参考 CloudFlare-AI-Insight-Daily 的资讯编排，将一周内 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献整理为总览、交叉重点、专题速览与期刊分布。

交错磁性(altermagnetism)成为本周最突出主题，涵盖从宏观输运（反常热霍尔、非线性霍尔）到原子尺度表征（STM自旋对比度成像）的多维度突破，理论工具（定向自旋空间群、FINDSPINGROUP平台）与材料实现（d波、i波、g波对称性）同步发展。铁电领域，HfO₂基薄膜的高温可靠性工程与二维极限下新机制（位错诱导、莫尔超晶格畴壁介导滑移）形成对比…

核心方向 本周总览 交叉研究 磁性/铁电 AI专题 期刊分布
🎯

本周核心方向（ML × ferro / 凝聚态）

8 篇

新材料线：有机流体铁电体通过GNN定向设计实现95%预测准确率，实验验证新分子合成；MagMatLLM框架发现多种未知磁性绝缘体，在稳定性-磁性-绝缘性竞争约束中定向生成。交错磁体材料取得双重突破：MnTe和CrSb中观测到反常声子热霍尔效应（无电学对应信号），CsV₂Se₂O中实现d波交替磁性原子尺度实空间可视化。新方法线：E(3)等变GNN成为量子材料对称性感知计算的核心架构；MatClaw首创代码优先LLM智能体，API调用准确率达99%，但在模拟时间尺度等隐性领域知识上暴露瓶颈。新现象线：铁电MoS₂莫尔超晶格揭示畴壁介导的超低势垒滑移机制，300 K速度~1 m/s，0.1%硫空位即可触发滑移-钉扎转变；Ge/SiGe量子阱经贝叶斯优化将自旋-轨道耦合提升三个数量级。

  1. 01
    机器学习揭示铁电莫尔超晶格中畴壁介导的超低势垒滑移与钉扎
    Domain-Wall-Mediated Ultralow-Barrier Sliding and Pinning in Ferroelectric Moiré Superlattices Revealed by Machine Learning
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：本文利用机器学习分子动力学揭示铁电MoS₂莫尔超晶格中的自发热驱动层间滑移，300 K时相对速度达~1 m/s。该运动表现为莫尔图案的整体漂移而非双层刚性平移，与meV/原子量级的刚性滑移势垒不一致。允许约束弛豫时，滑移沿几乎无能垒路径进行，直接复现莫尔图案的整体漂移。硫空位触发滑移-钉扎转变，约0.1% S空位即可将长程滑移转化为局域振荡。这些现象普遍存在于扭角诱导的多畴结构中，揭示滑移过程由畴壁介导。

    📐 方法要点：机器学习分子动力学揭示莫尔超晶格层间滑移机制，采用约束弛豫路径分析。

    🔗 相关工作关联：挑战传统刚性滑移模型，建立畴壁介导的低能垒滑移图像。

    💡 对你方向的启示：为理解扭角二维铁电中热涨落驱动的动态极化行为提供微观机制。

    阅读原文 ↗
  2. 02
    量子材料中的机器学习与深度学习：对称性、拓扑与交错磁体的兴起
    Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Quantum Materials: Symmetry, Topology, and the Rise of Altermagnets
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该综述分析了机器学习和深度学习如何克服传统第一性原理方法(如DFT)的三次标度瓶颈，加速量子材料奇异相的发现。重点讨论了从刚性描述符模型向灵活的对称性感知架构(特别是E(3)等变图神经网络)的转变，以及利用对称性指标和初等能带表示自动识别拓扑相的策略。最后以交错磁体(altermagnet)作为案例，展示这一超越铁磁和反铁磁的第三类磁性态的研究进展。

    📐 方法要点：系统综述E(3)等变GNN与对称性指标自动识别拓扑相的策略框架。

    🔗 相关工作关联：以交错磁体为案例，连接ML方法突破与新兴量子磁相发现。

    💡 对你方向的启示：为超越DFT标度瓶颈、加速奇异量子相的高通量筛选提供方法论路线图。

    阅读原文 ↗
  3. 03
    深度学习指导的流体铁电材料合成
    Deep learning directed synthesis of fluid ferroelectric materials
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该工作开发并实验验证了一种深度学习数据到分子的管道，实现有机流体铁电体的定向设计与合成。整理所有已知纵向极性液晶材料数据集，训练图神经网络以高达95%的准确率预测铁电行为，转变温度均方根误差低至11 K。利用图变分自编码器生成从头分子结构，经高性能分类器和回归器集成过滤，筛选出预测具有铁电向列相行为和可及转变温度的候选分子，并结合计算逆合成引擎与数字化化学库存进一步缩小范围，最终实验验证了新流体铁电体的成功合成。

    📐 方法要点：GNN分类器(95%准确率)与图变分自编码器联用的数据到分子管道。

    🔗 相关工作关联：整合逆合成引擎与数字化化学库存，闭环实验验证流体铁电体。

    💡 对你方向的启示：证明深度学习可定向突破有机铁电液晶的设计合成瓶颈。

    阅读原文 ↗
  4. 04
    竞争物理约束下磁性绝缘体的生成式发现
    Generative Discovery of Magnetic Insulators under Competing Physical Constraints
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该工作提出MagMatLLM约束引导生成式发现框架，整合语言模型晶体生成、进化选择、替代筛选和第一性原理验证，在生成和选择阶段强制执行功能约束（稳定性、磁性、绝缘性），定向搜索竞争物理要求定义的稀疏材料空间，识别出多种此前未知的磁性绝缘体候选材料。

    📐 方法要点：MagMatLLM约束引导生成框架，融合语言模型晶体生成与进化选择。

    🔗 相关工作关联：在生成阶段即嵌入稳定性-磁性-绝缘性多目标约束，替代事后筛选。

    💡 对你方向的启示：为竞争物理属性耦合的稀疏材料空间定向探索提供新范式。

    阅读原文 ↗
  5. 05
    交错磁体中反常热霍尔效应的观测
    Observation of anomalous thermal Hall effect in altermagnets
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该工作将研究范式从电荷载流子转向热载流子，对两种代表性交错磁体候选材料MnTe和CrSb进行系统的热霍尔效应研究。两种材料中均观测到显著的反常声子热霍尔信号，而无相应的电学对应信号，归因于该独特磁结构与声子的耦合。该发现确立反常声子热霍尔效应为交错磁体的本征特征，为识别这类新型量子磁体提供灵敏探针，并将Néel矢量与晶格振动直接关联，为低损耗声子器件和热可读存储器开辟前景。

    📐 方法要点：热霍尔输运测量，聚焦声子热载流子而非电荷载流子响应。

    🔗 相关工作关联：在MnTe和CrSb中确立反常声子热霍尔为交错磁体本征特征。

    💡 对你方向的启示：为Néel矢量探测提供无焦耳热的纯热学读出方案。

    阅读原文 ↗
  6. 06
    d波交替磁性的原子尺度实空间可视化
    Atomic-scale visualization of d-wave altermagnetism
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：交替磁性作为区别于传统铁磁和反铁磁的新磁相，具有零净磁化但破缺时间反演对称性的特征。本工作利用扫描隧道显微镜，在CsV₂Se₂O中提供了交替磁性的原子尺度实空间证据：通过本征自旋缺陷探针，直接观测到单向电子图案和椭圆充电环等标志性对称性破缺特征，且相邻自旋缺陷线呈现相反自旋和长程反铁磁耦合，为从动量空间探测迈向实空间可视化开辟了新途径。

    📐 方法要点：扫描隧道显微镜结合本征自旋缺陷探针的实空间成像技术。

    🔗 相关工作关联：首次在CsV₂Se₂O中捕获d波交替磁性的原子尺度对称性破缺图案。

    💡 对你方向的启示：建立从动量空间间接推断到实空间直接可视化的交错磁性表征新途径。

    阅读原文 ↗
  7. 07
    MatClaw：面向端到端材料探索的自主代码优先大语言模型智能体
    MatClaw: An Autonomous Code-First LLM Agent for End-to-End Materials Exploration
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：现有计算材料学大语言模型智能体受限于特定模拟代码的流水线架构和随任务范围增长的手写工具函数。本文提出MatClaw，一种代码优先智能体，直接编写并执行Python代码，可组合任意已安装领域库以在远程HPC集群上编排多代码工作流，无需预定义工具函数。为维持多日工作流的连贯执行，MatClaw采用四层记忆架构防止渐进式上下文丢失，并通过领域源代码的检索增强生成将每步API调用准确率提升至约99%。在铁电材料CuInP2S6的三个端到端演示（主动学习训练机器学习力场、居里温度预测、启发式参数空间搜索）中，该智能体在代码生成方面表现可靠，但在隐性领域知识（如适当的模拟时间尺度、平衡化协议和采样策略）方面存在困难。

    📐 方法要点：代码优先LLM智能体，四层记忆架构维持多日工作流连贯执行。

    🔗 相关工作关联：在CuInP2S6的ML力场训练、居里温度预测中验证端到端自动化。

    💡 对你方向的启示：暴露隐性领域知识编码难题，提示人机协作仍为必要补充。

    阅读原文 ↗
  8. 08
    机器学习定制锗异质结用于量子器件
    Tailoring Germanium Heterostructures for Quantum Devices with Machine Learning
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：针对现有压应变Ge/SiGe量子阱因重空穴特性导致自旋-轨道耦合(SOI)过弱的问题，提出通过局域应变硅尖峰增强非应变Ge沟道SOI的异质结改进方案。利用多目标贝叶斯优化优化尖峰分布，在确保与现有外延工艺兼容及生长参数波动鲁棒性的前提下，将SOI提升达三个数量级，为高速自旋量子比特操控提供新途径。

    📐 方法要点：多目标贝叶斯优化硅尖峰分布，平衡SOI增强与工艺兼容性。

    🔗 相关工作关联：解决压应变Ge量子阱重空穴导致的自旋-轨道耦合过弱问题。

    💡 对你方向的启示：为高速自旋量子比特的异质结工程优化提供可扩展设计协议。

    阅读原文 ↗
01

本周总览#

先把握一周的主线，再进入交叉重点与专题全文速览。

整体概览

本周177篇铁电/磁性文献呈现交错磁性(altermagnetism)研究爆发态势，涵盖输运、光学、热学及拓扑响应的多维度表征；铁电领域聚焦HfO₂基薄膜可靠性工程与二维铁电性新机制；AI/ML方面，大语言模型智能体(MatClaw、MatterChat)与十亿参数原子间势(MatRIS-MoE)成为方法学亮点，生成式材料发现框架(DielecMIND、MagMatLLM)实现定向功能材料搜索。

趋势观察

交错磁性(altermagnetism)成为本周最突出主题，涵盖从宏观输运（反常热霍尔、非线性霍尔）到原子尺度表征（STM自旋对比度成像）的多维度突破，理论工具（定向自旋空间群、FINDSPINGROUP平台）与材料实现（d波、i波、g波对称性）同步发展。铁电领域，HfO₂基薄膜的高温可靠性工程与二维极限下新机制（位错诱导、莫尔超晶格畴壁介导滑移）形成对比。AI/ML方法学呈现两极分化：一端是大语言模型智能体向端到端材料探索延伸（MatClaw、MatterChat），另一端是十亿参数级原子间势突破计算效率瓶颈（MatRIS-MoE），生成式框架正从被动筛选转向主动假设-验证闭环。

后续展望

交错磁性的实验表征工具箱（磁光、热输运、STM）日趋完善，下一步需实现室温功能性器件演示；铁电-磁性交叉的莫尔超晶格与滑移铁电体系有望成为新型多铁性平台。AI4S需解决LLM智能体的隐性领域知识瓶颈与大规模原子间势的泛化验证问题，物理约束与生成模型的深度融合将决定材料发现的实际转化率。

02

交叉研究#

优先覆盖 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料的直接交叉工作。

01

通过物理验证的生成式推理扩展极端高k介电材料空间#

Expanding the extreme-k dielectric materials space through physics-validated generative reasoning
📚 arXiv👤 Hossain Hridoy, Tahiya Chowdhury, Md Shafayat Hossain📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破传统数据库筛选范式，首创"生成式推理+物理验证"闭环架构：大语言模型负责提出介电材料假设，第一性原理计算即时验证，实现AI假设空间与物理约束的深度融合。从14种已知高k材料扩展至19种，为集
该工作提出DielecMIND人工智能框架，将材料发现重构为推理驱动探索而非数据库筛选问题。首次结合大语言模型假设生成与物理验证的第一性原理计算，在已知仅14种κ>150材料的基础上，发现并验证5种新化合物，显著扩展这一稀有材料类别。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出DielecMIND人工智能框架，将材料发现重构为推理驱动探索而非数据库筛选问题。首次结合大语言模型假设生成与物理验证的第一性原理计算，在已知仅14种κ>150材料的基础上，发现并验证5种新化合物，显著扩展这一稀有材料类别。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21068v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The most technologically consequential materials are often the rarest: they occupy narrow regions of chemical space, obey competing physical constraints, and appear only sparsely in existing databases. High-kappa dielectrics, high-Tc superconductors, and ferromagnetic insulators are to name a few. This scarcity fundamentally limits today's data-driven materials discovery, where machine-learning models excel at interpolation but struggle to generate genuinely new candidates. Here, we introduce DielecMIND, an artificial intelligence framework that reframes materials discovery as a reasoning-driven exploration instead of a database-screening problem. Using high-kappa dielectrics as a data-scarce and technologically stringent test case, DielecMIND combines large-language-model hypothesis generation for the first time with physics validated first-principles calculation to navigate chemical space beyond known compounds. Prior to our work, only 14 experimentally or computationally validated materials with kappa > 150 were known. Our framework discovers and validates 5 new such compounds, expanding this rare-materials class by a remarkable = 35% in a single study. Among them, we find that Ba2TiHfO6 exhibits a dielectric constant of 637, minimal loss at low optical frequencies, and stability up to 800 K. Beyond dielectrics, this work demonstrates a new paradigm for artificial-intelligence-guided discovery: one that generates a small number of physically grounded, experimentally plausible candidates yet measurably expands sparsely populated functional materials spaces. Thus, DielecMIND points toward a general strategy for discovering rare, high-impact functional materials where data scarcity has long constrained progress.

02

竞争物理约束下磁性绝缘体的生成式发现#

Generative Discovery of Magnetic Insulators under Competing Physical Constraints
📚 arXiv👤 Qiulin Zeng, Tahiya Chowdhury, Md Shafayat Hossain📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将大语言模型与多目标物理约束耦合，通过"生成-进化-筛选-验证"闭环实现磁性、绝缘性、稳定性等竞争条件的协同优化，突破了传统单目标搜索局限，为功能材料定向设计提供了可扩展的AI范式，对自
该工作提出MagMatLLM约束引导生成式发现框架，整合语言模型晶体生成、进化选择、替代筛选和第一性原理验证，在生成和选择阶段强制执行功能约束（稳定性、磁性、绝缘性），定向搜索竞争物理要求定义的稀疏材料空间，识别出多种此前未知的磁性绝缘体候选材料。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出MagMatLLM约束引导生成式发现框架，整合语言模型晶体生成、进化选择、替代筛选和第一性原理验证，在生成和选择阶段强制执行功能约束（稳定性、磁性、绝缘性），定向搜索竞争物理要求定义的稀疏材料空间，识别出多种此前未知的磁性绝缘体候选材料。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21073v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Discovering materials that must simultaneously satisfy multiple competing constraints remains a central challenge in computational materials design, particularly in data-scarce regimes where conventional data-driven approaches are least effective. Magnetic insulators represent a stringent example: the electronic conditions that favor magnetic order often also promote metallicity, while insulating behavior suppresses the interactions that stabilize magnetism. As a result, experimentally viable magnetic insulators are rare and difficult to identify through conventional screening. Here, we introduce MagMatLLM, a constraint-guided generative discovery framework that integrates language-model-based crystal generation with evolutionary selection, surrogate screening, and first-principles validation to target simultaneous stability, magnetism, and insulating behavior. Unlike stability-first approaches, the framework enforces functional constraints during generation and selection, steering the search toward sparsely populated regions of materials space defined by competing physical requirements. Using this workflow, we identify twelve previously unreported candidate magnetic insulators, including Tm₄Co₂Cr₂O₁₂ and Cr₄Nb₂O₁₂. Of these, ten are dynamically stable by phonon analysis and exhibit finite band gaps and nonzero magnetic moments in spin-polarized density functional theory calculations. Beyond the specific compounds identified here, this work establishes a general constraint-guided paradigm for multi-objective materials discovery in sparse chemical spaces and provides a transferable strategy for the design of quantum materials under competing physical constraints.

03

通过优化算法增强p-n二极管中自旋中心的相干性#

Enhancing Coherence of Spin Centers in p-n Diodes via Optimization Algorithms
📚 arXiv👤 Jonatan A. Posligua, David E. Stewart, Denis R. Candido📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出缩放梯度下降算法，耦合泊松方程数值解与电荷噪声模型，系统优化SiC p-i-n二极管中双空位缺陷的光谱线宽。该工作突破了传统试错法局限，为固态量子比特器件的多参数协同工程提供了可扩展的优化框架
研究开发了缩放梯度下降优化算法，以最小化p-n二极管中自旋中心的光学线宽。算法结合二极管泊松方程的数值解与非耗尽区电荷噪声计算，针对SiC p-i-n二极管中的双空位缺陷，在单参数与多参数情形下（反向偏压、掺杂密度与分布、二极管总长度）进行优化，并施加实际物理约束。该工作为固态自旋缺陷量子比特的器件工程提供了系统优化方案。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究开发了缩放梯度下降优化算法，以最小化p-n二极管中自旋中心的光学线宽。算法结合二极管泊松方程的数值解与非耗尽区电荷噪声计算，针对SiC p-i-n二极管中的双空位缺陷，在单参数与多参数情形下（反向偏压、掺杂密度与分布、二极管总长度）进行优化，并施加实际物理约束。该工作为固态自旋缺陷量子比特的器件工程提供了系统优化方案。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21874v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Solid-state spin defects hold great promise as building blocks for various quantum technologies. Embedding spin centers in p-n diodes under reverse bias has proved to be a powerful strategy to narrow the optical linewidth and increase spin coherence, while also enabling control of the photoluminescence wavelength via Stark shift. Given the multitude of parameters influencing spin centers in diodes (e.g., doping densities and profiles, temperature, bias voltage, spin center position), a question that has not yet been answered is: which set of these design parameters maximizes spin center coherence? In this work, we address this question by developing a scaled gradient descent optimization algorithm that minimizes the optical linewidth of spin centers by combining the numerical solution of a diode's Poisson equation with calculated charge noise from the non-depleted regions. Our optimization is performed for both single- and multiple-parameter cases for divacancies in SiC p-i-n diodes, including reverse-bias voltage, doping density and profile, and diode total length. Importantly, the optimization is subject to realistic physical constraints, such as small operating bias voltages, avoidance of the dielectric breakdown regime and physical thresholds for doping density. Additionally, due to the leakage current at reverse bias voltages, we develop a new formalism to investigate its influence on coherence. We show that the corresponding noise can be mitigated by implanting spin defects away from the diode's surfaces. Our work provides guidance on experimentally relevant diodes for hosting spin centers with the narrowest optical linewidths and longest coherence times.

04

机器学习揭示铁电莫尔超晶格中畴壁介导的超低势垒滑移与钉扎#

Domain-Wall-Mediated Ultralow-Barrier Sliding and Pinning in Ferroelectric Moiré Superlattices Revealed by Machine Learning
📚 arXiv👤 Jia-Wen Li, Sheng Meng, Xinghua Shi, Jin Zhang, Wei-Hai Fang📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破传统刚性滑移模型，揭示铁电莫尔超晶格中层间滑移由畴壁介导、沿几乎无能垒路径进行，并发现极低浓度硫空位即可实现滑移-钉扎转变。为设计低功耗、可重构的莫尔电子器件提供了原子级理论指导与缺陷工程策
本文利用机器学习分子动力学揭示铁电MoS₂莫尔超晶格中的自发热驱动层间滑移，300 K时相对速度达~1 m/s。该运动表现为莫尔图案的整体漂移而非双层刚性平移，与meV/原子量级的刚性滑移势垒不一致。允许约束弛豫时，滑移沿几乎无能垒路径进行，直接复现莫尔图案的整体漂移。硫空位触发滑移-钉扎转变，约0.1% S空位即可将长程滑移转化为局域振荡。这些现象普遍存在于扭角诱导的多畴结构中，揭示滑移过程由畴壁介导。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文利用机器学习分子动力学揭示铁电MoS₂莫尔超晶格中的自发热驱动层间滑移，300 K时相对速度达~1 m/s。该运动表现为莫尔图案的整体漂移而非双层刚性平移，与meV/原子量级的刚性滑移势垒不一致。允许约束弛豫时，滑移沿几乎无能垒路径进行，直接复现莫尔图案的整体漂移。硫空位触发滑移-钉扎转变，约0.1% S空位即可将长程滑移转化为局域振荡。这些现象普遍存在于扭角诱导的多畴结构中，揭示滑移过程由畴壁介导。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20277v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Sliding ferroelectrics built from stacked nonpolar monolayers enable out-of-plane polarization and unconventional switching via interlayer sliding, yet the microscopic sliding dynamics remain unclear. Using machine-learning molecular dynamics, we reveal spontaneous thermally driven interlayer sliding in ferroelectric MoS2 moiré superlattices, with relative velocities on the order of 1 m/s at 300 K. Instead of rigid translation of the entire bilayer, the motion appears as a global drift of the moiré pattern. Such thermally driven sliding is inconsistent with the meV/atom-scale rigid-sliding barrier. In contrast, when constrained relaxation is allowed, the sliding proceeds along an almost barrierless pathway that directly reproduces the global drift of the moiré pattern. Furthermore, sulfur vacancies trigger a sliding-to-pinning transition, with about 0.1% S vacancies already sufficient to convert the long-range sliding into localized oscillations. Notably, these phenomena are not restricted to small twist angles, but arise generically in twisting-induced multidomain structures. These results reveal that the sliding process is governed by a domain-wall-mediated collective reconstruction pathway with an ultralow barrier, rather than rigid layer translation, deepening the understanding of microscopic dynamics in moiré superlattices and sliding ferroelectrics.

05

深度生成模型中哈密顿量的自主涌现#

Autonomous Emergence of Hamiltonian in Deep Generative Models
📚 arXiv👤 Wenjie Xi, Wei-Qiang Chen📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作核心创新在于建立生成模型与统计物理的严格数学桥梁：通过黎曼扩散分数场的零噪声极限等价于热力学恢复力，将神经网络训练转化为哈密顿量参数反演问题。其意义在于首次证明深度生成模型能自主涌现底层物理定律
该工作引入严格代数框架提取生成模型隐式学习的物理相互作用，建立黎曼扩散分数场零噪声极限与热力学恢复力之间的精确等价，将训练神经网络直接用作力估计器。应用于仅由热平衡快照训练的序列依赖受挫一维O(3)自旋玻璃，过定线性反演成功恢复微观哈密顿量参数，推断参数与真实相互作用参数余弦相似度达99.7%，表明深度生成模型能够自主推断底层物理定律而非仅记忆数据分布。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作引入严格代数框架提取生成模型隐式学习的物理相互作用，建立黎曼扩散分数场零噪声极限与热力学恢复力之间的精确等价，将训练神经网络直接用作力估计器。应用于仅由热平衡快照训练的序列依赖受挫一维O(3)自旋玻璃，过定线性反演成功恢复微观哈密顿量参数，推断参数与真实相互作用参数余弦相似度达99.7%，表明深度生成模型能够自主推断底层物理定律而非仅记忆数据分布。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20821v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The unprecedented predictive success of deep generative models in complex many-body systems, such as AlphaFold3, raises an epistemological question: do these networks merely memorize data distributions via high-dimensional interpolation, or do they autonomously deduce the underlying physical laws? To address this, we introduce a rigorous algebraic framework to extract the implicit physical interactions learned by generative models. By establishing an exact equivalence between the zero-noise limit of a Riemannian diffusion score field and the thermodynamic restoring force, we utilize the trained neural network as a direct force estimator. Applying this framework to a sequence-dependent, frustrated 1D O(3) spin glass, we probe the latent representations of an O(3)-equivariant attention architecture trained solely on thermal equilibrium snapshots. Without incorporating any energetic priors, an overdetermined linear inversion successfully recovers the microscopic Hamiltonian parameters of the spin system. The inferred Hamiltonian parameters exhibit a 99.7% cosine similarity with the ground-truth interaction parameters. Furthermore, these sparse local parameters alone are sufficient to explain 87% of the variance in the continuous force field predicted by the network. Our results provide quantitative, falsifiable evidence that deep generative architectures do not merely perform statistical pattern matching, but autonomously discover and internalize the underlying physical rules.

06

基于Prometheus框架无监督发现阻挫J₁-J₂海森堡模型中的中间相序#

Unsupervised Discovery of Intermediate Phase Order in the Frustrated J₁₋J₂ Heisenberg Model via Prometheus Framework
📚 arXiv👤 Brandon Yee, Wilson Collins, Maximilian Rutkowski📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将无监督变分自编码器拓展至阻挫量子磁体，通过RDM降维技术突破有限尺寸瓶颈，首次实现机器学习对J₁-J₂模型中间相序参量的无偏识别，为强关联系统中隐蔽量子相的自动化发现提供了可扩展范式。
该研究将Prometheus变分自编码器框架应用于自旋-1/2 J₁-J₂方格海森堡模型，系统探索其Néel反铁磁与条纹有序之间的争议性中间相。对L=4采用精确对角化与全波函数量子感知VAE分析，对L=6,8引入基于约化密度矩阵（RDM）的DMRG基态方法突破全希尔伯特空间指数障碍。密集参数扫描与隐空间分析识别出S(π,π)和S(π,0)为VAE发现的主导序参量，RDM-VAE成功捕捉J₂/J₁≈0.5附近的Néel-条纹 cross…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究将Prometheus变分自编码器框架应用于自旋-1/2 J₁-J₂方格海森堡模型，系统探索其Néel反铁磁与条纹有序之间的争议性中间相。对L=4采用精确对角化与全波函数量子感知VAE分析，对L=6,8引入基于约化密度矩阵（RDM）的DMRG基态方法突破全希尔伯特空间指数障碍。密集参数扫描与隐空间分析识别出S(π,π)和S(π,0)为VAE发现的主导序参量，RDM-VAE成功捕捉J₂/J₁≈0.5附近的Néel-条纹 crossover。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.21468v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The spin-1/2 J₁₋J₂ Heisenberg model on the square lattice exhibits a debated intermediate phase between Néel antiferromagnetic and stripe ordered regimes, with competing theories proposing plaquette valence bond, nematic, and quantum spin liquid ground states. We apply the Prometheus variational autoencoder framework -- previously applied to classical (2D, 3D Ising) and quantum (disordered transverse field Ising) phase transitions -- to systematically explore the J₁₋J₂ phase diagram using a multi-scale approach. For L=4, we employ exact diagonalization with full wavefunction analysis via quantum-aware VAE. For larger systems (L=6, 8), we introduce a reduced density matrix (RDM) based methodology using DMRG ground states, enabling scaling beyond the exponential barrier of full Hilbert space representation. Through dense parameter scans of J₂/J₁ in [0, 1] and comprehensive latent space analysis, we identify the structure factor S(π,π) and S(π,0) as the dominant order parameters discovered by the VAE, with correlations exceeding |r| > 0.97. The RDM-VAE approach successfully captures the Néel-to-stripe crossover near J₂/J₁ approx 0.5--0.6, demonstrating that local quantum correlations encoded in reduced density matrices contain sufficient information for unsupervised phase discovery. This work establishes a scalable pathway for applying machine learning to frustrated quantum systems where full wavefunction access is computationally prohibitive.

07

08

量子材料中的机器学习与深度学习：对称性、拓扑与交错磁体的兴起#

Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Quantum Materials: Symmetry, Topology, and the Rise of Altermagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Mahyar Hassani-Vasmejani, Hosein Alavi-Rad, Meysam Bagheri Tagani📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该综述的核心创新在于将物理对称性（特别是E(3)等变性）嵌入机器学习架构，突破传统DFT计算瓶颈，实现拓扑相的自动化识别。研究意义在于为交错磁体等新奇量子态的高效预测提供范式，推动数据驱动材料发现从"
该综述分析了机器学习和深度学习如何克服传统第一性原理方法(如DFT)的三次标度瓶颈，加速量子材料奇异相的发现。重点讨论了从刚性描述符模型向灵活的对称性感知架构(特别是E(3)等变图神经网络)的转变，以及利用对称性指标和初等能带表示自动识别拓扑相的策略。最后以交错磁体(altermagnet)作为案例，展示这一超越铁磁和反铁磁的第三类磁性态的研究进展。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该综述分析了机器学习和深度学习如何克服传统第一性原理方法(如DFT)的三次标度瓶颈，加速量子材料奇异相的发现。重点讨论了从刚性描述符模型向灵活的对称性感知架构(特别是E(3)等变图神经网络)的转变，以及利用对称性指标和初等能带表示自动识别拓扑相的策略。最后以交错磁体(altermagnet)作为案例，展示这一超越铁磁和反铁磁的第三类磁性态的研究进展。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15985v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The landscape of condensed matter physics is facing an unprecedented data surge driven by high-throughput ab initio workflows and rapidly expanding experimental datasets. Traditional first-principles methods such as Density Functional Theory (DFT), despite their foundational role, suffer from cubic scaling, creating a major bottleneck when exploring the vast chemical space of quantum materials. This review analyzes how Machine Learning (ML) and Deep Learning (DL) are overcoming these limitations and accelerating the discovery of exotic phases of matter. We examine the shift from rigid descriptor-based models to flexible, symmetry-aware architectures, particularly E(3)-equivariant Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) that respect rotational and translational invariance. A central focus is the automated identification of topological phases, where ML models exploit symmetry indicators and elementary band representations to diagnose non-trivial topology without costly band structure integrations. The discussion culminates in a case study of the Altermagnet, a recently identified third class of magnetism beyond the ferromagnetic, antiferromagnetic dichotomy. We highlight how specialized AI search engines, combining graph theory with crystallographic symmetry analysis, have uncovered d-wave, g-wave, and even i-wave altermagnets, expanding the known landscape of magnetic order. The review concludes by addressing the interpretability gap and advocates for symbolic regression and active-learning frameworks to connect black-box predictions with experimentally verifiable mechanisms.

09

深度学习指导的流体铁电材料合成#

Deep learning directed synthesis of fluid ferroelectric materials
📚 arXiv👤 Charles Parton-Barr, Stuart R. Berrow, Calum J. Gibb, Jordan Hobbs, Wanhe Jiang, Caitlin O'Brien, Will C. Ogle, Helen F. Gleeson, Richard J. Mandle📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作构建了首个面向流体铁电材料的深度学习设计闭环，将图神经网络预测、生成式分子设计与自动化合成规划深度融合，突破了传统液晶材料依赖试错合成的瓶颈，为功能软物质材料的按需创制提供了可推广的AI驱动范式
该工作开发并实验验证了一种深度学习数据到分子的管道，实现有机流体铁电体的定向设计与合成。整理所有已知纵向极性液晶材料数据集，训练图神经网络以高达95%的准确率预测铁电行为，转变温度均方根误差低至11 K。利用图变分自编码器生成从头分子结构，经高性能分类器和回归器集成过滤，筛选出预测具有铁电向列相行为和可及转变温度的候选分子，并结合计算逆合成引擎与数字化化学库存进一步缩小范围，最终实验验证了新流体铁电体的成功合成。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作开发并实验验证了一种深度学习数据到分子的管道，实现有机流体铁电体的定向设计与合成。整理所有已知纵向极性液晶材料数据集，训练图神经网络以高达95%的准确率预测铁电行为，转变温度均方根误差低至11 K。利用图变分自编码器生成从头分子结构，经高性能分类器和回归器集成过滤，筛选出预测具有铁电向列相行为和可及转变温度的候选分子，并结合计算逆合成引擎与数字化化学库存进一步缩小范围，最终实验验证了新流体铁电体的成功合成。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.16671v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Fluid ferroelectrics, a recently discovered class of liquid crystals that exhibit switchable, long-range polar order, offer opportunities in ultrafast electro-optic technologies, responsive soft matter, and next-generation energy materials. Yet their discovery has relied almost entirely on intuition and chance, limiting progress in the field. Here we develop and experimentally validate a deep-learning data-to-molecule pipeline that enables the targeted design and synthesis of new organic fluid ferroelectrics. We curate a comprehensive dataset of all known longitudinally polar liquid-crystal materials and train graph neural networks that predict ferroelectric behaviour with up to 95% accuracy and achieve root mean square errors as low as 11 K for transition temperatures. A graph variational autoencoder generates de novo molecular structures which are filtered using an ensemble of high-performing classifiers and regressors to identify candidates with predicted ferroelectric nematic behaviour and accessible transition temperatures. Integration with a computational retrosynthesis engine and a digitised chemical inventory further narrows the design space to a synthesis-ready longlist. 11 candidates were synthesised and characterized through established mixture-based extrapolation methods. From which extrapolated ferroelectric nematic transitions were compared against neural network predictions. The experimental verification of novel materials augments the original dataset with quality feedback data thus aiding future research. These results demonstrate a practical, closed-loop approach to discovering synthesizable fluid ferroelectrics, marking a step toward autonomous design of functional soft materials.

10

MatClaw：面向端到端材料探索的自主代码优先大语言模型智能体#

MatClaw: An Autonomous Code-First LLM Agent for End-to-End Materials Exploration
📚 arXiv👤 Chenmu Zhang, Boris I. Yakobson📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：MatClaw突破传统智能体对预定义工具函数的依赖，以代码优先架构直接调用任意领域库编排多代码工作流，配合四层记忆机制解决长程上下文丢失难题，将API调用准确率提升至99%。该框架为自主材料探索提供了
现有计算材料学大语言模型智能体受限于特定模拟代码的流水线架构和随任务范围增长的手写工具函数。本文提出MatClaw，一种代码优先智能体，直接编写并执行Python代码，可组合任意已安装领域库以在远程HPC集群上编排多代码工作流，无需预定义工具函数。为维持多日工作流的连贯执行，MatClaw采用四层记忆架构防止渐进式上下文丢失，并通过领域源代码的检索增强生成将每步API调用准确率提升至约99%。在铁电材料CuInP2S6的三个端到端演示…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

现有计算材料学大语言模型智能体受限于特定模拟代码的流水线架构和随任务范围增长的手写工具函数。本文提出MatClaw，一种代码优先智能体，直接编写并执行Python代码，可组合任意已安装领域库以在远程HPC集群上编排多代码工作流，无需预定义工具函数。为维持多日工作流的连贯执行，MatClaw采用四层记忆架构防止渐进式上下文丢失，并通过领域源代码的检索增强生成将每步API调用准确率提升至约99%。在铁电材料CuInP2S6的三个端到端演示（主动学习训练机器学习力场、居里温度预测、启发式参数空间搜索）中，该智能体在代码生成方面表现可靠，但在隐性领域知识（如适当的模拟时间尺度、平衡化协议和采样策略）方面存在困难。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.02688v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Existing LLM agents for computational materials science are constrained by pipeline-bounded architectures tied to specific simulation codes and by dependence on manually written tool functions that grow with task scope. We present MatClaw, a code-first agent that writes and executes Python directly, composing any installed domain library to orchestrate multi-code workflows on remote HPC clusters without predefined tool functions. To sustain coherent execution across multi-day workflows, MatClaw uses a four-layer memory architecture that prevents progressive context loss, and retrieval-augmented generation over domain source code that raises per-step API-call accuracy to sim99 %. Three end-to-end demonstrations on ferroelectric CuInP2S6 (machine-learning force field training via active learning, Curie temperature prediction, and heuristic parameter-space search) reveal that the agent handles code generation reliably but struggles with tacit domain knowledge. The missing knowledge, such as appropriate simulation timescales, equilibration protocols, and sampling strategies, is the kind that researchers accumulate through experience but rarely formalize. Two lightweight interventions, literature self-learning and expert-specified constraints, bridge these gaps, defining a guided autonomy model in which the researcher provides high-level domain knowledge while the agent handles workflow execution. Our results demonstrate that the gap between guided and fully autonomous computational materials research is narrower than ever before: LLMs already handle code generation and scientific interpretation reliably, and the rapid improvement in their capabilities will accelerate materials discovery beyond what manual workflows can achieve. All code and benchmarks are open-source.

03

磁性 / 铁电专题#

聚焦自旋、铁电、多铁与相关功能材料研究。

01

巨自发克尔效应揭示交错磁体MnTe宏观时间反演对称性破缺的缺陷起源#

Giant spontaneous Kerr effect reveals the defect origin of macroscopic time-reversal symmetry breaking in altermagnetic MnTe
📚 arXiv👤 Weitung Yang, Choongjae Won, Cory Cress, Marshall Zachary Franklin, Xiaochen Fang, Shelby Fields, Nicholas Combs, Shaofeng Han, Weihang Lu, I. I. Mazin, Steven P. Bennett, Sang-Wook Cheong, Jing Xia📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作颠覆性地证明，α-MnTe中巨大的自发克尔效应并非源于本征交错磁序，而是由体材料载流子自掺杂诱导的缺陷态所致。这一发现澄清了交错磁体宏观时间反演对称性破缺的物理起源，同时确立了基于缺陷工程的克尔
该工作在α-MnTe单晶中观测到高达±1500微弧度、在Néel温度307 K精确出现的巨自发克尔旋转（1550 nm通信波长），而化学计量比绝缘薄膜无信号。体材料-薄膜对比证实载流子自掺杂而非理想交错磁序是宏观磁光响应来源，确立通信波长克尔成像作为交错磁自旋电子学实用读出手段。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在α-MnTe单晶中观测到高达±1500微弧度、在Néel温度307 K精确出现的巨自发克尔旋转（1550 nm通信波长），而化学计量比绝缘薄膜无信号。体材料-薄膜对比证实载流子自掺杂而非理想交错磁序是宏观磁光响应来源，确立通信波长克尔成像作为交错磁自旋电子学实用读出手段。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21021v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnetism, a recently identified third class of collinear magnetism with spin-split bands and vanishing net magnetization, has emerged in hexagonal αMnTe{} and is regarded as a promising platform for ultrafast, stray-field-free spintronics and for optical readout of spin order at telecommunication wavelengths. Whether the macroscopic symmetry-breaking signatures reported in MnTe, a spontaneous Hall effect and a tiny ``gossamer'' remanent moment, reflect the ideal altermagnetic order or are activated by defects remains an open question. Here we report giant spontaneous Kerr rotations of up to ± 1500microrad in αMnTe{} single crystals at the telecommunication wavelength of 1550,nm, onsetting precisely at the Néel temperature TN = 307,K. In contrast, a stoichiometric insulating αMnTe{} thin film shows no detectable signal. The bulk--film contrast identifies carrier self-doping, rather than the ideal altermagnetic order, as the source of macroscopic magneto-optical response, establishing telecom-wavelength Kerr imaging as a practical readout for altermagnetic spintronics.

02

铁磁金属Fe₃GaTe₂中的室温三阶非线性反常霍尔效应#

Room-temperature third-order nonlinear anomalous Hall effect in ferromagnetic metal Fe3GaTe2
📚 arXiv👤 Zheng Dai, Shuai Zhang, Jiajun Li, Xiubing Li, Congcong Li, Fengyi Guo, Heng Zhang, Ziqi Wang, Minhao Zhang, Xuefeng Wang, Huaiqiang Wang, Fengqi Song📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：在铁磁金属Fe₃GaTe₂中首次实现室温可观测的三阶非线性反常霍尔效应，通过磁场滞回特性与标度分析揭示其源于贝里曲率四极矩，突破了传统非线性霍尔效应限于低温的瓶颈，为开发无外加磁场、低能耗的室温三阶非
贝里曲率作为量子几何的虚部，在凝聚态物理中起关键作用，其空间分布可通过偶极和多极矩表征并诱导非线性反常霍尔效应（NLAHE）。本工作在铁磁金属Fe₃GaTe₂中观测到三阶NLAHE，该效应随磁场变化呈现滞回行为，矫顽场与反常霍尔效应相同，且可观测至居里温度（~350 K）。标度分析表明三阶NLAHE可能归因于贝里曲率四极矩，为室温三阶非线性电子器件开发开辟可能。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

贝里曲率作为量子几何的虚部，在凝聚态物理中起关键作用，其空间分布可通过偶极和多极矩表征并诱导非线性反常霍尔效应（NLAHE）。本工作在铁磁金属Fe₃GaTe₂中观测到三阶NLAHE，该效应随磁场变化呈现滞回行为，矫顽场与反常霍尔效应相同，且可观测至居里温度（~350 K）。标度分析表明三阶NLAHE可能归因于贝里曲率四极矩，为室温三阶非线性电子器件开发开辟可能。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21285v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Berry curvature, as the imaginary component of quantum geometry, plays a crucial role in condensed matter physics. The spatial distribution of Berry curvature can be characterized by its dipole and multipole moments, which can induce the nonlinear anomalous Hall effect (NLAHE). To date, the NLAHE has been demonstrated in various materials, yet reports on room-temperature NLAHE are still limited. In this work, we report the observation of the third-order NLAHE in ferromagnetic metal Fe3GaTe2. The third-order NLAHE shows hysteretic behavior with the variation of magnetic field, where the coercive field is the same as that of the anomalous Hall effect, and the third-order NLAHE remains observable up to the Curie temperature (~350 K). The scaling analysis suggests that the third-order NLAHE may be attributed to the Berry curvature quadrupole. Our work not only provides an approach to study magnetic materials through nonlinear electric transports, but also opens up possibilities for the future development of room-temperature third-order nonlinear electronic devices.

03

磁性拓扑绝缘体Mn(Bi₁₋ₓSbₓ)₂Te₄中的高阶奇次非线性霍尔效应#

Higher odd-order nonlinear Hall effect in magnetic topological insulator Mn(Bi1-xSbx)2Te4
📚 arXiv👤 Xiubing Li, Zheng Dai, Shuai Zhang, Heng Zhang, Congcong Li, Boyuan Wei, Fengyi Guo, Chunfeng Li, Fucong Fei, Minhao Zhang, Xuefeng Wang, Huaiqiang Wang, Fengqi Song📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：在磁性拓扑绝缘体中首次系统观测到三阶、五阶、七阶等高阶奇次非线性霍尔效应，揭示其奈尔温度以下的本征几何起源，拓展了量子材料非线性输运的研究维度，为拓扑自旋电子学器件提供了新物理机制。
非线性霍尔效应作为霍尔效应家族的新成员与量子材料的几何性质密切相关，此前研究主要集中于二阶和三阶效应。本工作在磁性拓扑绝缘体Mn(Bi₁₋ₓSbₓ)₂Te₄薄片中观测到三阶、五阶、七阶等高阶奇次非线性霍尔效应，其电压呈现二重角依赖关系，仅存在于奈尔温度以下，在电荷中性点附近达到最大，且随阶数增加指数衰减。该效应在奇数层和偶数层样品中均被观测到且幅度相当，理论分析表明其可能源于贝里曲率多极矩。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

非线性霍尔效应作为霍尔效应家族的新成员与量子材料的几何性质密切相关，此前研究主要集中于二阶和三阶效应。本工作在磁性拓扑绝缘体Mn(Bi₁₋ₓSbₓ)₂Te₄薄片中观测到三阶、五阶、七阶等高阶奇次非线性霍尔效应，其电压呈现二重角依赖关系，仅存在于奈尔温度以下，在电荷中性点附近达到最大，且随阶数增加指数衰减。该效应在奇数层和偶数层样品中均被观测到且幅度相当，理论分析表明其可能源于贝里曲率多极矩。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21293v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The nonlinear Hall effect is a new member of the Hall effect family, which attracts intense research interests, and it is closely related to the quantum geometry of quantum materials. The previous studies primarily concentrate on the second-order and third-order nonlinear Hall effect. However, the experimental study of higher-order nonlinear Hall effect is scarce at present. In this work, we report the observations of the higher odd-order (third-, fifth-, seventh-order) nonlinear Hall effect in magnetic topological insulator Mn(Bi1-xSbx)2Te4 thin flakes. The higher odd-order nonlinear Hall voltage exhibits a twofold angular dependence and exists only below the Néel temperature. It reaches its maximum near the charge neutral point and decays exponentially as the order of the nonlinear Hall effect increases. Furthermore, such higher odd-order nonlinear Hall effect is observed in both odd- and even-layer samples with comparable magnitudes. Theoretical analysis indicates that the higher odd-order nonlinear Hall effect responses may arise from the Berry curvature multipoles. Our work paves the way for the study of the higher-order nonlinear transport phenomena.

04

利用在线平台FINDSPINGROUP识别定向自旋空间群及其相关物理性质#

Identifying Oriented Spin Space Groups and Related Physical Properties Using an Online Platform FINDSPINGROUP
📚 arXiv👤 Yutong Yu, Xiaobing Chen, Yanzhou Zhu, Yuhui Li, Renzheng Xiong, Jiayu Li, Yuntian Liu, Qihang Liu📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首创FINDSPINGROUP在线平台，将定向自旋空间群理论转化为实用计算工具，突破性地统一了非相对论与相对论磁对称描述，实现了磁相自动分类与拓扑响应张量的高效推导，为非常规磁体的材料设计与物性
结合反铁磁结构与类铁磁响应的非常规磁体对下一代自旋电子学至关重要，其涌现性质由交换驱动的磁几何与自旋-轨道耦合共同决定，分别用自旋空间群（SSG）和磁空间群（MSG）框架描述。本工作推出FINDSPINGROUP计算平台，实现新近发展的定向自旋空间群框架以统一SSG与MSG描述，自动追踪从非相对论到相对论极限的对称破缺路径，支持磁相分类及动量依赖自旋劈裂、反常霍尔效应等现象的对称约束张量推导，并通过自旋晶体标准化数据交换。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

结合反铁磁结构与类铁磁响应的非常规磁体对下一代自旋电子学至关重要，其涌现性质由交换驱动的磁几何与自旋-轨道耦合共同决定，分别用自旋空间群（SSG）和磁空间群（MSG）框架描述。本工作推出FINDSPINGROUP计算平台，实现新近发展的定向自旋空间群框架以统一SSG与MSG描述，自动追踪从非相对论到相对论极限的对称破缺路径，支持磁相分类及动量依赖自旋劈裂、反常霍尔效应等现象的对称约束张量推导，并通过自旋晶体标准化数据交换。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21397v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Unconventional magnets that combine antiferromagnetic structures with ferromagnetic-like responses are essential for the development of next-generation spintronics. Their emergent properties are fundamentally dictated by the interplay between exchange-driven magnetic geometry and spin-orbit coupling, which are described by spin space group (SSG) and magnetic space group (MSG) frameworks, respectively. However, the lack of direct correspondence between these frameworks, developed in different eras, hinders the systematic tracking of symmetry evolution of these intertwined physical contributions. In this work, we introduce FINDSPINGROUP, a computational architecture that implements the recently emerged, oriented spin space group framework to unify SSG and MSG descriptions. By automating the tracking of symmetry-breaking pathways from the non-relativistic to the relativistic limit, this online platform enables the classification of magnetic phases and the derivation of symmetry-constrained tensors for phenomena such as momentum-dependent spin splitting and the anomalous Hall effect. By standardizing data exchange through the spin crystallographic information file, this architecture establishes a computational infrastructure for the high-throughput discovery and design of unconventional magnets.

05

铁轴型SrMn₂Ni₆Te₃O₁₈单晶生长及其磁、磁电与光学性质#

Single-crystal growth and magnetic, magnetoelectric, and optical properties of ferroaxial-type SrMn₂Ni₆Te₃O₁₈
📚 arXiv👤 Ryoya Nakamura, Shinichiro Asai, Yusuke Nambu, Takatsugu Masuda, Kenta Kimura📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：首次实现铁轴型氧化物SrMn₂Ni₆Te₃O₁₈单晶生长，通过电场调控光学旋转成像直接观测单铁轴畴，揭示c轴共线双向量反铁磁结构及完整磁电张量响应，为设计新型磁电耦合量子材料提供实验基础。
成功生长铁轴型磁氧化物家族AB₂C₆Te₃O₁₈（A=Pb,Sr; B=Mn,Cd; C=Ni,Co）成员SrMn₂Ni₆Te₃O₁₈单晶，系统研究其结构、磁、磁电和光学性质。电场诱导光学旋转的空间分布成像显示单晶优先形成单铁轴畴；磁化与中子衍射测量表明Mn²⁺和Ni²⁺磁矩在T_N=83 K反铁磁有序，形成c轴共线双向量型反铁磁结构。检测到磁点群6/m'pr'ime允许的全部独立磁电张量分量，α₃₃分量呈现显著的温度依赖异常（含峰和…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

成功生长铁轴型磁氧化物家族AB₂C₆Te₃O₁₈（A=Pb,Sr; B=Mn,Cd; C=Ni,Co）成员SrMn₂Ni₆Te₃O₁₈单晶，系统研究其结构、磁、磁电和光学性质。电场诱导光学旋转的空间分布成像显示单晶优先形成单铁轴畴；磁化与中子衍射测量表明Mn²⁺和Ni²⁺磁矩在T_N=83 K反铁磁有序，形成c轴共线双向量型反铁磁结构。检测到磁点群6/m'pr'ime允许的全部独立磁电张量分量，α₃₃分量呈现显著的温度依赖异常（含峰和符号反转）。同构化合物PbMn₂Ni₆Te₃O₁₈也观察到类似特征，表明该结构框架中铁轴与磁特性对Sr-Pb替代具有鲁棒性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21460v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Single crystals of SrMn₂Ni₆Te₃O₁₈, a member of the ferroaxial-type magnetic oxide family AB₂C₆Te₃O₁₈ (A = Pb, Sr; B = Mn, Cd; C = Ni, Co), have been successfully grown, and their structural, magnetic, magnetoelectric, and optical properties have been systematically studied. Imaging of the spatial distribution of electric-field-induced optical rotation reveals that the single crystals preferentially form single ferroaxial (FA) domains. Magnetization and neutron diffraction measurements show that Mn²⁺ and Ni²⁺ magnetic moments order antiferromagnetically at Tₘ̊ N = 83 K, forming a c-axis collinear bidirector-type antiferromagnetic structure. All independent magnetoelectric tensor components allowed by the magnetic point group 6/mprⁱme have been detected, and the ḩi₃₃ component exhibits a pronounced temperature-dependent anomaly, including a peak and a sign reversal. Preferential formation of single FA domains and a similar ḩi₃₃ anomaly are also observed in the isostructural compound PbMn₂Ni₆Te₃O₁₈. These findings suggest that the ferroaxial and magnetic characteristics within this structural framework are robust against Sr-Pb replacement.

基于磁隧道结传感器的磁通集中器设计优化#

Design optimization of flux concentrators for magnetic tunnel junctions-based sensors
📚 arXiv👤 Thomas Brun, Javier Rial, Lucia Risoli, Johanna Fischer, Philippe Sabon, Guillaume Jannet, Matthieu Kretzschmar, Helene Bea, Claire Baraduc📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：针对磁通集中器增益与噪声的固有矛盾，本研究创新性地建立了有限元模拟与磁阻解析模型相结合的双轨设计方法，首次导出灵敏度解析表达式，为超高灵敏度磁隧道结磁强计的微型化集成提供了系统优化理论框架，可加速空间
微型化、超高灵敏度且易于集成的磁强计在空间探索和健康监测等领域需求迫切，需要高灵敏度低噪声的磁传感器。集成高增益坡莫合金磁通集中器（FC）可获得高灵敏度（>1000 %/mT），增加FC气隙中磁隧道结（MTJ）数量可降低磁1/f噪声，但这会以更宽气隙为代价降低磁增益和灵敏度。本工作探索设计优化方案以平衡高FC增益与低磁噪声，提出两种互补建模方法：基于有限元模拟研究气隙几何参数对FC增益的影响，并建立与所有模拟结果一致且基于磁阻的解析公…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

微型化、超高灵敏度且易于集成的磁强计在空间探索和健康监测等领域需求迫切，需要高灵敏度低噪声的磁传感器。集成高增益坡莫合金磁通集中器（FC）可获得高灵敏度（>1000 %/mT），增加FC气隙中磁隧道结（MTJ）数量可降低磁1/f噪声，但这会以更宽气隙为代价降低磁增益和灵敏度。本工作探索设计优化方案以平衡高FC增益与低磁噪声，提出两种互补建模方法：基于有限元模拟研究气隙几何参数对FC增益的影响，并建立与所有模拟结果一致且基于磁阻的解析公式，最终导出灵敏度的解析模型。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21500v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Miniaturized, ultra-sensitive and easily integrable magnetometers are needed for many applications, like space exploration or health monitoring. Achieving this goal requires a magnetic sensor with high sensitivity and low noise. High sensitivity (>1000 %/mT) can be obtained by integrating high gain permalloy flux concentrators (FC). And reducing the magnetic 1/f noise can be realized by increasing the number of magnetic tunnel junctions (MTJs) in the air-gap of the FC. However, this is obtained at the expense of a wider air-gap and consequently a decrease of the magnetic gain and thus of the sensitivity. In this paper, we explore a design optimization scheme in order to find the best trade-off between high FC gain and low magnetic noise. To model the gain of the flux concentrator, we propose two complementary approaches; one is based on finite elements simulations of the FC gain where the influence of geometrical parameters of the air-gap is investigated. Then, in a second step, we propose an analytical formula consistent with all our simulations results and based on magnetic reluctance. Finally, we derive an analytical model of the sensor detectivity from which we can extract the optimal sensor design which allows an improvement by three orders of magnitude of the performances compared to a single junction.

07

范德华异质结中的手性自旋纹理#

Chiral spin-textures in van der Waals heterostructures
📚 arXiv👤 Nihad Abuawwad, Samir Lounis📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该文系统梳理了范德华异质结中手性自旋纹理的多物理场调控机制，创新性地将界面DM相互作用与低维偶极效应相结合解释斯格明子稳定化，为突破室温拓扑磁存储器件的材料瓶颈提供了理论框架与实验路径。
综述了范德华异质结中手性自旋纹理（如斯格明子）的形成机制、实验进展与未来方向。重点讨论了交换相互作用、磁各向异性、Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用及偶极效应在稳定手性磁态中的作用，并概述了动力学性质、输运特征及相关理论研究，最后展望了实现室温稳定手性自旋器件的挑战与前景。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

综述了范德华异质结中手性自旋纹理（如斯格明子）的形成机制、实验进展与未来方向。重点讨论了交换相互作用、磁各向异性、Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用及偶极效应在稳定手性磁态中的作用，并概述了动力学性质、输运特征及相关理论研究，最后展望了实现室温稳定手性自旋器件的挑战与前景。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21539v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Chiral spin textures such as skyrmions have attracted considerable attention due to their nontrivial topology, chirality, stability at the nanoscale, and potential for low-power spintronic devices. The recent discovery of intrinsic magnetism in van der Waals (vdW) materials and the ability to engineer their heterostructures has opened a new platform to study and manipulate such textures. In these layered systems, atomically sharp interfaces, strong spin-orbit coupling, and tunable symmetry breaking provide unique opportunities to stabilize and control chiral magnetic states. This review summarizes the fundamental mechanisms underlying the formation of chiral spin textures in vdW heterostructures, including the roles of exchange interactions, magnetic anisotropy, Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction, and dipolar effects. We highlight key experimental advances in the observation and manipulation of chiral textures, discuss their dynamical properties and transport signatures, while overviewing selected theoretical investigations. Finally, we outline current challenges and future directions toward realizing robust, room-temperature chiral spin textures for practical spintronic technologies.

08

高压MnB₄中交替磁性自旋涨落诱导的超导电性#

Superconductivity induced by altermagnetic spin fluctuations in high-pressure MnB₄
📚 arXiv👤 Danylo Radevych, Mercè Roig, Daniel F. Agterberg, Igor I. Mazin📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文突破传统电声耦合框架，首次提出交替磁性自旋涨落作为超导配对新媒介，为理解高压MnB₄中14 K超导的机理提供全新视角。该机制若获实验证实，将开辟交替磁性材料超导研究的新方向，拓展非常规超导体的材料
针对高压下非磁性MnB₄出现T_c≈14 K超导电性而电声耦合计算预测T_c<1 K的矛盾，提出交替磁性自旋涨落驱动超导的新机制。DFT计算显示MnB₄接近交替磁性不稳定性，构建的双轨道紧束缚模型RPA分析表明扩展s波为领先配对不稳定性。若证实，这将是首例交替磁性自旋涨落诱导超导的报道。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对高压下非磁性MnB₄出现T_c≈14 K超导电性而电声耦合计算预测T_c<1 K的矛盾，提出交替磁性自旋涨落驱动超导的新机制。DFT计算显示MnB₄接近交替磁性不稳定性，构建的双轨道紧束缚模型RPA分析表明扩展s波为领先配对不稳定性。若证实，这将是首例交替磁性自旋涨落诱导超导的报道。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21561v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent experiments found superconductivity in nonmagnetic MnB₄ with a high critical temperature (Tc) reaching 14 K at 158 GPa. However, ab initio calculations of the electron-phonon coupling predict a Tc below 1 K, suggesting that a conventional mechanism cannot explain this phenomenon. In this Letter, we find that MnB₄ is close to an altermagnetic instability in density-functional theory calculations. We propose that the superconductivity is driven by altermagnetic spin fluctuations. To verify the pairing symmetry, we have constructed a two-orbital tight-binding model, where boron states at the Fermi level are integrated out. Using this model, we identify an extended-s symmetry as the leading pairing instability. If confirmed, this will be the first reported case of superconductivity driven by altermagnetic spin fluctuations.

09

三维高阶拓扑绝缘体中磁通可调磁畴壁电子输运#

Magnetic-flux tunable electronic transport through domain walls in a three-dimensional second-order topological insulator
📚 arXiv👤 Zhe Hou, Ai-Min Guo📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示三维二阶拓扑绝缘体纳米线磁畴壁处存在由自旋纹理保护的一维拓扑边界态环路，其电导呈现完美的AB振荡，为磁通可调拓扑量子器件及自旋电子学应用提供了新平台。
研究了三维二阶拓扑绝缘体纳米线中磁畴壁处拓扑铰链态的电子输运特性。由于面外磁化在畴壁处反号，形成连接反向传播铰链态的闭合一维拓扑边界态环路；施加沿纳米线方向的均匀磁场时，两端电导呈现完美正弦型Aharonov-Bohm振荡G=(e²/2h)[1-cos(πΦ/Φ₀)]。散射矩阵方法表明，Φ=Φ₀(0)处的建设性(破坏性)干涉源于传输过程中的π自旋旋转。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究了三维二阶拓扑绝缘体纳米线中磁畴壁处拓扑铰链态的电子输运特性。由于面外磁化在畴壁处反号，形成连接反向传播铰链态的闭合一维拓扑边界态环路；施加沿纳米线方向的均匀磁场时，两端电导呈现完美正弦型Aharonov-Bohm振荡G=(e²/2h)[1-cos(πΦ/Φ₀)]。散射矩阵方法表明，Φ=Φ₀(0)处的建设性(破坏性)干涉源于传输过程中的π自旋旋转。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21562v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The three-dimensional (3D) topological insulators (TIs), hosting topologically protected helical surface states, can be promoted into second-order TIs when a diagonal Zeeman term, typical of magnetic doping, is introduced. The latter hosts exotic chiral one-dimensional (1D) topological hinge states (THSs). In this paper, we investigate the electronic transport of THSs through a magnetic domain wall (DW) in a 3D TI nanowire. Due to the sign reversal of the out-of-plane magnetization across the DW, four 1D topological boundary states, residing on the edge of the DW, arise and form an enclosed loop mediating the counterpropagating THSs. By applying a uniform magnetic field parallel to the nanowire, we obtain a perfect sinusoidal Aharonov-Bohm oscillation in the two-terminal conductance G, formulated by G=frace²2h łeft[ 1- o̧s(π Φ/Φ₀₎ i̊ght], with Φ the magnetic flux through the DW and Φ₀ = h/2e the flux quantum. Applying a phenomenological scattering matrix approach, we explain this novel Aharonov-Bohm oscillation perfectly, and attribute the constructive (destructive) interference of transmission at Φ = Φ₀ (0) to the π-spin rotation of the THSs traveling through the DW. Extending our study to a double-DW junction, where the central region has antiparallel magnetization to the leads, we observe Fabry-Pérot oscillations, in which the conductance minima are tuned by the magnetic flux. Our findings open a new avenue for finely controlling the quantum transport of THSs in magnetic systems using magnetic flux, and provide a faithful way for detecting THSs in experiments.

10

有限温度稠密自旋系统的动力学平均场理论#

Dynamical mean-field theory for dense spin systems at finite temperature
📚 arXiv👤 Przemysław Bieniek, Timo Gräßer, Götz S. Uhrig📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：将spinDMFT从无限温度推广至有限温度，首次实现虚时关联函数与热力学量的统一计算。该框架为量子自旋液体、阻挫磁体等强关联自旋体系的有限温度相图与临界行为研究提供了非微扰工具，弥补了传统数值方法在热
将无限温度自旋动力学平均场理论(spinDMFT)拓展至有限温度情形，可计算虚时关联函数与热力学量。通过与有限尺寸系统结果对比，该方法在随机耦合系统中取得很好吻合，铁磁系统吻合良好，反铁磁系统存在显著偏差；方法中出现了铁磁有序现象。讨论了可能的拓展方向与应用前景。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

将无限温度自旋动力学平均场理论(spinDMFT)拓展至有限温度情形，可计算虚时关联函数与热力学量。通过与有限尺寸系统结果对比，该方法在随机耦合系统中取得很好吻合，铁磁系统吻合良好，反铁磁系统存在显著偏差；方法中出现了铁磁有序现象。讨论了可能的拓展方向与应用前景。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21563v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In recent years, a method for computing spin dynamics at infinite temperature (spinDMFT) was developed. It utilizes the ideas of dynamical mean-field theory for fermions: single-site approximation and a self-consistency condition to approximate time-dependent spin correlations. In this work, we develop a crucial extension of the method to systems at finite temperature, able to compute imaginary-time correlations and thermodynamical quantities. We benchmark the method by comparison to results in finite-size systems, obtaining very good agreement with correlations in a random-coupling system, good agreement for a ferromagnetic system and large discrepancies in the case of an antiferromagnet. We note the appearance of ferromagnetic order in the method. We discuss possible extensions and potential applications of the approach.

11

相变制备非体相六角Fe₂S₂单层#

Emergence of a non-bulk hexagonal Fe₂S₂ single layer via phase transformation
📚 arXiv👤 Affan Safeer, Wejdan Beida, Felix Oberbauer, Nicolae Atodiresei, Gustav Bihlmayer, Max Wolfertz, Chiara Schlichte, Wouter Jolie, Stefan Blügel, Jeison Fischer, Thomas Michely📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：首次在实验上实现四方至六角Fe₂S₂单层的可控热诱导相变，构建出新型β-CuI型屈曲结构；揭示强关联电子效应与磁有序对二维铁硫化合物稳定性的决定性作用，为设计具有奇异拓扑与磁性的二维材料提供了新范式。
报道了通过热诱导相变在石墨烯/Ir(111)上制备新型六角Fe₂S₂单层的方法。原位STM与LEED揭示了从四方到六角晶格的转变及伴随的形貌与电子结构变化；该β-CuI结构由两个垂直堆叠的FeS蜂窝晶格构成屈曲层。第一性原理计算确认其热力学稳定性，表明在位库仑相互作用与磁有序对新二维Fe-S化合物的稳定性至关重要。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

报道了通过热诱导相变在石墨烯/Ir(111)上制备新型六角Fe₂S₂单层的方法。原位STM与LEED揭示了从四方到六角晶格的转变及伴随的形貌与电子结构变化；该β-CuI结构由两个垂直堆叠的FeS蜂窝晶格构成屈曲层。第一性原理计算确认其热力学稳定性，表明在位库仑相互作用与磁有序对新二维Fe-S化合物的稳定性至关重要。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21613v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Two-dimensional materials can stabilize crystal structures that are absent from their bulk counterparts, offering opportunities for materials design. Here, we report the synthesis of a previously unknown hexagonal Fe₂S₂ single layer with β-CuI structure, a buckled layer of two vertically stacked FeS honeycomb lattices, realized by thermally induced transformation of single layer mackinawite grown on graphene/Ir(111). In situ scanning tunneling microscopy and low-energy electron diffraction reveal a transition from a tetragonal to a hexagonal lattice accompanied by distinct morphological and electronic signatures. The hexagonal Fe₂S₂ forms reproducibly upon annealing and represents a new structural motif within the Fe-S material family. First-principles calculations identify the β-CuI structure as most consistent with experiment. The calculations suggest that on-site Coulomb interactions and magnetic order are relevant to understanding the stability of the new 2D Fe-S compound. The preferred nucleation of single-layer mackinawite, despite being energetically disfavored, is speculated to result from its low edge energy, analogous to the 3D case. Our results establish Fe₂S₂ as a platform for exploring structural polymorphism in two dimensions and demonstrate that reduced dimensionality can stabilize crystal structures not accessible in bulk materials.

12

Mn掺杂对PrFeAs(O,F)超导电性的影响：磁性杂质的作用#

Effect of Mn Substitution on Superconductivity in PrFeAs(O,F): Role of Magnetic Impurities
📚 arXiv👤 Priya Singh, Konrad Kwatek, Tatiana Zajarniuk, Taras Palasyuk, Cezariusz Jastrzkebski, A. Szewczyk, Michał Wierzbicki, Shiv J. Singh📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次系统揭示Mn磁性杂质对Pr基铁基超导体的掺杂效应，发现稀土Pr的4f电子关联可显著增强超导对磁性杂质的耐受性，为理解铁基超导配对机制及设计高鲁棒性超导材料提供了关键实验依据。
系统研究了PrFe₁₋ₓMnₓAsO₀.₇F₀.₃(x=0-0.1)中Mn替代Fe位对超导电性的影响。XRD与拉曼证实Mn优先进入FeAs面，伴随晶格膨胀与Fe相关振动模式抑制；输运显示T_c从48 K系统降至x=0.1时完全抑制，低温电阻出现绝缘化上翘。磁性与磁输运测量表明Mn作为高效磁性杂质破坏超导相干，Pr基体系表现出相对增强的鲁棒性，体现了稀土电子关联在杂质效应中的作用。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

系统研究了PrFe₁₋ₓMnₓAsO₀.₇F₀.₃(x=0-0.1)中Mn替代Fe位对超导电性的影响。XRD与拉曼证实Mn优先进入FeAs面，伴随晶格膨胀与Fe相关振动模式抑制；输运显示T_c从48 K系统降至x=0.1时完全抑制，低温电阻出现绝缘化上翘。磁性与磁输运测量表明Mn作为高效磁性杂质破坏超导相干，Pr基体系表现出相对增强的鲁棒性，体现了稀土电子关联在杂质效应中的作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21684v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate Mn substitution at the Fe site in PrFe1-xMnxAsO0.7F0.3 (0 to 0.1) using structural, Raman, density functional theory (DFT), transport, and magnetic measurements. X-ray diffraction and Raman analyses confirm preferential Mn incorporation into the FeAs planes, accompanied by lattice expansion and suppression of Fe-related vibrational modes. Electrical transport reveals a systematic decrease of the superconducting transition temperature from 48 K (x = 0) to complete suppression at x = 0.1, together with low-temperature resistivity upturns evolving toward insulating-like behavior. Magnetization and magnetotransport measurements show degradation of superconducting coherence, critical current density, upper critical field, and vortex activation energy with increasing Mn content. The results demonstrate that Mn acts as an efficient magnetic impurity, strongly perturbing the electronic and magnetic environment of the FeAs layers. Comparative analysis indicates relatively enhanced robustness of superconductivity in the Pr-based system, highlighting the role of rare-earth-dependent electronic correlations in impurity effects.

13

三维二阶拓扑绝缘体磁畴壁中无序诱导的相位平均至模式混合转变#

Disorder-induced crossover from phase-averaging to mode-mixing regimes in magnetic domain walls of a second-order topological insulator
📚 arXiv👤 Dong Zhou, Zhe Hou📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示三维二阶拓扑绝缘体磁畴壁中无序驱动的相位平均至模式混合转变机制，发现半量子化电导平台及其特征双台阶涨落结构。为拓扑量子器件中无序效应的精准调控及鲁棒性边界态输运设计提供了新范式。
研究了三维二阶拓扑绝缘体磁畴壁在Anderson无序下的电子输运。清洁极限下畴壁 hosting 两个同向传播的一维拓扑边缘态，形成有效Aharonov-Bohm干涉仪；引入无序后AB振荡被抑制，出现0.5 e²/h的半量子化电导平台。平台内电导涨落呈现特征性双台阶结构：中等无序下~0.35 e²/h对应相位平均区(PAR)，强无序下~0.29 e²/h对应模式混合区(MMR)，分别由随机相位干涉与模式间混合机制主导。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究了三维二阶拓扑绝缘体磁畴壁在Anderson无序下的电子输运。清洁极限下畴壁 hosting 两个同向传播的一维拓扑边缘态，形成有效Aharonov-Bohm干涉仪；引入无序后AB振荡被抑制，出现0.5 e²/h的半量子化电导平台。平台内电导涨落呈现特征性双台阶结构：中等无序下~0.35 e²/h对应相位平均区(PAR)，强无序下~0.29 e²/h对应模式混合区(MMR)，分别由随机相位干涉与模式间混合机制主导。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21702v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate electronic transport across a magnetic domain wall (DW) in a three-dimensional (3D) second-order topological insulator subject to Anderson disorder. In the clean limit, the DW hosts two co-propagating one-dimensional (1D) topological edge states that act as the two arms of an effective Aharonov-Bohm (AB) interferometer, inducing a sinusoidal conductance oscillation. Upon the introduction of disorder, the AB oscillations are suppressed, while a half-quantized plateau of 0.5 e²/h for the ensemble-averaged conductance emerges. Notably, within this plateau, the conductance fluctuation exhibits a distinctive two-step plateau structure, with values of sim 0.35 e²/h at moderate disorder, followed by a second plateau at sim0.29 e²/h under strong disorder. By developing theoretical frameworks that account for the random-phase interference and inter-mode mixing of the two arms, we identify the first fluctuation plateau as a signature of the phase-averaging regime (PAR) and the second as a signature of the mode-mixing regime (MMR). Furthermore, we show that, in the PAR the conductance follows a U-shaped beta distribution, while it evolves into a uniform distribution in the MMR. The Fano factor associated with shot noise is also computed, which exhibits a similar two-step plateau structure at 1/4 and 1/3, corresponding to the PAR and MMR, respectively. Our work provides a clear demonstration of the disorder-induced crossover from PAR to MMR, and highlights the crucial role of second-order conductance cumulants in identifying these transport regimes. The results suggest disorder-engineering as a powerful route for controlling electronic transport across DW-based devices.

14

SiC(0001)上外延石墨烯中镍插层：二维异质结构工程新平台#

Nickel intercalation in epitaxial graphene on SiC(0001): a novel platform for engineering two-dimensional heterostructures
📚 arXiv👤 Ylea Vlamidis, Stiven Forti, Antonio Rossi, Arrigo Calzolari, Carmela Marinelli, Camilla Coletti, Stefan Heun, Stefano Veronesi📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作发展了胶体纳米颗粒沉积-热驱动插层新策略，突破传统金属插层对超高真空的依赖，为常压下可控制备石墨烯基二维磁性异质结构提供平台，兼具基础物性研究与自旋电子学器件应用前景。
采用胶体纳米颗粒沉积路线实现了SiC(0001)上外延石墨烯下方Ni的可控插层。室温浸渍沉积~10 nm Ni纳米颗粒后，650°C退火驱动插层，在石墨烯/缓冲层界面形成形貌受退火条件调控的有序Ni岛。STM与ARPES结合DFT揭示了插层原子与电子结构，DFT证实二维纳米结构的热力学稳定性，预测平均磁矩为0.9 μ_B/Ni。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

采用胶体纳米颗粒沉积路线实现了SiC(0001)上外延石墨烯下方Ni的可控插层。室温浸渍沉积~10 nm Ni纳米颗粒后，650°C退火驱动插层，在石墨烯/缓冲层界面形成形貌受退火条件调控的有序Ni岛。STM与ARPES结合DFT揭示了插层原子与电子结构，DFT证实二维纳米结构的热力学稳定性，预测平均磁矩为0.9 μ_B/Ni。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21739v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Two-dimensional (2D) magnetic materials integrated with graphene offer a compelling platform for next-generation spintronic devices, yet nickel in its 2D form remains largely unexplored, due to fundamental synthesis limitations. Here, we report the controlled intercalation of Ni beneath epitaxial graphene on the Si-face of SiC(0001), achieved through a scalable colloidal nanoparticle deposition route. Chemically synthesized Ni nanoparticles (~10 nm diameter) are uniformly deposited onto graphene via immersion in colloidal solution at room temperature; subsequent thermal annealing at 650 degC drives intercalation, yielding well-ordered Ni islands at the graphene/buffer-layer interface with morphology dictated by annealing conditions. Scanning tunneling microscopy (STM) and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES), supported by density functional theory (DFT) calculations, elucidate the atomic and electronic structure of the intercalated layers. DFT simulations further confirm the thermodynamic stability of the 2D nanostructures as a function of shape and lateral size, predicting a robust average magnetic moment of 0.9 μ_B per atom. The resulting Ni-intercalated graphene on SiC constitutes a well-defined 2D heterostructure combining preserved graphene band structure with robust interfacial magnetism, stable under ambient conditions. These findings establish a reproducible, scalable pathway to engineer magnetic graphene-based heterostructures and open new avenues for their integration into spintronic architectures.

15

d波交替磁体中应变消除费米口袋实现近完全电荷-自旋转换#

Nearly Complete Charge--Spin Conversion via Strain-Eliminated Fermi Pockets in a d-Wave Altermagnet
📚 arXiv👤 Wancheng Zhang, Zhenhua Zhang, Rui Xiong, Zhihong Lu📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地以应变工程消除交替磁体KV₂Se₂O中的寄生费米口袋，将电荷-自旋转换效率从受限提升至96%的极限水平，为无磁场、室温自旋电子器件提供了兼具高效率与可调控性的材料平台。
针对室温交替磁体KV₂Se₂O中残余椭圆费米口袋降低电荷-自旋转换效率(CSE)的问题，提出面内等双轴拉伸应变系统消除寄生口袋、恢复平带几何的方案。第一性原理计算显示CSE随应变单调递增，4%应变时达约96%的创纪录值；紧束缚模型证实次近邻跃迁减小是口袋抑制的核心机制。此外，倾斜电场下产生非常规面外自旋流，最优取向CSE近55%。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对室温交替磁体KV₂Se₂O中残余椭圆费米口袋降低电荷-自旋转换效率(CSE)的问题，提出面内等双轴拉伸应变系统消除寄生口袋、恢复平带几何的方案。第一性原理计算显示CSE随应变单调递增，4%应变时达约96%的创纪录值；紧束缚模型证实次近邻跃迁减小是口袋抑制的核心机制。此外，倾斜电场下产生非常规面外自旋流，最优取向CSE近55%。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21779v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The room-temperature altermagnet KV₂Se₂O possesses nearly orthogonal flat Fermi surfaces, which in an idealized d-wave limit enable complete spin-channel separation and a theoretical charge-to-spin conversion efficiency (CSE) of 100%. Realistic samples, however, host residual elliptical Fermi pockets that enhance charge conductivity while suppressing spin conductivity, drastically reducing the CSE. Here we show that in-plane equibiaxial tensile strain systematically eliminates these parasitic pockets, restoring the flat-band geometry. Our first-principles calculations reveal that the CSE increases monotonically with strain, reaching a record value of approximately 96% at 4% strain. An effective tight-binding model fitted to the computed band structure accurately captures the evolution of the Fermi surface and confirms that the suppression of the pockets -- governed by reduced next-nearest-neighbor hoppings -- is the dominant mechanism for the strain-enhanced CSE. We further identify an unconventional out-of-plane spin current that emerges under tilted electric fields and achieves a CSE of nearly 55% at optimal orientations, offering a promising pathway for field-free perpendicular magnetization switching. Our work establishes strain engineering as a practical route to approach the ultimate conversion limit in altermagnets and provides a design principle for high-efficiency spintronic devices.

16

光学非线性反常霍尔效应揭示反铁磁体中的隐藏自旋序#

Optical nonlinear anomalous Hall effect reveals the hidden spin order in antiferromagnets
📚 arXiv👤 A. Schmid, D. Siebenkotten, D. Dai, J. Godinho, T. Ostatnický, N. Zou, Y. Zhang, J. Železný, Z. Šobáň, F. Křížek, V. Novák, S. Fairman, A. Hoehl, A. Hertwig, T. Janda, M. A. Huber, R. Huber, B. Kästner, J. Wunderlich📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在PT对称反铁磁体CuMnAs中实验证实光学非线性反常霍尔效应，利用其时间反演奇特性与奈尔矢量锁定关系，以近场光学实现亚100纳米分辨的反铁磁畴成像。该效应为电学写入的光学读取提供了无磁杂散
该工作首次实验观测到理论上预言的、存在于具有联合宇称-时间反演（PT）对称性反铁磁体中的光学非线性反常霍尔效应。该效应源于光致带间电偶极跃迁中自旋-轨道耦合导致的±k态不对称性，产生时间反演奇的、随奈尔矢量180°翻转而变号的光电流。在PT对称的CuMnAs中，利用近场激发以亚100纳米空间分辨率绘制了电流诱导自旋-轨道力矩翻转后的光电流分布，实现了反铁磁畴结构的纳米尺度成像，并可直接读取180°反转的反铁磁态。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作首次实验观测到理论上预言的、存在于具有联合宇称-时间反演（PT）对称性反铁磁体中的光学非线性反常霍尔效应。该效应源于光致带间电偶极跃迁中自旋-轨道耦合导致的±k态不对称性，产生时间反演奇的、随奈尔矢量180°翻转而变号的光电流。在PT对称的CuMnAs中，利用近场激发以亚100纳米空间分辨率绘制了电流诱导自旋-轨道力矩翻转后的光电流分布，实现了反铁磁畴结构的纳米尺度成像，并可直接读取180°反转的反铁磁态。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21802v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reading antiferromagnetic order remains a central obstacle for antiferromagnetic memory and logic because zero net magnetisation precludes conventional magnetic readout. Domain imaging typically relies on x-ray magnetic linear dichroism (XMLD) microscopy at synchrotron sources, but XMLD is even under time reversal and cannot distinguish 180deg-reversed magnetic states. Here we report the first experimental observation of the optical nonlinear anomalous Hall effect, predicted for antiferromagnets with combined parity - time-reversal (PT) symmetry. The effect stems from light-induced interband electric-dipole transitions, where spin-orbit coupling induces an asymmetry between ± k states and generates a time-reversal-odd photocurrent whose sign flips upon 180deg reversal of the Néel vector. In PT-symmetric CuMnAs, we use near-field excitation to map this photocurrent with sub-100-nm spatial resolution after current-induced spin-orbit-torque switching. The signal polarity follows local Néel vector reversal, enabling nanoscale imaging of antiferromagnetic texture and direct readout of 180deg-reversed antiferromagnetic states that remain indistinguishable in XMLD and other time-reversal-even linear-dichroic probes. The optical nonlinear anomalous Hall effect thus reveals a new light-spin interaction and provides a scalable route to nanoscale readout of hidden spin order, with potential for ultrafast all-electrical and all-optical antiferromagnetic spintronic technologies.

17

EuO(111)上铋薄膜作为近邻诱导拓扑态平台#

Bismuth Films on EuO(111) as a Platform for Proximity-Induced Topological States
📚 arXiv👤 Subham Naskar, Sujit Manna📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在铁磁绝缘体EuO(111)上外延生长出α相铋烯，利用近邻效应将铋的拓扑性质与EuO的铁磁性耦合，实现了兼具大能隙（~400 meV）和高温稳定性的量子自旋霍尔态，并探测到边界增强的边缘态。
该工作报道了在铁磁绝缘体EuO(111)上外延生长铋薄膜的实验实现。高分辨扫描隧道显微镜观察到原子有序的双层铋，具有(012)取向的准方晶格，对应稳定的α相铋烯。隧道谱显示约400 meV的稳健能隙，与室温下持续的量子自旋霍尔绝缘相一致；空间分辨隧道谱进一步识别出岛边界处的增强边缘态。低温磁输运测量补充表征了近邻效应诱导的拓扑态，该体系为实现高阶拓扑相提供了有前景的平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作报道了在铁磁绝缘体EuO(111)上外延生长铋薄膜的实验实现。高分辨扫描隧道显微镜观察到原子有序的双层铋，具有(012)取向的准方晶格，对应稳定的α相铋烯。隧道谱显示约400 meV的稳健能隙，与室温下持续的量子自旋霍尔绝缘相一致；空间分辨隧道谱进一步识别出岛边界处的增强边缘态。低温磁输运测量补充表征了近邻效应诱导的拓扑态，该体系为实现高阶拓扑相提供了有前景的平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21862v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Interfacing two-dimensional bismuth with a magnetic layer provides a promising route towards realizing higher-order topological phases. In particular, bismuthene on a ferromagnetic insulator substrate has been theoretically proposed by i̧tetChen2020 as a universal platform for magnetic second-order topological insulators. Here, we report the experimental realization of epitaxial bismuth films grown on the ferromagnetic insulator EuO(111). Using high-resolution scanning tunneling microscopy, we observe atomically ordered bi-layer bismuth with a (012)-oriented quasi-square lattice, corresponding to a stabilized α-phase bismuthene. The resulting film is exceptionally flat compared to conventional metallic films, reflecting the intrinsic two-dimensional nature of the Bi(012) phase. Tunneling spectroscopy(STS) reveals a robust energy gap of about 400 meV in the local density of states, consistent with a quantum spin Hall insulating phase persisting up to room temperature. Spatially resolved STS further identifies enhanced edge-localised states at the island boundaries. Complementary low-temperature magnetotransport measurements on proximity-coupled ultrathin Bi films exhibit linear magnetoresistance and a Hall sign reversal, indicative of quantum-confinement-driven surface-dominated transport. Our results establish bismuthene-magnetic-insulator heterostructures as a viable experimental platform for realizing magnetically tunable topological phases, providing a critical step toward the observation of higher-order topology in two dimensions.

18

超导(La,Pr)₃Ni₂O₇₋δ薄膜中3dz²轨道离域与磁性坍缩#

3dz^₂ orbital delocalization and magnetic collapse in superconducting (La,Pr)₃Ni₂O₇₋δ films
📚 arXiv👤 Xiaoyang Chen, Wenliang Zhang, Fei Peng, Ting Cui, Guangdi Zhou, Zezhong Li, Jaewon Choi, Lizhi Xu, Yiu-Fung Chiu, Stefano Agrestini, Sahil Tippireddy, Haoliang Huang, Heng Wang, Xianfeng Wu, Peng Li, Jin-Feng Jia, Mirian Garcia-Fernandez, Yi Lu, Er-Jia Guo, Qi-Kun Xue, Zhuoyu Chen, Donglai Feng, Ke-Jin Zhou📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次独立解耦应变与氧含量的作用，揭示镍基超导的双步电子结构演化机制：3dz²轨道离域化驱动磁性坍缩，阐明自旋密度波与超导的竞争关系，为镍酸盐超导机理提供关键实验判据。
该工作利用X射线吸收谱和共振非弹性X射线散射，通过独立调控(La,Pr)₃Ni₂O₇₋δ薄膜的应变和氧含量，追踪从母相到超导相的微观演化路径。揭示了两步演化：首先，两种独立调控均以相同方式出现离域特征——谱权重从上哈伯德型峰转移至O 2p_z态相关的空穴峰，同时原本局域的Ni 3dz²轨道变得更加巡游，dd轨道激发展宽减弱；其次，随着巡游性增强，长程自旋密度波序在强度和关联长度上均被压制，与超导性直接竞争，但短程磁振子仍持续存在。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用X射线吸收谱和共振非弹性X射线散射，通过独立调控(La,Pr)₃Ni₂O₇₋δ薄膜的应变和氧含量，追踪从母相到超导相的微观演化路径。揭示了两步演化：首先，两种独立调控均以相同方式出现离域特征——谱权重从上哈伯德型峰转移至O 2p_z态相关的空穴峰，同时原本局域的Ni 3dz²轨道变得更加巡游，dd轨道激发展宽减弱；其次，随着巡游性增强，长程自旋密度波序在强度和关联长度上均被压制，与超导性直接竞争，但短程磁振子仍持续存在。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21899v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The recent discovery of Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) nickelate thin-film superconductors has opened a new frontier in unconventional superconductivity. Its realization requires both compressive epitaxial strain and highly oxidative growth conditions, yet the microscopic pathway from the parent phase to the superconducting phase remains elusive. Here, X-ray absorption spectroscopy and resonant inelastic X-ray scattering are employed to track this evolution by independently tuning strain and oxygen content in (La,Pr)₃Ni₂O₇₋δ thin films. We uncover a remarkable two-step evolution. First, signatures of delocalization emerge in the same way upon two independent tunings: spectral weight transfers from an upper Hubbard-like peak to the hole-like peak associated with the O 2p_z state, and in parallel, the initially localized Ni 3dz^₂ orbital becomes more itinerant, accompanied by the broadening and weakening of dd orbital excitations. Second, as itinerancy increases, long-range spin-density-wave (SDW) order is suppressed in both intensity and correlation length, indicating direct competition with superconductivity. Yet, short-range magnons persist: they become damped, but their bandwidth remains unchanged. Our results paint a coherent picture in which both strain and oxygenation drive the RP bilayer nickelates towards superconducting instability, where the O 2p_z and Ni 3dz^₂ orbitals become delocalized. Concomitantly, the long-range magnetic order loses coherence and is suppressed. These findings establish an orbital-selective route to RP nickelate superconductivity, in which the delocalization of the interlayer 3dz^₂-2p_z-3dz^₂ molecular orbital and the robust short-range magnons upon the melting of SDW order are prerequisites, providing strong constraints for theory and a roadmap for designing nickelate superconductors.

19

低温冲击剥离法制备超高迁移率菱方石墨纳米电子器件#

Cryogenic shock exfoliation for ultrahigh mobility rhombohedral graphite nanoelectronics
📚 arXiv👤 Ludwig Holleis, Youngjoon Choi, Canxun Zhang, Jack H. Farrell, Gabriel Bargas, Audrey Hsu, Zexing Chen, Ian Sackin, Wenjie Zhou, Yi Guo, Thibault Charpentier, Yifan Jiang, Benjamin A. Foutty, Aidan Keough, Martin E. Huber, Takashi Taniguchi, Kenji Watanabe, Andrew Lucas, Andrea F. Young📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地发展低温冲击剥离与低压范德华组装联用技术，攻克菱方石墨烯大面积、高有序、高成品率制备难题；所获器件质量极高，首次在菱方多层石墨烯平带中观测到电子流体动力学行为的尺寸驱动转变，为研究关联电
该工作提出"低温冲击剥离"方法制备大面积菱方石墨烯薄片，结合低压范德华组装技术保持堆垛有序性，实现超过1300 μm²、成品率90%的高度均匀器件。扫描纳米SQUID-on-tip成像显示器件中心10×10 μm²区域具有均匀自旋磁性；横向磁聚焦揭示低温下无序平均自由程超过200 μm。在菱方多层石墨烯的平带中，观测到强电子-电子流体动力学中间温区由泊肃叶流向多孔电子流的尺寸驱动转变，为超高器件质量提供进一步佐证。

页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出"低温冲击剥离"方法制备大面积菱方石墨烯薄片，结合低压范德华组装技术保持堆垛有序性，实现超过1300 μm²、成品率90%的高度均匀器件。扫描纳米SQUID-on-tip成像显示器件中心10×10 μm²区域具有均匀自旋磁性；横向磁聚焦揭示低温下无序平均自由程超过200 μm。在菱方多层石墨烯的平带中，观测到强电子-电子流体动力学中间温区由泊肃叶流向多孔电子流的尺寸驱动转变，为超高器件质量提供进一步佐证。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21912v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Rhombohedral multilayer graphene (RMG) offers a highly tunable platform for correlated electron physics, featuring field-effect control of magnetic, superconducting, and topological phases[1-24]. The promise of these materials has been held back by the limited abundance of rhombohedral stacking in natural graphite, which constrains both sample yield and useful area. Here we introduce 'cryogenic shock exfoliation' to produce large area rhombohedral graphene flakes which, combined with a low-pressure van der Waals assembly technique that preserves stacking order, enable highly uniform devices exceeding 1300 μ m² with fabrication yields of 90%. Using scanning nanoSQUID-on-tip imaging, we demonstrate uniform spin magnetism over the full central 10 times 10 μ m² area of our devices. Transverse magnetic focusing reveals a disorder mean free path exceeding 200 μ m at low temperatures. Within the flat surface bands of RMG[20], we observe a size-driven crossover from Poiseuille to porous electron flow in the intermediate-temperature regime of strong electron-electron hydrodynamics[16, 25], providing a further signature of ultrahigh device quality. Our approach overcomes a key materials bottleneck in the fabrication of mesoscopic rhombohedral graphene devices, paving the way for incorporating strongly correlated phases into two-dimensional nanoelectronics.

20

长程耗散自旋系统中的量子跳跃关联#

Quantum jump correlations in long-range dissipative spin systems
📚 arXiv👤 Giulia Salatino, Anna Delmonte, Zejian Li, Rosario Fazio, Alberto Biella📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将量子跳跃轨迹统计与倾斜Lindbladian方法相结合，发展出团簇平均场和累积量展开的双尺度技术框架，首次系统揭示了长程耗散自旋系统中跳跃关联对非平衡相变的灵敏表征能力，为开放量子多体
该工作通过量子跳跃轨迹的统计性质刻画长程耗散自旋系统的非平衡相。利用倾斜Lindbladian方法研究量子跳跃的全计数统计，结合团簇平均场和累积量展开技术分别捕捉跳跃关联的短程和长程结构，并分析探测事件的等待时间分布。研究表明量子跳跃关联清晰显示底层相的特征，在相变两侧呈现不同动力学特性，凸显轨迹分辨可观测量作为开放量子多体系统集体行为探针的潜力。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过量子跳跃轨迹的统计性质刻画长程耗散自旋系统的非平衡相。利用倾斜Lindbladian方法研究量子跳跃的全计数统计，结合团簇平均场和累积量展开技术分别捕捉跳跃关联的短程和长程结构，并分析探测事件的等待时间分布。研究表明量子跳跃关联清晰显示底层相的特征，在相变两侧呈现不同动力学特性，凸显轨迹分辨可观测量作为开放量子多体系统集体行为探针的潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21513v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We characterize nonequilibrium phases in long-range dissipative spin systems through the statistical properties of quantum jump trajectories. While the average dynamics governed by the Lindblad master equation provides access to steady-state expectation values of order parameters, the quantum trajectory framework reveals features encoded in the spatial and temporal correlations of detection events. Focusing on a model exhibiting a paramagnetic-to-ferromagnetic phase transition, we investigate the full counting statistics of quantum jumps using a tilted Lindbladian approach. We combine this with cluster mean-field and cumulant expansion techniques, which allow us to capture, respectively, the short- and long-range structure of jump correlations. In addition, we study the waiting-time distributions of detection events. We show that quantum jump correlations display clear signatures of the underlying phases and reveal distinct dynamical features across the transition. Our results highlight the potential of trajectory-resolved observables as probes of collective behavior in open quantum many-body systems and provide new insights into the role of long-range interactions in shaping nonequilibrium dynamics.

21

基于定向自旋空间群的磁有序对称性分类#

Symmetry Classification of Magnetic Orders using Oriented Spin Space Groups
📚 arXiv👤 Yuntian Liu, Xiaobing Chen, Yutong Yu, Jesús Etxebarria, J. Manuel Perez-Mato, Qihang Liu📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地引入定向自旋空间群概念，统一了SSG与磁空间群两大理论体系，首次从群论层面系统区分铁磁与反铁磁序，并预言自旋-轨道磁性这一全新物相，为磁对称性分类奠定严格数学基础，对探索新奇拓扑磁态具有
该研究利用最先进的自旋空间群（SSG）理论对磁有序进行统一分类。基于SSG是否约束净自旋磁化为零，系统区分铁磁性（含亚铁磁性）与反铁磁性；引入固定磁取向的定向SSG描述，统一了SSG与磁空间群框架，清晰揭示自旋-轨道耦合诱导的对称性破缺路径。该群论框架完善了磁对称性的内在逻辑，并识别出一种称为自旋-轨道磁性的独特磁相。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用最先进的自旋空间群（SSG）理论对磁有序进行统一分类。基于SSG是否约束净自旋磁化为零，系统区分铁磁性（含亚铁磁性）与反铁磁性；引入固定磁取向的定向SSG描述，统一了SSG与磁空间群框架，清晰揭示自旋-轨道耦合诱导的对称性破缺路径。该群论框架完善了磁对称性的内在逻辑，并识别出一种称为自旋-轨道磁性的独特磁相。

English Abstract

arXiv:2506.20739v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Magnetism has witnessed remarkable progress in recent decades, largely driven by its potential for next-generation storage devices. However, the classification of magnetic orders, even for fundamental concepts such as ferromagnetism and antiferromagnetism, remains a topic of active evolution, particularly with the discovery of unconventional magnetic materials and advances in antiferromagnetic spintronics. Here, we present a unified classification of magnetic order utilizing the state-of-the-art spin space group (SSG) theory. Based on whether the net spin magnetization is constrained to zero by SSG, we systematically categorize magnetic orders into ferromagnetism (including ferrimagnetism) and antiferromagnetism. We further introduce an oriented SSG description, i.e., an SSG with a fixed magnetic orientation, thereby unifying the SSG and magnetic space group frameworks. This approach clearly reveals the symmetry-breaking pathway induced by spin-orbit coupling. The proposed group framework completes the intrinsic logic of magnetic symmetry and identifies a distinct magnetic phase, termed spin-orbit magnetism, in which the net spin magnetization is induced by spin-orbit coupling. Our work provides a comprehensive symmetry-based perspective for classifying magnetic order, offering fresh insights into unconventional magnets and broad applicability in spintronics and quantum material design.

22

一维Fe³⁺硫族化合物链中电子关联下纠缠的电荷、自旋与轨道自由度#

Intertwined charge, spin, and orbital degrees of freedom under electronic correlations in the one-dimensional Fe³⁺ chalcogenide chain
📚 arXiv👤 Yang Zhang, Pontus Laurell, Gonzalo Alvarez, Adriana Moreo, Thomas A. Maier, Ling-Fang Lin, Elbio Dagotto📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示一维Fe³⁺硫族化合物链中存在轨道选择性Mott相这一新奇量子态，阐明电子关联强度对电荷-自旋-轨道耦合的调控机制。其意义在于为理解低维铁基材料的量子相变提供理论框架，并指出该体系超导实
该工作基于第一性原理计算和密度矩阵重整化群方法，系统研究Fe³⁺硫族化合物链的三轨道电子Hubbard模型。发现链方向存在鲁棒的反铁磁耦合；在中间电子关联U/W区域，观察到轨道选择性Mott相，即局域电子与巡游电子共存。与此前报道的铁梯中超导配对倾向不同，Fe³⁺链在相应关联区域未显示明显配对趋势，暗示超导性在该体系中可能难以实现。
