页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作基于第一性原理计算和密度矩阵重整化群方法，系统研究Fe³⁺硫族化合物链的三轨道电子Hubbard模型。发现链方向存在鲁棒的反铁磁耦合；在中间电子关联U/W区域，观察到轨道选择性Mott相，即局域电子与巡游电子共存。与此前报道的铁梯中超导配对倾向不同，Fe³⁺链在相应关联区域未显示明显配对趋势，暗示超导性在该体系中可能难以实现。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.09870v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Motivated by recent developments in the study of quasi-one-dimensional iron systems with Fe²⁺, we comprehensively study the Fe³⁺ chalcogenide chain system. Based on first-principles calculations, the Fe³⁺ chain has a similar electronic structure as discussed before in the iron 2+ chain, due to similar FeX₄ (X = S or Se) tetrahedron chain geometry. Furthermore, a three-orbital electronic Hubbard model for this chain was constructed by using the density matrix renormalization group method. A robust antiferromagnetic coupling was unveiled in the chain direction. In addition, in the intermediate electronic correlation U/W region, we found an interesting orbital-selective Mott phase with the coexistence of localized and itinerant electrons (U is the on-site Hubbard repulsion, while W is the electronic bandwidth) {o̧lorbluebased on the orbital-selective behavior observed in the charge fluctuations}. Furthermore, we do not observe any obvious pairing tendency in the Fe³⁺ chain in the electronic correlation U/W region, where superconducting pairing tendencies were reported before in iron ladders. This suggests that superconductivity is unlikely to emerge in the Fe³⁺ systems. Our results establish with clarity the similarities and differences between Fe²⁺and Fe³⁺ iron chains, as well as iron ladders.

23

一维Kondo晶格模型中的载流子弛豫动力学#

Charge carrier relaxation dynamics in the one-dimensional Kondo lattice model
📚 arXiv👤 Arturo Perez-Romero, Mica Schwarm, Fabian Heidrich-Meisner📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在Kondo晶格模型中实现非平衡实时动力学与平衡态热化的系统性对比，揭示磁背景（铁磁/单态）和载流子浓度对热化行为的决定性作用，为理解重费米子材料中超快光谱实验的弛豫机制提供微观理论基准。
该工作采用含时Lanczos方法研究一维Kondo晶格模型中光激发载流子与磁激发的耦合弛豫过程。通过分析传导电子自旋极化、局域-传导电子自旋关联及电子动量分布，发现铁磁背景下单个或两个载流子情形不发生热化，而有限电子填充或单态磁背景下的稳态与热化兼容。实时模拟结果通过与有限温度期望值及能隙比分析的直接比较得到验证。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用含时Lanczos方法研究一维Kondo晶格模型中光激发载流子与磁激发的耦合弛豫过程。通过分析传导电子自旋极化、局域-传导电子自旋关联及电子动量分布，发现铁磁背景下单个或两个载流子情形不发生热化，而有限电子填充或单态磁背景下的稳态与热化兼容。实时模拟结果通过与有限温度期望值及能隙比分析的直接比较得到验证。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.21539v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: A generic question in the field of ultrafast dynamics is concerned with the relaxation dynamics and the subsequent thermalization of optically excited charge carriers. Among several possible relaxation channels available in a solid-state system, we focus on the coupling to magnetic excitations. In this paper, we study the real-time dynamics of a paradigmatic model, the Kondo lattice model in one dimension. We conduct a comprehensive study of the relaxation processes by evaluating the spin polarization of the conduction electron, the local spin-spin correlation between localized and conduction electrons, and the electronic momentum distribution. While in the well-studied cases of one or two charge carriers in a ferromagnetic background, no thermalization occurs, we demonstrate that the stationary state is compatible with thermalization if either the electronic filling is finite or the magnetic background is in the singlet sector. Our real-time simulations using the time-dependent Lanczos method are corroborated by a direct comparison with finite-temperature expectation values and an analysis of the spectrum in terms of the gap ratio.

24

绝缘交错磁体中的热磁振子力矩#

Thermomagnonic Torques in Insulating Altermagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Edward Schwartz, Hamed Vakili, Alexey A. Kovalev📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统铁磁体框架，首次揭示绝缘交错磁体中由晶体对称性支配的热磁振子力矩新机制，发现奇宇称自旋流与各向异性熵力矩两类效应；为利用温度梯度实现磁织构低耗散、高可控操控开辟新途径，对拓扑磁存储与热自
该工作发展了对称性控制的绝缘交错磁体各向异性热磁振子力矩理论，识别出与热产生子晶格奇宇称自旋流相关的自旋分裂磁振子力矩，以及由晶体对称性决定的各向异性熵力矩。这些力矩导致磁织构对温度梯度的各向异性响应：热自旋流诱导畴壁进动降低特定梯度方向的畴壁速度，并预言各向异性斯格明子霍尔响应，对称选择方向可实现快速运动且强烈抑制横向偏转。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作发展了对称性控制的绝缘交错磁体各向异性热磁振子力矩理论，识别出与热产生子晶格奇宇称自旋流相关的自旋分裂磁振子力矩，以及由晶体对称性决定的各向异性熵力矩。这些力矩导致磁织构对温度梯度的各向异性响应：热自旋流诱导畴壁进动降低特定梯度方向的畴壁速度，并预言各向异性斯格明子霍尔响应，对称选择方向可实现快速运动且强烈抑制横向偏转。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.14660v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We develop a symmetry-controlled theory of anisotropic thermomagnonic torques in insulating altermagnets. We identify a spin-splitter magnonic torque linked to thermally generated, sublattice-odd spin currents and an anisotropic entropic torque dictated by crystal symmetry. These torques produce anisotropic magnetic-texture responses to temperature gradients. In particular, thermally generated spin currents induce domain-wall precession, which reduces domain-wall velocities for selected gradient directions. We also predict an anisotropic skyrmion Hall response, with symmetry-selected directions enabling fast skyrmion motion with strongly suppressed transverse deflection. Our results reveal experimentally testable symmetry fingerprints of insulating altermagnets and extend more broadly to anisotropic magnets with exchange-driven magnon spin splitting.

25

无序金属中的量子交错磁性不稳定性#

Quantum Altermagnetic Instability in Disordered Metals
📚 arXiv👤 Alberto Cortijo📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在无序金属扩散区预言了量子交错磁相的存在，突破了传统费米液体理论仅关注铁磁/顺磁相的局限。通过系统构建各向异性-相互作用相图，揭示了自旋-轨道耦合对磁序选择的调控机制，为理解重费米子、过渡金
该工作分析了扩散区二维各向异性电子系统在零温下发生交错磁性不稳定性的可能性，考虑有/无自旋-轨道耦合情形。构建以各向异性参数和相互作用强度为变量的相图发现：零自旋-轨道耦合时，铁磁性仅在弱各向异性和弱耦合区占优，更强参数有利于交错磁性；有限自旋-轨道耦合下出现顺磁相竞争及量子临界点。顺磁-磁有序相变为二级，铁磁-交错磁相变为一级。交错磁相在小磁场下稳定，可与场诱导磁化共存。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作分析了扩散区二维各向异性电子系统在零温下发生交错磁性不稳定性的可能性，考虑有/无自旋-轨道耦合情形。构建以各向异性参数和相互作用强度为变量的相图发现：零自旋-轨道耦合时，铁磁性仅在弱各向异性和弱耦合区占优，更强参数有利于交错磁性；有限自旋-轨道耦合下出现顺磁相竞争及量子临界点。顺磁-磁有序相变为二级，铁磁-交错磁相变为一级。交错磁相在小磁场下稳定，可与场诱导磁化共存。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.19307v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The possibility of a zero temperature, altermagnetic instability in anisotropic two dimensional electron systems in the diffusive regime is analyzed, in the presence and absence of spin-orbit coupling. Allowing for ferromagnetism, a phase diagram is built as a function of the parameter that controls anisotropy and the strength of the interactions. It is found that, at zero spin orbit coupling, ferromagnetism only dominates at small values of anisotropy and coupling constant. Larger values of these parameters favour the formation of altermagnetism. At finite spin-orbit coupling, a paramagnetic phase competes with the other two, and a quantum critical point appears. The phase transition from the paramagnetic to the magnetically ordered phases is of second order, while the phase transition between ferromagnet and altermagnet states is first order. The altermagnetic phase is robust under small magnetic fields, displaying a coexistence with a field-induced magnetization.

26

交错磁体中反常热霍尔效应的观测#

Observation of anomalous thermal Hall effect in altermagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Wenbo Wan, Xu Zhang, Yixuan Luo, Yanfeng Guo, Shiyan Li📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在交错磁体中观测到纯声子驱动的反常热霍尔效应，其电学对应信号缺失，揭示了Néel矢量-声子耦合的独特物理机制，为无耗散声子器件与热学存储技术奠定材料基础。
该工作将研究范式从电荷载流子转向热载流子，对两种代表性交错磁体候选材料MnTe和CrSb进行系统的热霍尔效应研究。两种材料中均观测到显著的反常声子热霍尔信号，而无相应的电学对应信号，归因于该独特磁结构与声子的耦合。该发现确立反常声子热霍尔效应为交错磁体的本征特征，为识别这类新型量子磁体提供灵敏探针，并将Néel矢量与晶格振动直接关联，为低损耗声子器件和热可读存储器开辟前景。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作将研究范式从电荷载流子转向热载流子，对两种代表性交错磁体候选材料MnTe和CrSb进行系统的热霍尔效应研究。两种材料中均观测到显著的反常声子热霍尔信号，而无相应的电学对应信号，归因于该独特磁结构与声子的耦合。该发现确立反常声子热霍尔效应为交错磁体的本征特征，为识别这类新型量子磁体提供灵敏探针，并将Néel矢量与晶格振动直接关联，为低损耗声子器件和热可读存储器开辟前景。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.03183v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Altermagnets, recently proposed as a third category of collinear magnets, combine the features of zero net magnetization in antiferromagnets and the spin splitting in ferromagnets. While abundant spectroscopic evidence for altermagnetism has been reported, experimental observation of the anomalous Hall effect, a hallmark of ferromagnetism, remains scarce. Here, we shift the paradigm from charge to heat carriers and report the systematic study of the thermal Hall effect in two representative altermagnet candidates, MnTe and CrSb. In both materials, we observe a pronounced anomalous phonon thermal Hall signal, with no electrical counterpart observed, attributed to the coupling of this distinctive magnetic structure with phonons. Our findings establish the anomalous phonon thermal Hall effect as an intrinsic feature of altermagnets, and provide a sensitive probe to identify this new kind of quantum magnets. The anomalous phonon thermal Hall effect in altermagnets directly links the Néel vector to lattice vibrations, opening prospects for low-loss phononic devices and thermally readable memories.

27

具有任意两个绕数的光学霍普夫子#

Optical hopfions with arbitrary two winding numbers
📚 arXiv👤 Xinji Zeng, Jinwen Wang, Yun Chen, Guang Liu, Zhenyu Guo, Yongkun Zhou, Xin Yang, Chengyuan Wang, Dong Wei, Haixia Chen, Yijie Shen, Andrew Forbes, Hong Gao📅 2026-04-24⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地实现了任意绕数组合的光学霍普夫子，核心创新在于利用拉盖尔-高斯模式叠加构建了系统性的高阶拓扑结构生成方法，将实验验证的绕数提升至新量级。其意义在于为拓扑光子学提供了可编程的任意阶拓扑孤子
该工作利用自由空间中定制的拉盖尔-高斯模式叠加，实现了任意阶数、任意极向和环向绕数的光学霍普夫子，实验验证了高达5阶和3阶绕数的新纪录。通过偏振丝状结构可视化验证了所设计的拓扑纹理，为拓扑光子学、光通信以及磁性和其他系统中的类比研究提供了系统性的任意阶霍普夫子构建路径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用自由空间中定制的拉盖尔-高斯模式叠加，实现了任意阶数、任意极向和环向绕数的光学霍普夫子，实验验证了高达5阶和3阶绕数的新纪录。通过偏振丝状结构可视化验证了所设计的拓扑纹理，为拓扑光子学、光通信以及磁性和其他系统中的类比研究提供了系统性的任意阶霍普夫子构建路径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21424v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Hopfions, as three-dimensional topologically nontrivial structures described by poloidal and toroidal winding numbers, hold promise as robust information carriers in spintronics, functional materials, and optical communications. Although they have been experimentally realized in various physical systems, such realizations have been restricted to low orders, with the winding numbers lacking tunability. Here, using optical fields as our platform, we outline how to make tunable hopfions in any order with any winding number. We use tailored superpositions of Laguerre-Gaussian modes in free-space as our construction, achieving effective control for arbitrary-order poloidal and toroidal winding numbers, which we demonstrate up to orders 5 and 3, respectively, for a new state-of-the-art. The resulting torus-knot structures are visualized experimentally via polarization filaments, confirming the designed topological textures. Our work reports an exotic optical topologies observed in free space, provides a systematic route hopfions of any order, with implications for topological photonics, optical communications, and analogies in magnetic and condensed-matter systems.

28

Cr(pyrazine)3分子骨架中的持续补偿亚铁磁性#

Persistent compensated ferrimagnetism in the molecular framework Cr(pyrazine) 3
📚 Nature Chemistry👤 Frédéric Aribot, Maja A. Dunstan, Nathan J. Yutronkie, Mariusz Kubus 等17位作者📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在分子骨架中实现类氧化物强度的反铁磁耦合，利用Cr³⁺与自由基阴离子双亚晶格的对称匹配，获得宽温区持续补偿而非单点补偿的亚铁磁性，且居里温度远超室温，为环境稳定自旋电子器件提供了罕见材料平台
具有ReO3或钙钛矿相关拓扑结构的分子框架因其结构多样性而被广泛研究，但在此类体系中尚未实现具有强电子和磁关联的实例。本文报道Cr(吡嗪)3的合成，这是一种采用立方ReO3型结构的三维分子框架，其中Cr3+离子仅由吡嗪自由基阴离子桥联。在Cr(吡嗪)3中，Cr3+与自由基子晶格之间的反铁磁耦合（其强度与过渡金属氧化物中的相当）导致了一个近乎完全补偿的铁磁基态，具有极小的净磁矩。由于双格子晶格的对称性和化学计量比，磁补偿在宽温度范围内持…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

具有ReO3或钙钛矿相关拓扑结构的分子框架因其结构多样性而被广泛研究，但在此类体系中尚未实现具有强电子和磁关联的实例。本文报道Cr(吡嗪)3的合成，这是一种采用立方ReO3型结构的三维分子框架，其中Cr3+离子仅由吡嗪自由基阴离子桥联。在Cr(吡嗪)3中，Cr3+与自由基子晶格之间的反铁磁耦合（其强度与过渡金属氧化物中的相当）导致了一个近乎完全补偿的铁磁基态，具有极小的净磁矩。由于双格子晶格的对称性和化学计量比，磁补偿在宽温度范围内持续存在，而非仅在特定补偿温度下出现。长程磁有序在远高于室温时被观测到，使Cr(吡嗪)3成为极少数在环境条件下具有鲁棒补偿铁磁性的材料之一。

English Abstract

Molecular frameworks with ReO3- or perovskite-related topologies have been widely investigated for their structural versatility, yet examples displaying strong electronic and magnetic correlations have not been realized in such systems. Here we report the synthesis of Cr(pyrazine)3, a three-dimensional molecular framework adopting a cubic ReO3-type structure, in which Cr3+ions are bridged exclusively by pyrazine radical anions. In Cr(pyrazine)3, antiferromagnetic coupling between the Cr3+and radical sublattices, comparable in magnitude to that found in transition-metal oxides, leads to a nearly perfectly compensated ferrimagnetic ground state with an exceptionally small net magnetic moment. Owing to the symmetry and stoichiometry of the bipartite lattice, magnetic compensation persists over an extended temperature range rather than occurring only at a specific compensation temperature. Long-range magnetic order is observed well above room temperature, placing Cr(pyrazine)3among the very few materials featuring robust compensated ferrimagnetism under ambient conditions.

29

无序双钙钛矿GdSrCoMnO₆的Griffiths相、自旋-声子耦合及交换偏置效应#

Griffiths-like phase, spin-phonon coupling, and exchange-bias in the disordered double perovskite GdSrCoMnO₆
📚 arXiv👤 Gyanti Prakash Moharana, Diptikanta Swain, Hanuma Kumar Dara, Debendra Prasad Panda, S. N Sarangi📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示了结构无序在双钙钛矿中诱导的丰富磁现象，首次将Griffiths相、自旋-声子耦合与交换偏置效应关联于同一体系，为理解磁不均匀性对自旋动力学和自旋-晶格耦合的调控机制提供了实验依据，对设计新
该工作报道无序双钙钛矿GdSrCoMnO₆的结构、磁性及拉曼光谱研究，发现约153 K的铁磁转变、延伸至172 K的Griffiths-like相区、自旋-声子耦合证据及30 K以下的慢磁动力学；低温区观测到最高379 Oe的交换偏置效应，表明结构无序诱导的磁不均匀性对该体系的磁关联、自旋动力学及自旋-晶格响应起关键作用。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作报道无序双钙钛矿GdSrCoMnO₆的结构、磁性及拉曼光谱研究，发现约153 K的铁磁转变、延伸至172 K的Griffiths-like相区、自旋-声子耦合证据及30 K以下的慢磁动力学；低温区观测到最高379 Oe的交换偏置效应，表明结构无序诱导的磁不均匀性对该体系的磁关联、自旋动力学及自旋-晶格响应起关键作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.19894v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report structural, magnetic, and Raman studies of the disordered double perovskite GdSrCoMnO₆~(GSCM). DC magnetization shows a ferromagnetic transition at TC approx 153~K. The inverse susceptibility exhibits a downturn above TC and is consistent with a Griffiths-like regime extending up to TG approx 172~K. Raman measurements show a deviation of the phonon frequency from the anharmonic background near the magnetic-ordering region, consistent with spin-phonon coupling. AC susceptibility indicates slow magnetic dynamics below the freezing temperature Tf approx 30~K. These results point to magnetic inhomogeneity generated by the random distribution of mixed-valence Co and Mn ions and by the resulting competition between ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic interactions. In the low-temperature regime, an exchange-bias effect is observed up to 50~K, with an exchange-bias magnitude |HEB| = 379~Oe at 5~K. Structural disorder therefore plays an important role in the magnetic correlations, spin dynamics, and spin-lattice response of GSCM.

30

二维多铁性材料中对称性决定的反铁磁磁子输运开关效应#

Symmetry-dictated switching of antiferromagnetic magnon transport in 2D multiferroics
📚 arXiv👤 Yibo Liu, Jiale Wang, Jiexiang Wang, Ying Dai, Baibiao Huang, Xinru Li, Yandong Ma📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示二维多铁材料中铁电极化通过调控子晶格非对称性（交换作用与DM相互作用）来翻转磁子Berry曲率的普适机制，突破了共线反铁磁体中相反手性磁子完全抵消的限制，实现了非易失、可电控的反铁磁磁子
本文提出二维多铁晶格中反铁磁磁子输运非易失铁电开关的普适机制。该机制将磁子几何相位与铁电极化诱导的子晶格不对称性（交换作用和Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用）相耦合，解除了共线反铁磁体中相反手性磁子的精确补偿，产生高度可调净Berry曲率。反转铁电极化可完全翻转净磁子Berry曲率和反常热Hall电导率。第一性原理和线性自旋波理论在单层CuCr₂Se₄中严格验证了该几何相位驱动机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文提出二维多铁晶格中反铁磁磁子输运非易失铁电开关的普适机制。该机制将磁子几何相位与铁电极化诱导的子晶格不对称性（交换作用和Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用）相耦合，解除了共线反铁磁体中相反手性磁子的精确补偿，产生高度可调净Berry曲率。反转铁电极化可完全翻转净磁子Berry曲率和反常热Hall电导率。第一性原理和线性自旋波理论在单层CuCr₂Se₄中严格验证了该几何相位驱动机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20064v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: While antiferromagnetic magnons in two-dimensional (2D) materials hold immense promise for high-frequency spintronics, achieving their efficient active control remains a critical challenge. Here, we propose a universal mechanism for the nonvolatile ferroelectric (FE) switching of antiferromagnetic magnon transport in 2D multiferroic lattices. Our mechanism relies on coupling the magnon geometric phase to the FE-induced sublattice asymmetry in exchange and Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions. This explicitly breaks the exact compensation of opposite-chirality magnons inherent to collinear antiferromagnets, lifting their spin degeneracy and inducing a highly tunable net Berry curvature. Crucially, reversing the FE polarization deterministically swaps these magnetic asymmetries, which completely inverts the net magnon Berry curvature and the resulting anomalous thermal Hall conductivity. Using first-principles and linear spin-wave theory, we rigorously validate this geometric-phase-driven mechanism in single-layer CuCr2Se4. Our findings establish a robust paradigm for coupling multiferroicity with the magnon geometric phase, paving the way for nonvolatile and electrically switchable antiferromagnetic magnonics.

31

共振增强超-超交换在金红石交错磁体中产生巨大手性磁子劈裂#

Resonance-enhanced super-superexchange yields giant chiral magnon splitting in rutile altermagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Dai Q. Ho, D. Quang To, Byungkyun Kang, Matthew F. Doty, Garnett W. Bryant, Anderson Janotti📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作揭示金红石CuF₂中轨道共振驱动的超-超交换机制，通过Cu 3dz²与F 2pz能级对齐放大第七近邻交换差，产生meV级手性磁子劈裂。这为实验验证d波交错磁性并开发磁子 valleytronic
本文结合杂化泛函第一性原理计算与线性自旋波理论，证明金红石结构CuF₂展现出meV量级的手性相反磁子模式劈裂，其方向由其d波交错磁对称性决定。该劈裂源于异常强的长程超-超交换通道Cu–F···F–Cu，它增强了控制手性模式劈裂的第七近邻交换差J₇b−J₇a。研究识别出轨道共振机制：Cu 3dz²与F 2pz态的能量对齐强化了该路径的虚跃迁，放大了各向异性长程交换。金红石CuF₂为验证金红石交错磁性提供了理想平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文结合杂化泛函第一性原理计算与线性自旋波理论，证明金红石结构CuF₂展现出meV量级的手性相反磁子模式劈裂，其方向由其d波交错磁对称性决定。该劈裂源于异常强的长程超-超交换通道Cu–F···F–Cu，它增强了控制手性模式劈裂的第七近邻交换差J₇b−J₇a。研究识别出轨道共振机制：Cu 3dz²与F 2pz态的能量对齐强化了该路径的虚跃迁，放大了各向异性长程交换。金红石CuF₂为验证金红石交错磁性提供了理想平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20126v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets host momentum-selective spin splitting and chiral-split magnonic excitations despite vanishing net magnetization, enabling spin transport without ferromagnetism. In rutile structures, establishing altermagnetism spectroscopically has been challenging, motivating the search for a rutile platform with a resolvable exchange-driven chiral magnon splitting. Here we combine hybrid-functional first-principles calculations with linear spin-wave theory to show that rutile CuF₂ exhibits a meV-scale splitting between magnon modes of opposite chirality along momentum directions dictated by its d-wave altermagnetic symmetry. The splitting originates from an anomalously strong long-range super-superexchange channel Cu--FḑotsF--Cu, which enhances the symmetry-allowed difference between seventh-neighbour exchanges, J₇b - J₇ₐ, controlling the chiral-mode splitting. We identify an orbital-resonance mechanism: energetic alignment between Cu 3dz^₂ and F 2p_z states strengthens virtual hopping along the Cu--FḑotsF--Cu path and amplifies the anisotropic long-range exchange. Rutile CuF₂ therefore provides an ideal platform to validate rutile altermagnetism and suggests an orbital-energy description for engineering large chiral magnon splittings in insulating altermagnets.

32

层间调控堆叠四方交错磁性双层中的自旋与谷物理#

Layer-mediated tuning of spin and valley physics in stacked tetragonal altermagnetic bilayers
📚 arXiv👤 Jianke Tian, Xiaowen Zhou, Gui-Bin Liu📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文揭示层间堆叠对称性对四方交错磁性双层中自旋-谷自由度的约束机制，创新性地提出层间滑移与电场协同调控策略，突破传统磁电耦合局限，为低功耗自旋电子器件及高隧穿磁阻存储提供新设计范式。
基于第一性原理计算，本文证明层间堆叠对由两个四方交错磁性单层组成的双层中的自旋和谷自由度施加对称性约束，可通过层间滑移和外电场调控这些自由度。[C2||P]和[C2||Mz]对称性内在地强制自旋简并，而自旋与层自由度的耦合建立了电场控制自旋态的通用框架。适当的层间滑移打破[C2||Mz]对称性，产生自发谷劈裂并驱动向完全补偿亚铁磁态的转变。层间滑移诱导的可调谷劈裂可实现增强的隧穿磁阻。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

基于第一性原理计算，本文证明层间堆叠对由两个四方交错磁性单层组成的双层中的自旋和谷自由度施加对称性约束，可通过层间滑移和外电场调控这些自由度。[C2||P]和[C2||Mz]对称性内在地强制自旋简并，而自旋与层自由度的耦合建立了电场控制自旋态的通用框架。适当的层间滑移打破[C2||Mz]对称性，产生自发谷劈裂并驱动向完全补偿亚铁磁态的转变。层间滑移诱导的可调谷劈裂可实现增强的隧穿磁阻。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20162v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: As an emerging magnetic phase, altermagnets (AMs) with collinear compensated magnetism in real space and alternating spin splitting in the band structure have attracted widespread attention. Here, based on first-principles calculations, we demonstrate that the layer stacking imposes symmetry constraints on the spin and valley degrees of freedom (DOFs) in an AM bilayer composed of two tetragonal altermagnetic monolayers, thereby enabling the tuning of these DOFs through interlayer sliding as well as by an external electric field. Using several representative AM bilayers, we reveal that the [C2||P] and [C2||Mz] symmetries intrinsically enforce spin degeneracy, while the coupling between spin and layer DOFs establishes a general framework for achieving electric field control of spin states. Appropriate interlayer sliding breaks the [C2||Md] symmetry of AM bilayers, thereby giving rise to a spontaneous valley splitting and driving a transition to a fully compensated ferrimagnetic state. Furthermore, owing to the tunable valley splitting induced by interlayer sliding, enhanced tunneling magnetoresistance (TMR) can be realized by AM bilayers. This work highlights the intrinsic correlation among spin, valley, and layer DOFs, offering symmetry-based design principles for layer-based spintronic and valleytronic devices.

33

d波交错磁体中的光诱导拓扑相变与反常热输运#

Light-Induced Topological Phase Transitions and Anomalous Thermal Transport in d-Wave Altermagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Ayesha Maryam, Muzamil Shah, Kashif Sabeeh, Reza Asgari📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文首次揭示线偏振光可驱动d波交错磁体发生自旋选择性拓扑相变，实现量子自旋Hall态到自旋极化Chern绝缘体的可控转换；所得Berry曲率闭式解与反常Wiedemann-Franz定律为光控拓扑热电
本文研究二维d波交错磁性拓扑绝缘体在线偏振光驱动下的本征热输运和Floquet工程拓扑性质。利用解析计算的高频有效Hamiltonian，发展了Berry曲率的闭式表达式，分析了反常Hall、Nernst和热Hall电导率及其自旋分辨对应量。线偏振光打破交错磁体中连接自旋扇区的对称性，实现从量子自旋Hall态到自旋极化Chern绝缘体再到平庸相的一系列自旋选择性拓扑相变。Nernst响应在Chern区域表现出显著的热激活和能隙敏感性，…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文研究二维d波交错磁性拓扑绝缘体在线偏振光驱动下的本征热输运和Floquet工程拓扑性质。利用解析计算的高频有效Hamiltonian，发展了Berry曲率的闭式表达式，分析了反常Hall、Nernst和热Hall电导率及其自旋分辨对应量。线偏振光打破交错磁体中连接自旋扇区的对称性，实现从量子自旋Hall态到自旋极化Chern绝缘体再到平庸相的一系列自旋选择性拓扑相变。Nernst响应在Chern区域表现出显著的热激活和能隙敏感性，而电和热Hall响应均量子化并满足反常Wiedemann-Franz定律。各反常输运系数均表现出独特的d波偏振角依赖性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20164v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study intrinsic thermal transport and Floquet-engineered topology in a two-dimensional d wave altermagnetic topological insulator powered by linearly polarized light. We analyze the anomalous Hall, Nernst, and thermal Hall conductivities, as well as their spin-resolved equivalents, and develop closed-form formulas for the Berry curvature using an analytically calculated high-frequency effective Hamiltonian. We demonstrate that linearly polarized light, in contrast to conventional antiferromagnets, breaks the symmetry connecting spin sectors in altermagnets, allowing a series of spin-selective topological phase transitions from a quantum spin Hall state to a spin-polarized Chern insulator and finally to a trivial phase. The Nernst response shows substantial thermal activation and significant sensitivity to the gap size in the Chern domain, but both the electrical and thermal Hall responses become quantized and meet the anomalous Wiedemann Franz law. Every anomalous transport coefficient exhibits a distinctive d wave dependence on the polarization angle, reversing sign under orthogonal rotation and vanishing at symmetry-restoring directions. Our findings show a path to all-optical regulation of topological and caloritronic responses beyond traditional magnetic systems and establish thermal transport as a sensitive probe of altermagnetic order.

34

BaNd₂ZnS₅中场诱导选择性自旋能隙闭合与量子临界性#

Field-Induced Selective Spin Gap Closure and Quantum Criticality in BaNd₂ZnS₅
📚 arXiv👤 Sangyun Lee, A. J. Woods, B. Billingsley, Shengzhi Zhang, R. Movshovich, S. M. Thomas, C. A. Mizzi, B. Maiorov, Shuyi Li, Chunjing Jia, Tai Kong, Eun Sang Choi, Vivien S. Zapf, Minseong Lee📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在层状稀土磁体中实现模式选择性量子临界性——仅低能隙自旋模式在临界场处坍缩，而另一模式保持有能隙，形成独特的部分临界中间相。这一发现突破了传统量子相变中全模式同时临界化的范式，为探索新型量子
本文报道层状稀土磁体BaNd₂ZnS₅中场诱导模式选择性量子临界性的热力学证据。在Néel温度T_N=2.9 K以下，自旋-轨道纠缠的Nd³⁺磁矩在磁场下形成两个对称不等价的低能自旋激发模式，具有不同能隙Δ_L和Δ_H。沿[110]方向施加磁场时，低能隙Δ_L连续软化并在临界场H_c~2 T处坍缩，而高能隙Δ_H保持有能隙，系统进入部分临界的中间相。交流磁化率显示普适标度行为，在临界性处χₐc~T⁽⁻⁰.2)。有限残余Sommerfe…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文报道层状稀土磁体BaNd₂ZnS₅中场诱导模式选择性量子临界性的热力学证据。在Néel温度T_N=2.9 K以下，自旋-轨道纠缠的Nd³⁺磁矩在磁场下形成两个对称不等价的低能自旋激发模式，具有不同能隙Δ_L和Δ_H。沿[110]方向施加磁场时，低能隙Δ_L连续软化并在临界场H_c~2 T处坍缩，而高能隙Δ_H保持有能隙，系统进入部分临界的中间相。交流磁化率显示普适标度行为，在临界性处χₐc~T⁽⁻⁰.2)。有限残余Sommerfeld系数γ₀表明量子临界点附近单一对称扇区中出现无能隙激发。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20173v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report thermodynamic evidence for field-induced mode-selective quantum criticality in the layered rare-earth magnet BaNd2ZnS5 (BNZS). Below the Neel temperature TN = 2.9 K, spin-orbit-entangled Nd3+ moments form two symmetry-inequivalent low-energy spin-excitation modes arising from Kramers doublet physics under a magnetic field, with distinct gaps Delta_L and Delta_H. For magnetic fields applied along the [110] direction, the lower-energy gap Delta_L softens continuously and collapses at a critical field Hc ~ 2 T, while the higher-energy gap Delta_H remains gapped, leaving the system in an intermediate partially critical phase. Despite the partial nature of the criticality, thermodynamic measurements reveal a continuous quantum phase transition. The ac susceptibility shows universal scaling behavior, with chiₐc(T, H) collapsing onto a single scaling function and following chiₐc ~ T⁻⁰.2 at criticality. A finite residual Sommerfeld coefficient gamma₀ further indicates the emergence of gapless excitations confined to a single symmetry sector near the quantum critical point. In contrast to conventional quantum criticality based on global softening of low-energy excitations, BNZS exhibits a selective breakdown of Kramers-doublet excitations due to its strong anisotropic interactions. Our results establish BNZS as a spin-orbit-coupled rare-earth magnet where quantum criticality is not global but mode-selective, with anisotropic interactions enabling independent criticality in distinct excitation sectors.

35

面内Hall响应的区分与分离#

Distinguishing and Separating In-Plane Hall Responses
📚 arXiv👤 Soumya Sankar, Xingkai Cheng, Junwei Liu, Berthold Jäck📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文建立了一套基于对称性分析的普适解缠框架，首次实现面内Hall效应中各向异性与Berry曲率贡献的实验分离。以Fe₃Sn为原型，通过12端器件的精密角度调控验证理论预测，为拓扑磁性材料中几何霍尔响应
本文提出普适框架，通过不同的场反转对称性和角度依赖性，解缠面内磁场产生电Hall效应中各向异性和Berry曲率效应等多重贡献。利用12端Hall器件独立控制电场和面内磁场方向，以铁磁性Weyl半金属Fe₃Sn为例分析面内几何构型下记录的横向电压。该标准化方法为未来磁性及拓扑材料中面内Hall响应研究提供指导。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文提出普适框架，通过不同的场反转对称性和角度依赖性，解缠面内磁场产生电Hall效应中各向异性和Berry曲率效应等多重贡献。利用12端Hall器件独立控制电场和面内磁场方向，以铁磁性Weyl半金属Fe₃Sn为例分析面内几何构型下记录的横向电压。该标准化方法为未来磁性及拓扑材料中面内Hall响应研究提供指导。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20227v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Electric Hall effects generated by an in-plane magnetic field have recently gained attention owing to their intrinsic origin in topological electronic states and potential application in magnetic field sensing. In pratice, the measured transverse electric voltage typically combines contributions from multiple phenomena, such as anisotropy and Berry curvature effects, leading to interpretative ambiguities of the measurement signal. Here, we introduce a universal framework that disentangles these contributions via their distinct field-reversal symmetries and angular dependencies. Leveraging a 12-terminal Hall bar for independent control of the electric and in-plane magnetic field directions, we exemplify this method by analyzing the transverse electric voltage recorded on the the ferromagnetic Weyl semimetal Fe3Sn in an in-plane geometry. The standardized approach presented in this work will guide future studies of in-plane Hall responses in magnetic and topological materials.

36

源自层-轨道量子几何的本征磁电Hall效应#

Intrinsic Magnetoelectric Hall Effect from Layer-Orbital Quantum Geometry
📚 arXiv👤 Sunit Das, Amit Agarwal📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文揭示层状材料中电场与磁场通过层极化-轨道矩耦合诱导混合层-轨道量子几何，产生本征、无耗散、双线性磁电Hall效应。该机制突破自旋-轨道耦合限制，为栅极可调拓扑输运及低维量子材料功能器件设计开辟新途
本文证明层状材料中外加电场和磁场的联合作用与层极化和轨道矩耦合，在场修饰的Bloch态中产生混合层-轨道量子几何，从而产生对电场和磁场双线性依赖的本征磁电Hall效应。该响应与散射时间无关，可在无自旋-轨道耦合的非磁性系统中出现。其起源涉及层极化和轨道矩的带间相干，导致在能隙中持续存在的有限非量子化Hall响应。Hall系数对栅极反转呈奇性并追踪层极化。对称性分析确定了承载该效应的层状材料类别，并在菱形五层石墨烯中实现电导率达0.05…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文证明层状材料中外加电场和磁场的联合作用与层极化和轨道矩耦合，在场修饰的Bloch态中产生混合层-轨道量子几何，从而产生对电场和磁场双线性依赖的本征磁电Hall效应。该响应与散射时间无关，可在无自旋-轨道耦合的非磁性系统中出现。其起源涉及层极化和轨道矩的带间相干，导致在能隙中持续存在的有限非量子化Hall响应。Hall系数对栅极反转呈奇性并追踪层极化。对称性分析确定了承载该效应的层状材料类别，并在菱形五层石墨烯中实现电导率达0.05 e²/h量级。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20249v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Intrinsic Hall effects, such as the anomalous Hall effect, originate from the orbital quantum geometry of Bloch states. However, in layered materials, the combined action of out-of-plane electric and magnetic fields couples to layer polarization and orbital moment, generating a mixed layer-orbital quantum geometry in field-dressed Bloch states. We show that this geometry produces an intrinsic magnetoelectric Hall effect that is bilinear in the electric and magnetic fields. The response is scattering-time independent and can arise in nonmagnetic systems without spin-orbit coupling. Its origin lies in interband coherence involving layer polarization and orbital moment, leading to a finite, non-quantized Hall response that persists in the band gap. The Hall coefficient is odd under gate reversal and tracks layer polarization. A symmetry analysis identifies the classes of layered materials that host this effect. As a representative realization, we demonstrate the effect in rhombohedral pentalayer graphene, where the conductivity reaches values of order 0.05,e²/h. These results establish mixed layer-orbital quantum geometry as a mechanism for intrinsic magnetoelectric Hall transport and a direct probe of layer-resolved quantum geometry in Bloch bands.

37

门控超导交替磁异质结构中的完美自旋非互易性#

Perfect spin nonreciprocity in gated superconducting altermagnetic heterostructures
📚 arXiv👤 Pei-Hao Fu, Jun-Feng Liu, Luca Chirolli, Jorge Cayao📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究提出了一种基于门控超导交替磁异质结构的新机制，通过动量选择匹配实现近乎完美的自旋非互易性。核心创新在于利用交替磁性的动量依赖自旋分裂特性，将方向性滤波与超导输运结合，突破了传统自旋电子学器件的非
该研究在超导交替磁异质结构中展示了交替磁性与其横动量通道选择性滤波器之间的相互作用可实现完美的非互易自旋极化电流。通过在超导交替磁体与金属储层之间门控有限正常区域，方向性选择匹配动量依赖自旋分裂超导交替磁态的输运通道，从而在局域和非局域自旋电流中均产生非互易性。研究发现局域和非局域自旋非互易性具有高度可调极性和近乎完美的品质因数，可通过栅压和有限区域长度变化实现调控，且局域和非局域电荷电流也发展出非互易行为。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在超导交替磁异质结构中展示了交替磁性与其横动量通道选择性滤波器之间的相互作用可实现完美的非互易自旋极化电流。通过在超导交替磁体与金属储层之间门控有限正常区域，方向性选择匹配动量依赖自旋分裂超导交替磁态的输运通道，从而在局域和非局域自旋电流中均产生非互易性。研究发现局域和非局域自旋非互易性具有高度可调极性和近乎完美的品质因数，可通过栅压和有限区域长度变化实现调控，且局域和非局域电荷电流也发展出非互易行为。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20312v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We consider a superconducting altermagnet heterostructure and demonstrate that the interplay between altermagnetism and a selective filter of transverse momentum channels enables perfect nonreciprocal spin-polarized currents. We demonstrate that this nonreciprocity manifests in both local and nonlocal spin currents, signalling the emergence of directionally selective local and nonlocal spin behaviors. We show that the selective filter of transverse momentum channels is realized by gating a finite normal region between the superconducting altermagnet and the metallic reservoir, which then directionally selects transport channels that match the momentum-dependent spin-split superconducting altermagnetic states, allowing for nonreciprocal spin-polarized currents. We discover that the local and nonlocal spin nonreciprocity features a highly tunable polarity and nearly perfect quality factors, respectively, which is achieved by means of gate voltages and by varying the length of the finite region. Moreover, we find that local and nonlocal charge currents also develop a nonreciprocal behavior, whose quality factors can also reach perfect values. In all cases, the spin and charge currents are sensitive to variations of the altermagnetic field, a functional dependence that can be exploited to identify the type of altermagnetism. Our findings put forward an electrically controllable route towards nonreciprocal superconducting spintronic devices based on altermagnets.

38

受挫Sr₃CuNb₂O₉中无序驱动的不同动力学态共存：μSR与⁹³Nb NMR微观研究#

Disorder-driven coexistence of distinct dynamical states in frustrated Sr₃CuNb₂O₉: a microscopic μSR and ⁹³Nb NMR study
📚 arXiv👤 M. Biswas, K. Bhattacharya, K. M. Ranjith, S. M. Hossain, S. S. Islam, M. Naskar, R. Sarkar, B. Büchner, T. Shiroka, H. -J. Grafe, M. Majumder📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在三维受挫磁体中通过μSR与⁹³Nb NMR联用，微观证实无序诱导的随机单态相中存在快慢两种分离的自旋弛豫通道，揭示了无序驱动的多动力学态共存机制，为理解量子自旋液体及无序磁性材料的基态本质
该工作对三维受挫磁体Sr₃CuNb₂O₉进行了μ子自旋弛豫（μSR）和⁹³Nb核磁共振（NMR）的微观研究，该体系被认为是无磁位点无序宿主随机单态（RS）基态的罕见三维实例。μSR零场弛豫率显示随温度呈幂律发散，纵向磁场下的弛豫率也呈现幂律发散，与RS相形成一致。⁹³Nb NMR谱明确分辨出两种具有不同局域磁环境的组分，通过逆拉普拉斯变换（ILT）分析自旋-晶格弛豫测量，揭示出快、慢两个分离的弛豫通道，表明无序驱动的不同动力学态共存。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对三维受挫磁体Sr₃CuNb₂O₉进行了μ子自旋弛豫（μSR）和⁹³Nb核磁共振（NMR）的微观研究，该体系被认为是无磁位点无序宿主随机单态（RS）基态的罕见三维实例。μSR零场弛豫率显示随温度呈幂律发散，纵向磁场下的弛豫率也呈现幂律发散，与RS相形成一致。⁹³Nb NMR谱明确分辨出两种具有不同局域磁环境的组分，通过逆拉普拉斯变换（ILT）分析自旋-晶格弛豫测量，揭示出快、慢两个分离的弛豫通道，表明无序驱动的不同动力学态共存。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20337v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Despite recent progress in identifying the exotic random singlet (RS) state in disordered frustrated magnets as a distinct correlated phase, three-dimensional (3D) realizations remain scarce. Sr₃CuNb₂O₉ was proposed to be one of such 3D frustrated systems with magnetic site disorder hosting an RS ground state. Here, we report a detailed microscopic investigation of Sr₃CuNb₂O₉ employing muon spin relaxation (μSR) and ⁹³Nb nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) techniques. The μSR zero-field relaxation rate reveals a power-law divergence of the relaxation rate as a function of temperature. Also, a power-law divergence is present in the relaxation rate as a function of applied longitudinal field, consistent with the formation of an RS phase. The ⁹³Nb NMR spectra unambiguously resolve two components with distinct local magnetic environments, whose nature is further elucidated through spin-lattice relaxation measurements analyzed via an inverse Laplace transform (ILT) of the nuclear magnetization recovery. The relaxation-rate distribution obtained from ILT reveals two well-separated channels: a fast component, (1/T₁₎fₐₛₜ, and a slow component, (1/T₁₎ₛₗₒw. Both components follow distinct power-law temperature dependences (Tα), with α = 0.6 and 1.1 for the fast and slow channels, respectively. The combined spectral and relaxation data demonstrate that the fast channel qualitatively represents an RS-like state, whereas the slow channel exhibits quantum spin liquid (QSL) like behavior, thereby establishing the microscopic coexistence of RS and QSL-like phases in Sr₃CuNb₂O₉.

39

室温铁磁体中的辛联络三阶霍尔效应#

Symplectic connection third-order Hall effect in a room-temperature ferromagnet
📚 arXiv👤 Yu Cao, Xukun Feng, Yiming Guo, Huiying Liu, Qia Shen, Hongliang Chen, Wanxi Gong, Yu Yang, Dandan Guan, Yaoyi Li, Shiyong Wang, Hao Zheng, Canhua Liu, Xiaoxue Liu, Yumeng Yang, Xuepeng Qiu, Ruidan Zhong, Jinfeng Jia, Shengyuan A. Yang, Cong Xiao, Liang Liu📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在室温范德华铁磁体中揭示由辛联络诱导的三阶非线性霍尔效应，突破了传统贝里曲率框架，为高阶量子几何量的实验探测提供新范式，拓展了非线性输运研究至更广泛的磁性材料体系。
该工作在室温范德华铁磁体Fe3GaTe₂中发现了一种 fundamentally new 的三阶非线性霍尔效应（THE），其源于二阶贝里联络极化率，表现为带几何的高阶表征——辛联络。观测显示三阶横向响应对磁化呈奇性，居里温度以上消失且与驱动电流方向无关。标度律分析结合第一性原理计算确立了该响应为辛联络诱导的THE，为通过非线性输运探测超越贝里曲率和量子度量的高阶量子几何性质开辟了新途径，展示了在广泛不破缺反演对称性的磁体中探索非线性霍…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在室温范德华铁磁体Fe3GaTe₂中发现了一种 fundamentally new 的三阶非线性霍尔效应（THE），其源于二阶贝里联络极化率，表现为带几何的高阶表征——辛联络。观测显示三阶横向响应对磁化呈奇性，居里温度以上消失且与驱动电流方向无关。标度律分析结合第一性原理计算确立了该响应为辛联络诱导的THE，为通过非线性输运探测超越贝里曲率和量子度量的高阶量子几何性质开辟了新途径，展示了在广泛不破缺反演对称性的磁体中探索非线性霍尔现象的潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20356v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Third-order nonlinear Hall effects (THE) have recently attracted considerable experimental interest as powerful probes for quantum geometric properties in emergent quantum materials, encompassing quadrupole moments of quantum metric and Berry curvature. Here, we report a fundamentally new THE in room-temperature van der Waals ferromagnet Fe3GaTe2 from second-order Berry connection polarizability, which manifests a higher-order characterization of band geometry called symplectic connection. Our observations show that the third-order transverse response in Fe3GaTe2 is odd to magnetization, vanishes above the Curie temperature and remains independent of driving current directions. Scaling law analysis combined with first-principles calculations establishes this response as the symplectic-connection-induced THE. This discovery opens the door to probing high-order quantum geometric properties beyond Berry curvature and quantum metric through nonlinear transport, unveiling the potential of exploring nonlinear Hall phenomena in broad classes of magnets without breaking inversion symmetry. Moreover, the room-temperature manipulation of THE holds promises for device applications based on harnessing the quantum-geometric connection structure.

40

将纳米颗粒形状纳入宏自旋模型#

Including nanoparticle shape into macrospin models
📚 arXiv👤 Iago López-Vázquez, Òscar Iglesias, David Serantes📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统宏自旋模型忽略形貌效应的局限，首创性地将超椭球几何参数化与扩展Stoner-Wohlfarth模型相结合，建立了纳米颗粒形状-尺寸-有效磁参数的定量映射关系，为设计具有靶向磁响应的生物医
该研究评估了宏自旋近似描述具有实际几何形状的软磁纳米颗粒（MNPs）的可行性。以磁铁矿为对象，采用超椭球参数化涵盖从球形到立方形及不同伸长比的多种形状，通过全微磁模拟与扩展Stoner-Wohlfarth模型（同时包含本征立方磁晶各向异性和颗粒伸长引起的有效单轴贡献）得到的角依赖磁滞回线进行直接比较。宏自旋描述的适用范围约为：轴比r>1.5时10-60 nm，1.0<r<1.5时20-60 nm，建立了纳米颗粒形貌与有效宏自旋参数之间…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究评估了宏自旋近似描述具有实际几何形状的软磁纳米颗粒（MNPs）的可行性。以磁铁矿为对象，采用超椭球参数化涵盖从球形到立方形及不同伸长比的多种形状，通过全微磁模拟与扩展Stoner-Wohlfarth模型（同时包含本征立方磁晶各向异性和颗粒伸长引起的有效单轴贡献）得到的角依赖磁滞回线进行直接比较。宏自旋描述的适用范围约为：轴比r>1.5时10-60 nm，1.0<r<1.5时20-60 nm，建立了纳米颗粒形貌与有效宏自旋参数之间的直接联系。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20450v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the feasibility of the macrospin approximation to account for the actual shape of soft magnetic nanoparticles (MNPs) with realistic geometries. Specifically focusing on magnetite, we use the superellipsoidal parametrisation to account for a variety of shapes, with a continuous interpolation from spherical to cubic morphologies, as well as different elongations. Our procedure consists of the direct comparison between angular-dependent hysteresis loops obtained by full micromagnetic simulations, with those produced by an extended Stoner-Wohlfarth (SW) model that incorporates both the intrinsic cubic magnetocrystalline anisotropy, and an effective uniaxial contribution arising from the particle elongation. The limits of validity of the macrospin description are approximately 10-60 nm for axial ratios r>1.5, and 20-60 nm for 1.0<1.5. These results establish a direct connection between nanoparticle morphology and effective macrospin parameters, demonstrating the suitability of the generalized SW model for describing the magnetic response of realistically shaped MNPs.

41

逆法拉第效应诱导的铋铁石榴石米氏球中的自旋波杂化#

Spin-wave hybridization in bismuth iron garnet Mie spheres induced by the inverse Faraday effect
📚 arXiv👤 Fedor Shuklin, Khristina Albitskaya, Alexander Chernov, Mihail Petrov📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次利用逆法拉第效应在BIG米氏球中实现光学可控的自旋波杂化，通过米氏共振构建空间结构化的有效磁场，打破磁子宇称选择定则，为光-磁子耦合及量子信息处理提供了新范式。
该研究展示了利用逆法拉第效应在亚铁磁性铋铁石榴石（BIG）米氏球中调控偶极-交换自旋波谱。内部光学米氏共振产生空间结构化的有效磁场，其对称性继承自光学近场，作为磁子哈密顿量的可控微扰。对于沿平衡磁化方向入射的圆偏振光，光学微扰保持轴对称性而破缺镜像宇称，从而在同一Ĵz扇区内实现相反宇称磁子模式的杂化。耦合模理论推导了相应的避免交叉谱和诱导能级分裂的解析表达式，分裂大小与泵浦强度呈线性关系；BIG球的数值计算证实了预测的杂化，且在光学米…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究展示了利用逆法拉第效应在亚铁磁性铋铁石榴石（BIG）米氏球中调控偶极-交换自旋波谱。内部光学米氏共振产生空间结构化的有效磁场，其对称性继承自光学近场，作为磁子哈密顿量的可控微扰。对于沿平衡磁化方向入射的圆偏振光，光学微扰保持轴对称性而破缺镜像宇称，从而在同一Ĵz扇区内实现相反宇称磁子模式的杂化。耦合模理论推导了相应的避免交叉谱和诱导能级分裂的解析表达式，分裂大小与泵浦强度呈线性关系；BIG球的数值计算证实了预测的杂化，且在光学米氏共振附近分裂最大。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20479v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We show that the inverse Faraday effect can be used to engineer dipole--exchange spin-wave spectra in ferrimagnetic bismuth iron garnet (BIG) Mie spheres. Internal optical Mie resonances generate spatially structured effective magnetic fields whose symmetry is inherited from the optical near field and which act as controllable perturbations of the magnon Hamiltonian. For circularly polarized light incident collinearly with the equilibrium magnetization, the optical perturbation preserves axial symmetry while breaking mirror parity, thereby enabling hybridization of magnon modes with opposite parity within the same widehatJ_z sector. Using coupled-mode theory, we derive the corresponding avoided-crossing spectrum and analytical expressions for the induced level splittings, which scale linearly with pump intensity. Numerical calculations for BIG spheres confirm the predicted hybridization and show that the splitting is maximized near optical Mie resonances, where field enhancement and magneto-optical response are strongest. We further discuss the roles of damping, linewidth, and heating, and show that the predicted MHz--hundreds-of-MHz splittings should be observable under realistic conditions. These results identify BIG Mie resonators as a promising platform for symmetry-selective optical control of spin-wave spectra.

42

笼目金属中宇称破缺手性极性-向列电荷密度波与超导的发现#

Discovery of parity-violating chiral polar-nematic charge density wave and superconductivity in kagome metals
📚 arXiv👤 Xingwei Shi, Geng Li, Zhan Wang, Chuqi Zhang, Ke Zhu, Keyu Zeng, Zikun Tang, Li Huang, Zhen Zhao, Jianping Sun, Xiao Liu, Jin-Guang Cheng, Chengmin Shen, Shu Ping Lau, Kian Ping Loh, Haitao Yang, Xiao Lin, Ziqiang Wang, Hong-Jun Gao📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在笼目金属中揭示了一种新型混合宇称电荷密度波态——手性极性-向列CDW，其兼具铁电偶极与向列四极有序，并通过多极耦合实现电场可控的手性操控。这一发现为探索关联电子体系中拓扑超导、量子计算及新
该研究利用扫描隧道显微镜结合原子力显微镜和光学二次谐波产生，直接揭示了非磁性笼目金属超导体AV₃Sb₅（A=K,Rb,Cs）的CDW态中笼目面内反演对称性自发破缺。混合宇称CDW态同时表现出铁电偶极和向列四极有序矩，偶极与四极的共存和耦合有利于非共线铁电极性和向列排列，破缺所有镜面对称性并在3Q CDW中产生稳健的电子手性。多极耦合使面内电场能够电控和操控手性极性-向列CDW态及其手性。在超导转变以下，观察到在原始晶格和CDW晶格波矢…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用扫描隧道显微镜结合原子力显微镜和光学二次谐波产生，直接揭示了非磁性笼目金属超导体AV₃Sb₅（A=K,Rb,Cs）的CDW态中笼目面内反演对称性自发破缺。混合宇称CDW态同时表现出铁电偶极和向列四极有序矩，偶极与四极的共存和耦合有利于非共线铁电极性和向列排列，破缺所有镜面对称性并在3Q CDW中产生稳健的电子手性。多极耦合使面内电场能够电控和操控手性极性-向列CDW态及其手性。在超导转变以下，观察到在原始晶格和CDW晶格波矢处均存在宇称破缺的配对密度调制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20546v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Nonmagnetic kagome metals and superconductors AV3Sb5 (A = K, Rb, Cs) host unconventional charge density wave (CDW) and superconducting (SC) phases accompanied by multiple electronic symmetry breaking. Due to the centrosymmetric crystal structure, inversion symmetry has generally been assumed to hold. Here, using scanning tunneling microscopy complemented by atomic force microscopy and optical second-harmonic generation, we directly reveal that inversion symmetry in the kagome plane is spontaneously broken in the CDW state. The mixed-parity CDW state exhibits ferroelectric dipolar and nematic quadrupolar ordered moments. The coexistence and coupling between the dipole and quadrupole favor noncollinear ferro-polar and nematic alignment that breaks all mirror symmetries and gives rise to robust electronic chirality in the 3Q CDW. The multipolar coupling to in-plane electric field enables electric field control and manipulation of the chiral polar-nematic CDW state, including its chirality. Below the SC transition, we observe parity-violating pair density modulations at both the original and the CDW lattice wavevectors. Our findings of parity-violating electronic chiral multipolar order provide microscopic insights into the magnetoelectric and nonreciprocal transport, loop current order, pairing density waves, and unconventional superconductivity in kagome metals and related quantum materials.

43

磁铁矿中的极化子输运与Verwey相变#

Polaron transport and Verwey transition in magnetite
📚 arXiv👤 Nikita Fominykh, Vladimir Stegailov📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统Ihle-Lorentz小极化子模型框架，首次实现极化子-声子耦合的第一性原理动态模拟，揭示Verwey相变本质为trimeron集体输运而非能带突变，为强关联电子体系相变机制研究提供新
该工作提出基于第一性原理的极化子输运模型，结合动力学蒙特卡洛和分子动力学计算直接描述极化子与晶格振动的耦合，以解决磁铁矿Fe₃O₄ Verwey相变长达近百年的谜团。与Ihle-Lorentz小极化子模型不同，研究发现Verwey相变前后能带结构无显著变化，但观察到trimeron跳跃。该模型给出的直流电导率与实验数据在整个Verwey相变区间吻合。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出基于第一性原理的极化子输运模型，结合动力学蒙特卡洛和分子动力学计算直接描述极化子与晶格振动的耦合，以解决磁铁矿Fe₃O₄ Verwey相变长达近百年的谜团。与Ihle-Lorentz小极化子模型不同，研究发现Verwey相变前后能带结构无显著变化，但观察到trimeron跳跃。该模型给出的直流电导率与实验数据在整个Verwey相变区间吻合。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20642v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The enigmatic puzzle of the Verwey transition in magnetite Fe₃O₄ has been unresolved for almost a century. We present an ab initio-based model of the polaron transport combining kinetic Monte Carlo and molecular dynamics calculations to directly describe the coupling of polarons with lattice vibrations. Contrary to the Ihle-Lorentz small-polaron model, we find no significant change in the band structure across the Verwey transition, however, trimeron hopping is observed. The proposed model provides dc-conductivity in agreement with experimental data across the Verwey transition.

44

[001]织构Co₈₀Ir₂₀薄膜中的负磁晶各向异性应变效应#

Strain effects in [001] textured Co80Ir20 thin films with negative magnetocrystalline anisotropy
📚 arXiv👤 L. Aviles Felix, M. Vasquez Mansilla, J. E. Gomez, M. Balod, J. Padilla, J. Santiso, Subhakanta Das, S. N. Piramanayagam, A. Butera📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地揭示了[001]织构Co₈₀Ir₂₀薄膜中负磁晶各向异性与晶格应变的定量关联，通过底层工程实现应变调控而不破坏织构与晶粒结构，为开发应变可调的垂直磁各向异性存储器件提供了新思路。
该工作详细分析24 nm Co₈₀Ir₂₀铁磁薄膜的磁弹效应，通过不同底层（Ta、Pt）和覆盖层诱导[001]织构生长及不同程度应变。X射线衍射发现c轴晶格参数依赖于底层材料（Ta产生更大负应变），但织构程度和平均晶粒尺寸基本不变。室温磁化曲线和温变直流磁化测量显示不同底层导致的磁性行为差异，铁磁共振定量各向异性表明有效各向异性受应变调控，该工作围绕应变对负磁晶各向异性薄膜磁性的影响展开。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作详细分析24 nm Co₈₀Ir₂₀铁磁薄膜的磁弹效应，通过不同底层（Ta、Pt）和覆盖层诱导[001]织构生长及不同程度应变。X射线衍射发现c轴晶格参数依赖于底层材料（Ta产生更大负应变），但织构程度和平均晶粒尺寸基本不变。室温磁化曲线和温变直流磁化测量显示不同底层导致的磁性行为差异，铁磁共振定量各向异性表明有效各向异性受应变调控，该工作围绕应变对负磁晶各向异性薄膜磁性的影响展开。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20645v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Co80Ir20 ferromagnetic thin films have recently been the focus of intensive research because the negative magnetocrystalline anisotropy adds to the shape anisotropy and favors a strong alignment of the magnetization in the film plane for [001] textured or epitaxial thin films. However, the role of magnetoelastic effects has not been properly considered in most published research. In this work we have performed a detailed analysis of 24 nm Co80Ir20 thin films deposited on Si/SiO2 with different underlayers (Ta, Pt) and overlayers in order to induce [001]-textured growth and different degrees of strain. Using x-ray diffraction measurements we have found that the c-axis lattice parameter depends on the underlayer material (larger negative strain for Ta), but the degree of texture and the average grain size remain essentially constant, except for one of the multilayers. Differences in the magnetic behavior according to the underlayer were also found in room temperature magnetization vs field loops and temperature dependent dc magnetization measurements. Anisotropy was quantified using ferromagnetic resonance which showed that the effective anisotropy field is also dependent on the underlayer. Ta underlayers show an anisotropy close to that expected for shape, while Pt underlayer induces an additional in-plane anisotropy field of the order of 7-9 kOe. A simple model of stress induced anisotropy gives anisotropy field values similar to those observed experimentally. The correlation between observed strain and anisotropy together with the similarity in microstructural properties strongly suggests that stress effects cannot be disregarded when analyzing the magnetic data for the estimation of the magnetocrystalline contribution.

45

具有高可靠高温性能的无唤醒铁电电容器的工程化设计#

Engineering Wake-Up-Free Ferroelectric Capacitors with Enhanced High-Temperature Reliability
📚 arXiv👤 Nashrah Afroze, Salma Soliman, Yu-Hsin Kuo, Sanghyun Kang, Mengkun Tian, Priyankka Ravikumar, Andrea Padovani, Asif Khan📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示了氧化钨界面层是实现铁电HZO器件高温无唤醒与高耐久性的关键，而非PE-ALD薄膜本身。这一界面工程策略为汽车电子等高温场景下的高可靠铁电存储器设计提供了明确路径。
该工作系统探索铁电铪锆氧（HZO）异质结构在高温可靠运行方面的设计空间，采用热法和等离子体增强原子层沉积（Th-ALD和PE-ALD）在W和TiN底电极上沉积HZO薄膜。发现PE-ALD HZO/W器件在125°C下呈现无唤醒开关，并在宽温区（85-125°C）显著改善耐久性。通过解耦PE-ALD沉积的HZO薄膜与氧化底界面的贡献，确定氧化的W界面层（WOx）是高温耐久性增强和唤醒抑制的主因，而PE-ALD HZO薄膜提供减少唤醒的次…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作系统探索铁电铪锆氧（HZO）异质结构在高温可靠运行方面的设计空间，采用热法和等离子体增强原子层沉积（Th-ALD和PE-ALD）在W和TiN底电极上沉积HZO薄膜。发现PE-ALD HZO/W器件在125°C下呈现无唤醒开关，并在宽温区（85-125°C）显著改善耐久性。通过解耦PE-ALD沉积的HZO薄膜与氧化底界面的贡献，确定氧化的W界面层（WOx）是高温耐久性增强和唤醒抑制的主因，而PE-ALD HZO薄膜提供减少唤醒的次要益处；相反，TiN底电极的PE-ALD HZO器件无显著改善。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20698v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We systematically explore the design space of ferroelectric hafnium-zirconium oxide (H0.5Z0.5O or HZO) heterostructures for reliable high temperature operation. HZO films are deposited using thermal and plasma-enhanced atomic layer deposition (Th-ALD and PE-ALD) on tungsten (W) and titanium nitride (TiN) bottom electrodes (BE), while maintaining identical top electrodes. We demonstrate that PE-ALD HZO capacitors integrated with W BE exhibit wake-up-free switching up to 125C, along with significantly improved endurance compared to Th-ALD HZO/W devices across a wide temperature range (85-125C). By decoupling the contributions of the plasma-deposited HZO film and the oxidized bottom interface inherently formed during PE-ALD, we identify the oxidized W interfacial layer (WOx) as the primary factor governing endurance enhancement and wake-up suppression at elevated temperatures, while the PE-ALD HZO film provides secondary benefits in reducing wake-up. In contrast, PE-ALD HZO capacitors fabricated on TiN BE show no substantial improvement in wake-up behavior or endurance relative to Th-ALD HZO/TiN devices, despite the formation of an unintentional TiOxNy interfacial layer, and instead exhibit degraded polarization. This difference arises from the significantly weaker endurance enhancement and no wake-up suppression provided by oxidized TiN compared to oxidized W under comparable oxidation conditions. Overall, PE-ALD HZO films enable superior ferroelectric performance at elevated temperatures only when deposited on W BE, while Th-ALD HZO films remain a viable option for high temperature operation on TiN BE. These findings clarify the interplay between deposition technique, electrode chemistry, and interfacial oxidation, and provide design guidelines for integrating ferroelectric memories into monolithic 3D systems under stringent thermal constraints.

46

长程自旋-1链中的非传统量子临界性：来自纠缠熵和双粒子涨落的洞见#

Unconventional Quantum Criticality in Long-Range Spin-1 Chains: Insights from Entanglement Entropy and Bipartite Fluctuations
📚 arXiv👤 Justin Tim-Lok Chau, Jiarui Zhao, Nicolas Laflorencie, Zi Yang Meng📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将分裂自旋表示与量子蒙特卡洛结合，突破自旋-1系统模拟瓶颈，首次精确确定长程相互作用下Haldane-Néel相变的非共形临界行为（z≠1）。通过纠缠熵与双粒子涨落的标度分析，为理解超越
该工作采用基于分裂自旋表示的量子蒙特卡洛方法研究具有交错长程相互作用（按r⁻ᵃ衰减）的自旋-1海森堡链基态相图，将自旋-1模型映射为具局域投影约束的自旋-1/2自由度以实现大规模模拟。确定大α（短程）Haldane相与小α（长程）无能隙反铁磁Néel相之间的连续量子相变临界点α_c = 2.48(2)，提取的临界指数表明非传统临界性：该过渡为非共形，动力学指数z ≠ 1。进一步分析纠缠熵和双粒子涨落的标度行为，确定两相及临界点的普适标…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用基于分裂自旋表示的量子蒙特卡洛方法研究具有交错长程相互作用（按r⁻ᵃ衰减）的自旋-1海森堡链基态相图，将自旋-1模型映射为具局域投影约束的自旋-1/2自由度以实现大规模模拟。确定大α（短程）Haldane相与小α（长程）无能隙反铁磁Néel相之间的连续量子相变临界点α_c = 2.48(2)，提取的临界指数表明非传统临界性：该过渡为非共形，动力学指数z ≠ 1。进一步分析纠缠熵和双粒子涨落的标度行为，确定两相及临界点的普适标度。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.20831v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study the ground-state phase diagram of a spin-1 Heisenberg chain with staggered long-range (LR) interactions decaying as propto r⁻α using a quantum Monte Carlo approach based on the split-spin representation. This formulation enables efficient large-scale simulations by mapping the spin-1 model onto spin-1/2 degrees of freedom with local projection constraints. We resolve the continuous quantum phase transition between the gapped Haldane phase at large α (short-range regime) and a gapless antiferromagnetically ordered Néel phase at small α (LR regime), where the continuous SU(2) symmetry is broken. From finite-size scaling and crossing point analyses, we determine the critical point to be at α_c = 2.48(2) and extract the associated critical exponents, which indicate unconventional criticality. In particular, the transition is found to be nonconformal, characterized by a dynamic exponent z ≠ 1. We further analyze the scaling of entanglement entropy and bipartite fluctuations across the transition, and determine the corresponding universal scalings in both phases and at criticality.

47

受挫反铁磁体TbBO₃中的类自旋液体自旋动力学#

Spin-liquid-like spin dynamics in the frustrated antiferromagnet TbBO3
📚 arXiv👤 J. Khatua, D. Tay, T. Shiroka, M. Pregelj, K. Kargeti, S. K. Panda, G. B. G. Stenning, P. Manuel, M. D. Le, D. T. Adroja, P. Khuntia📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究在受挫反铁磁体TbBO₃中揭示了一种新型类自旋液体态，核心创新在于通过极低温μSR实验证实强交换耦合下仍无磁有序的持续动力学行为。其意义在于拓展了量子自旋液体的材料体系，并为理解几何阻挫与量子涨
该工作通过热力学测量和μ子自旋弛豫等局域探针技术，在低至16 mK下研究畸变三角晶格TbBO₃的奇异磁性。实验发现尽管存在显著的反铁磁交换作用，但未探测到长程磁有序或自旋冻结迹象，表明该受挫体系中存在持续自旋动力学。与其他自旋液体候选材料的标度行为对比暗示存在共同的底层机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过热力学测量和μ子自旋弛豫等局域探针技术，在低至16 mK下研究畸变三角晶格TbBO₃的奇异磁性。实验发现尽管存在显著的反铁磁交换作用，但未探测到长程磁有序或自旋冻结迹象，表明该受挫体系中存在持续自旋动力学。与其他自旋液体候选材料的标度行为对比暗示存在共同的底层机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2407.05867v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The synergistic interplay between spin correlations, spin-orbit coupling, and competing exchange interactions provides a promising route to realize exotic quantum states with nontrivial excitations in rare-earth based frustrated magnets. Here, by using thermodynamic and local-probe measurements down to 16 mK, we demonstrate the exotic magnetism and spin dynamics in the distorted triangular lattice TbBO3. Thermodynamic experiments reveal the presence of dominant antiferromagnetic exchange and subdominant dipolar interactions. Despite sizable antiferromagnetic exchange interactions between the Tb3+ moments, muon-spin relaxation experiment does not detect any signatures of long-range magnetic order or spin-freezing down to 16 mK, corroborating the specific heat and ac magnetic susceptibility down to 45 mK that suggests a persistent spin dynamics in this frustrated triangular lattice. The scaling of muon relaxation rate as a function of the characteristic energy scale for several spin-liquid candidates, including TbBO3, demonstrates that a common underlying mechanism is at play. The persistent dynamics in this frustrated triangular lattice antiferromagnet is reminiscent of a universal spin-liquid-like spin fluctuations, here attributed to dominant two dimensional (2D) antiferromagnetic short-range spin correlations, confirmed by the presence of a broad magnetic diffuse scattering in the elastic and low-energy inelastic neutron scattering channels at Q ~ 1.03 Ang**⁻¹** at low temperatures. Our results demonstrate that non-Kramers ion based triangular lattice hosts spin-liquid-like dynamics of local moments arising from the admixture of excited crystal electric field states into the ground state and intertwining of frustration and spin-orbit interaction.

48

具有Néel序锁定电极化的交错磁性II型多铁材料#

Altermagnetic type-II Multiferroics with Néel-order-locked Electric Polarization
📚 arXiv👤 Wen-Ti Guo, Junqi Xu, Yurong Yang, Haijun Zhang, Huaiqiang Wang📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统多铁材料局限，首次揭示交错磁性Néel序本身即可诱导电极化，建立全新磁电耦合微观机制；系统分类二维体系磁电行为，为设计新型多铁材料及实验探测Néel序提供理论框架与可验证方案。
该工作结合对称性分析和微观理论，明确证明交错磁性Néel序可产生电极化，建立了交错磁性多铁体中Néel序锁定电极化的微观机制。对二维层群对称性控制的交错磁体，将磁电耦合行为分为八类，并以单层MgFe₂N₂为第一性原理计算的原型实例，提出利用磁光显微镜识别Néel序及伴随电极化。

中文摘要

该工作结合对称性分析和微观理论，明确证明交错磁性Néel序可产生电极化，建立了交错磁性多铁体中Néel序锁定电极化的微观机制。对二维层群对称性控制的交错磁体，将磁电耦合行为分为八类，并以单层MgFe₂N₂为第一性原理计算的原型实例，提出利用磁光显微镜识别Néel序及伴随电极化。

English Abstract

arXiv:2505.01964v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Altermagnetism, an emergent magnetic phase featuring compensated collinear magnetic moments and momentum-dependent spin splittings, has recently garnered widespread interest. A critical issue concerns whether the unconventional spin structures can generate spontaneous electric polarization in altermagnets, thereby achieving type-II multiferroicity. Here, with the combination of symmetry analysis and microscopic theory, we explicitly demonstrate the generation of electric polarization by altermagnetic Néel order, and establish a microscopic mechanism of Néel-order-locked electric polarization in altermagnetic multiferroics.~We further reveal these pronounced magnetoelectric coupling behaviors and classify them into eight distinct categories for two-dimensional altermagnets governed by layer group symmetries. Then we take monolayer MgFe₂N₂ as a prototypical example of altermagnetic type-II multiferroics by first-principles calculations. We also propose to identify the Néel order and accompanying electric polarization in altermagnetic multiferroics by magneto-optical microscopy. Bridging type-II multiferroics and altermagnets, our work could pave the way for altermagnetic multifunctional spintronics.

49

关联范德华金属中多q反铁磁电荷序的多样性#

Versatile multi-q antiferromagnetic charge order in correlated vdW metals
📚 arXiv👤 Y. Fujisawa, P. Wu, R. Okuma, B. R. M. Smith, D. Ueta, R. Kobayashi, N. Maekawa, T. Nakamura, C-H. Hsu, Chandan De, N. Tomoda, T. Higashihara, K. Morishita, T. Kato, Z. Y. Wang, Y. Okada📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在范德华金属CeTe₃中实现多种反铁磁电荷有序相（条纹/棋盘格）的原子级成像与磁场调控，揭示关联电子体系中磁性、电荷序与费米面不稳定性之间的深层耦合机制，为理解量子材料中多重受挫竞争电子态及
该工作在300 mK下利用扫描隧道显微镜/谱学揭示范德华金属CeTe₃中存在多种竞争电子态：形成条纹和棋盘格序的反铁磁电荷有序相。其竞争可通过约1.5 T的面内磁场调控，揭示反铁磁性、电荷序和费米面不稳定性之间的强纠缠多重受挫。准粒子干涉成像直接识别了这些竞争在代表性半金属费米面上的动量空间起源。

中文摘要

该工作在300 mK下利用扫描隧道显微镜/谱学揭示范德华金属CeTe₃中存在多种竞争电子态：形成条纹和棋盘格序的反铁磁电荷有序相。其竞争可通过约1.5 T的面内磁场调控，揭示反铁磁性、电荷序和费米面不稳定性之间的强纠缠多重受挫。准粒子干涉成像直接识别了这些竞争在代表性半金属费米面上的动量空间起源。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.00750v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Following the discovery of graphene, interest in van der Waals (vdW) materials has surged; however, advancing physics beyond graphene requires quantum vdW materials platforms that host versatile, strongly interacting many-body states. Here, using scanning tunneling microscopy and spectroscopy at 300 mK, we uncover multiple competing electronic states in the van der Waals metal CeTe3: charge-ordered antiferromagnetic phases forming stripe and checkerboard orders. Remarkably, their competition is tuned by a modest in-plane magnetic field (~1.5 T), revealing strongly intertwined multiple frustrations involving antiferromagnetism, charge order, and Fermi-surface instabilities. Quasiparticle-interference imaging directly identifies the momentum-space origin of these competitions on the representative semimetals Fermi surface. While the observations can be understood at a basic level in terms of Kondo coupling between localized Ce 4f moments and itinerant Te 5p electrons, our results reveal a much richer phenomenology: an unusually broad electronic reconstruction extending to an energy scale of roughly 30 meV from EF, which realizes and deforms antiferromagnetic charge-ordered states and signals strongly correlated interactions beyond a weak-coupling description. Beyond establishing CeTe3 as a model platform, our results demonstrate that competing instabilities in antiferromagnetic two-dimensional metals/semimetals generate versatile electronic phases, opening a route to tunable nanoscale quantum states governed by the intertwined effects of correlation, symmetry, and topology.

50

自旋条纹无序化导致的奇异金属与费米弧#

Strange metal and Fermi arcs from disordering spin stripes
📚 arXiv👤 Xu Zhang, Nick Bultinck📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将自旋向列相引入涨落自旋条纹理论，揭示势无序可作为非传统随机场驱动量子临界性，突破传统电子-玻色子耦合框架。其意义在于首次证明极短程反铁磁关联（4-5个晶格常数）即可形成费米弧，为铜基高
该工作重新审视与费米面耦合的涨落自旋条纹有效理论，考虑自旋向列相介入自旋密度波态与对称态之间的参数区。发现势无序作为非传统随机场无序，自然产生包含由电子-玻色子耦合空间无序普适理论描述的量子临界点的相图。蒙特卡洛模拟显示，仅4-5个晶格常数的短程反铁磁关联长度即可在电子谱权重中产生显著的费米弧。

中文摘要

该工作重新审视与费米面耦合的涨落自旋条纹有效理论，考虑自旋向列相介入自旋密度波态与对称态之间的参数区。发现势无序作为非传统随机场无序，自然产生包含由电子-玻色子耦合空间无序普适理论描述的量子临界点的相图。蒙特卡洛模拟显示，仅4-5个晶格常数的短程反铁磁关联长度即可在电子谱权重中产生显著的费米弧。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.06309v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We revisit the effective theory for fluctuating spin stripes coupled to a Fermi surface, and consider the parameter regime where a spin nematic phase intervenes between the spin density wave state and the symmetric state. It is shown that adding potential disorder to this theory, which acts as an unconventional type of random-field disorder, naturally gives rise to a phase diagram containing a quantum critical point that is described by the universal theory of strange metals with spatial disorder in both the magnitude and sign of the electron-boson coupling term [A.A. Patel, H. Guo, I. Esterlis and S. Sachdev, Science 381, 790 (2023)]. One difference compared to the original theory, however, is that at non-zero temperatures the disordered spin-stripe model automatically self-averages over the sign of the coupling. We also study the effects of thermal fluctuations in a phenomenological model for the disordered spin density wave state, and find from Monte Carlo simulations that a short anti-ferromagnetic correlation length (order 4-5 lattice constants) already leads to pronounced Fermi arcs in the electronic spectral weight.

Ge量子点自旋动力学的设计与优化：g因子调制、几何诱导退相干甜点及声子诱导弛豫#

Design and Optimization of Spin Dynamics in Ge Quantum Dots: g-Factor Modulation, Geometry-Induced Dephasing Sweet Spots, and Phonon-Induced Relaxation
📚 arXiv👤 Ngoc Duong, Daryoosh Vashaee📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电

该工作利用三维模拟框架研究门控Ge空穴量子点中自旋动力学的几何与偏压调控。发现限制势形变驱动的不同限制区之间的转变显著改变波函数局域化、重空穴/轻空穴混合及有效垂直电场，导致显著的g因子调制和几何诱导的退相干甜点，使量子比特对垂直电场涨落一阶不敏感。声子诱导自旋弛豫T₁呈现接近B⁻⁹的磁场标度，与Rashba主导的重空穴自旋动力学一致。

中文摘要

该工作利用三维模拟框架研究门控Ge空穴量子点中自旋动力学的几何与偏压调控。发现限制势形变驱动的不同限制区之间的转变显著改变波函数局域化、重空穴/轻空穴混合及有效垂直电场，导致显著的g因子调制和几何诱导的退相干甜点，使量子比特对垂直电场涨落一阶不敏感。声子诱导自旋弛豫T₁呈现接近B⁻⁹的磁场标度，与Rashba主导的重空穴自旋动力学一致。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.10731v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Gate geometry and bias asymmetry can be used to engineer spin dynamics in gate-defined Ge hole quantum dots by reshaping the confinement potential and driving transitions between distinct confinement regimes. In this work, we show that these transitions strongly modify wavefunction localization, heavy-hole/light-hole mixing, and the effective vertical electric field, leading to pronounced g-factor modulation and geometry-induced dephasing sweet spots where the qubit becomes first-order insensitive to vertical electric-field fluctuations. We further find that phonon-induced spin relaxation exhibits a strong dependence on device size and bias, with T1 following a magnetic-field scaling close to B-9, consistent with Rashba-dominated heavy-hole spin dynamics. These results are obtained using a comprehensive three-dimensional simulation framework for strained Si0.2Ge0.8/Ge gate-defined hole spin qubits, combining realistic electrostatics with a four-band Luttinger-Kohn Hamiltonian. Unlike simplified symmetric confinement models, this approach captures asymmetric wavefunction redistribution, g-tensor anisotropy, and the coupled electrostatic and spin response of realistic devices. Our results establish gate pattern and bias design as practical tools for optimizing spin coherence in Ge hole-spin qubits.

52

非莫尔石墨烯/六方氮化硼边界与界面中非寻常铁电性的观测#

Observation of Unconventional Ferroelectricity in Non-Moir'e Graphene on Hexagonal Boron Nitride Boundaries and Interfaces
📚 arXiv👤 Tianyu Zhang, Yueyang Wang, Hongxia Xue, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Dong-Keun Ki📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统莫尔超晶格限制，在石墨烯/hBN非对准体系中利用边界与线缺陷界面诱导出非寻常铁电性，通过栅压调控揭示局域态特征，为范德华材料缺陷工程及新型铁电器件设计开辟了新途径。
该研究提出通过构建hBN特定边界和线缺陷界面，在无石墨烯-hBN或hBN-hBN层间对准的情况下实现非寻常铁电性。通过系统分析栅压依赖的移动电荷与局域电荷特性，识别出局域态的关键特征，揭示了石墨烯/hBN体系界面相互作用的复杂性，为范德华异质结缺陷工程提供了新思路。

该研究提出通过构建hBN特定边界和线缺陷界面，在无石墨烯-hBN或hBN-hBN层间对准的情况下实现非寻常铁电性。通过系统分析栅压依赖的移动电荷与局域电荷特性，识别出局域态的关键特征，揭示了石墨烯/hBN体系界面相互作用的复杂性，为范德华异质结缺陷工程提供了新思路。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.05621v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Interfacial interactions in two parallel-stacked hexagonal boron-nitride (hBN) layers facilitate sliding ferroelectricity, enabling novel device functionalities. Additionally, when Bernal or twisted bilayer graphene is aligned with an hBN layer, unconventional ferroelectric behavior was observed, though its precise origin remains unclear. Here, we propose an alternative approach to engineering such an unconventional ferroelectricity in graphene-hBN van der Waals (vdW) heterostructures by creating specific types of hBN boundaries and interfaces. We found that the unconventional ferroelectricity can occur--without the alignments at graphene-hBN or hBN-hBN interfaces--when there are hBN edges or interfaces with line defects. By systematically analyzing the gate dependence of mobile and localized charges, we identified key characteristics of localized states that underlie the observed unconventional ferroelectricity, informing future studies. These findings highlight the complexity of the interfacial interactions in graphene/hBN systems, and demonstrate the potential for defect engineering in vdW heterostructures.

53

稀土掺杂双层镍酸盐中的自旋涨落#

Spin Fluctuations in the Rare-Earth Doped Bilayer Nickelates
📚 arXiv👤 Honglin Zhou, Xinman Ye, Gang Wang, Devashibhai Adroja, David Tam, Michael Marek Koza, Zhilun Lu, Jinguang Cheng, Dao-Xin Yao, Huiqian Luo📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示稀土掺杂可使双层镍酸盐中单一自旋涨落模式发生能级分裂，并定量提取出增强的层间交换耦合强度，为层间磁性配对驱动高温超导的微观机制提供了关键实验判据。
该工作利用非弹性中子散射研究了Pr和Nd掺杂的La₃Ni₂O₇₋δ粉末样品，发现45 meV的平坦自旋涨落模式在掺杂后分裂为两个模式，并出现约60 meV的弱模式。结果表明稀土掺杂增强了层间耦合（SJ⊥约69-73 meV），为理解双层镍酸盐高温超导的磁性配对机制提供了新线索。

中文摘要

该工作利用非弹性中子散射研究了Pr和Nd掺杂的La₃Ni₂O₇₋δ粉末样品，发现45 meV的平坦自旋涨落模式在掺杂后分裂为两个模式，并出现约60 meV的弱模式。结果表明稀土掺杂增强了层间耦合（SJ⊥约69-73 meV），为理解双层镍酸盐高温超导的磁性配对机制提供了新线索。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.14946v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Spin fluctuations have been generally believed as the pairing glue of high-T_c superconductivity. Recent inelastic neutron scattering (INS) studies have revealed a weak flat spin-fluctuation signal around 45 meV in the bilayer nickelate La₃Ni₂O₇₋δ, suggesting strong interlayer and weak intralayer magnetic couplings (SJₚₑᵣₚapprox 60 meV, SJₚₐᵣₐₗₗₑₗłeq 3.5 meV) in contrast to cuprate and pnictide superconductors. Here, we report further INS studies on the Pr and Nd doped La₃Ni₂O₇₋δ powder samples at ambient pressure. Besides the crystalline electric field excitations at low energies, we have found that the 45 meV flat mode splits into two modes in doped compounds, along with another weak mode at about 60 meV, where the spin fluctuations in La₂NdNi₂O₇₋δ are stronger than La₃Ni₂O₇₋δ and La₂PrNi₂O₇₋δ. Our results are consistent with an enhanced interlayer coupling SJₚₑᵣₚ within the stripe-type Heisenberg model framework, where the estimated SJₚₑᵣₚ value is in the range of about 69 to 73 meV for the rare-earth doped bilayer nickelates.

Kondo效应存在下铜氧化物原子结中自旋极化输运的异常散粒噪声揭示#

Spin-polarized transport in copper-oxide atomic junctions revealed by anomalous shot-noise behavior in presence of the Kondo effect
📚 arXiv👤 Marcel Strohmeier, Samanwita Biswas, Wolfgang Belzig, Regina Hoffmann-Vogel, Elke Scheer📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次将散粒噪声分析拓展至Kondo体系，突破了传统磁电阻方法的局限，为原子尺度自旋过滤器件的定量表征提供了新范式，对量子自旋电子学器件设计具有重要指导意义。
该研究通过低温输运测量，在空气氧化的机械可控铜断裂结中发现了局域磁性存在的实验证据，包括滞后磁电阻、Kondo效应导致的零偏压异常以及异常散粒噪声行为。通过扩展Landauer散粒噪声理论以包含能量依赖透射函数，分析表明铜氧化物原子接触可实现全自旋极化，证实了其自旋过滤能力。

中文摘要

该研究通过低温输运测量，在空气氧化的机械可控铜断裂结中发现了局域磁性存在的实验证据，包括滞后磁电阻、Kondo效应导致的零偏压异常以及异常散粒噪声行为。通过扩展Landauer散粒噪声理论以包含能量依赖透射函数，分析表明铜氧化物原子接触可实现全自旋极化，证实了其自旋过滤能力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.10129v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Incorporating oxygen into metallic atomic-scale junctions modifies the interatomic bonding and may even promote the formation of monoatomic chains. In the specific case of copper oxide, first-principles studies have predicted the emergence of ferromagnetic ground states, attributing certain atomic configurations with spin filtering capabilities. By means of low-temperature transport measurements, we provide a series of experimental evidence indicating the presence of local magnetism in air oxidized mechanically controllable copper break junctions. Our findings include hysteretic magnetoresistance, zero-bias anomalies attributed to the Kondo effect and anomalous shot noise behavior. We provide an extension of the Landauer description of shot noise for quantum coherent transport to include energy-dependent transmission functions. The analysis of the anomalous shot noise in the presence of strong zero-bias anomalies arising from the Kondo effect allows to determine the spin polarization of the current which may reach even full polarization, confirming the spin-filtering capability of copper oxide atomic contacts.

55

阻挫磁体EuCo₂Al₉中的巨反常霍尔电导#

Giant anomalous Hall conductivity in frustrated magnet EuCo2Al9
📚 arXiv👤 Sheng Xu, Jian-Feng Zhang, Shu-Xiang Li, Junfa Lin, Xiaobai Ma, Wenyun Yang, Jun-Jian Mi, Zheng Li, Tian-Hao Li, Yue-Yang Wu, Jiang Ma, Qian Tao, Wen-He Jiao, Xiaofeng Xu, Zengwei Zhu, Yuanfeng Xu, Hanjie Guo, Tian-Long Xia, Zhu-An Xu📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：在EuCo₂Al₉阻挫磁体中发现反常霍尔电导达31000 Ω⁻¹cm⁻¹、霍尔角12%的巨反常霍尔效应，超出常规机制两个数量级。该工作揭示涨落自旋手性斜散射与Hund耦合驱动费米面重构的新机制，为探索
该工作在Eu基阻挫磁体EuCo₂Al₉中发现了巨反常霍尔效应，反常霍尔电导达31000 Ω⁻¹cm⁻¹，反常霍尔角达12%，超出常规机制两个数量级。结合磁输运、量子振荡、中子衍射和第一性原理计算，证实该效应源于Eu-4f矩间RKKY相互作用产生的涨落自旋手性斜散射，以及Hund耦合导致的巨大交换劈裂和费米面重构。

页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在Eu基阻挫磁体EuCo₂Al₉中发现了巨反常霍尔效应，反常霍尔电导达31000 Ω⁻¹cm⁻¹，反常霍尔角达12%，超出常规机制两个数量级。结合磁输运、量子振荡、中子衍射和第一性原理计算，证实该效应源于Eu-4f矩间RKKY相互作用产生的涨落自旋手性斜散射，以及Hund耦合导致的巨大交换劈裂和费米面重构。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.14682v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The interaction between conduction electrons and localized magnetic moments profoundly influences the electrical and magnetic properties of materials, giving rise to a variety of fascinating physical phenomena and quantum effects. Here, we discover a giant anomalous Hall effect (AHE) in a frustrated Eu-based magnet, exhibiting a giant anomalous Hall conductivity (AHC) of 31000 Ømega-1cm-1 and a remarkable anomalous Hall angle (AHA, tanθH) of 12 %--surpassing conventional mechanisms (either intrinsic or extrinsic) by two orders of magnitude. Combining magnetotransport, quantum oscillations, neutron diffraction and ab initio calculations, we establish that the giant AHC originates from fluctuating spin chirality skew scattering, generated by indirect Ruderman-Kittel-Kasuya-Yosida (RKKY) interactions of Eu-4f moments. Simultaneously, Hund's coupling of itinerant electrons and localized Eu-4f spins triggers giant exchange splitting, evidenced by temperature-dependent Fermi surface reconstruction. This work establishes a frustrated magnetic platform for engineering the AHE and elucidates the governing role of exchange interactions and spin textures in quantum transport, while also providing a framework for designing unconventional spintronic systems that harness emergent spin-texture dynamics.
