Rashba自旋-轨道耦合驱动石墨烯纳米带异质结构的拓扑相变#

Rashba Spin-Orbit Driven Topological Phase Transitions in Graphene Nanoribbon Heterostructures
📚 arXiv👤 Hao-Ru Wu, Jhih-Shih You, Yiing-Rei Chen, Hong-Yi Chen📅 2026-04-23⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地揭示Rashba自旋-轨道耦合与界面几何的协同效应可驱动石墨烯纳米带发生拓扑相变，无需改变晶格结构即可实现能隙关闭-重开，为自旋电子学器件提供可电学调控的鲁棒拓扑界面态新方案。
证明结构几何与Rashba自旋-轨道耦合的相互作用可在蜂窝纳米带异质结构中产生非平庸拓扑相。考虑扶手椅型纳米带中Rashba自旋-轨道耦合区域嵌入本征段之间的构型，增强Rashba耦合诱导受对称性保护的界面态局域于拓扑不同区域的结处，且对边缘扰动保持鲁棒。有限宽度下，Rashba自旋-轨道耦合驱动能隙关闭与重新打开，标志无需改变晶格结构的拓扑相变。结果揭示了界面几何与自旋-轨道相互作用协同调控石墨烯基纳米结构可调拓扑态的机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

证明结构几何与Rashba自旋-轨道耦合的相互作用可在蜂窝纳米带异质结构中产生非平庸拓扑相。考虑扶手椅型纳米带中Rashba自旋-轨道耦合区域嵌入本征段之间的构型，增强Rashba耦合诱导受对称性保护的界面态局域于拓扑不同区域的结处，且对边缘扰动保持鲁棒。有限宽度下，Rashba自旋-轨道耦合驱动能隙关闭与重新打开，标志无需改变晶格结构的拓扑相变。结果揭示了界面几何与自旋-轨道相互作用协同调控石墨烯基纳米结构可调拓扑态的机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.19568v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We demonstrate that the interplay between structural geometry and Rashba spin-orbit coupling generates nontrivial topological phases in honeycomb nanoribbon heterostructures. We consider an armchair nanoribbon in which a Rashba spin-orbit coupled region is embedded between pristine segments. Increasing the Rashba coupling induces symmetry-protected interface states localized at the junction between topologically distinct regions, which remain robust against edge perturbations. For finite ribbon widths, Rashba spin-orbit coupling drives a gap closing and reopening, signaling a topological phase transition without modifying the lattice structure. Our results reveal a mechanism by which interfacial geometry and spin-orbit interaction cooperatively engineer tunable topological states in graphene-based nanostructures.

58

工程化局域极化无序实现反铁电电容器创纪录效率#

Engineered local polarization disorder unlocks record efficiency in antiferroelectric capacitors
📚 Nature Communications👤 Fukang Chen, Leiyang Zhang, Yule Yang, Ruiyi Jing 等17位作者📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：通过组分非均匀性在PbZrO3基陶瓷中引入可控局域极化无序，空间分散反铁电-铁电转变的开关场，突破高储能效率与大可恢复密度间的传统权衡，实现Wrec=23.2 J cm⁻³与η=98.1%的协同提升，
反铁电陶瓷在下一代静电储能领域极具潜力，但其性能从根本上受到高储能效率（η）与大可恢复储能密度（Wrec）之间权衡关系的制约，这一矛盾源于反铁电-铁电相变及其伴随的滞后损耗。本研究表明，工程化局域极化无序与高场工作能力的协同作用可实现这些指标的优异平衡。在PbZrO3基陶瓷中，我们引入可控的组分非均匀性，在展宽极化矢量分布的同时保持反铁电调制结构。相场模拟与实验结果表明，这种工程化无序将反铁电-铁电转变相关的开关场在空间上分散分布，从…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

反铁电陶瓷在下一代静电储能领域极具潜力，但其性能从根本上受到高储能效率（η）与大可恢复储能密度（Wrec）之间权衡关系的制约，这一矛盾源于反铁电-铁电相变及其伴随的滞后损耗。本研究表明，工程化局域极化无序与高场工作能力的协同作用可实现这些指标的优异平衡。在PbZrO3基陶瓷中，我们引入可控的组分非均匀性，在展宽极化矢量分布的同时保持反铁电调制结构。相场模拟与实验结果表明，这种工程化无序将反铁电-铁电转变相关的开关场在空间上分散分布，从而在保持高极化强度的同时降低极化滞后。由此，多层陶瓷电容器在167 kV mm−1下实现了Wrec = 23.2 J cm−3和η = 98.1%，对应品质因数达1220，超越了大多数已报道的在可比较高场条件下的先进多层陶瓷电容器。这些发现揭示了局域极化无序作为一种关键机制，与增强的击穿强度相结合，可实现超高储能性能，为先进脉冲功率应用的高性能电容储能提供了一条有前景的途径。

English Abstract

Antiferroelectric ceramics are promising for next-generation electrostatic energy storage, yet their performance is fundamentally constrained by the trade-off between high energy storage efficiency (η) and large recoverable energy storage density (Wrec), arising from the antiferroelectric-to-ferroelectric phase transition and associated hysteresis loss. Here, we show that a combination of engineered local polarization disorder and high-field operability enables a highly favorable balance of these metrics. In PbZrO3-based ceramics, we introduced controlled compositional heterogeneity that broadens polarization vector distributions while preserving the antiferroelectric modulation. Phase-field simulations and experiments indicate that this engineered disorder spatially distributes the switching fields associated with the antiferroelectric–ferroelectric transition, thereby reducing polarization hysteresis while maintaining high polarization strength. As a result, the multilayer ceramic capacitors achieveWrec= 23.2 J cm−3andη= 98.1% at 167 kV mm−1, corresponding to a figure of merit of 1220, surpassing most reported state-of-the-art multilayer ceramic capacitors under comparable high-field conditions. These findings highlight local polarization disorder as a key mechanism that, in combination with enhanced breakdown strength, enables ultrahigh energy storage performance and offers a promising route toward high-performance capacitive energy storage for advanced pulsed-power applications.

59

二维α-MnS半导体中S原子位错诱导的室温铁电性#

S-atom dislocation-induced room-temperature ferroelectricity in two-dimensional α-MnS semiconductor
📚 Nature Communications👤 Ling Huang, Jialiang Wu, Chen-Min Dai, Ruofan Du 等18位作者📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文突破性地在中心对称二维α-MnS中实现室温铁电性，创新性地利用热膨胀失配诱导S原子位错与面外极化，并基于此构建高性能铁电隧道结，为超高密度存储与存算一体芯片提供新材料平台。
二维半导体中的室温铁电性因其在非易失性存储器和神经形态计算中的潜在应用而引发了巨大兴趣，这将触发下一代电子学的革命。然而，这种迷人的铁电性在具有天然中心对称性的此类材料中鲜有发现，尤其在原子级薄层极限下更是如此。本文揭示了化学气相沉积合成的二维α-MnS中具有面外极化的室温铁电性。α-MnS与云母衬底之间热膨胀系数的差异导致二维α-MnS中位错的演化，进而诱导拉伸应变的产生和S原子的位移，从而产生铁电性。此外，基于二维α-MnS的铁电…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

二维半导体中的室温铁电性因其在非易失性存储器和神经形态计算中的潜在应用而引发了巨大兴趣，这将触发下一代电子学的革命。然而，这种迷人的铁电性在具有天然中心对称性的此类材料中鲜有发现，尤其在原子级薄层极限下更是如此。本文揭示了化学气相沉积合成的二维α-MnS中具有面外极化的室温铁电性。α-MnS与云母衬底之间热膨胀系数的差异导致二维α-MnS中位错的演化，进而诱导拉伸应变的产生和S原子的位移，从而产生铁电性。此外，基于二维α-MnS的铁电隧道结展现出大的隧穿电致电阻（1.3 × 10⁴）、高耐久性（2.8 × 10³次循环）和长保持时间（1年）。这项工作代表了二维铁电半导体发展的重大飞跃，将推动超高密度信息存储器件和存算一体芯片的进一步探索。

English Abstract

Room-temperature ferroelectricity in two-dimensional semiconductors has ignited enormous interests due to their potential applications in non-volatile memory and neuromorphic computing, which will trigger a revolution in next-generation electronics. Nonetheless, this fascinating ferroelectricity is rarely discovered in such materials with natural central symmetry, especially at atomically thin limit. Here we disclose a room-temperature ferroelectricity with out-of-plane polarization in chemical vapor deposition synthesized two-dimensional α-MnS. The difference in thermal expansion coefficients between α-MnS and mica substrate leads to the evolution of dislocations in two-dimensional α-MnS, which induce the generation of tensile strain and the displacement of S atoms, thereby result in the emergence of ferroelectricity. In addition, the ferroelectric tunneling junction based on two-dimensional α-MnS exhibits large tunneling electroresistance (1.3 × 104), high endurance (2.8 × 103cycles), and long retention time (1 year). This work represents a substantial leap for developing two-dimensional ferroelectric semiconductors, which will stimulate the further exploration of ultrahigh-density information storage devices and computing-in-memory chips.

60

交错磁体与奇宇称磁体的Hatsugai-Kohmoto类模型#

Hatsugai-Kohmoto-like Models for Altermagnets and Odd-Parity Magnets
📚 arXiv👤 Konstantin Rickelt, Denis Sedov, Mathias S. Scheurer📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文将Hatsugai-Kohmoto精确可解模型推广至多轨道情形，首次系统揭示交错磁体与奇宇称磁体的微观形成机制。核心创新在于通过动量空间海森堡映射，从严格解出发导出了p波、d波非常规磁体相，并阐明
该工作引入广义多轨道Hatsugai-Kohmoto模型，研究其在消除基态简并微扰下的相图与物理性质。未微扰模型已展现丰富的谱函数，包括类似非常规磁体的区域。动量空间中的海森堡映射导致弱耦合下的对称性破缺不稳定性，排除平移对称性破缺序，而出现铁磁性及p波、d波非常规磁体；额外动量空间相互作用可稳定非简并单态基态，保留自旋劈裂特征。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作引入广义多轨道Hatsugai-Kohmoto模型，研究其在消除基态简并微扰下的相图与物理性质。未微扰模型已展现丰富的谱函数，包括类似非常规磁体的区域。动量空间中的海森堡映射导致弱耦合下的对称性破缺不稳定性，排除平移对称性破缺序，而出现铁磁性及p波、d波非常规磁体；额外动量空间相互作用可稳定非简并单态基态，保留自旋劈裂特征。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18684v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce a generalized Hatsugai-Kohmoto multi-orbital model and study its phase diagram and physical properties in the additional presence of perturbations that lift any extensive ground-state degeneracies. The unperturbed, exactly solvable model already displays a rich set of spectral functions, including regimes reminiscent of unconventional magnets. We map the first-order study of additional spatially local multi-orbital Hubbard interactions to a Heisenberg model in momentum space, which leads to symmetry-breaking instabilities already at weak coupling. Interestingly, translational-symmetry breaking orders, such as antiferromagnetism, are excluded. Instead, in addition to ferromagnetism, unconventional p-wave and d-wave magnets occur, characterized by spin order on the bonds of the underlying square lattice. Adding another type of momentum-space interaction, which still allows to solve the model exactly, is shown to stabilize a non-degenerate singlet ground state that retains the spin splitting characteristic of unconventional magnets. We discuss its impact on the spin structure factor. Taken together, our findings show that Hatsugai-Kohmoto-like models provide a rich playground for unconventional magnetism.

61

p波轨道磁性#

P-wave Orbital Magnetism
📚 arXiv👤 Yantao Li, Pavlo Sukhachov📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地提出环流诱导轨道织构产生p波磁性的全新机制，与传统自旋织构方案截然不同。其核心创新在于利用轨道自由度实现奇宇称磁性，并揭示该相受平移-时间反演联合对称性保护，具有环流可调的非平庸拓扑及狄
该工作提出了一种源于环流诱导轨道织构的p波磁性新机制，区别于传统非共线自旋织构方案。二维晶格模型表明，该奇宇称轨道磁性受平移-时间反演联合对称性保护，可通过轨道霍尔电导测量；体系具有受环流大小调控的非平庸拓扑，能谱包含狄拉克点。该研究为非常规p波磁性提供了基于轨道自由度的额外平台，并连接了奇宇称磁性与拓扑学。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出了一种源于环流诱导轨道织构的p波磁性新机制，区别于传统非共线自旋织构方案。二维晶格模型表明，该奇宇称轨道磁性受平移-时间反演联合对称性保护，可通过轨道霍尔电导测量；体系具有受环流大小调控的非平庸拓扑，能谱包含狄拉克点。该研究为非常规p波磁性提供了基于轨道自由度的额外平台，并连接了奇宇称磁性与拓扑学。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18695v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Realization of unconventional odd-parity magnets usually requires noncollinear spin textures of the underlying lattice. We propose a different concept of p-wave magnetism that originates from an orbital texture induced by loop currents. The resulting p-wave orbital magnetism is protected by the combined translation and time-reversal symmetry, with even-parity components arising when the symmetry is broken. Our proposal is exemplified by a two-dimensional (2D) lattice model whose energy spectrum contains Dirac points and which is characterized by a nontrivial topology controlled by the magnitude of the loop currents. Since the odd-parity magnetism precludes macroscopic magnetization, we suggest measuring it via orbital Hall conductivity. Our work establishes orbital degrees of freedom as an additional platform for unconventional p-wave magnetism beyond noncollinear spin textures, as well as makes a step forward to bridging odd-parity magnetism and topology.

62

无序立方晶格材料γ-Ba₃CoNb₂O₉中的动态磁性#

Dynamical magnetism in the disordered cubic lattice material γ-m̊ Ba₃m̊ CoNb₂m̊ O₉
📚 arXiv👤 Fanjun Xu, Ralf Feyerherm, Cecilie Glittum, Thomas J. Hicken, Hubertus Luetkens, Jonas A. Krieger, Cintli Aguilar-Maldonado, Sven Luther, Lucy K. Saunders, Clemens Ritter, Peter Fouquet, Margarita Russina, Karel Prokes, A. T. M. Nazmul Islam, Bella Lake📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在近渗流阈值的无序立方晶格γ-Ba₃CoNb₂O₉中发现一种新型量子磁态：自旋-1/2量子涨落、稀释无序与几何挫败协同抑制长程序，形成持久动态短程关联态。这为理解量子自旋液体与自旋玻璃的边界
该工作研究了γ-Ba₃CoNb₂O₉中无序简单立方自旋-1/2晶格的磁性行为，其中Co²⁺离子随机占据三分之一格位，系统接近磁有序的位置渗流阈值。比热、磁化率、中子自旋回波及缪子自旋旋转测量揭示宽的热力学 crossover、短程磁关联及持续至至少0.1 K的快自旋动力学，无静态有序或常规自旋玻璃冻结证据。蒙特卡洛模拟得到孤儿自旋、有限团簇及无限网络的广泛分布，计算的孤儿自旋比例（~8.8%）与磁化率推断的弱关联自旋比例（~8.2%）…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究了γ-Ba₃CoNb₂O₉中无序简单立方自旋-1/2晶格的磁性行为，其中Co²⁺离子随机占据三分之一格位，系统接近磁有序的位置渗流阈值。比热、磁化率、中子自旋回波及缪子自旋旋转测量揭示宽的热力学 crossover、短程磁关联及持续至至少0.1 K的快自旋动力学，无静态有序或常规自旋玻璃冻结证据。蒙特卡洛模拟得到孤儿自旋、有限团簇及无限网络的广泛分布，计算的孤儿自旋比例（~8.8%）与磁化率推断的弱关联自旋比例（~8.2%）吻合。稀释S=1/2海森堡模型的精确对角化捕捉了宽的磁比热异常，支持弱关联与强关联自旋环境共存。结果表明自旋-1/2量子涨落、稀释及近渗流阈值可共同支撑无序驱动的动态短程关联态。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18794v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: γ-m̊ Ba₃m̊ CoNb₂m̊ O₉ realizes a disordered simple-cubic spin-1/2 lattice in which Co²⁺ ions randomly occupy one third of the sites, placing the system close to the site-percolation threshold for magnetic order. Specific-heat, susceptibility, neutron spin-echo, and muon spin-rotation measurements reveal a broad thermodynamic crossover, short-range magnetic correlations, and persistent fast spin dynamics down to at least 0.1~K, with no evidence for static order or conventional spin-glass freezing. Monte Carlo simulations yield a broad distribution of orphan spins, finite clusters, and an infinite network. The calculated orphan-spin fraction (approx 8.8%) agrees well with the weakly correlated spin fraction inferred from magnetization (approx 8.2%). Exact diagonalization of a diluted S = 1/2 Heisenberg model captures the broad magnetic specific-heat anomaly and supports the coexistence of weakly and strongly correlated spin environments. These results support a picture in which spin-1/2 quantum fluctuations, together with dilution and proximity to the percolation threshold, can support a disorder-driven dynamical state with short-range correlations in three dimensions, distinct from both classical spin glasses and geometrically frustrated quantum spin liquids.

63

笼目反铁磁体的能量景观：多能量尺度的表征#

Energy landscape of the kagome antiferromagnet: Characterization of multiple energy scales
📚 arXiv👤 Brandon B. Le, Seung-Hun Lee, Gia-Wei Chern📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次系统刻画了笼目反铁磁体共面基态流形的复杂能量景观，核心创新在于揭示势垒随环尺寸指数增长的层级结构——六自旋环主导低能垒尺度、长环重排对应高能垒区域，并发现中间存在无标度过渡区。这一多尺度势垒
该研究探究了笼目海森堡反铁磁体共面基态流形内的能量景观。尽管共面态在谐波阶简并，态之间跃迁需要集体风向标环旋转，其势垒随环尺寸强烈增长。通过精确枚举和minimax势垒计算（小晶格）以及基于构型空间随机行走的统计构造（大晶格，以环长度作为势垒高度的代理），研究揭示了与基本六自旋环相关的低势垒主导尺度，以及更长重排导致的高势垒区域；大系统的统计分析进一步暴露了包括显著六自旋环峰和中间无标度环长度区域的势垒尺度层级，为多重动力学时间尺度提…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究探究了笼目海森堡反铁磁体共面基态流形内的能量景观。尽管共面态在谐波阶简并，态之间跃迁需要集体风向标环旋转，其势垒随环尺寸强烈增长。通过精确枚举和minimax势垒计算（小晶格）以及基于构型空间随机行走的统计构造（大晶格，以环长度作为势垒高度的代理），研究揭示了与基本六自旋环相关的低势垒主导尺度，以及更长重排导致的高势垒区域；大系统的统计分析进一步暴露了包括显著六自旋环峰和中间无标度环长度区域的势垒尺度层级，为多重动力学时间尺度提供了自然基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18902v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the energy landscape of the kagome Heisenberg antiferromagnet within its coplanar ground-state manifold. Although coplanar states are degenerate at harmonic order, transitions between them require collective weathervane-loop rotations whose barriers grow strongly with loop size. To characterize this structure, we construct disconnectivity graphs using two complementary approaches: exact enumeration and minimax-barrier calculations for small lattices, and a statistical construction for large lattices based on random walks through configuration space, with loop length used as a proxy for barrier height. The exact landscape reveals a dominant low-barrier scale associated with elementary six-spin loops and a broader higher-barrier sector from longer rearrangements. For large systems, the statistical analysis exposes a hierarchy of barrier scales, including a pronounced six-spin-loop peak and an intermediate scale-free regime of loop lengths. This hierarchy provides a natural basis for multiple dynamical time scales: six-spin loops govern the fastest local relaxation, while slower collective dynamics arise from activation of longer loops. These results show that the coplanar manifold is dynamically rugged, with its low-energy dynamics governed by a hierarchy of loop-mediated barriers.

64

Mn(Bi,Sb)₂Te₄-(Bi,Sb)₂Te₃/MnTe天然异质结构中的近邻磁性#

Proximity Magnetism in Mn(Bi,Sb)2Te4-(Bi,Sb)2Te3/MnTe Natural Heterostructures
📚 arXiv👤 Owen A. Vail, Shu-Wei Wang, Yasen Hou, Dinura Hettiarachchi, Jean-Felix Milette, Tim B. Eldred, Wenpei Gao, Wendy Sarney, Haile Ambaye, Jong Keum, Valeria Lauter, George J. de Coster, Matthew J. Gilbert, Don Heiman, Jagadeesh S. Moodera, Hang Chi📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作揭示了一种自组织形成的天然磁性异质结构新机制：Mn扩散驱动的界面重构产生Mn(Bi,Sb)₂Te₄七重层，其介导的交换耦合将界面磁性提升至200 K以上，远超体相奈尔温度。这一发现突破了传统磁性
该工作发现Mn从MnTe向(Bi,Sb)₂Te₃界面扩散时，自组织形成Mn(Bi,Sb)₂Te₄七重层状结构，与交替的(Bi,Sb)₂Te₃五重层共存，这一结构通过扫描透射电子显微镜和深度敏感极化中子反射术证实。磁输运实验与量子磁性模拟揭示，在Mn(Bi,Sb)₂Te₄自身奈尔温度（20 K）之上，其介导的交换场导致(Bi,Sb)₂Te₃/MnTe界面出现反常霍尔效应，界面奈尔温度超过200 K。这种新型磁性界面实现了无需外场的鲁棒确…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作发现Mn从MnTe向(Bi,Sb)₂Te₃界面扩散时，自组织形成Mn(Bi,Sb)₂Te₄七重层状结构，与交替的(Bi,Sb)₂Te₃五重层共存，这一结构通过扫描透射电子显微镜和深度敏感极化中子反射术证实。磁输运实验与量子磁性模拟揭示，在Mn(Bi,Sb)₂Te₄自身奈尔温度（20 K）之上，其介导的交换场导致(Bi,Sb)₂Te₃/MnTe界面出现反常霍尔效应，界面奈尔温度超过200 K。这种新型磁性界面实现了无需外场的鲁棒确定性自旋-轨道力矩翻转。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18935v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic topological insulators and their heterostructures provide great opportunities in coupling band topology with nontrivial spin configuration for enhanced spintronic device performance as well as designing totally new magnetoelectric systems and functionalities. We find that Mn interdiffusion from MnTe when interfaced with (Bi,Sb)2Te3 stabilizes as self-organized Mn(Bi,Sb)2Te4 septuple lamellae amongst alternating (Bi,Sb)2Te3 quintuple layers, as observed using scanning transmission electron microscopy and depth-sensitive polarized neutron reflectometry. We further demonstrate a valuable combination of magnetic and topological orders in these naturally formed Mn(Bi,Sb)2Te4-(Bi,Sb)2Te3 heterostructures that are exchange coupled with MnTe. Magnetotransport experiments and quantum magnetism simulations reveal that, above its own Neel temperature TN of 20 K, Mn(Bi,Sb)2Te4 mediates the exchange field leading to an anomalous Hall effect at the (Bi,Sb)2Te3/MnTe interface, with an enhanced interfacial TN exceeding 200 K. This novel magnetic interface in turn allows a robust and deterministic spin-orbit torque switching without an external magnetic field at a low critical current density of 300 kA cm-2. The antiferromagnetically coupled architecture of Mn(Bi,Sb)2Te4-(Bi,Sb)2Te3/MnTe, featuring unique magnetic and topological proximity effects across a chalcogenide backbone, is rich in fundamental interface physics and holds potential for practical applications in spintronics.

65

磁极化子实现异常磁热响应#

Magnetic Polarons Enable Exceptional Magnetocaloric Response
📚 arXiv👤 Joshua Ancheta, Caeli Benyacko, Fanghao Zhang, Stephen D. Wilson, Bolin Liao📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破磁热材料中磁熵与场响应性难以兼得的固有矛盾，提出磁极化子作为中间调控机制：纳米铁磁团簇兼具大有效磁矩与显著自旋涨落，在居里温度附近实现高效场诱导熵变。EuB₆在10–40 K温区展现优异低温
该研究表明磁极化子为克服磁熵与场响应性之间的典型权衡提供了中间 regime，从而实现异常磁热响应。以EuB₆为模型体系，结合热力学与磁性测量，证明居里温度附近出现的纳米尺度铁磁团簇强烈增强场诱导熵坍缩。这些团簇具有大有效磁矩，能高效响应外场，同时因尺寸小和动态涨落保持可观熵。EuB₆在10-40 K技术重要温区展现出巨大低温磁热响应，具有大的等温熵变和绝热温变。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究表明磁极化子为克服磁熵与场响应性之间的典型权衡提供了中间 regime，从而实现异常磁热响应。以EuB₆为模型体系，结合热力学与磁性测量，证明居里温度附近出现的纳米尺度铁磁团簇强烈增强场诱导熵坍缩。这些团簇具有大有效磁矩，能高效响应外场，同时因尺寸小和动态涨落保持可观熵。EuB₆在10-40 K技术重要温区展现出巨大低温磁热响应，具有大的等温熵变和绝热温变。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18938v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetocaloric materials are typically limited by a trade-off between magnetic entropy and field responsiveness. Here we show that magnetic polarons provide an intermediate regime that mitigates this constraint and enables an exceptional magnetocaloric response. Using EuB₆ as a model system, we combine thermodynamic and magnetic measurements to demonstrate that nanoscale ferromagnetic clusters emerging near the Curie temperature strongly enhance the field-induced entropy collapse. These clusters possess large effective moments that respond efficiently to applied fields while retaining substantial entropy due to their small size and dynamic fluctuations. As a result, EuB₆ exhibits a giant cryogenic magnetocaloric response, with both large isothermal entropy change and adiabatic temperature change in the technologically important 10-40 K range. Our results identify magnetic polarons as an underexplored route for optimizing magnetocaloric performance and establish an intermediate magnetic length scale as a design principle for high-performance cryogenic cooling materials.

66

隐形超均匀无序：关联体系中调控电子态与磁相变的新途径#

Stealthy hyperuniform disorder: A new route to controlling electric states and magnetic phase transition in correlated systems
📚 arXiv👤 Akihisa Koga, Takanori Sugimoto📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将"隐形超均匀无序"引入关联电子体系，发现其可在保持线性狄拉克态密度的同时，通过隐藏的结构关联调控波函数局域性及磁相变临界行为，为无损调控拓扑与磁性竞争提供了全新自由度。
该工作研究隐形超均匀键分布对蜂窝晶格Hubbard模型电子和磁性质的影响。通过非相互作用哈密顿量对角化，证明线性态密度稳健出现，而键分布的隐形特性改变高能区波函数扩展性并显著修饰带边态密度。采用实空间Hartree近似发现，相变始终发生在半金属与反铁磁有序态之间，临界相互作用强度对隐形特性敏感。与准周期蜂窝铺砌的比较进一步凸显结构关联的作用，表明隐形超均匀无序为调控电子态和磁性提供了新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究隐形超均匀键分布对蜂窝晶格Hubbard模型电子和磁性质的影响。通过非相互作用哈密顿量对角化，证明线性态密度稳健出现，而键分布的隐形特性改变高能区波函数扩展性并显著修饰带边态密度。采用实空间Hartree近似发现，相变始终发生在半金属与反铁磁有序态之间，临界相互作用强度对隐形特性敏感。与准周期蜂窝铺砌的比较进一步凸显结构关联的作用，表明隐形超均匀无序为调控电子态和磁性提供了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.19041v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the effects of stealthy hyperuniform bond distributions on the electronic and magnetic properties of the Hubbard model on the honeycomb lattice. Hyperuniform structures, distinct from random and quasiperiodic ones, have recently attracted considerable interest due to their anomalous suppression of density fluctuations. By diagonalizing the noninteracting Hamiltonian, we show that a linear density of states (DOS) robustly emerges, while the stealth property of the bond distribution changes the wave functions in the higher-energy region extended and significantly modifies the DOS near the band edge. To clarify the impact on magnetism, we apply the real-space Hartree approximation to the Hubbard model. We find that, the phase transition always occurs between semimetallic and antiferromagnetically ordered states and its critical interaction strength is sensitive to the stealth property. A comparison with the quasiperiodic honeycomb tiling further highlights the role of structural correlations. These results demonstrate that stealthy hyperuniform disorder provides a novel route to controlling electronic states and magnetic phase transitions in correlated systems.

67

稀Kondo过渡金属离子替代重费米子化合物电子结构的再审视#

Re-examination of electronic structure of dilute Kondo transition-metal ions substituted into a Heavy Fermion compound
📚 arXiv👤 Kou Takubo, Shintaro Suzuki, Kohei Yamamoto, Kohei Yamagami, Masafumi Horio, Toshiaki Ina, Kiyohumi Nitta, Masaichiro Mizumaki, Eiji Ikenaga, Yosuke Matsumoto, Hiroki Wadati, Satoru Nakatsuji📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次通过X射线吸收谱在重费米子体系中直接观测到Kondo效应导致的配体场重构，揭示了局域高自旋Mn²⁺与巡游B 2p轨道间的类Kondo关联及粒子-空穴不对称性，为理解关联电子体系中局域-巡游转
该工作对重费米子α-(Yb,Lu)(Al₁₋ₓMnₓ)B₄的Mn 2p→3d X射线吸收谱呈现明显的多重态结构，表明Mn位未占据电子结构为关联高自旋2+态，尽管磁性测量显示Mn位为非磁性。这一悖论结果表明配体场可在局域Mn 3d与周围B 2p轨道间有效出现，这是Kondo效应的预期表现但此前在谱学上未获明确证实。Mn 2p光电子发射则表明占据的Mn²⁺ 3d电子仍表现出巡游和非局域屏蔽特性，源于与导电B 2p及费米能级以下更重Yb 4…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对重费米子α-(Yb,Lu)(Al₁₋ₓMnₓ)B₄的Mn 2p→3d X射线吸收谱呈现明显的多重态结构，表明Mn位未占据电子结构为关联高自旋2+态，尽管磁性测量显示Mn位为非磁性。这一悖论结果表明配体场可在局域Mn 3d与周围B 2p轨道间有效出现，这是Kondo效应的预期表现但此前在谱学上未获明确证实。Mn 2p光电子发射则表明占据的Mn²⁺ 3d电子仍表现出巡游和非局域屏蔽特性，源于与导电B 2p及费米能级以下更重Yb 4f和5d带的类Kondo关联。粒子-空穴不对称性激发了对重费米子体系中关联与屏蔽效应的重新考量。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.19078v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Correlations between the localized and conductive spins/charges have been the central issue of various fascinating quantum phenomena found on itinerant electron systems. Here, the obvious multiplet structures are presented on the Mn 2p to 3d x-ray absorption for a heavy fermion α-(Yb,Lu)(Al₁₋ₓMnₓ₎B₄, indicating that the unoccupied electronic structure of the Mn site is described as the correlated high-spin 2+, even though magnetic measurements show the Mn sites to be nonmagnetic. This apparently paradoxical result demonstrates that a ligand field can effectively appear between localized Mn 3d and surrounding B 2p orbitals, which has been anticipated as a manifestation of a Kondo effect but not been clearly confirmed for most itinerant metals in spectroscopy. By contrast, the Mn 2p photoemission indicates that the occupied Mn²⁺ 3d electrons still exhibit itinerant and nonlocally screened nature also owing to the Kondo-like correlation with the conductive B 2p, and heavier Yb 4f and 5d bands below the Fermi energy. The asymmetry on the particle-hole stimulates a reconsideration of the correlation and screening effects in the core-level spectroscopies.

68

范德华磁性半导体异质结构中的超快光致磁电效应#

Ultrafast Light-Induced Magnetoelectric Effect in van der Waals Magnetic Semiconductor Heterostructures
📚 arXiv👤 Wenyi Zhou, Ravi Kumar Bandapelli, Hari Paudyal, Bangzheng Han, I-Hsuan Kao, Ziling Li, Yuqing Zhu, Durga Paudyal, Jyoti Katoch, Simranjeet Singh, Roland K. Kawakami📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究在WS₂/CrGeTe₃异质结中发现超快光激发可产生符号反转的磁转矩，揭示界面电荷转移调控磁各向异性的新机制，突破了传统光热激发范式，为低能耗、超快磁存储与自旋电子器件提供了全新操控策略。
该工作发现WS₂/CrGeTe₃（CGT）双层结构的超快光激发产生与孤立CGT薄膜相反符号的磁转矩，区别于典型的光热激发进动动力学机制。时间分辨磁光克尔效应实验与密度泛函理论及Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert模拟支持以下机制：光激发载流子跨界面电荷转移改变垂直磁各向异性，进而对磁层产生转矩触发进动磁化动力学。研究还表明WS₂向CGT的光生自旋流也可通过角动量转移触发进动动力学，为II型能带排列的范德华异质结构中磁化的超快…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作发现WS₂/CrGeTe₃（CGT）双层结构的超快光激发产生与孤立CGT薄膜相反符号的磁转矩，区别于典型的光热激发进动动力学机制。时间分辨磁光克尔效应实验与密度泛函理论及Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert模拟支持以下机制：光激发载流子跨界面电荷转移改变垂直磁各向异性，进而对磁层产生转矩触发进动磁化动力学。研究还表明WS₂向CGT的光生自旋流也可通过角动量转移触发进动动力学，为II型能带排列的范德华异质结构中磁化的超快操控提供了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.19080v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Atomic-scale heterostructures of van der Waals (vdW) magnets and semiconductors provide a unique environment for exploring magnetic dynamics. In contrast to typical photothermal excitation of precessional magnetization dynamics by a pump laser pulse, we find that ultrafast optical excitation of a WS₂/CrGeTe₃ (CGT) bilayer produces an opposite sign of magnetic torque compared to an isolated CGT film. Experimental observations by time-resolved magneto-optic Kerr effect (TR-MOKE) and theoretical analysis by density functional theory (DFT) and Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert (LLG) simulations support a mechanism in which charge transfer of photoexcited carriers across the interface alters the perpendicular magnetic anisotropy, which in turn generates a torque on the magnetic layer to trigger precessional magnetization dynamics. These results provide new avenues for ultrafast manipulation of magnetization in vdW heterostructures with type-II band alignments. Lastly, we show that optically-generated spin currents from WS₂ into CGT can also trigger precessional dynamics via angular momentum transfer.

69

阻挫笼目晶格上具有补偿亚铁磁特征的三重Q共线态#

Triple-bf Q collinear state with compensated ferrimagnetic nature on frustrated kagome lattice
📚 arXiv👤 Kazushi Aoyama, Hikaru Kawamura📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地揭示了三重Q共线态在J₃阻挫笼目晶格中诱导的补偿亚铁磁序，突破传统自旋分裂对晶体不对称性的依赖，为全电学操控的反铁磁自旋电子器件提供了新范式。
该工作理论证明，J₃主导的笼目反铁磁体中出现的三重Q 12子格态可实现无需晶体不对称性的自旋选择性能带分裂。反映多子格特性，局域磁化在三角 plaquette 单元内呈现完全补偿的亚铁磁图案，导致磁子和电子能带中的s波型自旋分裂。这使得绝缘体系在零场下实现反铁磁自旋塞贝克效应，金属体系中实现填充可控的极化态，凸显了阻挫磁体实现新型自旋电子学功能的潜力。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作理论证明，J₃主导的笼目反铁磁体中出现的三重Q 12子格态可实现无需晶体不对称性的自旋选择性能带分裂。反映多子格特性，局域磁化在三角 plaquette 单元内呈现完全补偿的亚铁磁图案，导致磁子和电子能带中的s波型自旋分裂。这使得绝缘体系在零场下实现反铁磁自旋塞贝克效应，金属体系中实现填充可控的极化态，凸显了阻挫磁体实现新型自旋电子学功能的潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.19156v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Spin-selective band splitting without net magnetization and spin-orbit couplings serves for a next-generation spin-current generator, and its typical platforms are altermagnets and compensated ferrimagnets as well, where the existence of a crystal asymmetry or nonequivalent sites is essential. Here, we theoretically demonstrate that such a splitting can be realized in a triple-bf Q 12-sublattice state emerging in a J₃₋dominant kagome antiferromagnet, without the help of the crystal asymmetry. Reflecting the multi-sublattice nature, a local magnetization reveals a fully compensated ferrimagnetic pattern in units of a triangle plaquette, leading to s-wave-type spin splittings in magnon and electron bands. This enables an atiferromagnetic spin Seebeck effect at zero field in insulating systems and filling-controlled polarized states in metallic systems, highlighting the potential of frustrated magnets to realize novel spintronics functionalities.

70

自旋-轨道耦合诱导的量子手性相#

Spin-orbit-induced quantum chiral phases
📚 arXiv👤 Daesik Kim, Hyojae Jeon, Seongjun Park, Seungho Lee, Jung Hoon Han, Hyun-Yong Lee📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示量子涨落可在经典手性为零的共线/共面自旋构型中诱导出纯量子手性相，突破传统手性磁性的经典图像。通过iMPS-DMRG精确相图与磁子理论，阐明量子涨落作为手性起源的新机制，为探索新奇量子磁
该工作证明在具有XXZ相互作用、自旋-轨道诱导交换相互作用和外磁场的自旋-1/2三角晶格模型中，存在标量自旋手性对称性允许但经典因共线或共面自旋排列而为零、由量子涨落产生的量子手性相。使用无限矩阵乘积态密度矩阵重正化群方法全面绘制相图，识别出多个磁性序与标量自旋手性共存的相。详细磁子分析将非零手性归因于量子涨落，拓展了量子手性磁性的探索空间。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作证明在具有XXZ相互作用、自旋-轨道诱导交换相互作用和外磁场的自旋-1/2三角晶格模型中，存在标量自旋手性对称性允许但经典因共线或共面自旋排列而为零、由量子涨落产生的量子手性相。使用无限矩阵乘积态密度矩阵重正化群方法全面绘制相图，识别出多个磁性序与标量自旋手性共存的相。详细磁子分析将非零手性归因于量子涨落，拓展了量子手性磁性的探索空间。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.19161v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The scalar spin chirality (SSC), whose nonzero value łangle bf Sᵢ ḑot (bf Sⱼ × bf Sₖ₎ ångle ≠ 0 implies the breaking of time-reversal and certain point-group symmetries in the ground state, is a key quantity characterizing chiral magnetism in both classical and quantum settings. The classical SSC is manifested, for instance, in skyrmion crystal phase, while the quantum SSC is still highly sought after in various frustrated spin-1/2 models. An interesting possibility that has not been explored so far is the case in which SSC is symmetry-wise allowed, yet remains zero classically due to the collinear or coplanar arrangement of spins, but is generated by virtue of quantum fluctuation. We demonstrate the existence of precisely such a phase in a spin-1/2 triangular-lattice model with XXZ interaction, spin-orbit-induced exchange interactions, and an external magnetic field. Using iDMRG, we thoroughly map out the phase diagram of the model and identify several phases with coexisting magnetic order and SSC. The nonzero SSC arises despite the classical magnetic order being collinear or coplanar. We provide detailed magnon analysis to ascribe its origin to quantum fluctuations around classical magnetic order. The estimate of SSC from magnon analysis agrees with iDMRG results quantitatively. We map out the magnon spectrum and its Berry curvature, culminating in the prediction of finite thermal Hall conductivity in these phases with SSC.

71

亚铁磁石榴石中畴壁脱钉的相干微波驱动#

Coherent Microwave Driving of Domain Wall Depinning in a Ferrimagnetic Garnet
📚 arXiv👤 Hanchen Wang, Laura van Schie, Adam Erickson, Lauren J. Riddiford, Davit Petrosyan, Christian L. Degen, Richard Schlitz, William Legrand, Pietro Gambardella📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次利用相干微波驱动实现亚铁磁畴壁的脱钉操控，通过氮空位磁测量术揭示畴壁局域振荡的非线性演化机制，为低功耗、可寻址的磁存储与逻辑器件提供了全新的全电学操控范式。
该工作展示了微波场驱动下钉扎在亚铁磁石榴石薄膜中畴壁的线性和非线性动力学共振激发。利用扫描氮空位磁测量术和非局域自旋泵浦测量，识别出源自畴壁在Pt条带定义钉扎线两侧局域振荡运动的磁子能隙内低频模式。微波驱动进入非线性 regime 时，该模式可在降低的外磁场下实现畴壁脱钉。微磁模拟揭示了随驱动功率增加，从局域振荡到钉扎位点间部分再定位、最终完全逃逸钉扎区域的演化过程，建立了通过局域非线性动力学操控磁织构的机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作展示了微波场驱动下钉扎在亚铁磁石榴石薄膜中畴壁的线性和非线性动力学共振激发。利用扫描氮空位磁测量术和非局域自旋泵浦测量，识别出源自畴壁在Pt条带定义钉扎线两侧局域振荡运动的磁子能隙内低频模式。微波驱动进入非线性 regime 时，该模式可在降低的外磁场下实现畴壁脱钉。微磁模拟揭示了随驱动功率增加，从局域振荡到钉扎位点间部分再定位、最终完全逃逸钉扎区域的演化过程，建立了通过局域非线性动力学操控磁织构的机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.19164v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Coherent control of domain wall dynamics offers a route to fast manipulation of magnetic textures beyond thermally activated motion. We demonstrate resonant excitation of linear and nonlinear dynamics of a pinned domain wall in a ferrimagnetic garnet thin film driven by a microwave field. Using scanning nitrogen-vacancy magnetometry and nonlocal spin-pumping measurements, we identify a low-frequency mode inside the magnon gap, originating from the localized oscillatory motion of a domain wall across a pinning line defined by a Pt stripline. Upon increasing the microwave drive into the nonlinear regime, this mode enables domain wall depinning at reduced external magnetic fields. Micromagnetic simulations reveal a progression from localized oscillations to partial relocation between pinning sites and, ultimately, complete escape from the pinning region with increasing driving power. These results establish resonant excitation of domain walls at engineered pinning sites as a mechanism for manipulating magnetic textures via localized nonlinear dynamics.

72

观点：磁性赛道上的量子计算#

Perspective: Quantum Computing on Magnetic Racetrack
📚 arXiv👤 Ji Zou, Jelena Klinovaja, Daniel Loss📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文提出磁畴壁兼具高迁移率与拓扑稳定性，可同时充当静态与飞行量子比特，突破了传统量子平台功能分离的局限；为低能耗、可扩展的固态量子计算提供了全新架构，并指明了拓扑磁体等候选材料的具体研发方向。
该观点文章论述了磁畴壁作为量子计算平台的潜力，强调其高迁移率使其既可作静态量子比特也可作飞行量子比特。文章概述了基于磁畴壁实现通用量子计算的关键要素与材料要求，讨论了具体候选材料平台、尚需完成的实验验证，以及该交叉领域面临的挑战与新机遇。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该观点文章论述了磁畴壁作为量子计算平台的潜力，强调其高迁移率使其既可作静态量子比特也可作飞行量子比特。文章概述了基于磁畴壁实现通用量子计算的关键要素与材料要求，讨论了具体候选材料平台、尚需完成的实验验证，以及该交叉领域面临的挑战与新机遇。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.19304v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic domain walls have long been pursued as carriers of classical information for storage and processing. With the ability to create, control, and probe domain walls at the nanoscale, they are recently recognized as an ideal platform for studying macroscopic quantum effects and provide a natural blueprint for building scalable quantum computing architectures. In particular, the experimentally demonstrated high mobility of domain walls makes them not only suitable as stationary qubits but also as flying qubits, which may offer advantages over currently explored quantum computing platforms. In this Perspective, we outline our current understanding of the essential ingredients and key requirements for realizing universal quantum computation based on magnetic domain walls. We highlight promising concrete material platforms and identify the experiments that are still needed to advance this concept. We also discuss the potential challenges and point to new opportunities in this emerging research direction at the interface between magnetism and quantum information science.

73

CeIrIn₅中场致反铁磁相变#

Field-induced antiferromagnetic transition in CeIrIn₅
📚 arXiv👤 Y. Tokunaga, M. -T. Suzuki, S. Krämer, H. Sakai, S. Kambe, H. Harima, D. Aoki, M. Horvatić, I. Sheikin📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示磁场沿磁矩排列方向可诱导反铁磁有序这一反直觉现象，突破传统认知中磁场抑制反铁磁的范式。通过多手段联用精确确定Q矢量和磁矩取向，为理解重费米子体系中磁场-自旋耦合机制及量子临界行为提供关键
该研究通过¹¹⁵In核磁共振(NMR)研究重费米子化合物CeIrIn₅在近c轴高磁场下的低温行为。约28 T处场致转变表现为NMR线强度骤降（T₂急剧缩短）及1/T₁显著峰，结合de Haas-van Alphen与能带计算，最自然地解释为Q=(1/2,1/2,0)反铁磁态，磁矩沿c轴反平行排列——这是磁场沿排列方向诱导反铁磁有序的独特案例。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究通过¹¹⁵In核磁共振(NMR)研究重费米子化合物CeIrIn₅在近c轴高磁场下的低温行为。约28 T处场致转变表现为NMR线强度骤降（T₂急剧缩短）及1/T₁显著峰，结合de Haas-van Alphen与能带计算，最自然地解释为Q=(1/2,1/2,0)反铁磁态，磁矩沿c轴反平行排列——这是磁场沿排列方向诱导反铁磁有序的独特案例。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.19376v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report low-temperature ¹¹⁵In nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) study of the prototypical heavy-fermion compound CeIrIn₅ in high magnetic fields applied close to the crystallographic c axis. For this orientation, a field-induced transition was previously reported to take place at about 28 T. Although we do not observe any change of the NMR spectrum above the transition, the intensity of the NMR lines drastically decreases as a consequence of a considerable shortening of the T₂ relaxation time. In addition, 1/T₁ shows a pronounced maximum at the transition. Taking into account previous high-field de Haas-van Alphen results in conjunction with band-structure calculations, our NMR results are most naturally explained by the field-induced transition into an antiferromagnetic state with the propagation vector Q = (1/2, 1/2, 0) and magnetic moments aligned antiferromagnetically along the c axis. This makes CeIrIn₅ a unique case where the application of the magnetic field induces an ordered state with moments antiferromagnetically aligned along the field direction.

74

二维石墨烯超晶格中的本征i波交错磁性#

Intrinsic i-wave altermagnetism in 2D graphene superlattices
📚 arXiv👤 Cuiju Yu, Jose L. Lado📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地提出对称性设计原则，在石墨烯反点超晶格中实现本征i波交错磁性，区别于传统磁性材料。通过多尺度计算揭示相互作用驱动的磁不稳定性机制，为发展无重金属、高迁移率的碳基自旋电子学器件开辟新路径。
该工作建立了在石墨烯反点超晶格中工程化i波交错磁性的对称性指导设计原则，并在特定单层及双层石墨烯超晶格中展示了交错磁态的出现。结合第一性原理方法与原子紧束缚模型，研究揭示了相互作用诱导的i波交错磁性劈裂，其源于二维石墨烯反点超晶格的本征磁不稳定性。该研究为在石墨烯平台中工程化i波交错磁性确立了策略，提出了基于碳的交错磁性自旋电子学平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作建立了在石墨烯反点超晶格中工程化i波交错磁性的对称性指导设计原则，并在特定单层及双层石墨烯超晶格中展示了交错磁态的出现。结合第一性原理方法与原子紧束缚模型，研究揭示了相互作用诱导的i波交错磁性劈裂，其源于二维石墨烯反点超晶格的本征磁不稳定性。该研究为在石墨烯平台中工程化i波交错磁性确立了策略，提出了基于碳的交错磁性自旋电子学平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.19661v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets feature unconventional magnetism due to their momentum-dependent spin splitting purely driven by magnetic order, for which a variety of transition-metal-based d-wave altermagnets have been proposed. However, carbon-based altermagnets in graphene structures remain elusive, even though magnetism in graphene nanostructures has been widely demonstrated. Here, we establish a symmetry-guided design principle to engineer i-wave altermagnets in graphene antidot superlattices and demonstrate the emergence of altermagnetic states in specific monolayer and bilayer graphene superlattices. By combining first principles methods and atomistic tight binding models, we show the appearance of an interaction-induced i-wave altermagnetic splitting, stemming from the intrinsic magnetic instability of 2D graphene antidot superlattices. Our work establishes a strategy to engineer i-wave altermagnetism in a graphene platform, putting forward a carbon-based platform for altermagnetic spintronics.

75

偶极-八极自旋冰的经典对称性富集拓扑序与不同单极电荷#

Classical symmetry enriched topological orders and distinct monopole charges for dipole-octupole spin ices
📚 arXiv👤 Pengwei Zhao, Gang v. Chen📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究提出通过经典自旋冰机制中磁单极磁荷的差异来区分偶极与八极自旋液体：偶极自旋冰因长程偶极相互作用获得有限磁荷，而八极自旋冰磁荷为零。这一判据为Ce₂Sn₂O₇的基态争议提供了实验分辨方案，并为理解
该工作论证了基于偶极-八极双重态的烧绿石自旋冰材料中，偶极自旋液体与八极自旋液体可通过经典自旋冰机制下磁单极的磁荷加以区分。长程偶极-偶极相互作用使偶极自旋冰的磁单极通过哑铃图像获得有限磁荷，而八极自旋冰在经典机制下预期为零磁荷。该研究预期这一决定性观测可解决Ce₂Sn₂O₇本质的争论，并更广泛地启发Ce-烧绿石自旋液体、Nd-烧绿石反铁磁体、Er基尖晶石及各类对称性富集拓扑相中涌现准粒子 distinct 性质的进一步实验与思考。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作论证了基于偶极-八极双重态的烧绿石自旋冰材料中，偶极自旋液体与八极自旋液体可通过经典自旋冰机制下磁单极的磁荷加以区分。长程偶极-偶极相互作用使偶极自旋冰的磁单极通过哑铃图像获得有限磁荷，而八极自旋冰在经典机制下预期为零磁荷。该研究预期这一决定性观测可解决Ce₂Sn₂O₇本质的争论，并更广泛地启发Ce-烧绿石自旋液体、Nd-烧绿石反铁磁体、Er基尖晶石及各类对称性富集拓扑相中涌现准粒子 distinct 性质的进一步实验与思考。

English Abstract

arXiv:2505.07805v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Distinct symmetry-enriched topological orders often do not have classical distinctions. Motivated by the recent progress on the pyrochlore spin ice materials based on the dipole-octupole doublets, we argue that the dipolar spin liquid and the octupolar spin liquid can be distinguished through the magnetic charges of the magnetic monopoles in the classical spin ice regime. It is observed and predicted that the long-range dipole-dipole interaction renders the magnetic monopole of the dipolar spin ice a finite magnetic charge via the dumbbell picture even in the classical regime. For the octupolar spin ice, however, a zero magnetic charge is expected from this mechanism in the classical regime. We expect this smoking-gun observation to resolve the debate on the nature of Ce₂Sn₂O₇, and more broadly, this work may inspire further experiments and thoughts on the Ce-pyrochlore spin liquids, Nd-pyrochlore antiferromagnets, Er-based spinels, and the distinct properties of the emergent quasiparticles in various symmetry-enriched topological phases.

76

钴掺杂对斯格明子宿主材料Cu₂OSeO₃的影响#

The Effects of Cobalt Doping on the Skyrmion Hosting Material Cu₂OSeO₃
📚 arXiv👤 M. Vás, A. J. Ferguson, H. E. Maynard-Casely, C. Ulrich, E. P. Gilbert, S. Yick, T. Söhnel📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作通过Co²⁺精准掺杂Cu₂OSeO₃的Cu2位点，实现了对斯格明子相稳定温区及临界磁场的可控调控，为理解磁性拓扑态的微观机制提供了原子级结构-磁性关联实验证据，拓展了磁斯格明子材料的设计维度。
该工作报道了Co掺杂Cu₂OSeO₃的合成与表征，系统研究了Co²⁺掺入Cu2位点对原子结构和磁结构的影响。同步辐射X射线衍射和高分辨中子粉末衍射证实Co²⁺进入Cu2位点导致晶胞膨胀，但晶体结构中的键长和键角无明显变化。磁化测量表明Co掺杂显著改变材料的磁有序行为，包括临界场增大、螺旋磁相临界温度降低，以及斯格明子口袋温度的降低和展宽。小角中子散射进一步探测了掺杂后的磁结构特征。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作报道了Co掺杂Cu₂OSeO₃的合成与表征，系统研究了Co²⁺掺入Cu2位点对原子结构和磁结构的影响。同步辐射X射线衍射和高分辨中子粉末衍射证实Co²⁺进入Cu2位点导致晶胞膨胀，但晶体结构中的键长和键角无明显变化。磁化测量表明Co掺杂显著改变材料的磁有序行为，包括临界场增大、螺旋磁相临界温度降低，以及斯格明子口袋温度的降低和展宽。小角中子散射进一步探测了掺杂后的磁结构特征。

English Abstract

arXiv:2506.23753v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Cu₂OSeO₃ has fascinating magnetic phases that can be easily manipulated through chemical doping. In this work, we report on the synthesis and characterization of Co-doped Cu₂OSeO₃ and its influence on both the atomic and magnetic structure. Polycrystalline (Cu₁_₋ₓCoₓ₎₂OSeO₃ samples with 0 < x < 0.1 were synthesized and the presence of Co was confirmed via elemental analysis. Using synchrotron powder X-ray diffraction, and high-resolution neutron powder diffraction, the incorporation of Co²⁺ into the Cu2 sites was confirmed. Co-doping led to an expansion to the unit cell but shows no apparent changes in bond lengths and angles in the crystal structure. Magnetization measurements showed that the incorporation of Co²⁺ into the Cu2 site led to significant changes to the magnetic ordering of the material. Including an increase to the critical fields, the lowering of the critical temperature of the helimagnetic phase, and both a lowering and expansion of the skyrmion pocket temperatures. Lastly, small-angle neutron scattering was used to probe the magnetic structures hosted by the material. It was found that upon doping, the skyrmion lattice nucleates at lower temperatures as well as stabilized over a large temperature range. The observed results highlight the effects of incorporating a magnetic ion into the crystal structure and how it affects the internal magnetic structures.

77

FeₓNbS₂中脆弱反铁磁性的电子起源#

Electronic origin of delicate antiferromagnetism in FeₓNbS₂
📚 arXiv👤 Wenxin Li, Jonathan T. Reichanadter, Shan Wu, Ji Seop Oh, Rourav Basak, Shannon C. Haley, Siqi Wang, Joshua E. Chaparro Mata, Elio Vescovo, Donghui Lu, Makoto Hashimoto, Christoph Klewe, Suchismita Sarker, Jessica L. McChesney, Alex Frañó, James G. Analytis, Robert J. Birgeneau, Jeffrey B. Neaton, Yu He📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示FeₓNbS₂在临界掺杂处准粒子退相干突然崩溃的微观机制，阐明电子关联驱动的Fe-Nb杂化消失如何调控层间交换作用，为理解插层TMD中脆弱磁性的电子起源提供新范式，对可调控二维磁性材料设
该工作结合角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)和密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，揭示了插层过渡金属硫化物FeₓNbS₂在临界掺杂x_c=1/3附近发生的eV尺度电子结构重组。Fe 3dz²电子在费米面200 meV内形成窄带，与其他过渡金属插层TMD磁体显著不同；这些态与TMD层中巡游电子强杂化，在x_c以上因关联效应迅速失去相干性。这种准粒子退相干突然崩溃导致Fe-Nb杂化消失，明确抑制了面外有效Fe-Fe交换相互作用，驱动磁基态从反铁磁条纹…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作结合角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)和密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，揭示了插层过渡金属硫化物FeₓNbS₂在临界掺杂x_c=1/3附近发生的eV尺度电子结构重组。Fe 3dz²电子在费米面200 meV内形成窄带，与其他过渡金属插层TMD磁体显著不同；这些态与TMD层中巡游电子强杂化，在x_c以上因关联效应迅速失去相干性。这种准粒子退相干突然崩溃导致Fe-Nb杂化消失，明确抑制了面外有效Fe-Fe交换相互作用，驱动磁基态从反铁磁条纹相转变为zigzag相。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.03327v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Among the family of intercalated transition-metal dichalcogenides (TMDs), FeₓNbS₂ is found to possess unique current-induced resistive switching behaviors, tunable antiferromagnetic states, and a commensurate charge order, all of which are tied to a critical Fe doping of x_c = 1/3. However, the electronic origin of such extreme stoichiometry sensitivities remains unclear. Combining angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) with density functional theory (DFT) calculations, we identify and characterize a dramatic eV-scale electronic restructuring that occurs across the x_c. Moment-carrying Fe 3dz^₂ electrons manifest as narrow bands within 200 meV of the Fermi level, distinct from other transition metal intercalated TMD magnets. These states strongly hybridize with itinerant electrons in TMD layer, rapidly lose coherence above x_c due to correlation-driven effects. This sudden quasiparticle decoherence collapses the Fe-Nb hybridization, which explicitly suppresses the out-of-plane effective Fe-Fe exchange interaction, driving the transformation of the magnetic ground state from an antiferromagnetic stripe phase to a zigzag phase. These observations resemble the exceptional electronic and magnetic sensitivity of strongly correlated systems, and demonstrate that quantifying orbital-specific hybridization via ARPES offers an alternative pathway to evaluate effective magnetic exchange in metallic magnets, complementing inelastic neutron and resonant x-ray scattering probes.

78

CrSBr中可重构层状磁畴结构的光学读出#

Optical Readout of Reconfigurable Layered Magnetic Domain Structure in CrSBr
📚 arXiv👤 Aleksandra Łopion, Pierre-Maurice Piel, Thomas Kliewer, Manuel Terbeck, Jan-Hendrik Larusch, Jakob Henz, Marie-Christin Heißenbüttel, Kseniia Mosina, Thorsten Deilmann, Michael Rohlfing, Zdenek Sofer, Ursula Wurstbauer📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将光学多层模型引入范德华磁体表征，建立层状磁构型与磁反射光谱的定量关联，实现磁组态的纯光学解码；界面工程拓展了磁态调控维度，级联中间态的发现为高密度磁信息存储与光子学集成提供了新范式。
范德华磁性半导体CrSBr具有多稳态磁序与强光-物质耦合特性，本工作通过磁反射光谱结合光学多层模型，实现了对层状磁构型的纯光学、非破坏、非接触式读出。外加磁场及与反铁磁体MnPS₃的界面工程可系统调控磁态的多重性与稳定性，其磁构型依赖层厚并呈现级联式中间态，为基于磁组态的信息编码与处理提供了兼容现代光电子技术的读出机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

范德华磁性半导体CrSBr具有多稳态磁序与强光-物质耦合特性，本工作通过磁反射光谱结合光学多层模型，实现了对层状磁构型的纯光学、非破坏、非接触式读出。外加磁场及与反铁磁体MnPS₃的界面工程可系统调控磁态的多重性与稳定性，其磁构型依赖层厚并呈现级联式中间态，为基于磁组态的信息编码与处理提供了兼容现代光电子技术的读出机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.04887v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The van der Waals magnetic semiconductor CrSBr combines multistable magnetic order with strong light--matter coupling, enabling optical access to a rich and reconfigurable layered magnetic domain structure. A purely optical, non-destructive, and non-contact readout of layered magnetic configurations is realized here by magneto-reflectance measurements and interpreted using an optical multilayer model. The magnetic state is tunable by applied magnetic fields and by interfacing CrSBr with the antiferromagnet MnPS₃. Applying an external magnetic field along the easy axis drives the hysteretic antiferromagnetic--to--ferromagnetic transition, which is not universally binary but instead develops through a cascade of intermediate magnetic configurations whose multiplicity and stability scale systematically with layer thickness and can be tailored by magnetic interfaces. The intertwined optical and magnetic properties of CrSBr provide a readout mechanism for information encoded in and processed through its magnetic configuration that is compatible with modern on- and off-chip photonic and electronic technologies. These properties identify CrSBr as a promising platform for intelligent matter and for spin-optoelectronics, in particular for neuromorphic architectures that can learn and evolve in response to changing environments.

79

d波交替磁性的原子尺度实空间可视化#

Atomic-scale visualization of d-wave altermagnetism
📚 arXiv👤 Daran Fu, Liu Yang, Yi Shen, Kebin Xiao, Yuyang Wang, Wei Jiang, Zhiwei Wang, Yugui Yao, Qi-Kun Xue, Wei Li📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将交替磁性研究从动量空间拓展至实空间，利用扫描隧道显微镜直接捕获CsV₂Se₂O中d波交替磁性的原子级自旋纹理，以本征缺陷为探针揭示单向电子态与自旋极化充电环等对称性破缺特征，为量子材料
交替磁性作为区别于传统铁磁和反铁磁的新磁相，具有零净磁化但破缺时间反演对称性的特征。本工作利用扫描隧道显微镜，在CsV₂Se₂O中提供了交替磁性的原子尺度实空间证据：通过本征自旋缺陷探针，直接观测到单向电子图案和椭圆充电环等标志性对称性破缺特征，且相邻自旋缺陷线呈现相反自旋和长程反铁磁耦合，为从动量空间探测迈向实空间可视化开辟了新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

交替磁性作为区别于传统铁磁和反铁磁的新磁相，具有零净磁化但破缺时间反演对称性的特征。本工作利用扫描隧道显微镜，在CsV₂Se₂O中提供了交替磁性的原子尺度实空间证据：通过本征自旋缺陷探针，直接观测到单向电子图案和椭圆充电环等标志性对称性破缺特征，且相邻自旋缺陷线呈现相反自旋和长程反铁磁耦合，为从动量空间探测迈向实空间可视化开辟了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.24114v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Altermagnetism is a newly identified magnetic phase, distinct from conventional ferromagnetism and antiferromagnetism. It exhibits no net magnetization while breaking time-reversal symmetry. Although its momentum-space signatures are established, direct real-space visualization of its defining rotational-symmetry breaking remains missing. Here, using scanning tunnelling microscopy, we provide atomic-scale real-space evidence for altermagnetism in CsV2Se2O. Utilizing intrinsic spin defects as probes, we directly visualize the hallmark symmetry breaking through unidirectional electronic patterns and elliptical charging rings, both tied to the alternating spin texture. Moreover, adjacent spin-defect lines exhibit opposite spins and long-range antiferromagnetic coupling, hinting at a novel spin order. Our work moves the field from momentum-space probes to direct real-space visualization, opening a path to explore how this unconventional magnetic order couples to other quantum states.

80

非共线磁体动力学磁化率：新型KKR第一性原理方案及其应用#

Dynamical magnetic susceptibility of non-collinear magnets: A novel KKR-based ab initio scheme and its application
📚 arXiv👤 David Eilmsteiner, Arthur Ernst, Paweł A. Buczek📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：发展了基于KKR格林函数的线性响应含时密度泛函理论新实现，首次系统处理非共线磁体的自旋激发动力学；揭示Goldstone模式数值收敛规律，发现Mn₃Ir中Landau阻尼对磁振子频率的非单调依赖，为太
本工作发展了基于Korringa-Kohn-Rostoker格林函数方法的线性响应含时密度泛函理论新实现，用于处理非共线磁体中的自旋激发。在绝热局域自旋密度近似框架下，详细讨论了非共线 susceptibility 计算中Goldstone模式的形成及其数值收敛行为。将该方案应用于交替磁性非共线kagome反铁磁体Mn₃Ir，研究了磁振子色散与Landau阻尼，发现阻尼对磁振子频率的非单调依赖使大动量激发在太赫兹自旋电子学中具有应用潜…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本工作发展了基于Korringa-Kohn-Rostoker格林函数方法的线性响应含时密度泛函理论新实现，用于处理非共线磁体中的自旋激发。在绝热局域自旋密度近似框架下，详细讨论了非共线 susceptibility 计算中Goldstone模式的形成及其数值收敛行为。将该方案应用于交替磁性非共线kagome反铁磁体Mn₃Ir，研究了磁振子色散与Landau阻尼，发现阻尼对磁振子频率的非单调依赖使大动量激发在太赫兹自旋电子学中具有应用潜力，并分析了磁模式的实时实空间动力学及其强手性依赖的衰减特性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.03220v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: A novel implementation of the linear response time-dependent density functional theory addressing spin excitations in non-collinear magnets based on the Korringa-Kohn-Rostoker Green's function method is presented. Following the exposition of the formalism based on the adiabatic local spin density approximation to the exchange-correlation kernel generalized to the noncollinear case, the computational scheme is discussed in detail. The formation of the Goldstone modes in non-collinear susceptibility calculations is elaborated on formally and from the numerical convergence point of view. The scheme is deployed to study the dispersion and Landau damping of magnons in the altermagnetic non-collinear kagome antiferromagnet Mn₃Ir. The non-monotonous dependence of the damping on the magnon frequency makes the large momentum excitations attractive in the terahertz spintronics. To this end, we analyze the real-time and real-space dynamics of the magnetic modes, including their strongly chirality-dependent attenuation.

81

基于含时密度泛函理论的非共线磁体中磁振子色散与寿命#

Dispersion and lifetimes of magnons in non-collinear magnets from time dependent density functional theory
📚 arXiv👤 David Eilmsteiner, Arthur Ernst, Paweł A. Buczek📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破绝热近似局限，首创线性响应含时密度泛函理论处理非共线磁体的磁振子Landau衰减，揭示手性依赖的磁振子寿命差异与共振特征，为理解非共线反铁磁体的自旋动力学及自旋电子学器件设计提供关键理论基础
本工作采用线性响应含时密度泛函理论结合非共线KKR格林函数方法与符号计算代数，研究非共线kagome三角反铁磁体Mn₃Rh的自旋动力学。该方案可处理磁振子衰变为非共线电子-空穴Stoner对的Landau衰减，这是绝热方法无法触及的。计算揭示三个在长波极限线性色散的Goldstone模式对应三条磁振子支，具有非平凡的空间极化；磁振子在整个布里渊区存在，但远离区中心时Landau阻尼显著。值得注意的是，相近动量和能量的磁振子因手性不同可…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本工作采用线性响应含时密度泛函理论结合非共线KKR格林函数方法与符号计算代数，研究非共线kagome三角反铁磁体Mn₃Rh的自旋动力学。该方案可处理磁振子衰变为非共线电子-空穴Stoner对的Landau衰减，这是绝热方法无法触及的。计算揭示三个在长波极限线性色散的Goldstone模式对应三条磁振子支，具有非平凡的空间极化；磁振子在整个布里渊区存在，但远离区中心时Landau阻尼显著。值得注意的是，相近动量和能量的磁振子因手性不同可呈现显著不同的衰减，部分以共振特征为主，这源于磁振子本征矢量与内禀自旋极化的相互作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.04111v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We investigate the spin dynamics of the non-collinear kagome triangular anti-ferromagnet Mn₃Rh using linear response time-dependent density functional theory. To this end, we present a novel first principles computational scheme for the evaluation of the dynamical susceptibility based on the non-collinear KKR Green's functions method and a symbolic computer algebra.This approach allows us to address the Landau decay of spin waves into non-collinear electron-hole Stoner pairs being inaccessible to adiabatic methods. Our calculations reveal three distinct Goldstone modes dispersing linearly in the long-wavelength regime giving rise to the three magnon branches and we discuss their non-trivial spatial polarizations. The spin-waves turn out to be defined in the whole Brillouin zone but their Landau damping becomes substantial away from the zone's center. Surprisingly, magnons of comparable momenta and energies can feature, depending on their chirality, considerably different attenuation, in some cases of predominantly resonant character. We trace this effect to the interplay between the magnon eigenvectors and the intrinsically spin-polarized altermagnetic band structure and the resulting spectrum of non-collinear Stoner states.

82

各向异性光场调控d波交替磁体的非平庸能带结构与自旋极化#

Exploring non-trivial band structure and spin polarizations in d-wave altermagnets tailored by anisotropic optical fields
📚 arXiv👤 Andrii Iurov, Liubov Zhemchuzhna, Tiyhearah Danner-Jackson📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示线偏振光可在d波交替磁体中打开有限能隙——区别于Dirac材料的独特光响应，并发现二阶微扰才能捕获的关键物理；各向异性光场为自旋极化调控与光控量子材料设计提供了新途径。
本工作理论研究了非共振光缀饰场下d波交替磁体的能谱、能隙、拓扑与集体性质及线性响应，涵盖dₓ²₋y²和dₓy两种配对对称性。在线偏振辐照下发现有限能隙的打开——这一现象在Dirac材料中未观察到；部分关键性质需在二阶微扰展开中才能揭示。各向异性驱动场导致交替磁体Edelstein磁化率的微妙变化，可实现自旋极化的精细调控。该工作还计算了多种交替磁体的Berry曲率，为光控量子材料设计提供了理论基础。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本工作理论研究了非共振光缀饰场下d波交替磁体的能谱、能隙、拓扑与集体性质及线性响应，涵盖dₓ²₋y²和dₓy两种配对对称性。在线偏振辐照下发现有限能隙的打开——这一现象在Dirac材料中未观察到；部分关键性质需在二阶微扰展开中才能揭示。各向异性驱动场导致交替磁体Edelstein磁化率的微妙变化，可实现自旋极化的精细调控。该工作还计算了多种交替磁体的Berry曲率，为光控量子材料设计提供了理论基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.29106v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The subject of the present paper is a detailed theoretical investigation of the energy spectrum and bandgaps, as well as topological and collective properties and linear response, in d-wave altermagnets in the presence of an off-resonance optical dressing field. We consider the altermagnets with both dₓ^₂₋y^₂ and dₓy pairing symmetries and focus on anisotropic dressing fields applied to an anisotropic and non-linear electron Hamiltonian. We have uncovered several crucial properties of the resulting electron-dressed states; specifically, we found that a finite bandgap is opened by linearly polarized irradiation, a phenomenon not observed in Dirac materials. Some of the crucial properties of the electron dressed states in the presence of the linearly polarized light can be uncovered only in the second-order perturbation expansion, which is often omitted. We found that introducing an anisotropic driving field leads to several subtle yet important changes in the Edelstein susceptibilities of altermagents, enabling the fine-tuning of their spin polarizations. We calculate the Berry curvature for various types of altermagnets and obtain closed-form analytical expressions for circularly polarized irradiation. We demonstrate that the optical driving field can generate finite Berry curvature in the absence of altermagnetic order. All these results are expected to become a crucial contribution to the rapidly developing fields of spintronics and device physics.

83

磁性拓扑绝缘体中的集体激发与轴子暗物质探测#

Collective excitations in magnetic topological insulators and axion dark matter search
📚 arXiv👤 Koji Ishiwata, Kentaro Nomura📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在磁性拓扑绝缘体中识别出"轴子型"振幅模准粒子，并发现其与电磁场的有效耦合较此前预期显著减弱甚至抑制两个数量级。这一发现修正了基于磁性拓扑绝缘体的轴子暗物质探测方案的理论预期，对实验灵敏度评
本工作研究磁性拓扑绝缘体中的集体激发及其对轴子探测的影响。在含Hubbard项的三维拓扑绝缘体模型中，通过动力学磁化率公式化反铁磁态和铁磁态下磁振子与振幅模的有效作用，其中一个振幅模被识别为"轴子型"准粒子。其与电磁场的有效耦合相比此前估计基本不变或被抑制多达两个数量级，这可能显著改变利用磁性拓扑绝缘体进行轴子搜寻的灵敏度。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本工作研究磁性拓扑绝缘体中的集体激发及其对轴子探测的影响。在含Hubbard项的三维拓扑绝缘体模型中，通过动力学磁化率公式化反铁磁态和铁磁态下磁振子与振幅模的有效作用，其中一个振幅模被识别为"轴子型"准粒子。其与电磁场的有效耦合相比此前估计基本不变或被抑制多达两个数量级，这可能显著改变利用磁性拓扑绝缘体进行轴子搜寻的灵敏度。

English Abstract

arXiv:2406.09705v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We investigate collective excitations in magnetic topological insulators (TIs) and their impact on axion detection. In the three-dimensional TI model with the Hubbard term, the effective action of magnons and amplitude modes is formulated by dynamical susceptibility under the antiferromagnetic and ferromagnetic states. One of the amplitude modes is identified as ``axionic'' quasi-particle and its effective coupling to the electromagnetic fields turns out to be roughly unchanged, or suppressed by up to two orders of magnitude, compared to the previous estimate, which may drastically change the sensitivity of the axion search using``axion' in magnetic TIs.

84

电介质中线性磁电响应的传播分类#

Propagation-based classification of linear magnetoelectric response in dielectrics
📚 arXiv👤 Eduardo Bittencourt, Elliton O. S. R. Brandão, Érico Goulart, Danilo H. Spadoti📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次系统分解磁电耦合张量的传播效应，发现迹部分在几何光学领头阶无贡献、反对称部分可解析求解、对称无迹部分主导方向依赖的偏振混合，为磁电材料的光学表征提供了理论框架与实验探测方案。
该工作研究具有线性磁电响应的均匀电介质在几何光学极限下的电磁波传播。在假设各向同性介电常数和磁导率的前提下，保持一般的3×3磁电耦合矩阵αᵢⱼ，推导了极化矢量的程函（菲涅尔）本征值问题，并获得归一化相速度r=v/v_d的紧致四次色散关系。通过将αᵢⱼ分解为迹、对称无迹和反对称三部分，分类了各部分的传播效应：纯迹部分在几何光学领头阶对传播无影响；反对称部分导致可因式分解的四次方程，产生具有解析相速度的两个分支；对称无迹部分通过代数不变量…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究具有线性磁电响应的均匀电介质在几何光学极限下的电磁波传播。在假设各向同性介电常数和磁导率的前提下，保持一般的3×3磁电耦合矩阵αᵢⱼ，推导了极化矢量的程函（菲涅尔）本征值问题，并获得归一化相速度r=v/v_d的紧致四次色散关系。通过将αᵢⱼ分解为迹、对称无迹和反对称三部分，分类了各部分的传播效应：纯迹部分在几何光学领头阶对传播无影响；反对称部分导致可因式分解的四次方程，产生具有解析相速度的两个分支；对称无迹部分通过代数不变量控制菲涅尔波面和偏振混合，具有最丰富的方向依赖性。最后讨论了通过相位敏感透射和共振测量探测相速度移动的可能性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.19235v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study electromagnetic wave propagation in homogeneous dielectrics endowed with a linear magnetoelectric (ME) response in the geometric-optics regime. Assuming isotropic permittivity and permeability while keeping a generic 3× 3 ME matrix αᵢⱼ, we derive the eikonal (Fresnel) eigenvalue problem for the polarization vector and obtain a compact quartic dispersion relation for the normalized phase speed r=v/v_d, where v_d=(μǎrepsilon)⁻¹/² is the phase speed of the underlying dielectric. We then classify the propagation effects of αᵢⱼ by decomposing it into trace, symmetric-traceless, and antisymmetric sectors. We show that (i) the pure-trace sector is propagation-silent at leading geometric-optics order; (ii) the antisymmetric sector yields a factorized quartic and produces two branches with closed-form phase speeds, including regimes where |v|>v_d; and (iii) the symmetric-traceless sector encodes the richest directional dependence through algebraic invariants that control the Fresnel wave surface and polarization mixing. Finally, we discuss how the predicted phase-speed shifts can be accessed by phase-sensitive transmission and resonant techniques, and we outline numerical workflows to validate the analytic dispersion and map polarization signatures in bulk and finite geometries.

85

全介质超表面中光注入局域自由载流子产生并增强持久性纳米尺度磁化#

Generation and Enhancement of Persistent Nanoscale Magnetization in All-Dielectric Metasurfaces by Optically Injected and Localized Free Carriers
📚 arXiv👤 Shivaksh Rawat, Samyobrata Mukherjee, Gennady Shvets📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文创新性地提出利用光注入局域自由载流子在全介质超表面中构建时间界面，突破传统空间超构材料局限，实现频率转换与波前调控；更独特的是揭示了残余环流驱动的持久性纳米尺度磁化效应，为光控磁存储、非易失性光子
本文研究支持尖锐光学共振且具有非平凡电磁场分布的时变介质超表面，展示局域自由载流子产生可用于工程化调控频率偏移、时间折射和反射的红外超表面导波。研究表明此类时间界面可在超表面内产生大的、高度局域化的准静态磁场，由残余环流支撑的纳米尺度磁化在散射波离开后仍持续存在。初始电磁能量被分配于时间反射/折射波、自由载流子残余运动和准静态磁场之间。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文研究支持尖锐光学共振且具有非平凡电磁场分布的时变介质超表面，展示局域自由载流子产生可用于工程化调控频率偏移、时间折射和反射的红外超表面导波。研究表明此类时间界面可在超表面内产生大的、高度局域化的准静态磁场，由残余环流支撑的纳米尺度磁化在散射波离开后仍持续存在。初始电磁能量被分配于时间反射/折射波、自由载流子残余运动和准静态磁场之间。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.11003v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Time-varying dielectric metasurfaces supporting sharp optical resonances with a non-trivial electromagnetic field distribution represent a unique platform for realizing temporal interfaces for metasurface-guided waves (MGWs). Rapidly changing metasurface resonance enables frequency conversion and temporal scattering of a concurrently propagating MGW. Using analytical methods and electromagnetic simulations, we demonstrate that localized free-carrier generation can be engineered to produce frequency-shifted, time-refracted, and reflected infrared MGWs. Furthermore, we demonstrate that such time interfaces can be utilized to generate large, highly localized quasistatic magnetic fields within the metasurfaces. The resulting nanoscale magnetization, supported by the residual circulating currents, persists after the departure of the time-scattered MGWs. We further demonstrate that the initial electromagnetic energy of the injected MGWs is partitioned between the time-reflected/refracted MGWs, residual motion of the free carriers, and a quasistatic magnetic field.

三维S=1/2化合物Y₃Cu₂Sb₃O₁₄中的新型量子自旋液体态#

Novel Quantum Spin Liquid States in the S=frac12 Three-Dimensional Compound Y₃Cu₂Sb₃O₁₄
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.👤 Saikat Nandi, Rounak Das, M. Hemmida, M. U. Akbar, H.-A. Krug von Nidda, Jörg Sichelschmidt, Sagar Mahapatra, Marlis Schuller, N. Büttgen, J. M. Wilkinson, M. P. Saravanan, Indra Dasgupta, and A. V. Mahajan📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电

该工作研究三维S=1/2系统Y₃Cu₂Sb₃O₁₄，其包含两个不等价的Cu²⁺位点，各自形成共边三角晶格。通过磁化率、比热、⁸⁹Y核磁共振等测量，该工作揭示了该化合物中的新型量子自旋液体态，详情需查阅原文。

该工作研究三维S=1/2系统Y₃Cu₂Sb₃O₁₄，其包含两个不等价的Cu²⁺位点，各自形成共边三角晶格。通过磁化率、比热、⁸⁹Y核磁共振等测量，该工作揭示了该化合物中的新型量子自旋液体态，详情需查阅原文。

具有有限极化与磁化的晶格激发#

Lattice Excitations with Finite Polarization and Magnetization
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.👤 Mike Pols, Carl P. Romao, and Dominik M. Juraschek📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作提出"多铁子"这一新型元激发概念，统一描述兼具电极化与磁化的集体激发，突破了铁电子与磁子各自独立的传统框架。多铁子可同时输运两种序参量，为设计新型多铁性存储与自旋电子器件提供了全新的激发态操控自
该工作引入多铁子(multiferron)作为兼具电极化与磁化的元激发，类比铁电序的元激发铁电子(ferron)与磁序的元激发磁子(magnon)。多铁子可同时调制和输运电极化与磁化，该工作围绕这类新型耦合激发模式展开，详情需查阅原文。

基于定向自旋空间群的磁有序对称性分类#

Symmetry classification of magnetic orders using oriented spin space groups
📚 Nature👤 Yuntian Liu, Xiaobing Chen, Yutong Yu, Jesús Etxebarria 等6位作者📅 2026-04-22⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文创新性地提出定向自旋空间群（OSSG）理论框架，统一了自旋空间群与磁空间群两种分类体系，并首次识别出自旋-轨道磁性（SOM）这一全新磁相，为非常规磁体设计和下一代自旋电子器件开发提供了系统的对称性
近年来，磁学取得了显著进展，主要驱动力在于其在下一代存储器件中的应用潜力。然而，即使对于铁磁性（FM）和反铁磁性（AFM）等基本概念，磁有序的分类仍在不断演变，特别是随着非常规磁性材料的发现和反铁磁自旋电子学的进步。本文利用最先进的自旋空间群（SSG）理论对磁有序进行分类。基于SSG框架是否将净自旋磁化强度约束为零，我们将磁有序系统地划分为FM（包括亚铁磁性）和AFM。我们进一步引入了"定向自旋空间群"（OSSG）描述，即具有固定磁化…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

近年来，磁学取得了显著进展，主要驱动力在于其在下一代存储器件中的应用潜力。然而，即使对于铁磁性（FM）和反铁磁性（AFM）等基本概念，磁有序的分类仍在不断演变，特别是随着非常规磁性材料的发现和反铁磁自旋电子学的进步。本文利用最先进的自旋空间群（SSG）理论对磁有序进行分类。基于SSG框架是否将净自旋磁化强度约束为零，我们将磁有序系统地划分为FM（包括亚铁磁性）和AFM。我们进一步引入了"定向自旋空间群"（OSSG）描述，即具有固定磁化方向的SSG，从而统一了SSG与磁空间群（MSG）框架。这一方法清晰地揭示了自旋-轨道耦合（SOC）诱导的对称性破缺路径。基于所提出的群论框架，我们识别出一种独特的磁相，称为自旋-轨道磁性（SOM），其中净自旋磁化强度由SOC诱导产生。我们的工作为磁有序分类提供了全面的基于对称性的视角，为非常规磁体提供了新见解，并在自旋电子学和量子材料设计中具有广泛的适用性。

English Abstract

Magnetism has seen substantial progress in recent decades, driven largely by its potential for next-generation storage devices. However, the classification of magnetic orders, even for fundamental concepts such as ferromagnetism (FM) and antiferromagnetism (AFM), remains a topic of active evolution, particularly with the discovery of unconventional magnetic materials and advances in antiferromagnetic spintronics1,2,3,4. Here we present a classification of magnetic order using the state-of-the-art spin space group (SSG) theory5,6,7,8,9,10,11. On the basis of whether the net spin magnetization is constrained to zero by the SSG framework, we systematically categorize magnetic orders into FM (including ferrimagnetism) and AFM. We further introduce an ‘oriented spin space group’ (OSSG) description, that is, a SSG with a fixed magnetic orientation, thereby unifying the SSG and magnetic space group (MSG)12,13,14frameworks. This approach clearly reveals the symmetry-breaking pathway induced by spin–orbit coupling (SOC). On the basis of the proposed group framework, we identify a distinct magnetic phase, termed spin–orbit magnetism (SOM), in which the net spin magnetization is induced by SOC. Our work provides a comprehensive symmetry-based perspective for classifying magnetic order, offering fresh insights into unconventional magnets and broad applicability in spintronics and quantum materials design.

Stannole dianions for axially coordinated lanthanide single-molecule magnets

English Abstract

To control the magnetic anisotropy of single-molecule magnets, precise engineering of the ligands is crucial. Now, homoleptic bis(stannolediide) complexes are synthesized with trivalent terbium, as well as trivalent and divalent dysprosium, expanding the series of axially coordinated lanthanide single-molecule magnets.
