91

激光诱导磁霍普夫子的成核#

Laser-induced nucleation of magnetic hopfions
📚 Nature Physics👤 Xiaowen Chen, Donghai Yang, Zefang Li, Jiangteng Guo 等20位作者📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本研究首次在FeGe中实现激光诱导孤立磁霍普夫子的无接触成核与直接观测，突破此前仅能通过特殊构型观测的限制。该光控方法为三维拓扑磁纹理的基础研究及拓扑磁存储器件开发提供了新途径。
霍普夫子是由涡旋弦闭合环形成的三维拓扑孤子，通常呈环状。在磁性晶体中，霍普夫子迄今仅在特殊构型中被观察到，即霍普夫子环与斯格明子弦相互连接。尽管理论预言了稳定孤立霍普夫子的存在，其实验实现仍具挑战。本研究利用透射电子显微镜，在立方手性磁体FeGe中展示了孤立磁性霍普夫子的激光诱导成核与直接观测。成核条件随激光能量密度和外磁场强度的变化关系得以确定。实验数据与微磁学模拟的定量吻合为孤立霍普夫子的出现提供了证据。我们在真实而非理想化边界条…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

霍普夫子是由涡旋弦闭合环形成的三维拓扑孤子，通常呈环状。在磁性晶体中，霍普夫子迄今仅在特殊构型中被观察到，即霍普夫子环与斯格明子弦相互连接。尽管理论预言了稳定孤立霍普夫子的存在，其实验实现仍具挑战。本研究利用透射电子显微镜，在立方手性磁体FeGe中展示了孤立磁性霍普夫子的激光诱导成核与直接观测。成核条件随激光能量密度和外磁场强度的变化关系得以确定。实验数据与微磁学模拟的定量吻合为孤立霍普夫子的出现提供了证据。我们在真实而非理想化边界条件下推导了霍普夫子的拓扑不变量，并计算了观测对象的整数值。我们还揭示了霍普夫子可在较宽磁场范围内与其他拓扑自旋纹理共存并发生相互作用。这些发现展示了一种无接触成核复杂三维磁纹理的方法，从而为磁性霍普夫子的进一步基础与应用研究奠定了基础。

English Abstract

Hopfions are three-dimensional topological solitons formed by closed loops of vortex strings, often taking the shape of rings. In magnetic crystals, hopfions have so far been observed only in unusual configurations in which hopfion rings are linked to skyrmion strings. Although theory predicts the existence of stable, isolated hopfions, their experimental realization has remained challenging. Here we demonstrate the laser-induced nucleation and direct observation of isolated magnetic hopfions in a cubic chiral magnet, FeGe, using transmission electron microscopy. The nucleation conditions are determined as a function of laser fluence and external magnetic field. Quantitative agreement between experimental data and micromagnetic simulations provides evidence for the emergence of isolated hopfions. We derive the topological invariant for hopfions under realistic rather than idealized boundary conditions and calculate its integer values for the observed objects. We also reveal that hopfions can coexist and interact with other topological spin textures over a broad field range. These findings demonstrate a contact-free approach for nucleating complex three-dimensional magnetic textures, thus providing a basis for further fundamental and applied research on magnetic hopfions.

92

三层镍酸盐中超快磁压光谱学与关联相调控#

Ultrafast Magneto-Pressure Spectroscopy and Control of Correlated Phases in a Trilayer Nickelate
📚 arXiv👤 Zhi Xiang Chong, Joong-Mok Park, Shuyuan Huyan, Avinash Khatri, Martin Mootz, Xinglong Chen, Daniel P. Phelan, Liang Luo, Ilias E. Perakis, J. F. Mitchell, Sergey L. Bud'ko, Paul C. Canfield, Jigang Wang📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究构建了极端条件（高压-强磁场-低温）飞秒光谱实验平台，首次揭示三层镍酸盐中电荷密度波转变的临界慢化行为及其压力抑制效应，发现超导相附近准粒子动力学异常而磁场响应微弱，为理解镍基超导微观机制提供了
该工作发展了高压（达40 GPa）、强磁场（达7 T）、低温（至5 K）飞秒光谱实验平台，用于探测Pr₄Ni₃O₁₀的准粒子动力学磁压演化。观测到电荷密度波转变处准粒子弛豫的显著临界慢化，该慢化在加压下消失；更高压力下低温弛豫延长，与初现超导关联一致，但7 T内磁场依赖性可忽略且缺乏涡旋诱导的预瓶颈动力学。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作发展了高压（达40 GPa）、强磁场（达7 T）、低温（至5 K）飞秒光谱实验平台，用于探测Pr₄Ni₃O₁₀的准粒子动力学磁压演化。观测到电荷密度波转变处准粒子弛豫的显著临界慢化，该慢化在加压下消失；更高压力下低温弛豫延长，与初现超导关联一致，但7 T内磁场依赖性可忽略且缺乏涡旋诱导的预瓶颈动力学。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16611v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Ultrafast spectroscopy under simultaneous high pressure and magnetic field provides a versatile approach for investigating pressure-driven electronic instabilities and correlated phases, and for probing potential bulk superconducting behavior under extreme conditions. However, such an experimental platform has yet to be implemented, standing as a roadblock to a fuller understanding of nonequilibrium superconductivity and vortex-controlled quasi-particle (QP) dynamics. Here, we bridge this capability gap by developing high pressure (up to 40 GPa), high magnetic field (up to 7 T), cryogenic (down to 5 K) femtosecond spectroscopy, and using it to probe magneto-pressure evolution of quasiparticle dynamics in the trilayer nickelate Pr₄Ni₃O₁₀. We observe pronounced critical slowing down of QP relaxation at the charge-density-wave transition, which collapses under applied pressure. At higher pressures, the relaxation instead lengthens at low temperature, consistent with incipient superconducting correlations. However, the negligibel magnetic-field-dependence up to 7~T and absence of vortex-induced pre-bottleneck dynamics--robust signatures observed in our controlled bulk superconducting samples--indicates that any superconducting state under the present pressure conditions is likely non-bulk, filamentary, or strongly inhomogeneous. The magneto-pressure ultrafast capability opens a new avenue for resolving outstanding questions surrounding pressure-induced superconductivity and intertwined orders in correlated quantum materials.

93

相互作用自旋系统中的热力学曲率与Widom脊#

Thermodynamic Curvature and the Widom Ridge in Interacting Spin Systems
📚 arXiv👤 Eric R. Bittner📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次建立Ising模型热力学响应的几何理论，核心发现是热力学曲率对控制变量选择的敏感性：正则系综变换导致(β,h)流形出现有限曲率，而(J,h)流形因可积性曲率消失。创新在于将Widom线重新诠
该工作对经典Ising模型建立热力学响应的几何表述，在逆温度β和磁场h张成的控制流形上定义曲率场。证明非平庸曲率敏感依赖于控制变量选择：(J,h)流形可积且曲率为零，而(β,h)流形因统计系综变化产生有限曲率，可表为能量与磁化涨落的协方差。蒙特卡洛计算显示曲率场从临界点向超临界区延伸出显著脊结构，将Widom线识别为控制空间的几何特征。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对经典Ising模型建立热力学响应的几何表述，在逆温度β和磁场h张成的控制流形上定义曲率场。证明非平庸曲率敏感依赖于控制变量选择：(J,h)流形可积且曲率为零，而(β,h)流形因统计系综变化产生有限曲率，可表为能量与磁化涨落的协方差。蒙特卡洛计算显示曲率场从临界点向超临界区延伸出显著脊结构，将Widom线识别为控制空间的几何特征。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16707v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We develop a geometric formulation of thermodynamic response in the classical Ising model by defining a curvature field over the control manifold spanned by inverse temperature β and magnetic field h. We show that the existence of nontrivial curvature depends sensitively on the choice of control variables: while the (J,h) manifold at fixed temperature is integrable and exhibits zero curvature, the (β,h) manifold supports a finite curvature field arising from variations of the statistical ensemble. This curvature is given by a mixed derivative of the free energy and can be expressed directly as the covariance between energy and magnetization fluctuations. We evaluate the curvature field using Monte Carlo sampling and demonstrate that it develops a pronounced ridge structure extending from the critical point into the supercritical regime. This identifies the Widom line as a geometric feature of control space, corresponding to a locus of maximal thermodynamic response. More generally, the formulation provides a direct connection between geometric thermodynamics, critical phenomena, and experimentally accessible observables, and suggests that thermodynamic curvature may be probed through measurements of work performed under cyclic driving protocols.

94

理解量子磁性现代实验的理论与数值努力#

Theoretical and Numerical Efforts in Understanding Modern Experiments on Quantum Magnetism
📚 arXiv👤 Zi Yang Meng, Cristian D. Batista, Shiliang Li📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文提出量子磁性研究应打破数值模拟、解析方法与材料实验三者割裂的现状，建立协同驱动的整合范式。核心创新在于将理论、计算与实验从单向验证关系重构为共同塑造科学认知的平等主体，对加速量子自旋液体、拓扑磁有
该工作倡导理论、数值模拟与实验之间更加整合的研究范式以应对量子磁性领域的挑战。作者指出当前三个基础支柱——数值模拟、解析方法与材料合成实验——往往各自视自身为主要驱动力，而主张一种替代性思维已开始在多个重要量子磁性模型及其材料实现的理解中取得进展，强调三者应共同塑造科学叙事而非仅作为验证工具。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作倡导理论、数值模拟与实验之间更加整合的研究范式以应对量子磁性领域的挑战。作者指出当前三个基础支柱——数值模拟、解析方法与材料合成实验——往往各自视自身为主要驱动力，而主张一种替代性思维已开始在多个重要量子磁性模型及其材料实现的理解中取得进展，强调三者应共同塑造科学叙事而非仅作为验证工具。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16820v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In recent decades, the study of quantum magnets, which feature unconventional behaviour such as exotic quantum phase transitions and quantum spin liquids, and unconventional magnetic states of matter, has made remarkable progress. However, each of the three foundational pillars -- numerical simulations, analytical methods, and, to a lesser extent, materials synthesis and experiments -- often tends to view itself as the primary driver of the field. Even through the need for collaboration among theory, numerics and experiment to understand the complex phases of quantum magnets is well established, yet, in our view there remains a persistent perception from experts in one area that the other two serve merely as supporting tool, primarily useful for validating the dominant ideas of one specialty, and less relevant to shaping the underlying scientific narrative. In this article, we advocate for a different, more integrated approach to overcome the challenges faced by quantum magnetism researchers. We argue that this alternative mindset has already started to advance the understanding of several important quantum magnetic models and their materials realizations.

95

UCd₁₁：一种强局域化的5f³材料#

UCd₁₁: A strongly localized 5f³ material
📚 arXiv👤 Martin Sundermann, Naoki Ito, Daisuke Takegami, Chun-Fu Chang, Sheng-Huai Chen, Chang-Yang Kuo, Simone G. Altendorf, Andrei Gloskovskii, Hlynur Gretarsson, Eric D. Bauer, Jan Kuneš, Liu Hao Tjeng, Andrea Severing, Atsushi Hariki📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究通过DFT+DMFT计算揭示UCd₁₁为强局域化5f³体系，其核心创新在于推翻"芯能级卫星结构可作为5f巡游性判据"的传统观点，为锕系电子结构表征提供了更可靠的理论框架，对重费米子材料及核燃料体
该工作结合密度泛函理论与动力学平均场理论计算研究反铁磁铀金属间化合物UCd₁₁。通过调节材料特定参数以复现不同光子能量下的价带光电子能谱，结果表明UCd₁₁是高度局域化的铀5f³体系；此外，基于DFT+DMFT的Anderson杂质模型计算显示，芯能级卫星结构的存在与否并非强关联或5f巡游性的可靠判据，挑战了传统认知。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作结合密度泛函理论与动力学平均场理论计算研究反铁磁铀金属间化合物UCd₁₁。通过调节材料特定参数以复现不同光子能量下的价带光电子能谱，结果表明UCd₁₁是高度局域化的铀5f³体系；此外，基于DFT+DMFT的Anderson杂质模型计算显示，芯能级卫星结构的存在与否并非强关联或5f巡游性的可靠判据，挑战了传统认知。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16844v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: UCd₁₁ is an antiferromagnetic uranium intermetallic compound (Tₘ̊ N = 5.3K) with enhanced electron mass and uranium-uranium spacings nearly twice the Hill limit, suggesting a weakly hybridized 5f electronic character. Various x-ray spectroscopy techniques indicate that uranium in UCd₁₁ adopts the formal U³⁺ 5f³ configuration, while core-level photoemission spectroscopy (PES) data of UCd₁₁ reveal only a weak satellite feature, typically interpreted as a signature of itinerancy. In this work, we present density functional theory (DFT) combined with dynamical mean-field theory (DMFT) calculations of UCd₁₁, using material-specific parameters tuned to reproduce valence-band PES spectra at different photon energies, thereby exploiting the energy dependence of photoionization cross sections. Our results demonstrate that UCd₁₁ is a highly localized uranium 5f³ system. Furthermore, core-level spectra obtained from a DFT+DMFT Anderson impurity model reveal that, contrary to common assumptions, the presence or absence of satellite structures is not a reliable indicator of strong correlations or itinerant 5f behavior.

96

晶体各向异性对范德华FePS₃磁光性质的影响#

Crystal Anisotropy Implications on the Magneto-Optical Properties of van der Waals FePS3
📚 arXiv👤 Ellenor Geraffy, Kusha Sharma, Shahar Zuri, Faris Horani, Adam K. Budniak, Muhamed Dawod, Yaron Amouyal, Thomas Brumme, Andrea Maricel León, Thomas Heine, Rajesh Kumar, Doron Naveh, Efrat Lifshitz📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次系统阐明FePS₃中面内结构各向异性对磁光性质的调控机制，建立了晶体结构—电子结构—光学响应的完整关联。通过实验与理论结合，揭示了从体块到单层极限下偏振依赖发射的物理起源，为基于低维反铁磁材
该工作揭示面内结构各向异性对反铁磁FePS₃从体块到单层极限的光学响应具有决定性影响。X射线衍射证实体块FePS₃中畸变FeS₆八面体导致不等价Fe-Fe距离和更大的a/b晶格参数比；微区光致发光观测到四个发射带，包括一个d-d跃迁和三个p-d电荷转移跃迁，这些带具有不同的偏振行为且持续至单层。密度泛函理论计算阐明了电子结构、发射峰指认及其线偏振与圆偏振响应差异的成因，建立了FePS₃中直接的结构-光学关联。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作揭示面内结构各向异性对反铁磁FePS₃从体块到单层极限的光学响应具有决定性影响。X射线衍射证实体块FePS₃中畸变FeS₆八面体导致不等价Fe-Fe距离和更大的a/b晶格参数比；微区光致发光观测到四个发射带，包括一个d-d跃迁和三个p-d电荷转移跃迁，这些带具有不同的偏振行为且持续至单层。密度泛函理论计算阐明了电子结构、发射峰指认及其线偏振与圆偏振响应差异的成因，建立了FePS₃中直接的结构-光学关联。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16912v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Antiferromagnetic FePS3 has recently gained significant interest in its potential applications in spin-related devices. Here, we show that in-plane structural anisotropy has a major impact in shaping the optical responses of FePS3 single-crystals from the bulk form down to the monolayer limit. X-ray diffraction on a bulk FePS3 crystal confirms a distorted FeS6 octahedron causing inequivalent Fe-Fe distances and consequently resulting in a higher a/b lattice parameter ratio. Micro-photoluminescence observations on bulk and monolayer FePS3 reveal four emissions: one intra-atomic d-d transition (band A, centered at ~1.24 eV) and three p-d charge transfer transitions (bands B, C, and D, centered around ~1.79 eV, ~2.3 eV, and ~2.56 eV, respectively). These bands exhibit different polarization behaviors, which persist down to the monolayer limit. Density functional theory calculations from bulk to monolayer FePS3 reveal the underlying electronic structure, assign the observed emissions, and indicate why these peaks have contrasting linear and circular polarization responses. These results establish a direct structure-optics relation in FePS3, highlighting the strong coupling between lattice anisotropy, electronic transitions, and symmetry-selective optical selection rules.

97

Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert方程中的能量耗散#

On the Energy Dissipation in the Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert Equation
📚 arXiv👤 Kutay Kulbak, Mohamed Iyad Boualem, Charlie Masse, Mariana Delalibera de Toledo, Vasily V. Temnov📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作揭示纳米磁体在亚稳态消失的分叉点附近，铁磁共振品质因数Q与阻尼常数α的标度关系发生本质偏离，突破了Q≈1/2α的经典近似。这为精确调控磁化动力学、优化自旋电子器件功耗与开关速度提供了关键理论依据
该工作在Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert框架下考察铁磁纳米磁体稳定平衡附近磁化动力学，系统分析小角度进动时铁磁共振频率、阻尼常数及共振品质因数Q对自由能极小值附近局域曲率的依赖关系。特别关注分叉点附近的FMR衰减时间行为，在这些点亚稳态能量极小值数目发生变化，常用近似Q≈1/2α失效。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert框架下考察铁磁纳米磁体稳定平衡附近磁化动力学，系统分析小角度进动时铁磁共振频率、阻尼常数及共振品质因数Q对自由能极小值附近局域曲率的依赖关系。特别关注分叉点附近的FMR衰减时间行为，在这些点亚稳态能量极小值数目发生变化，常用近似Q≈1/2α失效。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16938v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The dynamics of magnetization near a stable equilibrium in ferromagnetic nanomagnets are examined within the Landau--Lifshitz--Gilbert (LLG) framework. For a small angle precession, the dependence of ferromagnetic resonance (FMR) frequency, the damping constant and the resulting quality factor Q of the resonance on the local curvature around the free-energy minimum is systematically analyzed. Special attention is devoted to the behavior of the FMR decay time in the vicinity of bifurcation points, where the number of metastable energy minima changes and the commonly used approximation for the quality factor Qsimeq 1/2α (where α denotes the Gilbert damping) fails.

98

交错磁体输运与光学响应的中等通量评估#

Medium-Throughput Evaluation of Transport and Optical Responses in Altermagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Fu Li, Bo Zhao, Vikrant Chaudhary, Shengqiao Wang, Chen Shen, Hao Wang, Hongbin Zhang📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作建立中等通量计算框架，系统筛选150种交错磁材料，揭示磁对称性对输运与光学响应的约束规律，为实验识别交错磁态提供高效理论路径，并发现VNb₃S₆、CaIrO₃等功能性材料候选体系。
该工作发展了中等通量第一性原理计算流程，评估从MAGNDATA数据库收集的约150种已知交错磁化合物的输运与光学性质。结合密度泛函理论、Wannier插值和对称性分析，研究了包括反常霍尔效应、磁光Kerr效应和体光伏效应在内的线性与非线性响应，发现这些响应受磁对称性强约束，并进一步由自旋-轨道耦合、能带结构和反演对称性破缺共同塑造。代表性结果包括金属VNb₃S₆中的有限反常霍尔响应、绝缘体CaIrO₃中的巨Kerr旋转以及非中心对称C…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作发展了中等通量第一性原理计算流程，评估从MAGNDATA数据库收集的约150种已知交错磁化合物的输运与光学性质。结合密度泛函理论、Wannier插值和对称性分析，研究了包括反常霍尔效应、磁光Kerr效应和体光伏效应在内的线性与非线性响应，发现这些响应受磁对称性强约束，并进一步由自旋-轨道耦合、能带结构和反演对称性破缺共同塑造。代表性结果包括金属VNb₃S₆中的有限反常霍尔响应、绝缘体CaIrO₃中的巨Kerr旋转以及非中心对称CuFeS₂中的大位移电流，为识别交错磁材料中实验可及的特征指纹和功能性输运性质建立了对称性引导的路径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17071v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets provide a promising platform for unconventional transport and optical responses beyond conventional ferromagnets and antiferromagnets. In this work, we develop a medium-throughput first-principles workflow to evaluate transport and optical properties in approximately 150 known altermagnetic compounds collected from the MAGNDATA database. By combining density functional theory, Wannier interpolation, and symmetry analysis, we investigate representative linear and nonlinear responses, including the anomalous Hall effect, magneto-optical Kerr effect, and bulk photovoltaic effect. We find that these responses are strongly constrained by magnetic symmetry and further shaped by spin-orbit coupling, band structure, and inversion symmetry breaking. Representative examples include a finite anomalous Hall response in metallic VNb3S6, giant Kerr rotation in insulating CaIrO3, and large shift current in non-centrosymmetric CuFeS2. These results establish a symmetry-guided route for identifying experimentally accessible fingerprints and functional transport properties in altermagnetic materials.

99

多晶FeSi薄膜中拓扑输运的实验特征#

Experimental Signatures of Topological Transport in Polycrystalline FeSi Thin Films
📚 arXiv👤 R. Mantovan, A. Bozhko, V. Zhurkin, A. Bogach, A. Khanas, S. Zarubin, A. Zenkevich, V. Glushkov📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地证明多晶无序并不破坏拓扑量子态，在纳米晶FeSi薄膜中观测到内禀反常霍尔效应及Weyl手性反常，为低成本、可扩展的拓扑器件材料设计开辟新途径，挑战了单晶依赖的传统范式。
该工作在通过固态反应生长的65 nm厚多晶ϵ-FeSi薄膜中可靠地探测到清晰的拓扑特征，挑战了无序必然严重损害非平庸能带拓扑量子材料中新奇现象探索的既有观念。200 K以下温度无关的反常霍尔电导率σₓᵧᴬᴴᴱ≈const·σₓₓ（约14 μS/sq）牢固证明该化合物的反常霍尔效应为内禀起源、源于非平庸Berry相位；该标度律主导于约40 nm的纳米多晶织构之上，且对体块与表面输运模式的温度跨越具有鲁棒性。Weyl半金属特有的手性反常也…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在通过固态反应生长的65 nm厚多晶ϵ-FeSi薄膜中可靠地探测到清晰的拓扑特征，挑战了无序必然严重损害非平庸能带拓扑量子材料中新奇现象探索的既有观念。200 K以下温度无关的反常霍尔电导率σₓᵧᴬᴴᴱ≈const·σₓₓ（约14 μS/sq）牢固证明该化合物的反常霍尔效应为内禀起源、源于非平庸Berry相位；该标度律主导于约40 nm的纳米多晶织构之上，且对体块与表面输运模式的温度跨越具有鲁棒性。Weyl半金属特有的手性反常也在各向异性纵向磁电阻和平面霍尔效应中得到确认，由标度反常霍尔电导与Weyl半金属"量子化"霍尔响应的关联估计出两个Weyl点之间的距离。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17103v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Disorder in any form is considered to be highly detrimental to the experimental exploration of novel phenomena in quantum materials with non-trivial band topology. Contrary to established belief, clear topological features are reliably detected in the electron transport of polycrystalline 65-nm-thick ϵ -FeSi films grown via solid-state reaction of Fe deposited on a Si(100) substrate. The observation of temperature-independent anomalous Hall conductivity σₓyAHE sim const (σ_{xx)) (σₓyAHE approx 14 uS/sq.) below 200 K firmly proves the anomalous Hall effect in this compound to be intrinsic and originating from a non-trivial Berry phase. The discovered scaling dominates over the nanoscale (sim 40 nm) polycrystalline texture and is robust to temperature crossover between bulk and surface modes of electron transport. The non-trivial topological state of ϵ-FeSi is also confirmed by a chiral anomaly both in anisotropic longitudinal magnetoresistance and planar Hall effect specific for Weyl semimetals. Relating scaled anomalous Hall conductance to a "quantized" Hall response of a Weyl semimetal the distance between two Weyl points has been estimated as (k₊W-k₋W)/(2π) approx 0.36. Our findings confirm the topological origin of electron transport in the polycrystalline ϵ -FeSi thin films and discover its potential as a new high temperature and noble metal-free Weyl semimetal.

100

双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇超导体中的配对机制#

Pairing Mechanism in Bilayer Nickelate La₃Ni₂O₇ Superconductors
📚 arXiv👤 Xianxin Wu, Tao Xiang, Jiangping Hu📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文将统一高温超导基因原理拓展至双层镍酸盐体系，揭示dz²轨道层间交换与层内交换的协同配对机制，阐明s^±超导态的微观起源，为理解镍基超导及设计新型高温超导材料提供关键理论框架。
该工作将此前提出的统一非常规高温超导体的基因原理和合作费米面规则拓展至双层多轨道体系La₃Ni₂O₇，识别出两个可提供主导配对力的反铁磁交换通道：由内层顶氧介导的dz²轨道层间最近邻交换Jₚₑᵣₚ，以及由面内氧介导的dz²与dx²-y²轨道层内最近邻交换Jₓᵧ。由于双层成键-反成键劈裂和dx²-y²轨道的B₁g对称性，这两个通道合作产生稳健的s^±超导态，在动量空间中镜面对称偶与奇的费米面口袋之间存在内部符号反转，两个配对通道均在β口…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作将此前提出的统一非常规高温超导体的基因原理和合作费米面规则拓展至双层多轨道体系La₃Ni₂O₇，识别出两个可提供主导配对力的反铁磁交换通道：由内层顶氧介导的dz²轨道层间最近邻交换Jₚₑᵣₚ，以及由面内氧介导的dz²与dx²-y²轨道层内最近邻交换Jₓᵧ。由于双层成键-反成键劈裂和dx²-y²轨道的B₁g对称性，这两个通道合作产生稳健的s^±超导态，在动量空间中镜面对称偶与奇的费米面口袋之间存在内部符号反转，两个配对通道均在β口袋上最大化超导能隙。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17181v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The recent discovery of superconductivity with T_c approx 80~K in bilayer nickelate La₃Ni₂O₇ provides a new setting in which to test the organizing principles of unconventional high-temperature superconductivity. We show that the gene principle and the collaborative Fermi-surface rule which were previously proposed to unify unconventional high temperature superconductors, extend naturally to this bilayer, multi-orbital system. We identify that there are two antiferromagnetic exchange channels that can provide the dominant pairing force: an interlayer intra-orbital nearest-neighbour exchange Jₚₑᵣₚ between dz^₂ orbitals mediated by the inner apical oxygen, and an intralayer inter-orbital nearest-neighbour exchange Jₓz between dz^₂ and dₓ^₂₋y^₂ orbitals mediated by the in-plane oxygen. Owing to the bilayer bonding--antibonding splitting and the B₁g symmetry of the dₓ^₂₋y^₂ orbital, these two channels cooperate to produce a robust s^± superconducting state with an internal sign reversal between mirror-even and mirror-odd Fermi-surface pockets in momentum space. Both pairing channels maximize the superconducting gap on the β pocket with a form factor (coskₓ₋cosk_y)² in momentum space. The result places La₃Ni₂O₇ within a unified framework for unconventional superconductivity while revealing a distinct electronic environment for high-T_c pairing.

101

Ni替代对NdCo₂低温相变与磁热效应的影响#

Influence of Ni substitution on the phase transitions and magnetocaloric effect of NdCo2 at cryogenic temperatures
📚 arXiv👤 Vilde G. S. Lunde, Øystein S. Fjellvåg, Allan M. Döring, Marc Straßheim, Vladimir Pomjakushin, Konstantin P. Skokov, Oliver Gutfleisch, Tino Gottschall, Joachim Wosnitza, Anja O. Sjåstad, Bjørn C. Hauback, Christoph Frommen📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次系统揭示Ni替代对NdCo₂复杂晶体结构序列相变的调控规律，发现Ni可有效抑制低温正交相并降低相变温度，同时保持可观的磁热效应。这为通过化学掺杂优化稀土Laves化合物磁制冷工作温区与相变可
通过中子衍射和体磁化测量研究NdCo₂₋ₓNiₓ（0≤x≤1）立方Laves化合物的相变与磁热效应。Ni替代使立方-四方转变（100 K）和四方-正交转变（42 K）均向低温移动，x≥0.5时正交相被抑制，同时磁矩降低。NdCo₂在20 T下的绝热温变为6.3 K，NdCoNi降至4.9 K，间接法与直接法测得的磁热效应吻合良好。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

通过中子衍射和体磁化测量研究NdCo₂₋ₓNiₓ（0≤x≤1）立方Laves化合物的相变与磁热效应。Ni替代使立方-四方转变（100 K）和四方-正交转变（42 K）均向低温移动，x≥0.5时正交相被抑制，同时磁矩降低。NdCo₂在20 T下的绝热温变为6.3 K，NdCoNi降至4.9 K，间接法与直接法测得的磁热效应吻合良好。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17336v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We have investigated NdCo2-xNix cubic Laves compounds with 0 <= x <= 1 using neutron diffraction and bulk magnetization measurements to study the influence of partial Ni substitutions of Co on the phase transitions and the magnetocaloric effect. Upon cooling, NdCo2 undergoes a cubic to tetragonal transition at 100 K, and a tetragonal to orthorhombic transition at 42 K. The transitions are associated with long-range ferromagnetic ordering of the magnetic moments along the c axis and spin reorientation into the ab plane, respectively. Both transitions shift to lower temperatures as the Ni content x increases. For x >= 0.5, the orthorhombic phase is suppressed. Additionally, there was a reduction in the magnetic moment upon increasing the Ni substitution of Co. The magnetocaloric effect was determined both indirectly and directly, with good agreement between the methods. NdCo2 exhibits an adiabatic temperature change of 6.3 K for a field of 20 T, which is decreased to 4.9 K for NdCoNi for the same field strength due to the reduced magnetic moment upon Ni substitution.

102

Rb₁₋ₓV₂Te₂O中的G型反铁磁结构#

G-type antiferromagnetic structure in Rb1-xV2Te2O
📚 arXiv👤 Wu Xie (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Changchao Liu (School of Physics, Zhejiang University, Hangzhou, China), Fayuan Zhang (Quantum Science Center of Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, Shenzhen 518045, China), Zhenhong Tan (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Wenhai Ji (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Nan Zhao (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Lingxiang Bao (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Dong Zhang (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Feiran Shen (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Lunhua He (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China), Guanghan Cao (School of Physics, Zhejiang University, Hangzhou, China), Chaoyu Chen (Songshan Lake Materials Laboratory, Dongguan, China), Ping Miao (Spallation Neutron Source Science Center, Dongguan 523803, P. R. China)📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次通过中子粉末衍射实验确定Rb₁₋ₓV₂Te₂O在337 K以下呈G型反铁磁结构，颠覆了此前理论预测，为揭示层状金属性交替磁体中d波自旋对称性与实际磁基态的关联机制提供了关键实验依据。
该研究通过中子粉末衍射（NPD）探究了室温交替磁性候选材料Rb₁₋ₓV₂Te₂O的磁结构，发现其在337 K以下形成G型反铁磁结构，与原有理论预期不同。这一结果为理解该具有层状结构和d波自旋对称性的金属性交替磁体的物理机制提供了新视角。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究通过中子粉末衍射（NPD）探究了室温交替磁性候选材料Rb₁₋ₓV₂Te₂O的磁结构，发现其在337 K以下形成G型反铁磁结构，与原有理论预期不同。这一结果为理解该具有层状结构和d波自旋对称性的金属性交替磁体的物理机制提供了新视角。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17365v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnetism, known for its non-relativistic spin-split band structures with yet compensated moments, is being intensively investigated. Discovering new altermagnetic materials with characteristics suitable for practical use remains an important ongoing task. Recently a metallic room-temperature altermagnet candidate Rb1-xV2Te2O with a layered structure and d-wave spin symmetry has been reported based on experimental results from the spin-resolved photoemission spectroscopy and scanning tunnelling microscopy/spectroscopy (STM/STS) measurements. Here we report neutron powder diffraction (NPD) investigations on the magnetic structure of Rb1-xV2Te2O, which shows a G-type antiferromagnetic structure below the transition temperature of 337 K. The result is different from the original theoretical expectation, which might lead to new insights on the physics of this altermagnet candidate.

103

蜂窝状二维框架中的无金属设计型交替磁性#

Designer metal-free altermagnetism in honeycomb two-dimensional frameworks
📚 arXiv👤 Hongde Yu, Thomas Brumme, Thomas Heine📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地提出分子对称性破缺策略，在无金属有机体系中实现交替磁性，规避了传统过渡金属依赖。通过C₂ᵥ对称设计保留二分晶格而破缺反演对称，结合强电子关联与d波自旋劈裂，为自旋电子学提供了轻质、可调控
该研究提出分子设计策略，在三并苯衍生自由基中通过将单体点群对称性从D₃ₕ降至C₂ᵥ，选择性破缺反演对称性同时保持二分晶格，在蜂窝状二维晶体中实现无金属交替磁性。自旋极化密度泛函计算显示强反铁磁耦合（-130 meV）、M点d波自旋劈裂（17 meV）及Mott-Hubbard能隙（1.26 eV），与Lieb定理一致；紧束缚模型揭示各向异性最近邻跃迁是交替磁性的微观起源，双轴压缩应变可进一步增强该效应。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究提出分子设计策略，在三并苯衍生自由基中通过将单体点群对称性从D₃ₕ降至C₂ᵥ，选择性破缺反演对称性同时保持二分晶格，在蜂窝状二维晶体中实现无金属交替磁性。自旋极化密度泛函计算显示强反铁磁耦合（-130 meV）、M点d波自旋劈裂（17 meV）及Mott-Hubbard能隙（1.26 eV），与Lieb定理一致；紧束缚模型揭示各向异性最近邻跃迁是交替磁性的微观起源，双轴压缩应变可进一步增强该效应。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17386v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnetism combines momentum-dependent spin splitting of opposite-spin channels with zero net magnetization, enabling electric-field control of spin transport that is robust against external magnetic fields. Although widely explored in inorganic systems, metal-free altermagnets with pi-spin splitting, particularly in two-dimensional organic frameworks, have remained elusive. Here, we introduce a molecular design strategy that achieves designer metal-free altermagnetism in honeycomb 2D crystals. By reducing the monomer point-group symmetry from D3h to C2v in triangulene-derived radicals, inversion symmetry is selectively broken while the bipartite lattice is preserved. Spin-polarized density-functional-theory calculations reveal strong antiferromagnetic couplings of -130 meV, d-wave spin splitting of 17 meV at the M point, and Mott-Hubbard gaps of 1.26 eV, all fully consistent with Lieb's theorem. A minimal tight-binding model shows that anisotropic nearest-neighbor hopping arising from direction-dependent pi-orbital overlap is the microscopic origin of spin splitting and altermagnetism. Biaxial compressive strain further enhances the spin splitting to 27 meV. These results establish a general approach to room-temperature organic altermagnets and open a pathway toward carbon-based altermagnetism via engineered inversion-symmetry breaking.

104

NiPS₃/WSe₂异质结中局域激子发射与自发圆偏振#

Localized Exciton Emission with Spontaneous Circular Polarization in NiPS3/WSe2 Heterostructures
📚 arXiv👤 Adi Harchol, Shahar Zuri, Rajesh Kumar Yadav, Nirman Chakraborty, Idan Cohen, Tomasz Woźniak, Thomas Brumme, Thomas Heine, Doron Naveh, Efrat Lifshitz📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在NiPS₃/WSe₂异质结中实现零磁场自发圆偏振激子发射，揭示磁性界面诱导的磁近邻效应可主动调控谷激子动力学，为无外加磁场下的谷电子学器件及自旋-谷光电应用开辟新路径。
该研究利用低温微区光致发光和磁光PL光谱探究少层NiPS₃/WSe₂范德华异质结的光学响应，发现多个尖锐激子峰源于界面诱导势阱限域的WSe₂层内局域激子。这些激子在零磁场下即表现出自发圆偏振，表明NiPS₃界面未补偿自旋产生磁近邻效应；磁光PL显示非线性Zeeman劈裂，与界面交换场改变谷激子动力学一致。DFT计算证实PL的层内起源并揭示界面杂化与自旋纹理修饰。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用低温微区光致发光和磁光PL光谱探究少层NiPS₃/WSe₂范德华异质结的光学响应，发现多个尖锐激子峰源于界面诱导势阱限域的WSe₂层内局域激子。这些激子在零磁场下即表现出自发圆偏振，表明NiPS₃界面未补偿自旋产生磁近邻效应；磁光PL显示非线性Zeeman劈裂，与界面交换场改变谷激子动力学一致。DFT计算证实PL的层内起源并揭示界面杂化与自旋纹理修饰。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17409v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Two-dimensional (2D) van der Waals (vdW) heterostructures (HSs) provide a versatile platform for tailoring electronic, optical, and magnetic properties via proximity effects at their interfaces. In this work, we explore the optical response of few-layer NiPS3/WSe2 HSs using low-temperature micro-photoluminescence (μ-PL) and magneto-PL spectroscopy. The HSs exhibit multiple sharp excitonic peaks that do not appear in the individual constituent materials, indicating the emergence of localized intralayer WSe2 excitons confined by interface-induced potentials. Notably, these excitons exhibit spontaneous circular polarization even in the absence of an external magnetic field, suggesting a magnetic proximity effect induced by uncompensated spins at the NiPS3 interface. Magneto-PL measurements further reveal nonlinear Zeeman splitting, consistent with the presence of an interfacial exchange field that alters the valley exciton dynamics. Density functional theory (DFT) calculations confirm the intralayer origin of the PL and reveal interfacial hybridization and spin texture modifications, supporting the experimental findings. These results highlight how combining a 2D semiconductor with a layered antiferromagnet enables control over valley polarization and spin degrees of freedom, offering new opportunities for chiral light sources and magnetically tunable optoelectronic devices.

105

⁵⁹Co核四极共振研究4f³-Γ₆体系NdCo₂Zn₁₈Ga₂的静态与动态电子性质及可能磁结构#

Static and Dynamic Electronic Properties and the Possible Magnetic Structure of the 4f³⁻Γ₆ System NdCo2Zn₁₈Ga₂ Investigated Using ⁵⁹Co Nuclear Quadrupole Resonance
📚 arXiv👤 Tetsuro Kubo, Atsushi Sasaki, Keita Murooka, Hisashi Kotegawa, Rikako Yamamoto, Takahiro Onimaru, Hideki Tou📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地利用⁵⁹Co NQR探测4f³-Γ₆体系NdCo₂Zn₁₈Ga₂的微观磁性，发现NQR谱对反铁磁转变不敏感而弛豫率异常敏感，揭示Nd磁矩在Co位点产生抵消内场的特殊磁结构，并提出Ga掺杂
该研究对反铁磁转变温度T_N=1.5 K的NdCo₂Zn₁₈Ga₂进行⁵⁹Co核四极共振（NQR）测量。NQR谱在T_N处无明显变化，但核自旋-晶格弛豫率1/T₁呈现清晰异常。基于Nd磁矩排列的分析表明，这些磁矩在Co位点产生的内磁场相互抵消；若最近邻Nd磁矩反铁磁排列，则Ga替代可能解除磁阻挫从而提高T_N。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究对反铁磁转变温度T_N=1.5 K的NdCo₂Zn₁₈Ga₂进行⁵⁹Co核四极共振（NQR）测量。NQR谱在T_N处无明显变化，但核自旋-晶格弛豫率1/T₁呈现清晰异常。基于Nd磁矩排列的分析表明，这些磁矩在Co位点产生的内磁场相互抵消；若最近邻Nd磁矩反铁磁排列，则Ga替代可能解除磁阻挫从而提高T_N。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17416v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report ⁵⁹Co nuclear quadrupole resonance (NQR) measurements on the Nd-based compound NdCo₂Zn₁₈Ga₂, which undergoes an antiferromagnetic transition at Tₘ̊ N = 1.5 K. Although the NQR spectra show no detectable change across Tₘ̊ N, the nuclear spin-lattice relaxation rate, 1/T₁, exhibits a clear anomaly at Tₘ̊ N. An analysis based on the alignment of the Nd moments demonstrates that the internal magnetic fields generated by these moments cancel each other at the Co sites. If the nearest-neighbor Nd moments align antiferromagnetically, this finding suggests that Ga substitution removes magnetic frustration, thereby increasing Tₘ̊ N.

106

量子高自旋霍尔绝缘体#

Quantum higher-spin Hall insulators
📚 arXiv👤 Takuto Kawakami, Igor Kuzmenko, Yshai Avishai, Yigal Meir, Masatoshi Sato📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该理论突破性地将量子自旋霍尔效应推广至任意高自旋J体系，揭示非平庸镜面陈数保护的多重螺旋边缘态及高阶色散广义狄拉克费米子，预言非线性输运与磁畴壁分数化束缚态等新奇物性，为超冷原子量子模拟提供理论框架。
该研究发展了任意自旋J的量子自旋霍尔绝缘体理论，证明此类系统支持J+1/2对由非平庸镜面陈数保护的螺旋边缘模式，对应边缘理论由具有高阶色散的广义狄拉克费米子描述。这些模式产生独特的非线性电压输运响应；面内磁场在边缘谱中打开质量能隙，磁畴壁处存在(J+1/2)重简并的束缚态，具有非平庸绕数。该理论将量子自旋霍尔物理拓展至高自旋体系，并提示超冷原子气体中的可能实现方案。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究发展了任意自旋J的量子自旋霍尔绝缘体理论，证明此类系统支持J+1/2对由非平庸镜面陈数保护的螺旋边缘模式，对应边缘理论由具有高阶色散的广义狄拉克费米子描述。这些模式产生独特的非线性电压输运响应；面内磁场在边缘谱中打开质量能隙，磁畴壁处存在(J+1/2)重简并的束缚态，具有非平庸绕数。该理论将量子自旋霍尔物理拓展至高自旋体系，并提示超冷原子气体中的可能实现方案。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17479v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We develop a theory of quantum spin Hall insulators with arbitrary spin J. Our analysis demonstrates that such systems support J+tfrac12 pairs of helical edge modes protected by nontrivial mirror Chern numbers. We establish that the corresponding edge theory is described by a generalized Dirac fermion with higher-order dispersion. These modes produce unique transport responses that are non-linear with voltage. An in-plane magnetic field opens a mass gap in the edge spectrum, and magnetic domain walls host (J+tfrac12)-fold degenerate bound states characterized by nontrivial winding numbers. Our results extend quantum spin Hall physics to higher-spin systems and suggest possible realizations in ultracold atomic gases.

107

轨道玻璃隐藏相对论性莫特绝缘体中的缺失磁熵#

Orbital glass conceals missing magnetic entropy in a relativistic Mott insulator
📚 arXiv👤 Ilija K. Nikolov, Rong Cong, Adrien Rosuel, Stephen Carr, Ian R. Fisher, Dmitri E. Feldman, Adrian Del Maestro, Chandrasekhar Ramanathan, Vesna F. Mitrović📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地运用相位敏感技术独立分辨对称性各异的相互作用，首次在5d¹相对论性莫特绝缘体中直接捕获轨道玻璃态与向列相的微观证据。其核心突破在于揭示轨道色散驱动的定向有序可隐藏磁熵，为解耦强关联体系中
该研究利用相位敏感技术独立分辨不同对称性的相互作用，直接探测5d¹相对论性莫特绝缘体Ba₂NaOsO₆中竞争相互作用导致的轨道玻璃态。观测到短程轨道序持续至380 K，并在磁相变附近轨道色散急剧增强；该轨道色散产生定向有序，形成破缺晶体旋转对称性的轨道向列相。研究表明轨道向列态隐藏了缺失的磁熵，为解耦自旋与轨道自由度耦合产生的复杂序提供了方法学范例。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用相位敏感技术独立分辨不同对称性的相互作用，直接探测5d¹相对论性莫特绝缘体Ba₂NaOsO₆中竞争相互作用导致的轨道玻璃态。观测到短程轨道序持续至380 K，并在磁相变附近轨道色散急剧增强；该轨道色散产生定向有序，形成破缺晶体旋转对称性的轨道向列相。研究表明轨道向列态隐藏了缺失的磁熵，为解耦自旋与轨道自由度耦合产生的复杂序提供了方法学范例。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17540v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Coupling between different degrees of freedom (DOF) in an electronic material leads to exotic phases of matter characterized by complex and competing order parameters as well as emergent excitations. Building a microscopic understanding of these order parameters and their mutual relationship is hindered by the fact that different orders often mask each others' response to conventional experimental probes. Here, we reveal how to disentangle responses from distinct orders that arise from the coupling between the spin and orbital DOF. Our method uses a phase sensitive technique that measures ground state properties by independently resolving interactions of different symmetries. This allows us to directly detect an orbital glass state caused by competing interactions in the 5d¹ relativistic Mott insulator Ba₂NaOsO₆. We observe short-range orbital order up to 380 K and a dramatic increase of orbital dispersion near the magnetic phase transition. This orbital dispersion generates a directional ordering, i.e., it forms an orbital nematic state which breaks the rotational symmetry of the crystal. We establish that the orbital nematic state induces the magnetic ordering. The presence of this short-range orbital order well above the magnetic phase transition solves the long-standing puzzle of missing entropy in this material.

108

三角晶格低能Kondo模型中的手性磁性与量子反常霍尔效应#

Chiral Magnetism and Quantum Anomalous Hall Effect in a Low-energy Kondo Model on the Triangular Lattice
📚 arXiv👤 Kai Vylet, Xingkai Huang, Leon Balents📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地证明三角晶格低能Kondo模型中，布里渊区嵌套口袋结构可在宽参数区间稳定手性磁有序，无需依赖特定紧束缚模型即可实现量子反常霍尔态，为关联电子体系中拓扑物态的普适性机制提供了新范式，对磁性
该研究在三角晶格低能Kondo模型中，考虑巡游电子占据布里渊区Γ点价带口袋和M点三个导带口袋的费米面嵌套结构。将局域矩视为经典自旋，在四子格磁单胞中发现广泛的非共面磁有序区域，包括四面体及倾斜四面体态。手性相在较宽的口袋间Kondo耦合范围内保持稳定，并在外磁场下持续存在。特定手性有序可使电子能带打开能隙，形成σₓy=4e²/h的量子反常霍尔态，表明三角晶格上的手性磁性与量子化反常霍尔效应可不依赖特定紧束缚能带结构，而由低能嵌套口袋更…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在三角晶格低能Kondo模型中，考虑巡游电子占据布里渊区Γ点价带口袋和M点三个导带口袋的费米面嵌套结构。将局域矩视为经典自旋，在四子格磁单胞中发现广泛的非共面磁有序区域，包括四面体及倾斜四面体态。手性相在较宽的口袋间Kondo耦合范围内保持稳定，并在外磁场下持续存在。特定手性有序可使电子能带打开能隙，形成σₓy=4e²/h的量子反常霍尔态，表明三角晶格上的手性磁性与量子化反常霍尔效应可不依赖特定紧束缚能带结构，而由低能嵌套口袋更一般地产生。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17641v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study an effective low-energy Kondo model on the triangular lattice in which itinerant electrons occupy a valence pocket at Γ and three conduction pockets at the M points of the Brillouin zone. This construction has a Fermi-surface nesting structure that favors triple-Q magnetic order while only assuming the low-energy band-structure. Treating the local moments as classical spins on a four-sublattice magnetic unit cell, we find extended regions of non-coplanar order, including tetrahedral and related canted tetrahedral states, in addition to ferromagnetic and coplanar phases. The chiral phases remain stable over a broad range of inter-pocket Kondo couplings and persist in the presence of an external magnetic field. For certain chiral orders, the electronic bands can become gapped and host a quantum anomalous Hall state with σₓy=4,e²/h. These results show that chiral magnetism and a quantized anomalous Hall effect on the triangular lattice do not rely on a specific tight-binding band structure, but can arise more generally from low-energy nested pockets at Γ and M.

109

晶体学、洛伦兹对称性破缺与标准模型扩展#

Crystallography, Lorentz violation, and the Standard-Model Extension
📚 arXiv👤 Marco Schreck, Rogeres A. da Silva Magalhães📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文开创性地建立标准模型扩展框架与晶体电磁性质的系统对应，将高能物理中的洛伦兹对称性破缺参数化方法引入凝聚态体系。核心创新在于利用晶体学和磁点群分类，证明双折射、磁电效应等传统光学现象可获得SME理论
该工作将场论与高能物理方法引入晶体学，建立标准模型扩展(SME)电磁 sector 与光学介质之间的关联。证明不同晶体结构的电磁性质可在SME框架中参数化，利用晶体学和磁点群展示这一对应关系。对双折射和磁电介质进行专门研究，重新发现磁电效应中尚未被系统描述的现象并以SME语言表述。具有特定对称性的材料可作为SME效应的凝聚态类比，并提出具有特殊光学性质的材料探索方向。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作将场论与高能物理方法引入晶体学，建立标准模型扩展(SME)电磁 sector 与光学介质之间的关联。证明不同晶体结构的电磁性质可在SME框架中参数化，利用晶体学和磁点群展示这一对应关系。对双折射和磁电介质进行专门研究，重新发现磁电效应中尚未被系统描述的现象并以SME语言表述。具有特定对称性的材料可作为SME效应的凝聚态类比，并提出具有特殊光学性质的材料探索方向。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17646v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The motivation behind the present work is to adopt methodology from field theory and high-energy physics to crystallography. In particular, we establish a relationship between the electromagnetic sector of the Standard-Model Extension (SME) for Lorentz invariance violation and optical media. At an effective level, electromagnetic properties associated with different crystal structures are demonstrated to be parametrized in the SME. Crystallographic and magnetic point groups provide the mathematical tools to show this correspondence. Birefringent and magnetoelectric media merit a dedicated study. Intriguing effects, which have not been described systematically in the modern literature, are rediscovered for the latter and expressed in SME language. With the setting developed at our disposal, materials with specific symmetries such as birefringent or multiferroic crystals serve as condensed-matter analogs for SME effects. It enables us to propose materials with unusual optical properties, which have not been thoroughly looked at in recent times.

110

pyzentropy：实现第一性原理热力学递归熵的Python包#

pyzentropy: A Python package implementing recursive entropy for first-principles thermodynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Nigel Lee En Hew, Luke Allen Myers, Shun-Li Shang, Zi-Kui Liu📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作将信息论递归熵概念引入第一性原理热力学，突破传统近似方法局限；以Fe₃Pt为例，仅基于12原子超胞的高概率构型采样，即可精准复现因瓦合金的异常热力学行为，为复杂磁性材料有限温度性质的高效预测提供
该工作开发开源Python包pyzentropy，将信息论中熵的递归性质引入第一性原理热力学计算。以Fe₃Pt为案例，考虑12原子超胞及多种磁构型，应用递归熵公式计算系统总熵，成功复现因瓦效应及线热膨胀系数、定压热容和体模量的异常温度依赖关系。构建的T-V和P-T相图与实验观测吻合良好，并强调确定关键高概率构型对准确捕捉材料性质的重要性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作开发开源Python包pyzentropy，将信息论中熵的递归性质引入第一性原理热力学计算。以Fe₃Pt为案例，考虑12原子超胞及多种磁构型，应用递归熵公式计算系统总熵，成功复现因瓦效应及线热膨胀系数、定压热容和体模量的异常温度依赖关系。构建的T-V和P-T相图与实验观测吻合良好，并强调确定关键高概率构型对准确捕捉材料性质的重要性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17665v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: While the recursive property of entropy is well known in information theory, it is rarely utilized in thermodynamics, despite entropy originating in this field. Moreover, computational tools to implement this concept within first-principles thermodynamics remain lacking. In this work, we introduce an open-source Python package, pyzentropy, to implement this approach. We demonstrate its effectiveness using Fe₃Pt as a case study, considering a 12-atom supercell with multiple magnetic configurations. By applying the recursive formulation of entropy to compute the total entropy of the system, we reproduce the Invar behavior, along with the anomalous temperature dependence of the linear coefficient of thermal expansion (LCTE), heat capacity C_P, and bulk modulus B. We also construct the T-V and P-T phase diagrams in good agreement with experimental observations. Finally, we highlight the importance of determining key high-probability configurations to accurately capture material properties.

111

退相干导致的磁电阻效应#

Magnetoresistance from decoherence
📚 arXiv👤 Xian-Peng Zhang, Yan-Qing Feng, Haiwen Liu, Yugui Yao📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破了传统Drude图像的框架，首次将量子退相干确立为磁电阻的独立起源机制，揭示了电导率与杂质密度的线性标度这一反直觉规律，为量子退相干提供了无需依赖量子干涉图案的直接电学探测方案，并预言了磁场
该研究揭示了一种区别于传统动量弛豫机制的新颖磁电阻起源：量子退相干在整个费米海中的密度矩阵非对角元衰减。由两个复退相干时间参数化的电导率与杂质密度呈线性标度，与Drude图像中电导率反比于杂质密度的行为形成鲜明对比。这种非传统标度为量子退相干提供了直接的电学探测手段。外磁场与交换场的相互作用导致丰富的磁输运现象，包括温度驱动的正到负磁电阻转变，以及类似Kondo效应的非单调温度依赖和电导率极大值。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究揭示了一种区别于传统动量弛豫机制的新颖磁电阻起源：量子退相干在整个费米海中的密度矩阵非对角元衰减。由两个复退相干时间参数化的电导率与杂质密度呈线性标度，与Drude图像中电导率反比于杂质密度的行为形成鲜明对比。这种非传统标度为量子退相干提供了直接的电学探测手段。外磁场与交换场的相互作用导致丰富的磁输运现象，包括温度驱动的正到负磁电阻转变，以及类似Kondo效应的非单调温度依赖和电导率极大值。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17672v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Microscopic theories of magnetoresistance have traditionally focused on momentum relaxation and the plasma frequency of itinerant electrons. Here, we uncover a distinct mechanism in which magnetoresistance originates from quantum decoherence throughout the whole Fermi sea, specifically the decay of the off-diagonal components of the density matrix. The resulting conductivity, parameterized by two complex decoherence times, scales linearly with impurity density-markedly contrasting the conventional Drude picture, where conductivity is governed by momentum relaxation of Ferm-surface quasiparticles and is inversely proportional to impurity density. This unconventional scaling provides a direct electrical probe of quantum decoherence, a quantity central to both fundamental studies and emerging nanoscale technologies. Furthermore, the interplay between the external magnetic field and the exchange field gives rise to rich magnetotransport phenomena, including temperature-drive crossover from positive to negative magnetoresistance and a nonmonotonic temperature dependence with a conductivity maximum reminiscent of the Kondo effect. Our results establish quantum decoherence as a key ingredient in magnetoresistance and our findings should have an unprecedented impact on advancing research and applications involving magnetoresistance.

112

具有非厄米Gamma相互作用的横场Ising链中的动态自旋向列序#

Dynamical spin-nematic order in a transverse field Ising chain with non-Hermitian Gamma interaction
📚 arXiv👤 Yu-Hong Yan, Ran Wang, Kun-Liang Zhang📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作将非厄米Gamma相互作用引入横场Ising链，突破传统厄米框架，发现PT对称性破缺诱导的无能隙相及动态自旋向列序。其核心创新在于揭示非厄米效应可稳定长程向列关联，并为实验上通过非平衡动力学探测
该研究探讨非厄米Gamma相互作用对横场Ising链相变和磁关联的影响。除有能隙铁磁相和顺磁相外，发现存在无能隙相，其中系统因宇称-时间对称性破缺而呈现长程自旋向列序。宇称-时间对称性破缺还导致动态自旋向列序的出现，为非平衡动力学表征自旋向列相图提供途径。Ising相互作用、横场和非厄米Gamma相互作用的竞争产生丰富量子相，并为在自旋链中生成自旋向列序提供方案。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究探讨非厄米Gamma相互作用对横场Ising链相变和磁关联的影响。除有能隙铁磁相和顺磁相外，发现存在无能隙相，其中系统因宇称-时间对称性破缺而呈现长程自旋向列序。宇称-时间对称性破缺还导致动态自旋向列序的出现，为非平衡动力学表征自旋向列相图提供途径。Ising相互作用、横场和非厄米Gamma相互作用的竞争产生丰富量子相，并为在自旋链中生成自旋向列序提供方案。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17700v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the effect of non-Hermitian Gamma interaction on the phase transitions and magnetic correlations for the transverse field Ising chain. We demonstrate that apart from the gapped ferromagnetic and paramagnetic phases, there is a gapless phase, where the system exhibits long-range spin-nematic order induced by parity-time symmetry breaking. Furthermore, we reveal that the parity-time symmetry breaking leads to the emergence of dynamical spin-nematic order, which also suggests a way of characterizing the spin-nematic phase diagram through non-equilibrium dynamics. Our findings show rich quantum phases stem from the competition among the Ising interaction, transverse field and non-Hermitian Gamma interaction, as well as providing a scheme for generating spin-nematic order in the spin chain.

113

NiCo₂O₄薄膜中的类II型超快退磁行为#

Type-II-like ultrafast demagnetization behavior in NiCo2O4 thin films
📚 arXiv👤 Ryunosuke Takahashi, Kaede Yamada, Harjinder Singh, Kanata Watanabe, Junta Igarashi, Julius Hohlfeld, Jon Gorchon, Gregory Malinowski, Daisuke Kan, Yuichi Shimakawa, Takayuki Ishibashi, Stephane Mangin, Hiroki Wadati📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在NiCo₂O₄薄膜中揭示本征类II型超快退磁行为，通过双波长构型交叉验证排除实验假象，为理解亚铁磁氧化物非平衡自旋动力学提供新范式，对超快自旋电子器件设计具有指导意义。
该研究利用两种独立泵浦-探测构型(1030/515 nm和800/400 nm)的时间分辨磁光法拉第效应，研究外延NiCo₂O₄薄膜的光致磁化动力学。光激发在实验时间分辨率内立即降低磁光信号，随后出现约5-6 ps的较慢退磁分量及~100 ps量级的恢复。该皮秒退磁分量在两种实验构型和激发波长下均被一致观测，证明其为NCO薄膜超快磁响应的本征特征。由于最早时刻的下降可能包含瞬时光学贡献，整体响应被描述为类II型而非确定性的教科书II型…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用两种独立泵浦-探测构型(1030/515 nm和800/400 nm)的时间分辨磁光法拉第效应，研究外延NiCo₂O₄薄膜的光致磁化动力学。光激发在实验时间分辨率内立即降低磁光信号，随后出现约5-6 ps的较慢退磁分量及~100 ps量级的恢复。该皮秒退磁分量在两种实验构型和激发波长下均被一致观测，证明其为NCO薄膜超快磁响应的本征特征。由于最早时刻的下降可能包含瞬时光学贡献，整体响应被描述为类II型而非确定性的教科书II型分类。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17916v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Rare-earth-ferrimagnetic oxides are emerging as attractive platforms for investigating ultrafast spin dynamics. Here, we study the photoinduced magnetization dynamics of epitaxial NiCo2O4 (NCO) thin films by time-resolved magneto-optical Faraday effect using two independent pump-probe configurations: 1030/515 nm and 800/400 nm. In both measurements, photoexcitation induces an immediate reduction of the magneto-optical signal within the experimental time resolution, followed by a reproducible slower demagnetization component with a characteristic timescale of approximately 5-6 ps and a subsequent recovery on the ~100 ps timescale. Importantly, this picosecond demagnetization component is observed consistently across the two experimental configurations and excitation wavelengths, demonstrating that it is an intrinsic feature of the ultrafast magnetic response of NCO thin films. Because the earliest-time dip may contain a transient optical contribution, we describe the overall response as type-II-like, rather than assigning a definitive textbook type-II classification solely on the basis of the sub-resolution signal. These results establish a robust two-step ultrafast demagnetization behavior in NCO and highlight rare-earth-free oxide ferrimagnets as promising systems for exploring Mult sublattice spin dynamics on ultrafast timescales.

114

非厄米磁性约瑟夫森结中的0-π转变#

0-π transitions in non-Hermitian magnetic Josephson junctions
📚 arXiv👤 Roberto Capecelatro, Marco Marciani, Claudio Guarcello, Gabriele Campagnano, Procolo Lucignano, Roberta Citro📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示非厄米耗散对磁性约瑟夫森结0-π量子相变的调控机制：环境耦合诱导的自旋依赖耗散通过复本征值效应将转变推向更高磁场，且磁场方向与磁化方向的相对角度成为新的相变驱动参数。这为利用非厄米性作为
该研究考虑超导-量子点-超导器件与铁磁金属库耦合并置于外磁场中的非厄米磁性约瑟夫森结输运性质。关注随磁场幅度增大平衡相位差从φ=0到φ=π的0-π转变，环境耦合诱导自旋依赖耗散并展宽Andreev能级。结合格林函数计算与限制于子能隙Andreev准束缚态的有效非厄米描述，证明耗散使0-π转变移向更高磁场。外场与库磁化方向的相对角度也可在固定场强下驱动转变，此效应完全归因于非厄米哈密顿量复本征值的行为，凸显非厄米性作为工程量子器件新调控…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究考虑超导-量子点-超导器件与铁磁金属库耦合并置于外磁场中的非厄米磁性约瑟夫森结输运性质。关注随磁场幅度增大平衡相位差从φ=0到φ=π的0-π转变，环境耦合诱导自旋依赖耗散并展宽Andreev能级。结合格林函数计算与限制于子能隙Andreev准束缚态的有效非厄米描述，证明耗散使0-π转变移向更高磁场。外场与库磁化方向的相对角度也可在固定场强下驱动转变，此效应完全归因于非厄米哈密顿量复本征值的行为，凸显非厄米性作为工程量子器件新调控自由度的潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17978v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study the transport properties of non-Hermitian magnetic Josephson junctions, considering a superconductor-quantum dot-superconductor device coupled to a ferromagnetic metallic reservoir in the presence of an external magnetic field. We focus on the 0-π transitions that occur when the equilibrium phase difference between the superconductors shifts from φ=0 to φ=π upon increasing the magnetic field amplitude. The coupling to the environment induces spin-dependent dissipation and leads to the broadening of the junction Andreev levels. By combining Green's function calculations with an effective non-Hermitian description restricted to the sub-gap Andreev quasi-bound states, we show that dissipation shifts the 0-π transition to higher magnetic fields. Remarkably, also the relative angle between the applied field and the reservoir magnetization can be used to drive the transition, at fixed field magnitude. We demonstrate that this effect can be entirely ascribed to the behavior of the complex eigenvalues of the non-Hermitian Hamiltonian. These findings highlight non-Hermiticity as a resource that can introduce new control knobs for engineering the current-phase relation in superconducting junctions.

115

铁磁Kondo晶格CeCo₂As₂中的增强反常能斯特效应#

Enhanced Anomalous Nernst Effect in the Ferromagnetic Kondo Lattice CeCo2As2
📚 arXiv👤 Shuyue Guan, Weian Guo, Pengyu Zheng, Xinxuan Lin, Yuqing Huang, Jiawei Li, Xiao-Bin Qiang, Longfei Li, Weiwei Xie, Hai-Zhou Lu, Zhiping Yin, Shuang Jia📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在铁磁Kondo晶格体系中实现显著增强的反常能斯特效应，揭示f电子平带强贝里曲率与关联拓扑的深层联系，为拓扑热电材料设计及高温反常输运器件开发提供了新范式。
该工作报道铁磁Kondo晶格CeCo₂As₂中增强的自发反常能斯特效应(ANE)，其Kondo屏蔽的铈基4f矩嵌入铁磁d电子框架中。观测到的大反常能斯特系数超过塞贝克系数，归因于f轨道主导平带中的强贝里曲率。增强的ANE作为费米能钉扎于拓扑平带的特征，凸显Kondo晶格中关联驱动拓扑的重要性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作报道铁磁Kondo晶格CeCo₂As₂中增强的自发反常能斯特效应(ANE)，其Kondo屏蔽的铈基4f矩嵌入铁磁d电子框架中。观测到的大反常能斯特系数超过塞贝克系数，归因于f轨道主导平带中的强贝里曲率。增强的ANE作为费米能钉扎于拓扑平带的特征，凸显Kondo晶格中关联驱动拓扑的重要性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17987v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The anomalous Nernst effect (ANE), generating a voltage perpendicular to a temperature gradient due to magnetization, is closely linked to the Berry curvature (BC) near the Fermi energy in topological magnets. We report an enhanced spontaneous ANE in the ferromagnetic Kondo lattice CeCo2As2, which features Kondo-screened cerium-based 4f moments embedded in a ferromagnetic d-electron framework. The observed large anomalous Nernst coefficient, greater than the Seebeck coefficient, is attributed to the strong BC present in the f-orbital-dominated flat bands. The enhanced ANE in CeCo2As2 serves as a signature of the Fermi energy pinning within the topological flat band, highlighting the correlation-driven topology in the Kondo lattice.

116

磁性纳米线中拓扑平庸磁孤子的传播、产生与利用#

Propagation, generation, and utilization of topologically trivial magnetic solitons in magnetic nanowires
📚 arXiv👤 Kai-Tao Huang, X. S. Wang📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统拓扑磁孤子研究框架，首次系统揭示一维拓扑平庸磁孤子的完备解析描述与可控激发机制。核心创新在于利用介质界面非线性散射特性及脉冲序列编码，实现孤子的定向生成与畴壁的离散化数字操控，为后CMO
该工作理论及数值研究铁磁纳米线中一维拓扑平庸磁孤子的性质与产生。由两个自由参数描述的近似解析孤子解经微磁模拟验证。孤子在各向异性不同介质界面处的反射和折射具有高度非线性，区别于线性自旋波。通过在至少两个连续区域交替施加相反方向的磁场或自旋极化电流脉冲，可产生一对反向传播的磁孤子，每个孤子落入可控的孤子解。这些磁孤子可驱动畴壁运动一定距离，实现与信息技术数字本质兼容的畴壁离散操控。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作理论及数值研究铁磁纳米线中一维拓扑平庸磁孤子的性质与产生。由两个自由参数描述的近似解析孤子解经微磁模拟验证。孤子在各向异性不同介质界面处的反射和折射具有高度非线性，区别于线性自旋波。通过在至少两个连续区域交替施加相反方向的磁场或自旋极化电流脉冲，可产生一对反向传播的磁孤子，每个孤子落入可控的孤子解。这些磁孤子可驱动畴壁运动一定距离，实现与信息技术数字本质兼容的畴壁离散操控。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17992v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic solitons are nonlinear, local excitations in magnetic systems. In this study, we theoretically and numerically investigate the properties and generation of one-dimensional (1D) topologically trivial magnetic solitons in ferromagnetic nanowires. An approximate analytical soliton solution described by two free parameters is validated by comparing with the micromagnetic simulation. Across an interface between two media of different anisotropy, the reflection and refraction of a soliton are highly nonlinear that are different from the linear spin waves. A pair of magnetic solitons that propagate in opposite directions can be generated by alternately applying magnetic field or spin-polarized current pulses of opposite directions to at least two successive regions. Each soliton falls into a soliton solution that can be controlled by the generation process. These magnetic solitons can be used to drive domain wall motion over a certain distance determined by the soliton magnitude, allowing for discrete manipulation of domain walls compatible with the digital nature of information technology. Our findings pave the way for the application of topologically trivial solitons in spintronics.

117

表面铁磁体GdAg₂/Ag(111)中磁涨落对自旋轨道杂化的抑制#

Magnetic-fluctuation-driven suppression of spin-orbit hybridization in the surface ferromagnet GdAg₂/Ag(111)
📚 arXiv👤 Ryo Noguchi, Jongkeun Jung, Younsik Kim, Sungsoo Hahn, Changyoung Kim📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示磁涨落对自旋轨道耦合杂化的动态抑制机制，突破传统静态磁性调控框架；建立有效非厄米描述，为高温拓扑态保持及非厄米能带物理研究提供全新磁性材料平台。
利用变温和偏振依赖角分辨光电子能谱，研究二维外尔节线型表面铁磁体GdAg₂/Ag(111)发现：自旋涨落可在居里温度以上保留节线衍生能带交叉，而SOC诱导杂化仅在低温发展。高温杂化抑制归因于自旋退相干和能带依赖散射，可用有效非厄米框架描述。该工作确立磁涨落作为调控SOC杂化及贝里曲率的旋钮，为探索非厄米能带物理提供磁性平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

利用变温和偏振依赖角分辨光电子能谱，研究二维外尔节线型表面铁磁体GdAg₂/Ag(111)发现：自旋涨落可在居里温度以上保留节线衍生能带交叉，而SOC诱导杂化仅在低温发展。高温杂化抑制归因于自旋退相干和能带依赖散射，可用有效非厄米框架描述。该工作确立磁涨落作为调控SOC杂化及贝里曲率的旋钮，为探索非厄米能带物理提供磁性平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18009v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic materials hosting topological band structures have attracted intense interest due to the interplay between magnetism and spin-orbit coupling (SOC). Here, using temperature- and polarization-dependent angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy, we investigate the surface ferromagnet GdAg₂/Ag(111), a two-dimensional system with Weyl-nodal-line-like band crossings. We find that spin fluctuations preserve the nodal-line-derived band crossings even above the Curie temperature, while SOC-induced hybridization develops only at low temperatures, as evidenced by spectral-weight redistribution. The suppression of the hybridization at high temperature is attributed to spin decoherence and band-dependent scattering, captured by an effective non-Hermitian framework. Our results establish magnetic fluctuations as a control knob for SOC-induced hybridization and associated Berry curvature, and highlight magnetic systems as a platform for exploring non-Hermitian band physics.

118

近场效应对磁活性弹性体磁滞回线的影响#

Influence of near-field effect on magnetic hysteresis in magneto-active elastomers
📚 arXiv👤 Pawan Patel, Dirk Romeis, Marina Saphiannikova📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究构建了磁活性弹性体磁滞的多尺度理论框架，核心创新在于突破传统偶极近似，引入近场高阶效应刻画颗粒间相互作用，揭示软磁体系磁滞源于磁场升降过程中被困微结构的路径依赖重排。研究意义在于为MAE器件的磁
建立多尺度理论框架研究磁活性弹性体(MAEs)磁滞起源，重点考察磁化/退磁过程中内部微结构演化。系统总能量由磁能和微观力学贡献构成，圆柱样品宏观形变完全约束。粒子相互作用先从纯偶极-偶极作用建模，再扩展至包含近距离高阶近场效应。结果表明软磁颗粒MAEs的磁滞主要源于被困微结构重排，导致升降磁场下不同颗粒构型。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

建立多尺度理论框架研究磁活性弹性体(MAEs)磁滞起源，重点考察磁化/退磁过程中内部微结构演化。系统总能量由磁能和微观力学贡献构成，圆柱样品宏观形变完全约束。粒子相互作用先从纯偶极-偶极作用建模，再扩展至包含近距离高阶近场效应。结果表明软磁颗粒MAEs的磁滞主要源于被困微结构重排，导致升降磁场下不同颗粒构型。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18063v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magneto-active elastomers (MAEs) are polymer composites consisting of magnetic microparticles embedded in an elastomeric matrix. These materials exhibit strong magneto-mechanical coupling under external magnetic fields, resulting in tunable stiffness, reversible shape changes, and nonlinear magnetic responses. This study presents a multiscale theoretical framework to investigate the origin of magnetic hysteresis in MAEs, with emphasis on the evolution of the internal microstructure during magnetization and demagnetization. The total energy of the system is formulated as the sum of magnetic and micromechanical contributions, while macroscopic deformation of a cylindrical MAE sample is fully constrained. Particle interactions are modeled first via pure dipole-dipole interactions and then extended to include higher-order near-field effects at close particle separations. The results show that hysteresis in MAEs with magnetically soft particles primarily arises from trapped microstructural rearrangements, leading to distinct particle configurations under increasing and decreasing magnetic fields. Parametric studies demonstrate that particle volume fraction, sample aspect ratio, and matrix stiffness strongly influence the microstructure evolution and the width of resulting hysteresis loops. The proposed framework provides a solid foundation for modeling magnetic hysteresis, which is essential for the design and optimization of MAEs in practical applications.

119

亚铁磁薄膜中的通用斯格明子相图#

Generic skyrmion phase diagram in ferrimagnetic films
📚 arXiv👤 M. V. Wijethunga, X. R. Wang📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究构建了亚铁磁斯格明子的统一相图框架，核心创新在于提出无量纲参数ζₑff量化子晶格锁定强度，揭示强耦合区可实现无DMI斯格明子稳定化这一反直觉机制，突破了DMI作为斯格明子必要条件的传统认知。该工
研究亚铁磁斯格明子中反铁磁耦合子晶格间交换作用J的变化如何调控稳定与亚稳构型，引入无量纲参数ζₑff表征强/弱子晶格锁定之间的交叉。强耦合区可实现无DMI子晶格中斯格明子稳定化，获得无DMI亚铁磁斯格明子；J减小时锁定破坏导致独立子晶格行为，基于有效κ的描述失效。该工作建立了子晶格交换与斯格明子相稳定性的统一框架。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究亚铁磁斯格明子中反铁磁耦合子晶格间交换作用J的变化如何调控稳定与亚稳构型，引入无量纲参数ζₑff表征强/弱子晶格锁定之间的交叉。强耦合区可实现无DMI子晶格中斯格明子稳定化，获得无DMI亚铁磁斯格明子；J减小时锁定破坏导致独立子晶格行为，基于有效κ的描述失效。该工作建立了子晶格交换与斯格明子相稳定性的统一框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18079v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Ferrimagnetic skyrmions offer enhanced tunability due to antiferromagnetically coupled sublattices and reduced net magnetization. In chiral magnetic films at zero magnetic field, skyrmion stability is commonly characterized by a dimensionless parameter κ, yet its applicability to ferrimagnetic systems remains unclear, as most studies assume a fixed, strong inter-sublattice exchange coupling J. Here we investigate how variations in J govern relaxed stable and metastable ferrimagnetic skyrmion configurations and introduce a dimensionless parameter ζₑff to characterize the crossover between strong and weak inter-sublattice locking. In the strong-coupling regime, inter-sublattice locking enables stabilization of skyrmion in a sublattice where intrinsic Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction is absent while the other sublattice has finite DMI, yielding a sublattice with DMI-free ferrimagnetic skyrmions. As J decreases, this locking breaks down, leading to independent sublattice behavior and the failure of an effective κ-based description. Our results establish a unified framework linking inter-sublattice exchange and skyrmion phase stability in ferrimagnetic systems.

120

二维铁电高阶拓扑绝缘体Tl₂S和SnS中轨道霍尔电导的极化工程#

Polarization Engineering of the Orbital Hall Conductivity in Two-dimensional Ferroelectric Higher-Order Topological Insulator Tl₂S and SnS
📚 arXiv👤 YingJie Hu, Heng Gao, Yabei Wu, Wei Ren📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次将铁电极化作为内禀调控手段引入二维高阶拓扑体系的轨道霍尔输运，揭示面内极化与高阶拓扑的强耦合机制，提出带隙内可逆切换轨道霍尔电导平台的新方案，为低功耗轨道电子学器件设计开辟路径。
研究两类二维铁电高阶拓扑绝缘体（面外/面内极化）的拓扑起源，揭示其不同轨道输运行为及通过极化调控轨道霍尔电导(OHC)的机制。面内极化与高阶拓扑存在强耦合，可作为在带隙内可逆切换OHC平台的内禀手段。以Tl₂S和SnS为模型，分别展示持续性和电学可切换轨道输运，推进铁电性、高阶拓扑与轨道输运耦合的理解。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究两类二维铁电高阶拓扑绝缘体（面外/面内极化）的拓扑起源，揭示其不同轨道输运行为及通过极化调控轨道霍尔电导(OHC)的机制。面内极化与高阶拓扑存在强耦合，可作为在带隙内可逆切换OHC平台的内禀手段。以Tl₂S和SnS为模型，分别展示持续性和电学可切换轨道输运，推进铁电性、高阶拓扑与轨道输运耦合的理解。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18093v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Ferroelectric higher-order topological insulators (HOTIs) exhibit tunable physical properties arising from the interplay between ferroelectric polarization and band topology. This work investigates the topological origin of two classes of two-dimensional (2D) ferroelectric HOTIs with out-of-plane or in-plane polarization, revealing their distinct orbital transport behaviors and the mechanism for engineering orbital Hall conductivity (OHC) via polarization control. Our results demonstrate the unique role of polarization in modulating both the higher-order band topology and orbital transport. A strong coupling between in-plane polarization and higher-order topology is identified, establishing in-plane polarization as an intrinsic means to reversibly switch the OHC plateau within the band gap. Using Tl₂S and SnS as representative models of the two HOTI types, we demonstrate persistent and electrically switchable orbital transport, respectively. Our study advances the understanding of the coupling among ferroelectricity, higher-order topology, and orbital transport, offering new avenues for controllable orbitronics.

121

反铁磁体中非对称散射诱导的奈尔自旋轨道力矩#

Asymmetric Scattering-Induced Neel Spin-Orbit Torque in Antiferromagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Sayan Sarkar, Amit Agarwal📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示了反铁磁体中一类全新外禀自旋轨道力矩机制：非对称杂质散射与能带几何量（反常自旋极化率）耦合产生PT奇自旋极化，突破传统Drude输运的对称性限制。其核心创新在于将高阶散射过程的反对称性与拓扑
证明非对称杂质散射与布洛赫电子的反常自旋极化率(ASP)耦合时，可产生额外的PT奇自旋极化。该外禀贡献源于反对称高阶散射过程与能带几何的 interplay，将原本PT偶的磁化率转化为交错自旋极化。以四方CuMnAs最小模型展示，此反常斜散射贡献可与常规对称散射(Drude)贡献相当，甚至在足够杂质密度下超越之，为反铁磁电学操控提供新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

证明非对称杂质散射与布洛赫电子的反常自旋极化率(ASP)耦合时，可产生额外的PT奇自旋极化。该外禀贡献源于反对称高阶散射过程与能带几何的 interplay，将原本PT偶的磁化率转化为交错自旋极化。以四方CuMnAs最小模型展示，此反常斜散射贡献可与常规对称散射(Drude)贡献相当，甚至在足够杂质密度下超越之，为反铁磁电学操控提供新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18097v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic switching in antiferromagnets relies on Neel spin orbit torque (NSOT), which originates from a current-induced staggered spin polarization of itinerant electrons. In collinear antiferromagnets, such a response requires the spin susceptibility to be odd under combined space-time inversion symmetry (PT), and is conventionally attributed to symmetric scattering processes. Here, we demonstrate that asymmetric impurity scattering generates an additional PT-odd spin polarization when coupled with the anomalous spin polarizability (ASP) of Bloch electrons. This extrinsic contribution arises from the interplay between antisymmetric higher-order scattering processes and band geometry, effectively converting an otherwise PT-even susceptibility into a staggered spin polarization. Using a minimal model of tetragonal CuMnAs, we show that this anomalous skew-scattering contribution can be comparable to, and with sufficient impurity density even exceed, the conventional symmetric scattering (Drude) contribution. Our results identify a new band-geometry-driven mechanism for NSOT and establish an efficient route for electrical control of antiferromagnets.

122

半填充三维Hubbard-Holstein模型的磁输运与相竞争#

Magnetotransport and Phase competition in three-dimensional Hubbard-Holstein model at half-filling
📚 arXiv👤 Sandip Halder, Moshe Schechter📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在三维半填充Hubbard-Holstein模型中系统揭示电子关联与电声耦合的竞争机制，发现反铁磁绝缘体与电荷有序绝缘体的一级相变边界及多相共存现象，为理解铜氧化物和镍酸盐中关联电子体系的无
采用精确对角化结合半经典蒙特卡洛模拟（绝热近似处理声子）研究3D单带Hubbard-Holstein模型在半填充下的磁输运性质。低温电子关联U-电声耦合V相图显示反铁磁绝缘体(AF-I)和电荷有序绝缘体(CO-I)两相以一级相变分隔，交汇处无金属相。U~带宽时V-T相图呈现多相共存，包括AF-I、CO-I、莫特绝缘体、双极化子绝缘体及两种双极化子金属态。

中文摘要

采用精确对角化结合半经典蒙特卡洛模拟（绝热近似处理声子）研究3D单带Hubbard-Holstein模型在半填充下的磁输运性质。低温电子关联U-电声耦合V相图显示反铁磁绝缘体(AF-I)和电荷有序绝缘体(CO-I)两相以一级相变分隔，交汇处无金属相。U~带宽时V-T相图呈现多相共存，包括AF-I、CO-I、莫特绝缘体、双极化子绝缘体及两种双极化子金属态。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18219v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the magnetotransport properties of the one-band Hubbard-Holstein model at half-filling in three dimensions (3D) using exact diagonalization based semi-classical Monte Carlo simulations with phonons treated in the adiabatic limit. The low-temperature electronic correlation U vs electron-phonon coupling V phase diagram reveals two insulating phases--antiferromagnetic (AF-I) and charge-ordered (CO-I)--separated by a first-order transition, with no metallic phase observed at their intersection, indicating robustness of these phases in 3D. For U sim bandwidth, the V vs temperature T phase diagram exhibits multiple phases including AF-I, CO-I, Mott-Hubbard insulator, bipolaronic insulator, and two bipolaronic metallic states. Several first-order transitions occur near V sim 3.75. Above the ordering temperature, the density of states shows universal behavior dominated by electronic contribution, while susceptibility and DOS analyses reveal pseudogap features. Magnetic and transport properties along the phase boundary highlight strong proximity effects between competing phases, suggesting routes for tuning correlated materials and emergent electronic states.

123

交错电磁体中的多极压电性与各向异性表面输运#

Multipolar Piezoelectricity and Anisotropic Surface Transport in Alterelectrics
📚 arXiv👤 Amber Visser, Viktor Könye, Oleg Janson, Jeroen van den Brink, Corentin Coulais, Jasper van Wezel📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地提出"交错电体"新概念，将交错电磁体的对称性框架拓展至电极化领域，揭示四极压电性与双曲色散等涌现物性。通过厘清磁性内禀关联与对称性约束的边界，为设计各向异性表面输运器件及探索磁电交叉新现
提出交错电磁体(altermagnets)的电极化对应物——交错电体(alterelectrics)，其具有四极压电性和双曲色散。通过简化模型和第一性原理材料实现展示这些性质，并建立自旋分离能带的对应物：表面模式允许表面依赖的各向异性电子输运。该工作厘清哪些性质内禀关联磁性、哪些由对称性决定，为探索新奇电磁现象提供新平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

提出交错电磁体(altermagnets)的电极化对应物——交错电体(alterelectrics)，其具有四极压电性和双曲色散。通过简化模型和第一性原理材料实现展示这些性质，并建立自旋分离能带的对应物：表面模式允许表面依赖的各向异性电子输运。该工作厘清哪些性质内禀关联磁性、哪些由对称性决定，为探索新奇电磁现象提供新平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18324v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets are an emergent class of materials combining features of ferro- and antiferro-magnetic materials. They have spin-separated bands normally associated with ferromagnets, but a vanishing net magnetization. Moreover the symmetries giving rise to d-wave altermagnetism can provide them with a particular anisotropic, quadrupolar (i.e. with equal and opposite values when strained in perpendicular directions) piezomagnetism. Observing that the same symmetries provide a natural place to look for hyberbolic wave dispersion, this raises the question which properties are intrinsically linked to magnetism and which are determined by the symmetry. Here, we disentangle these concepts by introducing an alternative to altermagnets, based on electric polarization. These alterelectrics display quadrupolar piezoelectricity and a hyperbolic dispersion, which we demonstrate conceptually within a simplified model as well as a first-principles material realization. We furthermore establish that a counterpart of the spin-separated bands is formed by surface modes which allow for surface dependent anisotropic electronic transport analogous to the spintronic applications proposed for altermagnets.

124

二维d波交错磁体中四重自旋纹理锁定的直接观测#

Direct observation of quadruple spin-texture locking in a 2D d-wave altermagnet
📚 arXiv👤 Dan Mu, Bei Jiang, Qingchen Duan, Zulin Xu, Xingkai Cheng, Yusen Xiao, Xinru Han, Xinyu Liang, Zhaokun Luo, Ryan L. Kong, Qiheng Wang, Junwei Liu, Jianxin Zhong, Ruidan Zhong, Qiangqiang Gu, Baiqing Lv, Hong Ding📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地发展原位可切换自旋极化针尖技术，首次在原子尺度直接成像二维交错磁体的d波自旋-晶格锁定纹理，确立自旋散射与动量锁定机制，为交错磁性这一新兴拓扑量子物态的实验表征奠定基准，推动自旋电子学新
利用原位可场切换的自旋极化Cr针尖，在RbV₂Se₂O中实现准粒子干涉的自旋对比度成像，克服交错磁体长期实验瓶颈。结果显示该材料电子态在子晶格层面呈现d波型自旋纹理，自旋取向主要沿c轴，首次提供自旋-晶格锁定的原子尺度证据。干涉图案呈现显著自旋依赖调制，确立自旋散射锁定和自旋动量锁定，为交错磁性态提供决定性实验基准。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

利用原位可场切换的自旋极化Cr针尖，在RbV₂Se₂O中实现准粒子干涉的自旋对比度成像，克服交错磁体长期实验瓶颈。结果显示该材料电子态在子晶格层面呈现d波型自旋纹理，自旋取向主要沿c轴，首次提供自旋-晶格锁定的原子尺度证据。干涉图案呈现显著自旋依赖调制，确立自旋散射锁定和自旋动量锁定，为交错磁性态提供决定性实验基准。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18337v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets combine vanishing net magnetization with nonrelativistic, momentum-dependent spin splitting, offering a new paradigm for spintronics. Spin-crystal symmetry coupling, namely spin-lattice locking, is the defining mechanism of altermagnetism, enforcing opposite spin sublattices in real space and spin-momentum-locked electronic structure in reciprocal space. Direct atomic-scale visualization of spin-lattice locking therefore constitutes a decisive benchmark of the altermagnetic state, yet such evidence has remained elusive despite extensive efforts. Here we show that the electronic states in RbV2Se2O exhibit a d-wave-like spin texture at the sublattice level, providing the first atomic-scale evidence of spin-lattice locking with a predominantly c-axis spin orientation. By employing an in-situ, field-switchable spin-polarized Cr tip, we realize spin-contrast mapping of quasiparticle interference at identical energies, overcoming a long-standing experimental barrier in altermagnets. The resulting interference patterns exhibit pronounced spin-dependent modulations, establishing spin scattering locking and spin momentum locking as the real and reciprocal space manifestations. Unexpectedly, we uncover that the spin-selective scattering response is organized by a long-period stripe modulation, giving rise to a previously unidentified form of spin-texture locking, spin-stripe locking. We attribute this behavior to the emergence of a spin-density-wave moiré pattern. Together, these results establish a unified picture of quadruple spin-texture locking phenomena in a d-wave altermagnet, and position altermagnets as a versatile platform for exploring many-body interactions among intertwined degrees of freedom, including spin, lattice, momentum, moiré potential and valley.

125

可调对称性自旋-1链中的量子猝灭#

Quantum quenches in a spin-1 chain with tunable symmetry
📚 arXiv👤 Luis Eduardo Ramos-Solís, Sayan Choudhury, Freddy Jackson Poveda-Cuevas, Eduardo Ibarra-García-Padilla📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作通过调控四极相互作用实现自旋链从非可积到可积的连续过渡，在SU(3)对称点发现新守恒量并建立可达态理论框架，为理解可积性破缺下量子热化与预热化行为提供了可控的数值研究平台，对冷原子量子模拟实验具
该工作采用时间演化块衰减（TEBD）方法研究各向异性自旋-1海森堡链在实验可及初态下的动力学，通过调节四极相互作用强度参数J_q实现从非可积SU(2)到可积SU(3)模型的调控。研究表征了局域磁化、纠缠熵和自旋关联对J_q的依赖关系，在SU(3)对称点识别出新的守恒量，并以该守恒律允许的可达态数目为理论框架解释数值结果。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用时间演化块衰减（TEBD）方法研究各向异性自旋-1海森堡链在实验可及初态下的动力学，通过调节四极相互作用强度参数J_q实现从非可积SU(2)到可积SU(3)模型的调控。研究表征了局域磁化、纠缠熵和自旋关联对J_q的依赖关系，在SU(3)对称点识别出新的守恒量，并以该守恒律允许的可达态数目为理论框架解释数值结果。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18425v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In recent years, the dynamics of interacting quantum systems far from equilibrium have attracted significant research interest. Driven by rapid progress in quantum simulators, various non-equilibrium phenomena have now been realized experimentally. In this work, we use the time-evolving block decimation (TEBD) method to investigate the dynamics of an anisotropic spin-1 Heisenberg chain for a wide range of experimentally accessible initial states. By adjusting the parameter J_q that controls the quadrupolar interaction strength, we can tune the system from a non-integrable SU(2) Heisenberg model to an integrable SU(3) Heisenberg model. We examine the local magnetization, entanglement entropy, and spin correlations, and characterize their dependence on J_q. We identify a new conserved quantity at the SU(3) symmetric point and provide a theoretical framework to explain our numerical observations in terms of the number of accessible states permitted by this conservation law. Our results provide a route to realize a rich array of non-equilibrium behavior in spin-1 lattice models, which can be engineered in several experimental platforms such as ultracold atoms in optical lattices.

126

莫尔超晶格对交替电四极序的调控#

Moire Control of Alterelectric Quadrupolar Order
📚 arXiv👤 Alejandro Lopez-Bezanilla📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：莫尔超晶格为调控交替电四极序提供了全新平台，通过有效莫尔场实现对其内部取向的连续操控，突破了传统铁电材料仅关注净极化的局限，为设计高可调性量子材料与拓扑电子器件开辟新途径。
该工作展示莫尔超晶格可将交替电性（无净极化的补偿铁电态，由四极电子序重塑低能电子结构）转化为可控相。在Bloch周期双轨道理论中，缓变层间配准被粗粒化为作用于自洽双分量交替电四极的有效莫尔场， resulting相在强填充依赖的不稳定性阈值之上发展，并从弱选择区渡越到稳健的轴主导基态。配准-相位扫描提供了通过内部四极空间的显式连续路径，证实莫尔超晶格不仅稳定交替电性，还操控其内部取向。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作展示莫尔超晶格可将交替电性（无净极化的补偿铁电态，由四极电子序重塑低能电子结构）转化为可控相。在Bloch周期双轨道理论中，缓变层间配准被粗粒化为作用于自洽双分量交替电四极的有效莫尔场， resulting相在强填充依赖的不稳定性阈值之上发展，并从弱选择区渡越到稳健的轴主导基态。配准-相位扫描提供了通过内部四极空间的显式连续路径，证实莫尔超晶格不仅稳定交替电性，还操控其内部取向。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18428v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Alterelectricity is a compensated ferroic state in which quadrupolar electronic order reshapes low-energy electronic structure without producing a net polarization. Here we show that a moiré superlattice can turn such order into a controllable phase. Within a Bloch-periodic two-orbital theory, the slowly varying interlayer registry is coarse-grained into an effective moiré field acting on a self-consistent two-component alterelectric quadrupole. The resulting phase develops above a strongly filling-dependent instability threshold and crosses over from a weakly selected regime into a robust axial-dominated ground state, while the diagonal-dominated branch remains only a weak competitor. A registry-phase sweep supplies an explicit continuous path through internal quadrupole space, demonstrating that the moiré superlattice does more than stabilize alterelectricity: it steers its internal orientation. This orientational selection is encoded directly in the redistribution of low-energy spectral weight across the moiré Brillouin zone. These results identify moiré superlattices as a generic route to controllable alterelectric order and to programmable anisotropic electronic functionality.

127

RNiO₃中光致轨道极化与姜-泰勒效应#

Photoinduced orbital polarization and Jahn-Teller effect in RNiO₃
📚 arXiv👤 Sangeeta Rajpurohit, Sheikh Rubaiat Ul Haque, Aaron M. Lindenberg, Peter E. Blöchl, Tadashi Ogitsu1📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示光场可激活稀土镍酸盐中"沉睡"的轨道自由度，通过线偏振光选择性调控e_g轨道占据并抑制洪德耦合，驱动相干姜-泰勒结构畸变。这为超快光学操控关联电子材料的轨道序与晶格结构开辟了新途径，有望
该工作利用相互作用多能带紧束缚模型结合电子-离子-自旋动力学实时模拟，证明稀土镍酸盐中通常不活跃的轨道自由度可通过线偏振光光激发诱导极化。光致d-d跃迁降低Ni位局域磁矩并有效抑制激发态洪德耦合J，且通过调节光偏振可实现强轨道选择性，导致e_g轨道占据失衡。该非平衡态因有效J降低和轨道布居不均而失稳，沿相干激发的姜-泰勒模式发生结构弛豫。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用相互作用多能带紧束缚模型结合电子-离子-自旋动力学实时模拟，证明稀土镍酸盐中通常不活跃的轨道自由度可通过线偏振光光激发诱导极化。光致d-d跃迁降低Ni位局域磁矩并有效抑制激发态洪德耦合J，且通过调节光偏振可实现强轨道选择性，导致e_g轨道占据失衡。该非平衡态因有效J降低和轨道布居不均而失稳，沿相干激发的姜-泰勒模式发生结构弛豫。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18524v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The orbital degree of freedom in rare-earth nickelates is typically inactive across the temperature-driven metal-insulator transition, where the system develops two inequivalent Ni sites associated with Ni-O bond disproportionation and breathing-mode distortions of NiO₆ octahedra. Here, we show that orbital polarization can be induced by optical excitation with linearly polarized light. Using an interacting multiband tight-binding model combined with real-time simulations of coupled electron-ion-spin dynamics, we find that photoinduced d-d transitions reduce the local magnetic moments at Ni sites and effectively suppress Hund's coupling J in the excited state. Importantly, these transitions can be made strongly orbital-selective by tuning the light polarization, leading to an imbalance in e_g orbital occupancies. The resulting nonequilibrium state, characterized by reduced effective J and unequal orbital populations, becomes unstable toward Jahn-Teller (JT) distortions, driving structural relaxation along coherently excited JT modes. Our results demonstrate that polarization-controlled optical excitation provides a pathway to access hidden nonthermal phases with emergent orbital order, enabling coherent control of coupled charge, spin, and lattice degrees of freedom on ultrafast timescales.

128

LaFeAsO超导能隙的磁性与对称性：动力学平均场理论研究#

Magnetism and symmetry of superconducting gap in LaFeAsO from dynamical mean-field theory
📚 arXiv👤 S. L. Skornyakov, V. I. Anisimov, A. A. Katanin📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将DFT+DMFT与Bethe-Salpeter方程结合，首次从动态相互作用顶点修正角度揭示LaFeAsO中s±波超导优于d波的微观机制，阐明了巡游电子对磁阻挫的抑制作用与超导对称性的关
该工作采用密度泛函理论结合动力学平均场理论（DFT+DMFT）研究电子关联对铁基母化合物LaFeAsO磁性和超导性质的影响。发现静态非局域磁化率在面内波矢Q=(π,π)处出现峰，阶梯近似中顶点修正使其显著增强并导致磁不稳定性。考虑Bethe-Salpeter方程的本征函数，在二阶微扰和含动态相互作用顶点的阶梯近似中分别得到d波和s±序参量的主导，后者的优势与巡游自由度对磁阻挫的降低（仅部分形成局域磁矩）相关。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用密度泛函理论结合动力学平均场理论（DFT+DMFT）研究电子关联对铁基母化合物LaFeAsO磁性和超导性质的影响。发现静态非局域磁化率在面内波矢Q=(π,π)处出现峰，阶梯近似中顶点修正使其显著增强并导致磁不稳定性。考虑Bethe-Salpeter方程的本征函数，在二阶微扰和含动态相互作用顶点的阶梯近似中分别得到d波和s±序参量的主导，后者的优势与巡游自由度对磁阻挫的降低（仅部分形成局域磁矩）相关。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18582v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: By employing a combined method of density functional theory and dynamical mean field theory (DFT+DMFT) we investigate the effect of electronic correlations on the magnetic and superconducting properties of the iron-based parent compound LaFeAsO. We find that the static non-local susceptibility ḩi(bf q) exhibits a peak at the in-plane wave vector mathbf Q=(π,π), which is strongly enhanced upon inclusion of the vertex corrections in the ladder approximation, leading to magnetic instability. Considering the eigenfunctions of the Bethe-Salpeter equation with the vertex, obtained within the second order perturbation theory, as well as the ladder approach containing dynamic interaction vertices, in agreement with earlier weak-coupling-based studies of LaFeAsO, we obtain a close competition between d-wave and s± order parameters, dominating in the second-order and ladder approach, respectively. We argue that the dominating s± instability in the ladder DFT+DMFT approach is related to the reduced degree of magnetic frustration by itinerant degrees of freedom due to only partially formed local magnetic moments. Our study shows that dynamic correlation effects do not change the type of the leading superconducting instability in LaFeAsO.

129

偶极平面转子链量子相的有效理论#

Effective theory of quantum phases in the dipolar planar rotor chain
📚 arXiv👤 Estêvão V. B. de Oliveira, Muhammad Shaeer Moeed, Pierre-Nicholas Roy📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作为偶极平面转子链构建了从无序到有序相的统一量子有效理论框架，核心创新在于揭示四次项对消除量子化歧义的关键作用，填补了偶极转子集体激发低能有效描述的空白，为冷原子偶极气体及量子磁性材料的理论建模提
该工作利用不含时微扰理论和小角度二次近似发展相互作用偶极平面转子集体行为的理论描述。对无序相证明不含时微扰理论的适用性；对有序相基于偶极序的稳定平衡构型构建二次近似，并证明势能展开中四次项对纠正量子化歧义导致的能谱移动至关重要。采用精确对角化和密度矩阵重正化群数值技术对两种近似进行基准测试。
