中文摘要

该工作利用不含时微扰理论和小角度二次近似发展相互作用偶极平面转子集体行为的理论描述。对无序相证明不含时微扰理论的适用性；对有序相基于偶极序的稳定平衡构型构建二次近似，并证明势能展开中四次项对纠正量子化歧义导致的能谱移动至关重要。采用精确对角化和密度矩阵重正化群数值技术对两种近似进行基准测试。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16999v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In this work, we develop a theoretical description of the collective behavior of interacting dipolar planar rotors by using time independent perturbation theory and a small angle quadratic approximation. The ground state properties for both the ordered and disordered quantum phases of the system are directly calculated and analyzed. Time-independent perturbation theory is shown to be appropriate for the disordered phase. For the ordered phase, we construct a quadratic approximation based on the stable equilibrium configurations of the dipolar ordering; we show that the inclusion of the quartic terms from the expansion of the potential energy are essential to correct the shift in the energy spectrum due to quantization ambiguities. Numerical techniques such as Exact Diagonalization and Density Matrix Renormalization Group are used for the benchmark the quality of both approximations.

130

弱莫特绝缘体中量子自旋液体的电场调控#

Electric field control of a quantum spin liquid in weak Mott insulators
📚 arXiv👤 Daniel J. Schultz, Alexandre Khoury, Félix Desrochers, Omid Tavakol, Emily Z. Zhang, Yong Baek Kim📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文创新性地提出利用直流电场而非传统压力/化学掺杂来调控弱莫特绝缘体的t/U比，通过四阶微扰理论建立电场调控的环交换模型，揭示电场可同时诱导空间各向异性并显著增强环交换相互作用，为在固态材料中实现手征
三角晶格Hubbard模型在强耦合下具有丰富相图，包括手征自旋液体相，但实验上难以调控t/U比。本文研究直流电场通过重整化交换相互作用来调控该模型，进行四阶小t/U展开，导出电场下的环交换模型，发现电场不仅引入空间各向异性，还增强环交换项相对于最近邻海森堡相互作用的重要性，为实验实现手征自旋液体提供新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

三角晶格Hubbard模型在强耦合下具有丰富相图，包括手征自旋液体相，但实验上难以调控t/U比。本文研究直流电场通过重整化交换相互作用来调控该模型，进行四阶小t/U展开，导出电场下的环交换模型，发现电场不仅引入空间各向异性，还增强环交换项相对于最近邻海森堡相互作用的重要性，为实验实现手征自旋液体提供新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2309.00037v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The triangular lattice Hubbard model at strong coupling, whose effective spin model contains both Heisenberg and ring exchange interactions, exhibits a rich phase diagram as the ratio of the hopping t to onsite Coulomb repulsion U is tuned. This includes a chiral spin liquid (CSL) phase. Nevertheless, this exotic phase remains challenging to realize experimentally because a given material has a fixed value of t/U that can difficultly be tuned with external stimuli. One approach to address this problem is applying a DC electric field, which renormalizes the exchange interactions as electrons undergo virtual hopping processes; in addition to creating virtual doubly occupied sites, electrons must overcome electric potential energy differences. Performing a small t/U expansion to fourth order, we derive the ring exchange model in the presence of an electric field and find that it not only introduces spatial anisotropy but also tends to enhance the ring exchange term compared to the dominant nearest-neighbor Heisenberg interaction. Thus, increasing the electric field serves as a way to increase the importance of the ring exchange at constant t/U. Through density matrix renormalization group calculations, we compute the ground state phase diagram of the ring exchange model for two different electric field directions. In both cases, we find that the electric field shifts the phase boundary of the CSL towards a smaller ratio of t/U. Therefore, the electric field can drive a magnetically ordered state into the CSL. This explicit demonstration opens the door to tuning other quantum spin systems into spin liquid phases via the application of an electric field.

131

钙掺杂钪钽酸铅的可调电热效应#

Tunable electrocaloric effect in lead scandium tantalate through calcium doping
📚 arXiv👤 Youri Nouchokgwe, Natalya S. Fedorova, Pranab Biswas, Veronika Kovacova, Ivana Gorican, Silvo Drmovsek, Binayak Mukherjee, Uros Prah, Guillaume F. Nataf, Torsten Granzow, Mael Guennou, Hana Ursic, Jorge Iniguez-Gonzalez, Emmanuel Defay📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：通过A位钙掺杂策略精准调控PST相变温度，首次揭示低掺杂常规与高掺杂逆电热的浓度依赖转变机制，突破单一材料制冷温区限制，为级联固态制冷器件设计提供新范式。
本文通过在高度有序PST中进行A位钙掺杂，调控其相变和电热响应。根据钙浓度不同，转变温度可移至258 K或319 K；量热法、极化回线和压电力显微镜揭示Ca≥2%时中间反铁电相的出现，第一性原理计算予以支持。Ca≤2%表现为常规电热效应，更高掺杂出现逆电热效应；在110 kV/cm电场下，Ca掺杂PST在263-353 K范围内绝热温变达2 K，为级联电热制冷器件拓展应用温区。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文通过在高度有序PST中进行A位钙掺杂，调控其相变和电热响应。根据钙浓度不同，转变温度可移至258 K或319 K；量热法、极化回线和压电力显微镜揭示Ca≥2%时中间反铁电相的出现，第一性原理计算予以支持。Ca≤2%表现为常规电热效应，更高掺杂出现逆电热效应；在110 kV/cm电场下，Ca掺杂PST在263-353 K范围内绝热温变达2 K，为级联电热制冷器件拓展应用温区。

English Abstract

arXiv:2502.02402v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: State-of-the-art electrocaloric cooling prototypes rely on the conventional electrocaloric effect of ferroelectric lead scandium tantalate (PbSc0.5Ta0.5O3, PST), which peaks near room temperature. Here, we demonstrate that A-site calcium doping in highly ordered PST modifies its phase transitions and enables precise tuning of the electrocaloric response. The transition temperature shifts down to 258 K and up to 319 K, depending on Ca concentration. Calorimetry under electric field, electrical polarization loops, and piezoresponse force microscopy reveal the emergence of an intermediate antiferroelectric phase stabilized for Ca ≥ 2%. These results are supported by first-principles calculations. We observe a conventional electrocaloric effect for Ca łeq 2% and an inverse electrocaloric effect at higher doping (≥ 2%). Under an applied field of 110 kV cm⁻¹, Ca-doped PST exhibits an adiabatic temperature change of 2 K over a range from 263 K to 353 K. Such Ca-doped PST compounds could be used to expand the temperature range of PST below the freezing point of water. Our results offer a pathway to cascaded electrocaloric cooling devices with extended operating spans.

Generating single- and many-body quantum magnonic states
📚 arXiv👤 Violet Williams, Jayakrishnan M. P. Nair, Yaroslav Tserkovnyak, Benedetta Flebus📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电

该工作构建了固态自旋缺陷系综与共享磁性 baths 耦合的理论框架，研究发射磁振子之间的量子关联及其对实验可调参数的依赖。结果表明发射磁振子保留了固态发射体固有的量子关联，为确定性生成量子多体磁振子态提供了途径。

中文摘要

该工作构建了固态自旋缺陷系综与共享磁性 baths 耦合的理论框架，研究发射磁振子之间的量子关联及其对实验可调参数的依赖。结果表明发射磁振子保留了固态发射体固有的量子关联，为确定性生成量子多体磁振子态提供了途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.05971v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The growing interest in quantum magnonics is driving the development of advanced techniques for generating, controlling, and detecting non-classical magnonic states. Here, we explore the potential of an ensemble of solid-state spin defects coupled to a shared magnetic bath as a source of such states. We establish a theoretical framework to characterize the quantum correlations among magnons emitted by the ensemble into the bath and investigate how these correlations depend on experimentally tunable parameters. Our findings show that the emitted magnons retain the quantum correlations inherent to the solid-state emitters, paving the way for the deterministic generation of quantum many-body magnonic states.

133

基于ghost Gutzwiller变分嵌入的强关联系统拓扑能带图像#

Band structure picture for topology in strongly correlated systems with the ghost Gutzwiller ansatz
📚 arXiv👤 Ivan Pasqua, Antonio Maria Tagliente, Gabriele Bellomia, Bartomeu Monserrat, Michele Fabrizio, Carlos Mejuto-Zaera📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将ghost Gutzwiller变分嵌入方法拓展至拓扑能带理论，通过引入辅助准粒子自由度构建强关联系统的有效单粒子图像，突破了传统能带理论在关联电子体系中的失效瓶颈。其意义在于建立了电
该工作利用ghost Gutzwiller (gGut)变分嵌入框架，引入辅助准粒子自由度以恢复强关联系统的有效能带描述，从而弥合电子关联与能带拓扑之间的语言隔阂。以相互作用Bernevig-Hughes-Zhang模型为例，该方法不仅复现了已知结果，还揭示了承载非平庸拓扑的Hubbard能带等新现象。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用ghost Gutzwiller (gGut)变分嵌入框架，引入辅助准粒子自由度以恢复强关联系统的有效能带描述，从而弥合电子关联与能带拓扑之间的语言隔阂。以相互作用Bernevig-Hughes-Zhang模型为例，该方法不仅复现了已知结果，还揭示了承载非平庸拓扑的Hubbard能带等新现象。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.10670v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Understanding the interplay between electronic correlations and band topology remains a central challenge in condensed matter physics, primarily hindered by a language mismatch problem. While band topology is naturally formulated within a single-particle band theory, strong correlations typically elude such an effective one-body description. In this work, we bridge this gap leveraging the ghost Gutzwiller (gGut) variational embedding framework, which introduces auxiliary quasiparticle degrees of freedom to recover an effective band structure description of strongly correlated systems. This approach enables an interpretable and computationally efficient treatment of correlated topological phases, resulting in energy- and momentum-resolved topological features that are directly comparable with experimental spectra. We exemplify the advantages of this framework through a detailed study of the interacting Bernevig-Hughes-Zhang model. Not only does the gGut description reproduce established results, but it also reveals previously inaccessible aspects: most notably, the emergence of topologically nontrivial Hubbard bands hosting their own edge states, as well as possible ways to manipulate these through a finite magnetization. These results position the gGut framework as a promising tool for the predictive modeling of correlated topological materials.

134

手性交替磁体磁电材料#

Chiral Altermagnetic Magnetoelectrics
📚 arXiv👤 Chengwu Xie, Weizhen Meng, Zhenzhou Guo, Xiaodong Zhou, Shifeng Qian, Tie Yang, Wenhong Wang, Zhenxiang Cheng, Xiaotian Wang📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：提出"手性交替磁体磁电材料"新类别，以K[Co(HCOO)₃]为实验平台，实现手性锁定g波自旋劈裂与Néel矢量-手性协同调控的双模式电极化切换，为新型多铁性器件与自旋电子学应用开辟路径。
该工作提出了一类结构手性、非极性交替磁系统中的手性交替磁体磁电材料，并确定三维金属-有机框架K[Co(HCOO)₃]为实验可验证的平台。该材料展现出手性锁定的g波交替磁自旋劈裂，以及由Néel矢量重取向和结构手性共同控制的双模式可切换电极化。
阅读原文 ↗

中文摘要

该工作提出了一类结构手性、非极性交替磁系统中的手性交替磁体磁电材料，并确定三维金属-有机框架K[Co(HCOO)₃]为实验可验证的平台。该材料展现出手性锁定的g波交替磁自旋劈裂，以及由Néel矢量重取向和结构手性共同控制的双模式可切换电极化。

English Abstract

arXiv:2508.12770v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In this work, we introduce a new class of chiral altermagnetic magnetoelectrics in structurally chiral, nonpolar altermagnetic systems and identify the experimentally well-characterized three-dimensional metal-organic framework K[Co(HCOO)₃] as a promising material platform. K[Co(HCOO)₃] exhibits chirality-locked emphg-wave altermagnetic spin splitting together with dual-mode switchable electric polarization controlled by Néel-vector reorientation and structural chirality. Specifically, Néel-vector reorientation generates a finite electric polarization and reverses its sign, whereas chirality switching between left- and right-handed enantiomers produces an additional sign reversal. The associated electronic and optical responses provide effective readout channels for these switchable states. Our results establish chiral altermagnetic magnetoelectrics as a promising route to chirality- and Néel-vector-controlled nonvolatile multifunctional spintronics.

135

铁基超导体中的奇宇称磁性#

Odd-Parity Magnetism in Fe-Based Superconductors
📚 arXiv👤 Reuel Dsouza, Andreas Kreisel, Brian M. Andersen, Daniel F. Agterberg, Morten H. Christensen📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在铁基超导体中预言了奇宇称磁态这一新奇量子物态，突破了传统磁序分类框架。其核心创新在于揭示共面磁序可自发破缺反演对称性而不破坏时间反演对称，并阐明自旋-轨道耦合调控下自旋极化从h波到面内倾斜
该工作结合低能有效模型与密度泛函理论，证明具有共面磁序的铁基超导体可实现破缺反演对称性而保持时间反演对称的奇宇称磁态。无自旋-轨道耦合时电子自旋沿k_z方向极化，呈现h波形式因子的自旋劈裂；引入自旋-轨道耦合后动量空间自旋倾斜至(kₓ,k_y)平面并产生有限的Edelstein响应。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作结合低能有效模型与密度泛函理论，证明具有共面磁序的铁基超导体可实现破缺反演对称性而保持时间反演对称的奇宇称磁态。无自旋-轨道耦合时电子自旋沿k_z方向极化，呈现h波形式因子的自旋劈裂；引入自旋-轨道耦合后动量空间自旋倾斜至(kₓ,k_y)平面并产生有限的Edelstein响应。

English Abstract

arXiv:2508.21673v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Odd-parity magnetism constitutes an intriguing phase of matter which breaks inversion symmetry while preserving time-reversal symmetry. Here we demonstrate that the Fe-based superconductors exhibiting coplanar magnetic order realize an odd-parity magnetic state by combining low-energy modeling with density-functional theory. In the absence of spin-orbit coupling, the electronic spins are polarized along the k_z-direction and the splitting of the up and down states exhibits an h-wave form-factor. The magnitude of the splitting depends sensitively on specific parameters of the low-energy model, including specific out-of-plane hopping parameters and the Fermi energies of the hole- and electron-pockets. Interestingly, despite this state breaking inversion symmetry and exhibiting a finite out-of-plane Berry curvature and non-linear anomalous Hall effect, the Edelstein effect vanishes. Incorporating spin-orbit coupling tilts the momentum-space electronic spins into the (kₓ,k_y)-plane and imparts finite in-plane components to the Edelstein response. Our findings highlight the Fe-based superconductors as platforms for exploring odd-parity magnetism both on its own and coexisting with unconventional superconductivity.

136

通过激子凝聚稳定滑移铁电性#

Stabilization of sliding ferroelectricity through exciton condensation
📚 arXiv👤 Matteo D'Alessio, Daniele Varsano, Elisa Molinari, Massimo Rontani📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统单粒子图像局限，首次揭示激子凝聚对滑移铁电性的关键稳定作用，以WTe₂双层为模型阐明电子-空穴相互作用导致的能带重整化效应，为理解低维铁电机制及设计新型二维极性材料提供了重要的多体物理视
该工作以WTe₂双层为原型结构，理论上研究了滑移铁电性的起源与定量机制。结果表明激子效应在基态中引起显著的能带重整化，激子凝聚对滑移导致的铁电性稳定化有重要贡献，超越了此前忽略电子-空穴相互作用效应的预测。

中文摘要

该工作以WTe₂双层为原型结构，理论上研究了滑移铁电性的起源与定量机制。结果表明激子效应在基态中引起显著的能带重整化，激子凝聚对滑移导致的铁电性稳定化有重要贡献，超越了此前忽略电子-空穴相互作用效应的预测。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.01465v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Sliding ferroelectricity is a phenomenon that arises from the insurgence of spontaneous electronic polarization perpendicular to the layers of two-dimensional (2D) systems upon the relative sliding of the atomic layer constituents. Because of the weak van der Waals (vdW) interactions between layers, sliding and the associated symmetry breaking can occur at low energy cost in materials such as transition-metal dichalcogenides. Here we discuss theoretically the origin and quantitative understanding of the phenomenon by focusing on a prototype structure, the WTe2 bilayer, where sliding ferroelectricity was first experimentally observed. We show that excitonic effects induce relevant energy band renormalizations in the ground state, and exciton condensation contributes significantly to stabilizing ferroelectricity upon sliding, beyond previous predictions that disregard electron-hole interaction effects. Enhanced excitonic effects in 2D and vdW sliding are general phenomena that point to sliding ferroelectricity as relevant for a broad class of important materials, where the intrinsic electric dipole can couple with other quantum phenomena and, in turn, an external electric field can control the quantum phases through ferroelectricity in unexplored ways.

137

强Rashba自旋-轨道耦合交替磁体中超导条纹相的不稳定性#

Instability toward Superconducting Stripe Phase in Altermagnets with Strong Rashba Spin-Orbit Coupling
📚 arXiv👤 Kohei Mukasa, Yusuke Masaki📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在强Rashba-交替磁耦合体系中揭示条纹超导相的低温重入现象，其核心创新在于发现交替磁劈裂诱导的费米面各向异性可驱动多质心动量Cooper对凝聚，为探索非中心对称磁体中拓扑超导新物态及量子
该工作数值研究了具有d波自旋劈裂和强Rashba自旋-轨道耦合的非中心对称金属交替磁体中的有限动量超导。构建了条纹相（Cooper对获得多个质心动量）与螺旋相之间的相图，发现条纹相在低温下出现并随交替磁劈裂强度呈现重入行为，其配对机制源于交替磁劈裂导致的费米面各向异性形变。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作数值研究了具有d波自旋劈裂和强Rashba自旋-轨道耦合的非中心对称金属交替磁体中的有限动量超导。构建了条纹相（Cooper对获得多个质心动量）与螺旋相之间的相图，发现条纹相在低温下出现并随交替磁劈裂强度呈现重入行为，其配对机制源于交替磁劈裂导致的费米面各向异性形变。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.00837v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We numerically investigate finite-momentum superconductivity in noncentrosymmetric metallic altermagnets with d-wave spin-splitting and strong Rashba-type spin-orbit coupling. Focusing on a stripe phase in which Cooper pairs acquire multiple center-of-mass momenta, we construct phase diagrams that reveal phase boundaries between the stripe phase and a helical phase characterized by a single center-of-mass momentum. Our results show that the stripe phase emerges at low temperatures and exhibits a reentrant behavior as a function of the strength of the altermagnetic splitting. We further analyze the stripe phase within a linearized gap equation, and uncover the mechanism of the pairing formation unique to the stripe phase. This mechanism originates from the anisotropic deformation of the Fermi surfaces induced by the altermagnetic splitting, highlighting the intriguing interplay between the spin-orbit coupling and the altermagnets.

138

CeCo₅铁磁体中的磁各向异性与中间价态#

Magnetic anisotropy and intermediate valence in CeCo₅ ferromagnet
📚 arXiv👤 Alexander B. Shick (Institute of Physics, Czech Academy of Sciences, Na Slovance 2, 182 21 Prague, Czech Republic), Evgenia A. Tereshina-Chitrova (Institute of Physics, Czech Academy of Sciences, Na Slovance 2, 182 21 Prague, Czech Republic)📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统DFT方法对Ce中间价态描述的局限，创新性地将DFT+U与Anderson杂质模型精确对角化相结合，首次从第一性原理角度揭示Ce³⁺/Ce⁴⁺价态涨落对磁矩的抑制机制，为强关联稀土永磁材
该工作针对CeCo₅中Ce的中间价态挑战标准DFT和静态DFT+U方法的问题，将DFT+U与Ce 4f壳层Anderson杂质模型的精确对角化相结合。发现Ce⁴⁺-Ce³⁺价态涨落导致自旋和轨道矩显著减小，总磁矩6.70 μ_B与实验一致，单轴磁各向异性能达4.8 meV/f.u.，与实验数据高度吻合。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对CeCo₅中Ce的中间价态挑战标准DFT和静态DFT+U方法的问题，将DFT+U与Ce 4f壳层Anderson杂质模型的精确对角化相结合。发现Ce⁴⁺-Ce³⁺价态涨落导致自旋和轨道矩显著减小，总磁矩6.70 μ_B与实验一致，单轴磁各向异性能达4.8 meV/f.u.，与实验数据高度吻合。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.07063v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The intermediate valence of Ce in CeCo₅ challenges standard density functional theory (DFT) and static DFT+U approaches, which fail to capture its magnetic properties. By combining DFT+U with exact diagonalization of the Anderson impurity model for the Ce 4f shell, we find a substantial reduction of Ce spin and orbital moments, consistent with DFT+DMFT, arising from Ce⁴⁺ - Ce³⁺ valence fluctuations. The total magnetic moment of 6.70 μ_B agrees with experiment, and the calculated 4f density of states reproduces photoemission and Bremsstrahlung isochromat spectra. The uniaxial magnetic anisotropy energy reaches 4.8 meV/f.u. when Coulomb correlations on both Ce 4f and Co 3d shells are included, in very good agreement with experimental data. These results highlight the importance of dynamical correlations and provide guidance for exploring high-performance, low-rare-earth-content permanent magnets.

139

磁振子极化子的化学势#

Chemical potential of magnon polarons
📚 arXiv👤 Violet Williams, Benedetta Flebus📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地建立了磁振子极化子化学势的严格热力学定义，解决了非平衡磁子-声子耦合系统中准粒子统计描述的基础问题，为自旋卡诺电子学器件和磁振子玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚的实验调控提供了理论框架。
该工作基于旋转不变的自旋-晶格耦合形式，推导了共线铁磁体和反铁磁体中磁振子-极化子准粒子化学势的严格定义。研究表明，在非平衡条件下，磁振子极化子气体由与守恒轴角动量共轭的单一化学势描述，且铁磁体中共旋 sector 的两个杂化分支共享该化学势。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作基于旋转不变的自旋-晶格耦合形式，推导了共线铁磁体和反铁磁体中磁振子-极化子准粒子化学势的严格定义。研究表明，在非平衡条件下，磁振子极化子气体由与守恒轴角动量共轭的单一化学势描述，且铁磁体中共旋 sector 的两个杂化分支共享该化学势。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.02222v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Using a rotationally invariant formulation of spin-lattice coupling, we derive a rigorous definition of the chemical potential for magnon-polaron quasiparticles in collinear ferromagnets (FMs) and antiferromagnets (AFMs), valid when magnetoelastic scattering equilibrates magnons and acoustic phonons on timescales much shorter than those associated with quasiparticle-nonconserving relaxation processes. While our microscopic framework applies to generic magnon-phonon interactions, here we focus on high-symmetry crystals where the two transverse acoustic modes form a degenerate doublet. This doublet can combine into circularly polarized phonons, making the chiral selectivity of the coupling manifest: the FM magnon mode hybridizes only with the co-rotating phonon, whereas in collinear AFMs each magnon branch of opposite handedness couples to the phonon of the same chirality. We show that, in both FM and AFM systems, the nonequilibrium magnon-polaron gas is governed by a single chemical potential conjugate to the conserved axial angular momentum. In FMs, the two hybrid branches in the co-rotating sector share this chemical potential, weighted by their magnonic fractions; in AFMs, the four magnon-polaron branches split into two chiral sectors that carry opposite angular momenta and couple with opposite sign to the same chemical potential. Building on this microscopic thermodynamic framework, we formulate a Boltzmann transport theory for magnon-polarons and derive compact expressions for angular-momentum and heat currents that interpolate continuously to the decoupled regime and reproduce the phenomenological magnon-polaron transport framework underlying previous spin Seebeck analyses.

140

交错磁性诱导的层霍尔效应#

Layer Hall effect induced by altermagnetism
📚 arXiv👤 Fang Qin, Rui Chen📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地利用d波交错磁体的近邻效应，在铁磁拓扑绝缘体中实现了无外磁场、净霍尔电导为零的层霍尔效应，并通过Néel矢量取向实现与量子化Chern绝缘态的可控切换，为低能耗自旋电子器件和拓扑量子计算
该研究提出通过d波交错磁体近邻在铁磁拓扑绝缘体Bi₂Se₃中实现层霍尔效应的方案。当顶层和底层表面附近放置反平行Néel矢量的交错磁体时，产生净霍尔电导为零的层霍尔效应；平行Néel矢量则导致量子化Chern绝缘态。该效应在垂直电场下变得可观测。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究提出通过d波交错磁体近邻在铁磁拓扑绝缘体Bi₂Se₃中实现层霍尔效应的方案。当顶层和底层表面附近放置反平行Néel矢量的交错磁体时，产生净霍尔电导为零的层霍尔效应；平行Néel矢量则导致量子化Chern绝缘态。该效应在垂直电场下变得可观测。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.03937v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In this work, we propose a scheme to realize the layer Hall effect in the ferromagnetic topological insulator Bi₂Se₃ via proximity to d-wave altermagnets. We show that an altermagnet and an in-plane magnetic field applied near one surface gap the corresponding Dirac cone, yielding an altermagnet-induced half-quantized Hall effect. When altermagnets with antiparallel Néel vectors are placed near the top and bottom surfaces, giving rise to the layer Hall effect with vanishing net Hall conductance, i.e., the altermagnet-induced layer Hall effect. In contrast, altermagnets with parallel Néel vectors lead to a quantized Chern insulating state, i.e., the altermagnet-induced anomalous Hall effect. We further analyze the dependence of the Hall conductance on the orientation of the in-plane magnetic field and demonstrate that the layer Hall effect becomes observable under a perpendicular electric field. Our results establish a route to engineer altermagnet-induced topological phases in ferromagnetic topological insulators.

141

WSe₂与WTe₂体相固溶体中缺陷诱导的多铁性#

Defect-induced multiferroicity in bulk solid solutions of WSe₂ and WTe₂
📚 arXiv👤 H. Rojas-Páez, G. Villabón-Linares, J. Pazos, E. Ramos, R. Moreno, O. Herrera-Sandoval, J. A. Galvis, P. Giraldo-Gallo📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在WSe₂-WTe₂体相固溶体中通过调控Te组分和硫族缺陷浓度，实现了结构相变、铁电性与铁磁性的协同调控，并在特定组分区域获得多铁态共存，为二维材料的多功能器件设计提供了新范式。
该工作研究了化学气相输运合成的W(Se₁₋ₓTeₓ)₂₍₁₋δ₎体相固溶体单晶的结构、磁性和铁电性质随Te浓度x和硫族缺陷分数δ的演变。X射线衍射与拉曼光谱揭示随x增加晶格膨胀和对称性降低，在临界组分xc≈18%处发生2H至1Td结构转变；压电力显微镜在近化学计量比（δ<5%）区域识别压电性，在缺陷富集区（δ>20%）发现可切换铁电性，磁测量显示相应从顺磁到铁磁行为的转变，特定组分区域实现多铁态共存。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究了化学气相输运合成的W(Se₁₋ₓTeₓ)₂₍₁₋δ₎体相固溶体单晶的结构、磁性和铁电性质随Te浓度x和硫族缺陷分数δ的演变。X射线衍射与拉曼光谱揭示随x增加晶格膨胀和对称性降低，在临界组分xc≈18%处发生2H至1Td结构转变；压电力显微镜在近化学计量比（δ<5%）区域识别压电性，在缺陷富集区（δ>20%）发现可切换铁电性，磁测量显示相应从顺磁到铁磁行为的转变，特定组分区域实现多铁态共存。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.08515v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Transition metal dichalcogenides provide a versatile platform for tunable ferroic phenomena at the atomic scale owing to their reduced dimensionality. Here we investigate the structural, magnetic, and ferroelectric properties of bulk solid solution W(Se1-xTex)2(1-delta) single crystals synthesized by chemical vapor transport. The room temperature behavior is analyzed as a function of tellurium concentration (x) and chalcogen defect fraction (delta). X ray diffraction and Raman spectroscopy reveal lattice expansion and symmetry reduction with increasing x, consistent with a 2H to 1Td structural transition above a critical composition xc about 18 percent. Piezoresponse force microscopy identifies piezoelectricity near stoichiometric compositions (delta less than 5 percent) and switchable ferroelectricity in the chalcogen deficient regime (delta greater than 20 percent). Magnetometry measurements show a corresponding evolution from paramagnetic to ferromagnetic behavior with increasing delta. Near stoichiometric Te poor samples exhibit piezoelectric and paramagnetic responses, whereas multiferroic states characterized by the coexistence of ferroelectric and ferromagnetic responses emerge at high vacancy concentrations. The performed characterizations indicate that x primarily governs structural symmetry, while delta controls the emergence of both ferromagnetic and ferroelectric responses. These trends are summarized in a configurational phase diagram highlighting the cooperative influence of dopants and defects on ferroic behavior. Overall, controlled stoichiometry and vacancy engineering offer an effective strategy to tailor ferroic responses in transition metal dichalcogenides.

142

具有弱和强一级Néel-价键固体相变的SU(N)量子自旋模型#

SU(N) Quantum Spin Model with Weak and Strong First-Order Néel to Valence-Bond Solid Transitions
📚 arXiv👤 Ryan Flynn, Anders W. Sandvik📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示SU(N)自旋模型中Néel-价键固体相变的反常维度效应：增大N反而强化一级相变，颠覆常规认知。核心创新在于发现X项的U(1)涨落缺失是退禁闭临界性破缺的关键微观机制，为理解量子临界性的对称
该研究引入具有SU(N)对称性的二维X-Q量子自旋模型，其基态在Néel反铁磁与自发二聚化态之间发生相变。量子蒙特卡洛模拟显示N=2时接近退禁闭量子临界点，与J-Q模型类似；但出人意料的是N>2时相变变为强一级，违背增大N应减弱不连续性的常规预期。该行为归因于大N下主导相变的X项无法诱导二聚体图案的显著U(1)涨落，为支持退禁闭临界性的微观相互作用提供了新认识。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究引入具有SU(N)对称性的二维X-Q量子自旋模型，其基态在Néel反铁磁与自发二聚化态之间发生相变。量子蒙特卡洛模拟显示N=2时接近退禁闭量子临界点，与J-Q模型类似；但出人意料的是N>2时相变变为强一级，违背增大N应减弱不连续性的常规预期。该行为归因于大N下主导相变的X项无法诱导二聚体图案的显著U(1)涨落，为支持退禁闭临界性的微观相互作用提供了新认识。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.16106v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We introduce an SU(N) symmetric two-dimensional quantum spin model, the X-Q model, which hosts a ground state transition between Néel antiferromagnetic and spontaneously dimerized states. The Q terms are products of two adjacent singlet projectors on first-neighbor sites, as in the often studied J-Q model (where J is the Heisenberg exchange), while the X terms are products of two permutation operators on second-neighbor sites. Quantum Monte Carlo simulations reveal close proximity to a deconfined quantum critical point for N=2, as in the J-Q model. However, for N>2 the transformation becomes strongly first order, contrary to conventional expectations that increasing N should weaken discontinuities. We attribute this behavior to the inability of the X term, which dominates at the transition for large N, to induce significant U(1) fluctuations of the dimer pattern. These results provide insights into the microscopic interactions that support deconfined criticality.

143

Kitaev自旋液体中通量扇区的杂质四极矩局域探测#

Impurity quadrupole moments as local probes of flux sectors in the Kitaev spin liquid
📚 arXiv👤 Masahiro O. Takahashi, Wen-Han Kao, Satoshi Fujimoto, Natalia B. Perkins📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次提出利用磁性杂质四极矩作为Kitaev量子自旋液体中通量扇区的局域探针，通过SO(6)马约拉纳表示建立可观测的不连续跃迁信号，为实验上直接分辨涌现拓扑序提供了新途径，并揭示了杂质束缚π通量与
该研究证明磁性杂质的四极矩可作为量子自旋液体（QSL）中涌现通量构型的直接探测手段。采用SO(6)马约拉纳表示处理自旋-3/2杂质算符，结合杂质相关项的自洽平均场近似，表明基态通量扇区可通过通量扇区跃迁点处杂质四极矩的不连续跳变来识别。磁场下杂质间四极关联呈指数衰减，衰减速率敏感依赖于通量扇区；研究还讨论了杂质束缚π通量相对于模型参数和内部通量构型的稳定性，并与Lieb通量构型猜想建立联系。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究证明磁性杂质的四极矩可作为量子自旋液体（QSL）中涌现通量构型的直接探测手段。采用SO(6)马约拉纳表示处理自旋-3/2杂质算符，结合杂质相关项的自洽平均场近似，表明基态通量扇区可通过通量扇区跃迁点处杂质四极矩的不连续跳变来识别。磁场下杂质间四极关联呈指数衰减，衰减速率敏感依赖于通量扇区；研究还讨论了杂质束缚π通量相对于模型参数和内部通量构型的稳定性，并与Lieb通量构型猜想建立联系。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.23145v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Emergent fluxes play a central role in the low-energy properties of quantum spin liquids (QSLs), where they encode the underlying gauge structure and fractionalization of spins. Here, we show that the quadrupole moment of magnetic impurities provides a direct probe of these flux configurations in QSLs. Employing the SO(6) Majorana representation for spin-3/2 impurity operators in the isotropic Kitaev spin liquid together with a self-consistent mean-field approximation for impurity-related terms, we show that the ground-state flux sector can be identified by discontinuous jumps of the impurity quadrupole moment at the flux sector transition points. We also demonstrate that the quadrupole correlations between impurities under a magnetic field exhibit exponential decay, with decay rates that depend sensitively on the flux sector. Furthermore, we discuss the stability of pi fluxes bound to impurities with respect to model parameters and internal flux configurations, and relate our findings to Lieb's conjecture on flux configurations. These results establish the quadrupole moments of magnetic impurities as a sensitive tool to study fractionalized excitations and flux physics in Kitaev magnets.

144

拓扑阻挫与石墨烯磁子学#

On topological frustration and graphene magnonics
📚 arXiv👤 Vasil A. Saroka📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次将图论拓扑阻挫从离散网络拓展至二维连续体系，通过石墨烯纳米网构建本征完全平坦带，实现反铁磁基态与混合自旋波激发，为有机自旋电子器件的近室温、低功耗、超快操控开辟全新材料平台。
该工作揭示了蜂窝晶格有限片段上的图论拓扑阻挫在二维体系中持续存在，导致费米能级处出现完全平坦的电子能带。基于石墨烯单层纳米网可系统构建此类终极平坦带体系，其倾向于反铁磁有序并表现出混合自旋波激发（弱铁磁与强反铁磁特征混合），为近室温工作的低功耗、紧凑型超快有机自旋电子学提供了新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作揭示了蜂窝晶格有限片段上的图论拓扑阻挫在二维体系中持续存在，导致费米能级处出现完全平坦的电子能带。基于石墨烯单层纳米网可系统构建此类终极平坦带体系，其倾向于反铁磁有序并表现出混合自旋波激发（弱铁磁与强反铁磁特征混合），为近室温工作的低功耗、紧凑型超快有机自旋电子学提供了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.01227v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The graph-theoretic topological frustration is a peculiar situation on a finite piece of the honeycomb lattice that prevents a full pairwise coupling of the lattice sites via nearest neighbor links, even when the total number of sites is an even number. This type of frustration is inherent for organic molecules that are classified as concealed non-Kekulean hydrocarbons, representing peculiar diradicals. Here we show that this topological frustration persists in 2D systems based on honeycomb lattice. Such systems exhibit fully flat electronic energy bands located at the Fermi level. Therefore, 2D ultimately flat bands can be systematically and predictably constructed for graphene monolayer nanomeshes. These systems are prone to antiferromagnetic ordering and hybrid spin-wave excitations mixing weak ferromagnetic and strong antiferromagnetic features, which could pave the way towards low-power, compact, and ultrafast organic spintronics with near room-temperature operation.

145

多畴尖晶石材料显微分析的晶体学挑战#

Crystallographic Challenges in Microscopy of Multidomain Spinel Materials
📚 arXiv👤 Ninon Scherz, Shashwat Anand, Colin Ophus, Tucker Holstun, Mary Scott, Tara P. Mishra, Gerbrand Ceder📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将电子显微模拟与理论分析结合，系统分类了δ-DRX尖晶石八种畴变体的四种界面傅里叶滤波特征，并揭示[110]带轴下特定反相界的"隐形"效应，为多畴尖晶石材料的原子尺度精准表征提供了关键晶
该研究评估了STEM-HAADF成像及傅里叶滤波在表征δ-DRX尖晶石畴及其反相界中的应用，这些结构特征对材料的电化学性能至关重要。基于电子显微模拟和δ-DRX结构组成的理论认识，发现八种不同变体间的畴界面可归为四种傅里叶滤波轮廓，其中一种在[110]优选带轴下会使边界在原子分辨电镜中不可探测。该工作揭示了原子分辨表征多畴尖晶石材料时的晶体学复杂性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究评估了STEM-HAADF成像及傅里叶滤波在表征δ-DRX尖晶石畴及其反相界中的应用，这些结构特征对材料的电化学性能至关重要。基于电子显微模拟和δ-DRX结构组成的理论认识，发现八种不同变体间的畴界面可归为四种傅里叶滤波轮廓，其中一种在[110]优选带轴下会使边界在原子分辨电镜中不可探测。该工作揭示了原子分辨表征多畴尖晶石材料时的晶体学复杂性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17561v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Electron microscopy techniques are instrumental in the characterization of energy storage materials, with atomic resolution images providing the detailed structural features that are needed to understand their properties. Atomically resolved electron microscopy techniques have been routinely used to study the microstructure in high performing Mn-based oxide cathodes, which often contain spinel-like ordering. Here, we evaluate STEM-HAADF imaging and subsequent Fourier filtering as tools for characterizing δ-DRX spinel domains and their antiphase boundaries, which play a central role in the material's electrochemical performance. Using electron microscopy simulations and recent theoretical insight into the structural makeup of δ-DRX, we attempt to characterize the crystallographic spinel variants which occur in its multi-domain structure. We show that each domain interface, arising from pairings among eight distinct variants, can be categorized into one of four Fourier filtered profiles, one of which leaves the boundary undetectable in atomically resolved electron microscopy when viewed along the preferred [110] zone axis. Our results also suggest that the appearance of seemingly disordered or layered-like regions might actually arise from low energy domain boundaries which are slanted relative to the [110] viewing direction. Our findings highlight the need for careful interpretation of atomic-resolution micrographs of phase transitions, where local reordering drives transformations from higher to lower symmetry structures while maintaining lattice coherence.

Racetrack Computing with a Topological Boundary Ratchet
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.👤 Parisa Omidvar, Markus Bestler, Sima Zahedi Fard, Oded Zilberberg, and Marc Serra-Garcia📅 2026-04-21⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作核心创新在于以拓扑边界棘轮机制调和了信息非易失存储与移动处理的矛盾，将多稳序参量的空间编码与拓扑保护的定向输运相结合；意义在于为磁存储器件的片上信息处理与高效读出提供了无需外场驱动的全新物理方案
该工作利用多稳序参量在空间域中编码非易失信息，并通过拓扑边界棘轮机制解决信息稳定性与移动处理需求之间的固有矛盾。该方案为磁存储器件中的信息处理与读出提供了新途径，详情需查阅原文。

光激发重塑反铁磁体中的自旋波谱#

Optical excitations reshape the spin-wave spectrum in antiferromagnets
📚 Nature Physics📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在倾斜反铁磁体DyFeO₃中实现飞秒光抽运对自旋波谱的可逆重塑，而非破坏磁有序。其核心创新在于利用电荷转移激发调控磁交换作用，为超快、低能耗的反铁磁自旋电子器件及磁子晶体设计开辟了新途径。
电荷转移激发定义了许多绝缘体的光学带隙，同时也对反铁磁体的磁交换有贡献。在倾斜反铁磁体DyFeO₃中，对这些跃迁进行飞秒光学抽运会重塑自旋波谱——即定义反铁磁体动力学的集体自旋激发集合——而不会破坏长程有序。Baltz, V. 等. 反铁磁自旋电子学. 现代物理评论 90, 015005 (2018)。这篇综述文章概述了反铁磁自旋电子学领域的进展。文章ADS谷歌学术 Khomskii, D. I. 过渡金属化合物（剑桥大学出版社，20…

中文摘要

电荷转移激发定义了许多绝缘体的光学带隙，同时也对反铁磁体的磁交换有贡献。在倾斜反铁磁体DyFeO₃中，对这些跃迁进行飞秒光学抽运会重塑自旋波谱——即定义反铁磁体动力学的集体自旋激发集合——而不会破坏长程有序。Baltz, V. 等. 反铁磁自旋电子学. 现代物理评论 90, 015005 (2018)。这篇综述文章概述了反铁磁自旋电子学领域的进展。文章ADS谷歌学术 Khomskii, D. I. 过渡金属化合物（剑桥大学出版社，2014）。该书解释了反铁磁交换。Caviglia, A. D. 等. 关联电子绝缘体NdNiO₃中光致磁有序熔化. 物理评论 B 88, 220401(R) (2013)。该论文报道了光激发下磁有序的破坏。文章ADS谷歌学术 Chumak, A. V. 等. 一种电流控制的动态磁子晶体. 物理学杂志D：应用物理 42, 205005 (2009)。该论文提出了铁磁磁子晶体的设计。文章ADS谷歌学术 Hortensius, J. R. 等. 反铁磁体中的相干自旋波输运. 自然·物理 17, 1001–1006 (2021)。该论文报道了反铁磁体中传播相干磁子的光学激发与探测。文章谷歌学术 下载参考文献 出版者注 施普林格·自然对已出版地图和机构隶属关系中的管辖权主张保持中立。 这是以下论文的摘要：Radovskaia, V. 等. 绝缘反铁磁体中磁子谱的光工程调控. 自然·物理 https://doi.org/10.1038/s41567-026-03230-6 (2026)。 重印与许可 光学激发重塑反铁磁体中的自旋波谱. 自然·物理 (2026)。https://doi.org/10.1038/s41567-026-03231-5 下载引用 发表日期：2026年4月20日 正式版本：2026年4月20日 DOI：https://doi.org/10.1038/s41567-026-03231-5 您与以下链接的分享对象将能够阅读此内容： 抱歉，本文目前暂无可共享链接。 由施普林格·自然SharedIt内容共享计划提供

English Abstract

Charge-transfer excitations, which define the optical bandgap in many insulators, also contribute to magnetic exchange in antiferromagnets. Femtosecond optical pumping of these transitions in canted antiferromagnet DyFeO3reshapes the spin-wave spectrum — the set of collective spin excitations that define the dynamics of the antiferromagnet — without destroying the long-range order. Baltz, V. et al. Antiferromagnetic spintronics.Rev. Mod. Phys.90, 015005 (2018).This review article outlines progress in the field of AFM spintronics. ArticleADSGoogle Scholar Khomskii, D. Photoinduced melting of magnetic order in the correlated electron insulator NdNiO3.Phys. Rev. B88, 220401(R) (2013).This paper reports the destruction of magnetic order under photoexcitation. Phys.42, 205005 (2009).This paper presents the design of a ferromagnetic magnonics crystal. ArticleADSGoogle Scholar Hortensius, J. R. et al. Coherent spin-wave transport in an antiferromagnet.Nat. Phys.17, 1001–1006 (2021).This paper reports the optical excitation and detection of propagating coherent magnons in an AFM. 基于mumax+的交错磁体模拟#

Simulating altermagnets using mumax+
📚 arXiv👤 Lars Moreels, Nicolai Bechler, Bartel Van Waeyenberge, Jonathan Leliaert, Jan Masell📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作在开源微磁学软件mumax+中首创性地实现了d波交错磁体的模拟功能，通过面向对象设计扩展多子晶格框架，解决了交错磁体中自旋-晶格耦合与静磁场计算的难题。该工具为探索交错磁体中新奇拓扑孤子（如斯格
该工作展示了如何在微磁学模拟软件mumax+中实现d波交错磁体的模拟。通过新增交错磁体磁化类，重现了布洛赫畴壁中奈尔矢量和净磁化线分布的解析解，并研究了磁子色散关系及其对交换作用各向异性的依赖，以及自旋转移力矩驱动下奈尔斯格明子的运动。该功能通过扩展原有反铁磁模拟代码实现，mumax+的面向对象设计保证了多子晶格系统中静磁场的正确计算。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作展示了如何在微磁学模拟软件mumax+中实现d波交错磁体的模拟。通过新增交错磁体磁化类，重现了布洛赫畴壁中奈尔矢量和净磁化线分布的解析解，并研究了磁子色散关系及其对交换作用各向异性的依赖，以及自旋转移力矩驱动下奈尔斯格明子的运动。该功能通过扩展原有反铁磁模拟代码实现，mumax+的面向对象设计保证了多子晶格系统中静磁场的正确计算。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15454v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In this paper, we demonstrate how altermagnets can be simulated in the recently released micromagnetic simulation package mumax+. We have added a new magnet class for d-wave altermagnets and demonstrate how mumax+ is able to reproduce the analytical solutions for line profiles of the Néel vector and net magnetization for a Bloch domain wall. Next, we show simulation results of the magnon dispersion relation and its dependence on the anisotropic nature of the exchange interaction. Finally, we study the motion of a Néel skyrmion by applying a spin transfer torque. This new feature was implemented by extending the pre-existing code base for antiferromagnetic simulations. The object-oriented design of mumax+ allows for a correct calculation of the magnetostatic field in multi-sublattice systems, a feature that many other micromagnetic simulators lack.

149

外延Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂铁电器件中忆阻输运机制的面积选择性调控#

Device-area selection of memristive transport regimes in epitaxial Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂-based ferroelectric devices
📚 arXiv👤 Priscila A. Tapia Presas, Lautaro Galarregui, Wilson Román Acevedo, Myriam H. Aguirre, José Santiso, Sylvia Matzen, Beatriz Noheda, Diego Rubi📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示了外延Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂铁电器件中忆阻输运机制随器件面积发生定性转变的物理规律，建立了统一的统计成核模型定量描述隧穿-导电通道转变的临界尺度。这一发现为铁电忆阻器的高密度集成提供了
该研究结合结构、铁电及忆阻表征与跨三个数量级器件面积的统计分析，探究了外延Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂/La₀.₆₇Sr₀.₃₃MnO₃异质结中极化调制电阻变化与缺陷介导电输运的竞争机制。发现了两种具有相反电阻-电压手性的忆阻态：小面积器件呈现与面积成反比的低阻态（符合隧穿输运），大面积器件则表现出与面积无关的局域导电通道特征。统计成核模型定量描述了该行为，得到转变特征面积A*≈10³ μm²，且该转变与大面积器件中铁电唤醒效应的起始相关。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究结合结构、铁电及忆阻表征与跨三个数量级器件面积的统计分析，探究了外延Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂/La₀.₆₇Sr₀.₃₃MnO₃异质结中极化调制电阻变化与缺陷介导电输运的竞争机制。发现了两种具有相反电阻-电压手性的忆阻态：小面积器件呈现与面积成反比的低阻态（符合隧穿输运），大面积器件则表现出与面积无关的局域导电通道特征。统计成核模型定量描述了该行为，得到转变特征面积A*≈10³ μm²，且该转变与大面积器件中铁电唤醒效应的起始相关。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15486v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Ferroelectric memristive devices based on hafnia are promising systems for neuromorphic electronics, yet the interplay between polarization-modulated resistive changes and defect-mediated transport often leads to complex and debated switching mechanisms. Here, we investigate this competition in epitaxial Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂/La₀.₆₇Sr₀.₃₃MnO₃ heterostructures with Pt top electrodes by combining structural, ferroelectric, and memristive characterization with a statistical analysis across a broad range of device areas spanning three orders of magnitude. We identify two distinct memristive regimes with opposite resistance--voltage chiralities. Small devices exhibit a low-resistance state that scales inversely with area, consistent with area-distributed tunneling transport, while larger devices display an area-independent resistance indicative of localized conductive channels. A statistical nucleation model quantitatively captures this behavior and yields a crossover characteristic area A^* approx 10³~μm². This crossover also correlates with the onset of ferroelectric wake-up in larger devices, linking conductive-channel nucleation and oxygen-vacancy redistribution within a unified physical picture. These results establish lateral device size as a key parameter controlling the dominant transport mechanism in epitaxial hafnia-based devices.

150

反铁磁均匀自旋-1/2链化合物CuSb₂O₆的非弹性中子散射研究#

Inelastic neutron scattering study on the AFM uniform spin-1/2 chain compound CuSb2O6
📚 arXiv👤 Masashi Hasea, Minoru Soda, Takatsugu Masuda, Shinichi Itoh, Tetsuya Yokoo📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次通过非弹性中子散射在CuSb₂O₆中观测到由微小伊辛各向异性（DJ/J≈1%）打开的1.8 meV自旋能隙，并证实其符合AFM均匀XXZ链模型，为低维量子磁性材料中各向异性与元激发的关联提供
该工作对反铁磁均匀自旋-1/2链化合物CuSb₂O₆粉末样品进行了非弹性中子散射实验。在奈尔温度以下（2.5 K），磁激发出现在1.8–13 meV能量范围，能隙值（1.8 meV）与比热估算值（1.51 meV）接近；高于奈尔温度（12.5 K）时激发变为无能隙。该能隙源于自旋波激发中的各向异性，最强激发位于对应0.66 nm的波矢处，与理论预期的Cu对（0.65562 nm）最强交换作用一致。实验结果可用AFM均匀XXZ链模型（J…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对反铁磁均匀自旋-1/2链化合物CuSb₂O₆粉末样品进行了非弹性中子散射实验。在奈尔温度以下（2.5 K），磁激发出现在1.8–13 meV能量范围，能隙值（1.8 meV）与比热估算值（1.51 meV）接近；高于奈尔温度（12.5 K）时激发变为无能隙。该能隙源于自旋波激发中的各向异性，最强激发位于对应0.66 nm的波矢处，与理论预期的Cu对（0.65562 nm）最强交换作用一致。实验结果可用AFM均匀XXZ链模型（Jab = 6.437 meV，DJab = 0.063 meV）解释，1.8 meV能隙由小伊辛各向异性（DJab/Jab = 0.0098）导致。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15608v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We carried out inelastic neutron scattering experiments on a powdered sample of the antiferromagnetic (AFM) uniform spin-1/2 chain compound CuSb2O6.The magnetic excitations appear in the energy range of 1.8 to 13 meV at 2.5 K below the AFM transition temperature (TN = 8.7 K).The gap value (1.8 meV) is close to that evaluated from the specific heat (1.51 meV). The excitations at 12.5 K (> TN) appear gapless. Thus, the 1.8 meV gap is caused by some anisotropy in spin-wave excitations. The gap excitations are strongest at 0.48 corresponding to a length of 0.66 nm. This result is consistent with the theoretical one that the interaction in a Cu pair with a length of 0.65562 nm (Jab) is strongest. The magnetic excitations can be explained by the AFM uniform XXZ chain with Jab = 6.437 meV and DJab = 0.063 meV. The 1.8 meV gap is caused by the small Ising anisotropy (DJab/Jab = 0.0098).

151

量子磁体Mn₃Si₂Te₆中电感与忆阻的共存#

Inductance Meets Memory in the Quantum Magnet Mn3Si2Te6
📚 arXiv👤 Tristan R. Cao, Gabriel Schebel, Arabella Quane, Hengdi Zhao, Yu Zhang, Feng Ye, Longji Cui, Gang Cao📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在单一量子材料中实现电感与忆阻的共存，核心创新在于揭示手性轨道电流的非平衡重构可同时编码动态响应与信息存储两种功能。其意义在于突破传统电子元件功能分离的局限，为开发可重构、低功耗的新型电子器
该研究在亚铁磁体Mn₃Si₂Te₆单晶中展示了手性轨道电流的非平衡重构可同时产生涌现电感和非易失忆阻。低频c轴磁场下，相干轨道电流畴产生稳健的顺时针感性I-V回线；高频低场下，电流驱动的一阶重构导致不完全反转和亚稳态俘获，产生内禀电动势和零电流下的有限剩余电压。这些结果确立了轨道电流作为可同时编码响应和记忆功能的量子态变量，为可重构低功耗电子系统开辟了新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在亚铁磁体Mn₃Si₂Te₆单晶中展示了手性轨道电流的非平衡重构可同时产生涌现电感和非易失忆阻。低频c轴磁场下，相干轨道电流畴产生稳健的顺时针感性I-V回线；高频低场下，电流驱动的一阶重构导致不完全反转和亚稳态俘获，产生内禀电动势和零电流下的有限剩余电压。这些结果确立了轨道电流作为可同时编码响应和记忆功能的量子态变量，为可重构低功耗电子系统开辟了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15635v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Orbital degrees of freedom offer a largely untapped route to emergent dynamical phenomena in correlated quantum materials. However, it remains unclear whether collective orbital states can intrinsically generate both reactive and memory functionalities in a bulk system. Here we show that in the ferrimagnet Mn3Si2Te6, nonequilibrium reconfiguration of chiral orbital currents produces both emergent inductance and nonvolatile memristance as intrinsic properties of a single crystal. At low frequency and under a magnetic field along the c axis, coherent orbital-current domains generate robust clockwise inductive I-V loops. At higher frequency and low field, current-driven first-order reconfiguration leads to incomplete reversal and metastable trapping, producing an intrinsic electromotive force and a finite remanent voltage at zero current. These results establish orbital currents as a class of quantum state variables that encode both reactive and memory functionalities, opening routes toward intrinsically reconfigurable and energy-efficient electronic systems.

152

全补偿与未补偿亚铁磁铁谷半导体#

Fully compensated and uncompensated ferrimagnetic ferrovalley semiconductors
📚 arXiv👤 Weifeng Xie, Libo Wang, Yunliang Yue, Xiong Xu, Huayan Xia, Hui Wang📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次建立交错磁体-亚铁磁体相变与谷极化的定量关联，提出"净磁矩-谷极化正相关"机制；通过设计未补偿亚铁磁单层VCrSeTeO，突破性地实现超400 meV内禀谷极化，并预言谷内可反转的反常谷霍尔
该工作阐明了单轴应变驱动下交错磁体向全补偿亚铁磁体转变的机制，发现伴随的非相对论谷极化与相反自旋子晶格间磁原子的净磁矩正相关。提出未补偿亚铁磁单层VCrSeTeO以实现大内禀谷极化，自旋-轨道耦合在单轴应变下可进一步将谷极化提升至超过400 meV。此外，揭示了亚铁磁VCrSeTeO中独特的反常谷霍尔效应——同一谷内谷霍尔电压发生反转。该工作为基于交错磁体衍生亚铁磁铁谷半导体的谷电子学应用提供了理论指导。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作阐明了单轴应变驱动下交错磁体向全补偿亚铁磁体转变的机制，发现伴随的非相对论谷极化与相反自旋子晶格间磁原子的净磁矩正相关。提出未补偿亚铁磁单层VCrSeTeO以实现大内禀谷极化，自旋-轨道耦合在单轴应变下可进一步将谷极化提升至超过400 meV。此外，揭示了亚铁磁VCrSeTeO中独特的反常谷霍尔效应——同一谷内谷霍尔电压发生反转。该工作为基于交错磁体衍生亚铁磁铁谷半导体的谷电子学应用提供了理论指导。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15640v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets (AMs) and fully compensated ferrimagnets (FC-FIMs) are emerging classes of magnetic materials that combine the advantages of antiferromagnets and ferromagnets. Here, we elucidate the mechanism behind the uniaxial strain-driven transformation from AM to FC-FIM and find that the accompanying non-relativistic valley polarization is positively correlated with the net magnetic moment between magnetic atoms in opposite spin sublattices. We then propose an uncompensated ferrimagnetic monolayer VCrSeTeO to achieve large intrinsic valley polarization. Spin-orbit coupling (SOC) is shown to further increase the valley polarization to over 400 meV under uniaxial strains and the reason is explained in terms of SOC perturbation theorem. Furthermore, we reveal a distinctive anomalous valley Hall effect in which the valley Hall voltage is reversed within the same valley in ferrimagnet VCrSeTeO. This work proposes a strategy for realizing giant valley polarization and provides theoretical guidance for the application of ferrimagnetic ferrovalley semiconductors derived from altermagnets in valleytronics.

153

手性磁体中斯格明子ium的电流驱动动力学与失稳路径#

Current-Induced Dynamics and Instability Pathways of Skyrmioniums in Chiral Magnets
📚 arXiv👤 Kaito Nakamura, Yuka Kotorii, Andrey O. Leonov📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示零拓扑荷斯格明子ium的霍尔效应起源，打破"拓扑荷决定横向运动"的传统认知；建立内禀结构-非平衡响应的关联框架，为拓扑磁超材料的高密度、低能耗信息存储与逻辑器件设计提供新自由度。
该工作系统研究了手性磁性薄膜中斯格明子ium的电流驱动动力学、转变与失稳行为，涵盖孤立对象及集体态形成的超材料。基于广义Thiele方程的解析描述与微磁学模拟相结合，阐明了斯格明子ium内部结构对其非平衡响应的调控机制。尽管总拓扑荷为零，斯格明子ium在电流作用下仍表现出有限横向速度（斯格明子ium霍尔效应），源于内核斯格明子与外环正负拓扑贡献的不平衡。更高电流密度下，斯格明子ium经历多种失稳：伸长、塌缩为斯格明子、转变为拓扑平庸液…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作系统研究了手性磁性薄膜中斯格明子ium的电流驱动动力学、转变与失稳行为，涵盖孤立对象及集体态形成的超材料。基于广义Thiele方程的解析描述与微磁学模拟相结合，阐明了斯格明子ium内部结构对其非平衡响应的调控机制。尽管总拓扑荷为零，斯格明子ium在电流作用下仍表现出有限横向速度（斯格明子ium霍尔效应），源于内核斯格明子与外环正负拓扑贡献的不平衡。更高电流密度下，斯格明子ium经历多种失稳：伸长、塌缩为斯格明子、转变为拓扑平庸液滴或膨胀等。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15692v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a comprehensive study of current-driven dynamics, transformations, and instabilities of skyrmioniums in chiral magnetic films, considering both isolated objects and collective states forming skyrmionium-based meta-matter. Using micromagnetic simulations combined with an analytical description based on the generalized Thiele equation, we clarify how the internal structure of skyrmioniums governs their nonequilibrium response to electric currents. Despite having zero total topological charge, skyrmioniums exhibit a finite transverse velocity under applied currents. We show that this skyrmionium Hall effect originates from an imbalance between positive and negative topological contributions of the inner skyrmion and surrounding ring, which typically occupy different areas. Current-induced deformations further enhance this imbalance, yielding Hall angles comparable to those of skyrmions. At higher current densities, skyrmioniums undergo distinct instabilities depending on magnetic field and uniaxial anisotropy, including elongation, collapse into a skyrmion, transformation into a topologically trivial droplet, and expansion into stripe textures. We map these regimes in current--field and current--anisotropy phase diagrams and resolve their microscopic pathways via the evolution of topological charge and local rotational measures. Beyond isolated textures, mixed skyrmion--skyrmionium lattices display rich collective dynamics, including elastic transport, polymorphic transitions, soliton exchange, and stripe formation. Pulsed currents provide additional control, enabling access to regimes beyond continuous driving. Our results establish skyrmioniums and their meta-matter as tunable nonequilibrium systems probing the topological energy landscape far from equilibrium.

154

原子级薄层反铁磁体中大且栅压可调各向异性磁电阻的持续存在#

Persistence of large and gate-tunable anisotropic magnetoresistance in an atomically thin antiferromagnet
📚 arXiv👤 Cheol-Yeon Cheon, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Alberto F. Morpurgo, Dmitry Lebedev📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：在原子级薄层NiPS₃中实现栅压可调各向异性磁电阻，首次将奈尔矢量电学读出推进至1.3 nm极限。通过双器件构型揭示低/高电荷密度区的主导机制差异，实现磁电阻幅度与符号的全电控，为超薄反铁磁存储与存算
该工作在二维范德华反铁磁半导体NiPS₃中实现了低至1.3 nm（两层）的奈尔矢量电学读出。利用自旋翻转介导的奈尔矢量旋转，结合晶体管和隧穿结两种器件构型，识别出分别在低和高电荷密度下占主导的两类各向异性磁电阻贡献。通过栅压实现了对这些贡献的完全调控，使磁电阻的幅度和符号均可调。该结果确立了半导体性vdW反铁磁体作为研究超薄膜极限下AMR的丰富平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在二维范德华反铁磁半导体NiPS₃中实现了低至1.3 nm（两层）的奈尔矢量电学读出。利用自旋翻转介导的奈尔矢量旋转，结合晶体管和隧穿结两种器件构型，识别出分别在低和高电荷密度下占主导的两类各向异性磁电阻贡献。通过栅压实现了对这些贡献的完全调控，使磁电阻的幅度和符号均可调。该结果确立了半导体性vdW反铁磁体作为研究超薄膜极限下AMR的丰富平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15793v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Anisotropic magnetoresistance (AMR) offers a robust electrical readout of antiferromagnetic (AFM) states, playing a central role in the rapidly advancing field of AFM spintronics. Despite its great versatility, electrical probing of the Néel vector via AMR remains challenging in the ultrathin limit due to interface disorder and reduced dimensionality. Here, we demonstrate electrical readout of the Néel vector down to 1.3 nm (two layers) in the two-dimensional van der Waals (vdW) AFM semiconductor NiPS3. Leveraging spin-flop-mediated rotation of the Néel vector and using both transistor and tunnel-junction device geometries, we identify two distinct AMR contributions in NiPS3, that dominate at low and high charge densities, respectively. We achieve full gate control over these contributions, enabling tunability of both the magnitude and sign of magnetoresistance. Our results establish semiconducting vdW antiferromagnets as a rich platform for studying AMR in the ultrathin limit, opening new avenues for multifunctional AFM spintronic devices.

155

通过轨道杂化相实验量化电子对称性破缺#

Experimental quantification of electronic symmetry breaking through orbital hybridization phase
📚 arXiv👤 Shungo Aoyagi, Shunsuke Kitou, Yuiga Nakamura, Taka-hisa Arima, Naoya Kanazawa📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文提出从价电子密度各向异性量化电子对称性破缺的实验新范式，核心创新在于建立轨道杂化相与局域对称性的唯一对应关系，并以同步辐射衍射直接测定该相位，定义电子手性量ḩi。该方法突破了传统对称性分析仅依赖结
该工作提出从价电子密度分布各向异性量化电子对称性破缺的实验框架，证明在局域对称性约束下可唯一确定轨道杂化相。作者将该方法应用于结构手性过渡金属硅化物，利用同步辐射X射线衍射测定杂化相位，进而定义电子手性量ḩi并理论验证其物理意义，为手性等缺乏定量描述符的对称性破缺类型提供了新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出从价电子密度分布各向异性量化电子对称性破缺的实验框架，证明在局域对称性约束下可唯一确定轨道杂化相。作者将该方法应用于结构手性过渡金属硅化物，利用同步辐射X射线衍射测定杂化相位，进而定义电子手性量ḩi并理论验证其物理意义，为手性等缺乏定量描述符的对称性破缺类型提供了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15906v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Symmetry classification of crystal structures has been central to predicting physical properties of materials. While such structural classification identifies which physical responses are symmetry-allowed, the magnitudes of these responses are governed by the degree of symmetry breaking in the electronic state. However, a well-defined quantitative descriptor for the electronic symmetry breaking has been established only in limited cases such as electric polarization and magnetization. No analogous descriptor exists for most other types, including chirality. Here, we propose an experimental framework for quantifying electronic symmetry breaking from the anisotropy of valence electron density distribution. We show that the orbital hybridization phases governing this anisotropy can be uniquely determined under site symmetry constraints. Applying this framework to structurally chiral transition-metal silicides, we determine hybridization phases from their valence electron densities observed by synchrotron X-ray diffraction. From the obtained complex hybridization, we quantify an electronic chirality ḩi and theoretically demonstrate that it is directly proportional to circular dichroism, establishing ḩi as a predictive descriptor of chiral responses. This approach is systematically applicable to various point groups, offering a general route to quantifying electronic symmetry breaking and predicting associated physical properties.

156

关联Kagome超导体母相中的反铁磁二聚体#

Antiferromagnetic Dimers in the Parent Phase of a Correlated Kagome Superconductor
📚 arXiv👤 Yifan Wang, Chenchao Xu, Yi Liu, Jinke Bao, Jiayu Guo, Xiaoran Yang, Yuiga Nakamura, Hiroshi Fukui, Taishun Manjo, Daisuke Ishikawa, Alfred Q. R. Baron, Saizheng Cao, Rui Li, Zilong Li, Yanan Zhang, Ruihan Chen, Ming Shi, Huiqiu Yuan, Guanghan Cao, Chao Cao, Yu Song📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在Kagome超导体母相CsCr₃Sb₅中解析出4×1 CDW的原子结构，揭示其由反铁磁Cr二聚体与弱耦合Cr链构成。核心创新在于发现强一级CDW相变缺乏传统软模特征，提出涨落反铁磁二聚体可
该工作解析了CsCr₃Sb₅中4×1电荷密度波(CDW)态的晶体结构，发现其由Cr二聚体与Cr链组成。第一性原理计算表明二聚体内反铁磁交换作用占主导，而链内及二聚体-链耦合较弱。该CDW相变更为强一级相变，无明显软模或漫散射，暗示涨落的反铁磁二聚体可能在超导CsCr₃Sb₅的电子配对中起关键作用。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作解析了CsCr₃Sb₅中4×1电荷密度波(CDW)态的晶体结构，发现其由Cr二聚体与Cr链组成。第一性原理计算表明二聚体内反铁磁交换作用占主导，而链内及二聚体-链耦合较弱。该CDW相变更为强一级相变，无明显软模或漫散射，暗示涨落的反铁磁二聚体可能在超导CsCr₃Sb₅的电子配对中起关键作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15935v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Kagome metals are prone to charge-density wave (CDW), magnetic, and superconducting phases, with their flat electronic band conducive for correlated physics. In contrast to the weakly correlated AV₃Sb₅ (A = K, Rb, Cs) kagome metals with a 2×2 CDW, CsCr₃Sb₅ is a correlated metal with a flat band close to the Fermi level, and exhibits a 4×1 CDW intertwined with magnetic order. Under pressure, the intertwined orders are suppressed and give way to a dome of superconductivity that emerges from a non-Fermi liquid normal state. Here, we solve the crystal structure of the 4× 1 CDW state in CsCr₃Sb₅, and show it consists of Cr dimers separated by Cr chains. First-principles calculations show the dominant exchange interaction is antiferromagnetic within the dimers, while the intra-chain and dimer-chain couplings are much weaker. The CDW transition of CsCr₃Sb₅ is found to be more strongly first-order than those in AV₃Sb₅, without significant soft phonons or diffuse scattering above the CDW transition temperature. These findings suggest that fluctuating antiferromagnetic dimers may play a major role in the electron pairing of superconducting CsCr₃Sb₅.

157

涡旋中电荷密度波驱动的拓扑相变#

Charge Density Wave Driven Topological Phase Transition in Vortices
📚 arXiv👤 Zhenhua Zhu, Ziqiang Wang, Dong E. Liu📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地将电荷密度波相位作为拓扑调控自由度，揭示涡旋中心局域反演对称性破缺可诱导自旋三重态配对主导，实现无需精细调节的稳健拓扑相变，为量子计算中马约拉纳零能模的局域操控提供新途径。
该工作建立理论框架揭示条纹CDW相位如何调控磁涡旋的拓扑性质。作者提出两种机制：直接调制场景中CDW作为周期势场局域重整化能带参数，但需精细调节才能重现对称的节点/反节点趋势；反演对称性破缺场景中，钉扎于涡旋中心的CDW节点破坏局域反演对称性，允许自旋三重态配对成分混入，当该成分主导时可产生稳健的拓扑转变。CDW相位因而成为局域调控涡旋拓扑的可能手柄。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作建立理论框架揭示条纹CDW相位如何调控磁涡旋的拓扑性质。作者提出两种机制：直接调制场景中CDW作为周期势场局域重整化能带参数，但需精细调节才能重现对称的节点/反节点趋势；反演对称性破缺场景中，钉扎于涡旋中心的CDW节点破坏局域反演对称性，允许自旋三重态配对成分混入，当该成分主导时可产生稳健的拓扑转变。CDW相位因而成为局域调控涡旋拓扑的可能手柄。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15976v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The interplay between charge density waves (CDWs) and superconductivity is a central theme in quantum materials, yet how CDW phase textures govern vortex topology remains poorly understood. We develop a theoretical framework showing that the phase of a stripe CDW can switch a magnetic vortex between topological and trivial regimes. Motivated by recent experiments, we propose two candidate mechanisms enabling phase-controlled switching of vortex topology. In a direct-modulation scenario, the CDW acts as a periodic potential that locally renormalizes band parameters and can induce topological transitions, but it generally cannot reproduce the symmetric node/antinode trend without fine tuning. In contrast, in an inversion-symmetry-breaking (ISB) scenario, a CDW node pinned to the vortex center breaks local inversion and allows for the mixture of spin-triplet pairing of Cooper pairs, producing a robust topological transition when this component dominates. Our results suggests CDW phase as a possible local handle to tune and test vortex topology.

158

磁绝缘体中磁化动力学电学检测的歧义消解#

Disambiguating electrical detection of magnetization dynamics in magnetic insulators
📚 arXiv👤 Hanchen Wang, William Legrand, Shangyuan Wang, Davit Petrosyan, Hiroki Matsumoto, Richard Schlitz, Ka Shen, Pietro Gambardella📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次系统厘清磁绝缘体中自旋泵浦与ST-FMR两种机制的竞争关系，揭示信号符号反转的物理根源，建立统一解释框架，为磁绝缘体自旋电子学器件的可靠电学表征奠定理论基础。
该工作系统研究了重金属/磁绝缘体异质结构中自旋泵浦与自旋力矩铁磁共振(ST-FMR)的竞争效应，二者产生的电压信号符号相反易导致物理解释歧义。作者以Pt封装的铥铁石榴石和铋钇铁石榴石薄膜为对象，在非局域和局域器件中阐明自旋波特性、磁阻尼、磁场取向和器件几何如何调控信号符号与幅度，提供了统一解释磁绝缘体微波激发实验中电学检测信号的完整框架。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作系统研究了重金属/磁绝缘体异质结构中自旋泵浦与自旋力矩铁磁共振(ST-FMR)的竞争效应，二者产生的电压信号符号相反易导致物理解释歧义。作者以Pt封装的铥铁石榴石和铋钇铁石榴石薄膜为对象，在非局域和局域器件中阐明自旋波特性、磁阻尼、磁场取向和器件几何如何调控信号符号与幅度，提供了统一解释磁绝缘体微波激发实验中电学检测信号的完整框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15999v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Electrical detection of magnetization dynamics in magnetic insulators underpins both fundamental studies of magnon transport and the development of low-loss magnonic devices. In heavy-metal/magnetic-insulator heterostructures, spin pumping and spin-torque ferromagnetic resonance (ST-FMR) are widely used for this purpose and are often treated separately in different measurement geometries. In practice, the competition between these two effects gives rise to electrical voltage signals of opposite signs, which can lead to ambiguous interpretations of the underlying physics. Here, we show how to disambiguate their respective contributions and provide a framework for interpreting experiments involving microwave excitation of magnetic insulators and detection of magnetization dynamics via spin-charge conversion in heavy metals. We systematically investigate spin pumping and ST-FMR in nonlocal and local devices using Pt-capped thin films of thulium and bismuth-yttrium iron garnets. We show how spin-wave character, magnetic dissipation, magnetic field orientation and device geometry govern the sign and magnitude of the resulting signals. In several cases, the voltage generated by microwave excitation changes sign between an out-of-plane or in-plane magnetic configuration. We disentangle a contribution due to spin pumping, induced by exponentially decaying propagating spin waves, and a weakly distance-dependent contribution from ST-FMR, remotely induced by inductive coupling. We show that both the spin wave excitation profile across the film thickness and magnetic damping largely determine which of the two contributions dominates. Hence, the sign of the electrical signal cannot be uniquely assigned to the chirality of the magnon modes.

159

MgO:LN晶体中飞秒近红外激光体域制备过程中光致空间电荷场的形成#

Formation of photoinduced space-charge field during in-bulk domain creation by femtosecond NIR laser irradiation in MgO:LN crystals
📚 arXiv👤 I. A. Kipenko (Ural Federal University, Yekaterinburg, Russia), D. A. Zorikhin (Ural Federal University, Yekaterinburg, Russia), A. R. Akhmatkhanov (Ural Federal University, Yekaterinburg, Russia), V. Ya. Shur (Ural Federal University, Yekaterinburg, Russia)📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示飞秒激光在MgO:LN晶体中通过光折变效应诱导空间电荷场实现畴反转的物理机制，阐明了折射率改性与畴结构的本质区别及热稳定性差异，为三维非线性光子器件的精准激光写入提供了关键工艺依据。
该工作研究了MgO掺杂铌酸锂单晶体在近红外飞秒激光辐照下的畴反转过程，重点关注光致畴、微轨迹与折射率改性区的相对位置关系。发现畴包裹微轨迹并与透镜状折射率改性区部分相交；退火实验表明折射率改性源于光折变效应且不可逆消失，而微轨迹和畴保持不变，其消失机制为光致空间电荷场被体电导率增加所屏蔽。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究了MgO掺杂铌酸锂单晶体在近红外飞秒激光辐照下的畴反转过程，重点关注光致畴、微轨迹与折射率改性区的相对位置关系。发现畴包裹微轨迹并与透镜状折射率改性区部分相交；退火实验表明折射率改性源于光折变效应且不可逆消失，而微轨迹和畴保持不变，其消失机制为光致空间电荷场被体电导率增加所屏蔽。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16048v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We have studied the domain switching under NIR fs-laser irradiation in MgO:LN single crystals with special attention to the relative positions of the light-induced domains, microtracks and regions with modified refractive index in the vicinity of the focusing point. The optical imaging along X direction of the irradiated sample demonstrated the narrow microtracks and the lens-shaped regions ("lenses") located in the vicinity of the microtracks. The relative positions of light-induced microtracks, domains and lenses were revealed by overlapping of their images. We have found that the domain envelops the microtrack and partially intersects with the lens. The temperature stability of all light-induced objects during annealing was studied. It was shown that the local modification of the refractive index disappeared irreversibly while the microtrack and domain remain unchanged. The obtained local modification of the refractive index has been considered as a result of the photorefractive effect. The disappearance of the lens after annealing is caused by bulk screening of the photoinduced space-charge field by increased bulk conductivity. The generation of photovoltaic field by tightly focused NIR fs-laser irradiation close to the focusing point is reported for the first time to the authors' knowledge. It should be noted that in LN the photovoltaic field is codirectional with spontaneous polarization and thus cannot switch the polarization. However, it is possible in ferroelectrics with the opposite direction of the photovoltaic field and low value of threshold field. The revealed effect can be utilized for creation of 3D nonlinear photonic crystals by in-bulk domain engineering.

160

非中心对称量子自旋链中的自旋子位移电流#

Spinon shift current in a noncentrosymmetric quantum spin chain
📚 arXiv👤 Ryosuke Yamashita, Shintaro Takayoshi, Takahiro Morimoto📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示非中心对称量子自旋链中光致直流电的微观机制：自旋子激发携带电极化并通过位移电流驱动体光伏效应。创新性地将自旋子动力学与位移电流机制结合，为量子磁性材料的光电转换及自旋电子学器件设计提供了
该工作理论研究了光辐照下非中心对称量子自旋链中由自旋子激发诱导的直流电产生。基于s=1/2一维反铁磁XXZ模型与磁电耦合，利用无限时间演化块解耦(iTEBD)进行实时模拟，证实自旋子激发是直流产生的起源。发现该体光伏效应由自旋子携带的电极化通过位移电流机制驱动，可称为"自旋子位移电流"。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作理论研究了光辐照下非中心对称量子自旋链中由自旋子激发诱导的直流电产生。基于s=1/2一维反铁磁XXZ模型与磁电耦合，利用无限时间演化块解耦(iTEBD)进行实时模拟，证实自旋子激发是直流产生的起源。发现该体光伏效应由自旋子携带的电极化通过位移电流机制驱动，可称为"自旋子位移电流"。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16063v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We theoretically study direct current generation in a quantum spin chain induced by spinon excitations by light irradiation. We consider a s=1/2 1D antiferromagnetic XXZ model with magnetoelectric coupling that describes multiferroics with broken inversion symmetry. We perform the real-time simulation using infinite time-evolving block decimation (iTEBD), and demonstrate the direct current generation under light irradiation. By comparing the second order nonlinear conductivity and the two-spinon excitation spectra of 1D XXZ model, we confirm that the spinon excitations are the origin for the direct current generation in the quantum spin chain. We find that the bulk photovoltaic effect is driven by electric polarization carried by the spinons through the shift current mechanism, and thus is regarded as ``the spinon shift current''.

161

激光写入可重构能量势垒与可编程莫尔自旋纹理#

Laser-written reconfigurable energy landscapes and programmable Moiré spin textures
📚 arXiv👤 Matteo Panzeri, Piero Florio, Davide Girardi, Joseba Urrestarazu, Giacomo Sala, Nicola Pellizzi, Matteo Vitali, Marco Madami, Luca Ciaccarini Mavilla, Silvia Tacchi, Elisa Riedo, Andrea Meo, Vito Puliafito, Mario Carpentieri, Riccardo Tomasello, Efe Ersoy, Kai Wagner, Patrick Maletinsky, Olivier Boulle, Edoardo Albisetti, Daniela Petti📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作核心创新在于将激光写入与交换偏置调控相结合，实现了能量势垒的灰度可重构，突破了传统自旋纹理的二元限制。其意义在于为高密度信息编码和可编程人工自旋超材料提供了非接触、纳米精度的调控范式，兼具可扩展
该工作利用聚焦激光辅助局域场冷技术，建立了快速、非接触、可扩展的灰度自旋纹理工程平台。通过无损纳米尺度调控薄膜异质结构中的交换偏置各向异性，实现局域能量轮廓的灰度可编程控制，进而创建具有精确调控磁滞、场依赖可读性和可调翻转阈值的磁图案。基于此展示了磁场门控可读性的信息编码，以及具有场可重构对称性的人工自旋超材料。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用聚焦激光辅助局域场冷技术，建立了快速、非接触、可扩展的灰度自旋纹理工程平台。通过无损纳米尺度调控薄膜异质结构中的交换偏置各向异性，实现局域能量轮廓的灰度可编程控制，进而创建具有精确调控磁滞、场依赖可读性和可调翻转阈值的磁图案。基于此展示了磁场门控可读性的信息编码，以及具有场可重构对称性的人工自旋超材料。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16120v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic textures are central to emerging spintronic and unconventional computing technologies due to their rich dynamics, topological properties and nanoscale dimensions. A major challenge remains achieving tunable, reversible, and spatially resolved control over these textures and their evolution as a function of external stimuli, by spatially reprogramming the magnetic energy landscape that governs their nucleation and stability. Here, we exploit a focused laser-assisted local field cooling technique that establishes a fast, non-contact and scalable platform for grayscale spin texture engineering. By non-destructively controlling the exchange-bias anisotropy with nanoscale resolution in thin-film heterostructures, this approach enables grayscale, reprogrammable control of the local energy profile, which we use to create magnetic patterns with highly controlled hysteresis, field-dependent readability and tunable switching thresholds. Leveraging this capability, we demonstrate information encoding with magnetic field-gated readability, and artificial spin metamaterials, stabilizing spin lattices with field-reconfigurable symmetries and creating artificial Moiré spin textures via the geometric superposition of twisted magnetic potentials. These results establish a versatile, reprogrammable platform that bridges the gap between application-oriented magnetic memory and fundamental studies of emergent order in artificial lattices.

162

由对称性保护零模稳定的磁畴#

Magnetic domains stabilized by symmetry-protected zero modes
📚 arXiv👤 Pavel Kos, Dominik S. Wild, Kristian Knakkergaard Nielsen📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示手征对称性保护的指数多个零模可使磁畴壁初态形成热力学稳定的非遍历动力学，突破传统热化预期；确立了对称保护子空间在实验可及量子系统中实现本征非遍历性的新机制，为量子信息存储与多体局域化研究开辟
该工作展示了耦合链XX模型中的强非遍历行为，其中畴壁初态在任意长时间内保持非均匀磁化分布。这一效应源于手征对称性保护的指数多个零模。基于Lanczos算法的分析揭示了热力学极限下链间耦合的临界局域化转变。反铁磁缺陷和对称性破缺微扰恢复慢热化，而对称性守恒微扰下非遍历动力学保持鲁棒，确立了简并对称保护子空间可在实验可及量子系统中产生热力学稳定的非遍历动力学。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作展示了耦合链XX模型中的强非遍历行为，其中畴壁初态在任意长时间内保持非均匀磁化分布。这一效应源于手征对称性保护的指数多个零模。基于Lanczos算法的分析揭示了热力学极限下链间耦合的临界局域化转变。反铁磁缺陷和对称性破缺微扰恢复慢热化，而对称性守恒微扰下非遍历动力学保持鲁棒，确立了简并对称保护子空间可在实验可及量子系统中产生热力学稳定的非遍历动力学。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15510v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Understanding mechanisms for the breakdown of thermalization in closed quantum systems is a central problem in quantum many-body physics. We demonstrate strong non-ergodic behavior in the XX model on coupled chains, where domain-wall initial states retain an inhomogeneous magnetization profile for arbitrarily long times. We find that this effect arises due to exponentially many zero modes protected by chiral symmetry. Using an analysis based on the Lanczos algorithm, we identify a localization transition in the thermodynamic limit at a critical coupling between the chains. We further show that antiferromagnetic defects in the initial state and symmetry-breaking perturbations restore slow thermalization, whereas it remains robust for symmetry-conserving perturbations. These results establish that degenerate, symmetry-protected subspaces can give rise to thermodynamically stable non-ergodic dynamics in experimentally accessible quantum systems.

163

dhcp氢化铁中压力诱导热膨胀异常与磁弹性耦合#

Pressure-induced thermal expansion anomalies in dhcp iron hydride associated with magnetoelastic coupling
📚 arXiv👤 Yuichiro Mori, Katsutoshi Aoki, Masahiro Takano, Hiroyuki Kagi, Ina Park, Zifan Wang, Duck Young Kim, Noriyoshi Tsujino, Sho Kakizawa, Yuji Higo📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将高压高温XRD与第一性原理计算结合，首次在dhcp-FeHₓ中建立压力-居里温度-体积异常的定量关联，为极端条件下巡游电子磁性的实验表征提供了可推广的方法论，对深部地球氢化铁核的磁热力
该工作对双六方密堆积结构氢化铁（dhcp-FeHₓ）进行了高压高温XRD测量，将温度-体积关系中的奇点确定为居里温度（T_C）。加压降低dhcp-FeHₓ的T_C，并出现显著的体积异常，表明压力增强了磁弹性耦合。DFT+DMFT计算再现了自发磁化及其T_C的负压力依赖性，与实验结果一致。该方法为确定磁转变温度和磁弹性耦合效应提供了途径，凸显了dhcp-FeHₓ作为巡游电子磁性独特模型体系的价值。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对双六方密堆积结构氢化铁（dhcp-FeHₓ）进行了高压高温XRD测量，将温度-体积关系中的奇点确定为居里温度（T_C）。加压降低dhcp-FeHₓ的T_C，并出现显著的体积异常，表明压力增强了磁弹性耦合。DFT+DMFT计算再现了自发磁化及其T_C的负压力依赖性，与实验结果一致。该方法为确定磁转变温度和磁弹性耦合效应提供了途径，凸显了dhcp-FeHₓ作为巡游电子磁性独特模型体系的价值。

English Abstract

arXiv:2501.08937v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Iron hydride with a double hexagonal close-packed structure (dhcp-FeHₓ) undergoes a ferromagnetic-paramagnetic transition without changing its crystal structure. Despite its relevance to metal-hydrogen interactions and magnetically driven elasticity, the extensive investigation of this phase is almost limited to room temperature. Here, we performed XRD measurements at high pressure and high temperature, identifying the singularity in the temperature-volume relationship as the Curie temperature (T_C). Pressurization lowered the T_C of dhcp-FeHₓ, and pronounced volume anomalies, indicating that pressure enhanced magnetoelastic coupling. Density functional theory combined with dynamical mean-field theory (DFT+DMFT) reproduced the spontaneous magnetization and its negative pressure dependence of T_C, consistent with our experimental results. This establishes a methodology for determining magnetic transition temperatures and magnetoelastic coupling effects, and highlights dhcp-FeHₓ as a unique model system for providing new insights into itinerant-electron magnetism.

164

Kagome自旋液体中Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用导致的狄拉克节点钉扎#

Dirac node pinning from Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions in a Kagome spin liquid
📚 arXiv👤 Ajesh Kumar, Byungmin Kang, Patrick A. Lee📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统对称性保护框架，揭示DM相互作用通过规范通量-轨道磁化耦合实现狄拉克节点的能量钉扎，为理解YCOB中1/9平台附近狄拉克费米自旋子的稳定存在提供新机制，拓展了量子自旋液体中拓扑激发受动力
该工作针对Kagome自旋液体候选材料YCOB在1/9磁化平台附近存在狄拉克费米自旋子的实验，提出了由Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya（DM）相互作用驱动的节点产生与节点钉扎机制。采用Gutzwiller投影变分蒙特卡洛计算，证明DM相互作用诱导自旋子谱中的能带闭合相变，能带反转时陈数发生变化。DM产生的内部规范通量与自旋子轨道磁化耦合的相互作用抵消能带重开，在参数范围内能量上钉扎狄拉克节点，形成了有别于对称性保护的独特钉扎…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对Kagome自旋液体候选材料YCOB在1/9磁化平台附近存在狄拉克费米自旋子的实验，提出了由Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya（DM）相互作用驱动的节点产生与节点钉扎机制。采用Gutzwiller投影变分蒙特卡洛计算，证明DM相互作用诱导自旋子谱中的能带闭合相变，能带反转时陈数发生变化。DM产生的内部规范通量与自旋子轨道磁化耦合的相互作用抵消能带重开，在参数范围内能量上钉扎狄拉克节点，形成了有别于对称性保护的独特钉扎机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2503.11834v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Recent experiments on the Kagome spin liquid candidate YCOB suggest the presence of Dirac fermionic spinons near the magnetization plateau at 1/9. Theories suggest that the spinons are charge neutral spin-1/2 excitations, in a 2π/3 flux which triples the unit cell. Generally a gap is expected, and there is no symmetry protection for the Dirac nodes in this system. The question arises as to what causes the nodes and stabilizes them. In this work, we propose a node-creation and node-pinning mechanism driven by the Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya (DM) interactions. Employing Gutzwiller-projected variational Monte Carlo calculations, we demonstrate that DM interactions induce a band closing phase transition in the spinon spectrum. There is a change in the Chern number when the bands are inverted. Together with the DM-generated internal gauge flux, the coupling to the spinon orbital magnetization counteracts the band reopening. This interplay energetically pins the Dirac nodes over a range of parameters, resulting in a pinning mechanism distinct from the usual one from symmetry protection.

165

全补偿反铁磁体在磁场下的亚自旋翻转开关#

Sub-spin-flop switching of a fully compensated antiferromagnet by magnetic field
📚 arXiv👤 Honglin Zhou, Muyu Wang, Yinina Ma, Xiaoyan Ma, Gang Li, Zihao Tao, Xiquan Zheng, Liqin Yan, Yingying Peng, Ding-Fu Shao, Bo Liu, Shiliang Li📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究在全补偿反铁磁体CeNiAsO中实现了超低磁场（远低于自旋翻转阈值）的畴选择性开关，获得~35%的巨电阻各向异性。其核心创新在于利用面内磁场打破反铁磁畴简并，而非依赖自旋-轨道耦合，且该机制在共
该工作在近期提出的p波磁性候选材料CeNiAsO这一全补偿反铁磁体中，展示了远低于自旋翻转阈值的低磁场开关效应。利用面内磁场选择性稳定两个简并反铁磁畴之一，实现了高达~35%的巨面内电阻各向异性的可逆非易失开关，该幅度远超自旋-轨道耦合驱动的传统各向异性信号。开关行为在低温非共线Néel相和较高温度共线自旋密度波相中均持续存在，凸显了畴选择机制的普适性，为反铁磁体的电场操控建立了实用途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在近期提出的p波磁性候选材料CeNiAsO这一全补偿反铁磁体中，展示了远低于自旋翻转阈值的低磁场开关效应。利用面内磁场选择性稳定两个简并反铁磁畴之一，实现了高达~35%的巨面内电阻各向异性的可逆非易失开关，该幅度远超自旋-轨道耦合驱动的传统各向异性信号。开关行为在低温非共线Néel相和较高温度共线自旋密度波相中均持续存在，凸显了畴选择机制的普适性，为反铁磁体的电场操控建立了实用途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.07351v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The control of antiferromagnets by magnetic fields represents a fundamental challenge in condensed matter physics, owing to their fully compensated magnetic order and vanishing net magnetization. Conventional methods rely on either uncompensated moments or high-field spin-flop transitions. Here, we demonstrate low-field switching in the fully compensated antiferromagnet CeNiAsO -- a material recently proposed as a candidate for p-wave magnetism. Using an in-plane magnetic field well below the spin-flop threshold, we selectively stabilize one of two degenerate antiferromagnetic domains with mutually orthogonal sublattice orientations. This field-induced domain selection allows reversible and nonvolatile switching of a giant in-plane resistivity anisotropy up to sim35,% -- a magnitude that far exceeds conventional anisotropy signals driven by spin-orbit coupling. The switching behavior persists across both the low-temperature noncollinear Néel phase and the higher-temperature collinear spin-density-wave phase, highlighting the universality of the domain-selection mechanism. Our work establishes a practical approach for manipulating compensated antiferromagnets with modest magnetic fields and underscores their potential for high-performance spintronic devices based on giant and switchable resistivity anisotropy.

166

交替磁体异质结构中近邻诱导的超导性与涌现拓扑相#

Proximity-induced superconductivity and emerging topological phases in altermagnet-based heterostructures
📚 arXiv👤 Ohidul Alam, Amartya Pal, Paramita Dutta, Arijit Saha📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次建立交替磁体-超导体异质结构的近邻效应理论框架，揭示d波交替磁体可诱导偶宇称单态与三态配对；核心创新在于通过插入Rashba自旋-轨道耦合层打破空间反演对称性，将偶宇称三态转化为奇宇称三态，
该工作构建了研究交替磁体-超导体异质结构中超导近邻效应的理论框架。考虑二维d波交替磁体与三维常规s波超导体近邻耦合，通过积掉超导自由度得到描述交替磁体层近邻修正的有效哈密顿量，并导出有效格林函数以获得近邻诱导配对振幅。研究发现交替磁体层中存在偶宇称单态和三态配对振幅，为获得实现拓扑超导所需的奇宇称三态分量，在异质结构中引入Rashba自旋-轨道耦合层，并分析了该近邻诱导体系的能带拓扑。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作构建了研究交替磁体-超导体异质结构中超导近邻效应的理论框架。考虑二维d波交替磁体与三维常规s波超导体近邻耦合，通过积掉超导自由度得到描述交替磁体层近邻修正的有效哈密顿量，并导出有效格林函数以获得近邻诱导配对振幅。研究发现交替磁体层中存在偶宇称单态和三态配对振幅，为获得实现拓扑超导所需的奇宇称三态分量，在异质结构中引入Rashba自旋-轨道耦合层，并分析了该近邻诱导体系的能带拓扑。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.26894v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We present a theoretical framework for investigating superconducting proximity effect in altermagnet (AM)-superconductor (SC) heterostructures. In general, AMs, characterized by vanishing net magnetization but spin-split electronic spectra, provide a promising platform for realizing unconventional magnetic phases. We consider a two-dimensional d-wave AM proximity coupled to a three dimensional ordinary s-wave SC. By integrating out the superconducting degrees of freedom, we derive an effective Hamiltonian that describes the proximity-induced modifications in the AM layer in the form of a self-energy. We then derive an effective Green's function to obtain the proximity-induced pairing amplitudes in the AM layer and classify the induced pairing amplitudes according to their parity, frequency, and spin. We find the presence of even-parity singlet and triplet pairing amplitudes in the AM layer. To achieve the odd-parity triplet components, important to realize topological superconductivity, we introduce a layer of Rashba spin-orbit coupling (RSOC) in the heterostructure. We analyse the band topology of this proximity-induced AM-RSOC layer and demonstrate the emergence of both weak and strong topological superconducting phases with edge-localized modes, characterized by winding number and Chern number. These findings highlight the role of AM-SC hybrid setup as a versatile platform for realizing odd-parity triplet pairings and engineering topological superconductivity in two-dimension.

167

褶皱蜂窝状反铁磁体中的高温量子反常霍尔效应#

High-Temperature Quantum Anomalous Hall Effect in Buckled Honeycomb Antiferromagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Mohsen Hafez-Torbati, Götz S. Uhrig📅 2026-04-20⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地提出褶皱蜂窝Néel反铁磁莫特绝缘体作为高温反铁磁陈绝缘体新载体，揭示垂直电场通过褶皱诱导的交错势驱动拓扑相变机制，发现量子化霍尔电导的普适标度规律；预言室温下可实现量子化反常霍尔效应，
该工作提出具有褶皱蜂窝结构的Néel反铁磁莫特绝缘体作为高温反铁磁陈绝缘体（AFCI）的候选材料。利用推广的近藤晶格模型证明，垂直电场因褶皱产生的交错势可驱动AF莫特绝缘体向AFCI相转变。霍尔电导的量子化温度T_q主要取决于自旋-轨道耦合强度和跃迁参数，与模型具体细节无关；超过T_q时霍尔电导偏离量子化值伴随手性边缘态的谱展宽。采用重过渡金属元素典型参数预测AFCI可存活至室温，并建议Sr₃CaOs₂O₉作为潜在实现材料。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出具有褶皱蜂窝结构的Néel反铁磁莫特绝缘体作为高温反铁磁陈绝缘体（AFCI）的候选材料。利用推广的近藤晶格模型证明，垂直电场因褶皱产生的交错势可驱动AF莫特绝缘体向AFCI相转变。霍尔电导的量子化温度T_q主要取决于自旋-轨道耦合强度和跃迁参数，与模型具体细节无关；超过T_q时霍尔电导偏离量子化值伴随手性边缘态的谱展宽。采用重过渡金属元素典型参数预测AFCI可存活至室温，并建议Sr₃CaOs₂O₉作为潜在实现材料。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.04551v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We propose Néel antiferromagnetic (AF) Mott insulators with a buckled honeycomb structure as potential candidates to host a high-temperature AF Chern insulator (AFCI). Using a generalized Kondo lattice model we show that the staggered potential induced by a perpendicular electric field due to the buckling can drive the AF Mott insulator to an AFCI phase. We address the temperature evolution of the Hall conductance and the chiral edge states. The quantization temperature T_q, below which the Hall conductance is quantized, depends essentially on the strength of the spin-orbit coupling and the hopping parameter, independent of the specific details of the model. The deviation of the Hall conductance from the quantized value e²/h above T_q is found to be accompanied by a spectral broadening of the chiral edge states, reflecting a finite life-time, i.e., a decay. Using parameters typical for heavy transition-metal elements we predict that the AFCI can survive up to room temperature. We suggest Sr₃CaOs₂O₉ as a potential compound to realize a high-T AFCI phase.

04

AI / 机器学习专题#

覆盖模型、方法与 AI for Science 应用工作。

01

高斯Kolmogorov-Arnold网络的尺度缩放#

Scaling of Gaussian Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks
📚 arXiv👤 Amir Noorizadegan, Sifan Wang📅 2026-04-25🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作揭示高斯KAN深度架构中尺度参数ε的层级不对称性：首层主导网络可区分性，后续层无法补偿其信息损失。基于特征矩阵分析提出ε∈[1/(G-1), 2/(G-1)]的实用设计规则，为共享中心高斯KAN
该工作系统研究高斯尺度参数ε在高斯KAN深度边基架构中的作用，核心发现尺度选择主要由首层决定，因首层直接构建于输入域且后续层无法恢复其引入的可区分性损失。通过分析首层特征矩阵，识别出实用操作区间ε∈[1/(G-1), 2/(G-1)]（G为高斯中心数）。对当前标准共享中心高斯KAN，该区间被阐释为稳定有效的设计规则而非普适最优结果，并通过ε的暴力扫描在多种配置下验证。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作系统研究高斯尺度参数ε在高斯KAN深度边基架构中的作用，核心发现尺度选择主要由首层决定，因首层直接构建于输入域且后续层无法恢复其引入的可区分性损失。通过分析首层特征矩阵，识别出实用操作区间ε∈[1/(G-1), 2/(G-1)]（G为高斯中心数）。对当前标准共享中心高斯KAN，该区间被阐释为稳定有效的设计规则而非普适最优结果，并通过ε的暴力扫描在多种配置下验证。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21174v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The Gaussian scale parameter (ϵ) is central to the behavior of Gaussian Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (KANs), yet its role in deep edge-based architectures has not been studied systematically. In this paper, we investigate how (ϵ) affects Gaussian KANs through first-layer feature geometry, conditioning, and approximation behavior. Our central observation is that scale selection is governed primarily by the first layer, since it is the only layer constructed directly on the input domain and any loss of distinguishability introduced there cannot be recovered by later layers. From this viewpoint, we analyze the first-layer feature matrix and identify a practical operating interval, [ ϵ in łeft[frac1G-1,frac2G-1i̊ght], ] where (G) denotes the number of Gaussian centers. For the standard shared-center Gaussian KAN used in current practice, we interpret this interval not as a universal optimality result, but as a stable and effective design rule, and validate it through brute-force sweeps over (ϵ) across function-approximation problems with different collocation densities, grid resolutions, network architectures, and input dimensions, as well as a physics-informed Helmholtz problem. We further show that this range is useful for fixed-scale selection, variable-scale constructions, constrained training of (ϵ), and efficient scale search using early training MSE. Finally, using a matched Chebyshev reference, we show that a properly scaled Gaussian KAN can already be competitive in accuracy relative to another standard KAN basis. In this way, the paper positions scale selection as a practical design principle for Gaussian KANs rather than as an ad hoc hyperparameter choice.

02

材料科学多模态大语言模型：MatterChat#

A multimodal large language model for materials science
📚 Nature Machine Intelligence👤 Yingheng Tang, Wenbin Xu, Jie Cao, Weilu Gao 等9位作者📅 2026-04-24🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：MatterChat通过桥接模块对齐原子间势与预训练LLM，首次实现全分辨率结构感知的多模态材料建模，突破通用LLM无法理解原子结构的瓶颈，为性质预测、合成路径规划及科学推理提供专用智能工具，显著降低
理解和预测无机材料的性质对于加速材料科学进步以及推动能源、电子等领域的应用至关重要。通过多模态大语言模型（LLM）将材料结构数据与基于语言的信息相结合，能够增强人机交互，从而为这些工作提供巨大潜力。然而，关键挑战在于如何将全分辨率的原子结构整合到LLM中。本工作我们介绍了MatterChat，一种通用的结构感知多模态LLM，它将材料结构数据和文本输入统一到一个单一的连贯模型中。MatterChat使用桥接模块来有效对齐预训练的通用机器…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

理解和预测无机材料的性质对于加速材料科学进步以及推动能源、电子等领域的应用至关重要。通过多模态大语言模型（LLM）将材料结构数据与基于语言的信息相结合，能够增强人机交互，从而为这些工作提供巨大潜力。然而，关键挑战在于如何将全分辨率的原子结构整合到LLM中。本工作我们介绍了MatterChat，一种通用的结构感知多模态LLM，它将材料结构数据和文本输入统一到一个单一的连贯模型中。MatterChat使用桥接模块来有效对齐预训练的通用机器学习原子间势与预训练的LLM，从而降低训练成本并增强灵活性。我们的结果表明，MatterChat在材料性质预测和人机交互方面显著提升了性能，超越了GPT-4等通用LLM。我们还展示了其在更高级科学推理和分步材料合成等应用中的实用性。

English Abstract

Understanding and predicting the properties of inorganic materials is crucial for accelerating advancements in materials science and driving applications in energy, electronics and beyond. Integrating material structure data with language-based information through multimodal large language models (LLMs) offers great potential to support these efforts by enhancing human–artificial intelligence interaction. However, a key challenge lies in integrating atomic structures at full resolution into LLMs. In this work, we introduce MatterChat, a versatile structure-aware multimodal LLM that unifies material structural data and textual inputs into a single cohesive model.
