页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对三维Ising自旋玻璃最小能量构型搜索问题，提出全局退火蒙特卡洛算法，将标准局域更新与机器学习提出的全局更新相结合。基准测试表明该方法不仅超越模拟退火性能，且比群体退火更具鲁棒性，在不同问题难度和系统尺寸下无需超参数调优即可保持有效性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.19544v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Combinatorial optimization problems are central to both practical applications and the development of optimization methods. While classical and quantum algorithms have been refined over decades, machine learning--assisted approaches are comparatively recent and have not yet consistently outperformed simple, state-of-the-art classical methods. Here, we focus on a class of Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) problems, specifically the challenge of finding minimum energy configurations in three-dimensional Ising spin glasses. We use a Global Annealing Monte Carlo algorithm that integrates standard local moves with global moves proposed via machine learning. We show that local moves play a crucial role in achieving optimal performance. Benchmarking against Simulated Annealing and Population Annealing, we demonstrate that Global Annealing not only surpasses the performance of Simulated Annealing but also exhibits greater robustness than Population Annealing, maintaining effectiveness across problem hardness and system size without hyperparameter tuning. These results provide clear and robust evidence that a machine learning--assisted optimization method can exceed the capabilities of classical state-of-the-art techniques in a combinatorial optimization setting.

97

用于MoS₂外延预测模拟的机器学习原子间势#

Machine-Learned Interatomic Potential for Predictive Simulation of MoS2 Epitaxy
📚 arXiv👤 Emir Bilgili, Nicholas Taormina, Richard Hennig, Simon R. Phillpot, Youping Chen📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：基于UF3框架构建的机器学习势函数，在保持DFT精度的同时实现了近经验势的计算效率，首次成功复现MoS₂层状同质外延的非平衡生长动力学，为二维材料大规模外延模拟提供了兼具精度与速度的原子级工具。
基于UF3框架开发了多层MoS₂的机器学习原子间势，该势函数在晶格常数、层间结合能、相稳定性、声子谱及各向异性弹性张量等方面与DFT高度一致。非平衡分子动力学模拟再现了层状同质外延生长实验观察，该势函数计算速度仅约为最快经验势的两倍，可实现大规模原子模拟。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

基于UF3框架开发了多层MoS₂的机器学习原子间势，该势函数在晶格常数、层间结合能、相稳定性、声子谱及各向异性弹性张量等方面与DFT高度一致。非平衡分子动力学模拟再现了层状同质外延生长实验观察，该势函数计算速度仅约为最快经验势的两倍，可实现大规模原子模拟。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.15952v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: A machine-learned interatomic potential (MLIP) for multilayer MoS2 was developed using the ultra-fast force field (UF3) framework. The UF3 MLIP reproduces key properties in strong agreement with DFT including lattice constants, interlayer binding energies, and phase-stability. Furthermore, the potential reasonably captures the phonon spectra and the highly anisotropic elastic tensor across monolayer (1H) and bulk (2H, 3R) MoS2 phases. Critically, defect and edge formation energies are captured with high fidelity, exhibiting a strong correlation with DFT (R² = 0.91) across ten defective monolayers and reproducing the relative difference between the free energies of zigzag and armchair edges within 5% of DFT. Non-equilibrium molecular dynamics simulations reveal layered homoepitaxial growth consistent with experimental observations, demonstrating the formation of van der Waals gaps between successive epilayers and triangular domains bounded by zigzag edges. The robust UF3 MLIP, which is only ~2X slower than the fastest empirical potentials, enables large-scale atomistic simulations of MoS2 epitaxial growth.

98

Fermi Sets：费米子的通用可解释神经网络架构#

Fermi Sets: Universal and interpretable neural architectures for fermions
📚 arXiv👤 Liang Fu📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：Fermi Sets通过"反对称基+对称函数"的分解策略，突破了传统Slater行列式随粒子数指数增长的瓶颈，将高维费米子波函数表达复杂度降至线性规模，为量子化学和凝聚态系统的第一性原理计算提供了兼具
该工作提出Fermi Sets架构用于费米子多体波函数，证明任意连续费米子波函数可由K个反对称基函数（如对乘积或Slater行列式）与对称函数的线性组合任意精度逼近。关键结果表明一维连续体仅需K=1，二维K=2，高维K最多随粒子数线性增长，实现了通用逼近与最小开销的平衡。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出Fermi Sets架构用于费米子多体波函数，证明任意连续费米子波函数可由K个反对称基函数（如对乘积或Slater行列式）与对称函数的线性组合任意精度逼近。关键结果表明一维连续体仅需K=1，二维K=2，高维K最多随粒子数线性增长，实现了通用逼近与最小开销的平衡。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.02508v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We introduce Fermi Sets, a universal and physically interpretable neural architecture for fermionic many-body wavefunctions. Building on a ``parity-graded'' representation [1], we prove that any continuous fermionic wavefunction on a compact domain can be approximated to arbitrary accuracy by a linear combination of K antisymmetric basis functions--such as pairwise products or Slater determinants--multiplied by symmetric functions. A key result is that the number of required bases is provably small: K=1 suffices in one-dimensional continua (and on lattices in any dimension), K=2 suffices in two dimensions, and in higher dimensions K grows at most linearly with particle number. The antisymmetric bases can be learned by small neural networks, while the symmetric factors are implemented by permutation-invariant networks whose width scales only linearly with particle number. Thus, Fermi Sets achieve universal approximation of fermionic wavefunctions with minimal overhead while retaining clear physical interpretability. As a numerical illustration, a single Fermi Sets model applied to metallic solid hydrogen in three dimensions, trained simultaneously across multiple nuclear geometries, surpasses all diffusion Monte Carlo benchmarks.

99

湍流的Gaussian场表示：压缩、尺度分离与物理保真度#

Gaussian Field Representations for Turbulent Flow: Compression, Scale Separation, and Physical Fidelity
📚 arXiv👤 Dhanush Vittal Shenoy, Steven H. Frankel📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作以可学习参数的各向异性高斯核叠加构建湍流场的连续参数化表示，实现了超10³-10⁴倍压缩比下的速度场高精度重建；揭示各向同性基函数在小尺度涡量捕捉上的局限，为湍流数据压缩与多尺度物理保真建模提供
该工作提出基于局域Gaussian原语的湍流场连续参数化表示，将速度场建模为可学习位置、振幅和尺度的核函数叠加。在Taylor-Green涡旋上的评估表明，各向同性基线形式在压缩比超10³-10⁴时保持高速度精度，但小尺度结构损失导致涡量退化；各向异性Gaussian提供最一致的改进。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出基于局域Gaussian原语的湍流场连续参数化表示，将速度场建模为可学习位置、振幅和尺度的核函数叠加。在Taylor-Green涡旋上的评估表明，各向同性基线形式在压缩比超10³-10⁴时保持高速度精度，但小尺度结构损失导致涡量退化；各向异性Gaussian提供最一致的改进。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16449v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Representing turbulent flow fields in a compact yet physically faithful form remains a central challenge in computational fluid dynamics. We propose a continuous parametric representation based on localized Gaussian primitives, in which the velocity field is modeled as a superposition of kernels with learnable positions, amplitudes, and scales. This formulation yields a compact, grid-independent encoding while enabling evaluation of derived quantities such as vorticity and enstrophy. The approach is assessed on three-dimensional Taylor-Green vortex fields spanning stages from smooth flow to fully developed turbulence. We quantify the compression-accuracy trade-off using both primary variables and derivative-sensitive diagnostics. The baseline isotropic formulation achieves high velocity accuracy at compression ratios exceeding 1e3-1e4, but exhibits substantial enstrophy degradation due to loss of small-scale structure. To address this limitation, we investigate structure-aware extensions including adaptive placement, multi-resolution kernels, and anisotropic Gaussians. The anisotropic formulation provides the most consistent improvement, better aligning with elongated vortical structures and recovering intermediate- and high-wavenumber content, while other strategies yield modest gains. A compact-support Beta basis improves enstrophy in some cases but introduces localized artifacts. Overall, the results indicate that the main limitation of baseline Gaussian representations lies in geometric expressiveness rather than parameter count. The proposed framework provides a compact, interpretable, and continuous representation of turbulent flows, and establishes a foundation for structure-aware and physics-informed flow compression.

100

面向非局域热平衡原子动力学的时间依赖物理信息潜空间动力学辨识#

Physics-Informed Latent Space Dynamics Identification for Time-Dependent NLTE Atomic Kinetics
📚 arXiv👤 Jeongwoo Nam, William Anderson, Youngsoo Choi, Hai P. Le, Mark E. Foord, Byoung Ick Cho, Haewon Jeong, Min Sang Cho📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将物理信息嵌入潜空间动力学辨识，首次实现NLTE等离子体时间依赖原子动力学的显式约化建模。针对EUV光源锡等离子体，在保持亚百分之二精度的同时实现超十万倍加速，突破了传统原子动力学模拟的
该工作提出专为NLTE原子动力学设计的物理信息潜空间动力学辨识(pLaSDI)框架，通过显式约化控制方程捕获非平衡等离子体的时间依赖原子动力学。应用于EUV光刻等离子体相关锡NLTE数据，模型以低于2%误差再现电荷态演化，加速比约5×10⁴-10⁵，且在训练轨迹外保持稳定收敛。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出专为NLTE原子动力学设计的物理信息潜空间动力学辨识(pLaSDI)框架，通过显式约化控制方程捕获非平衡等离子体的时间依赖原子动力学。应用于EUV光刻等离子体相关锡NLTE数据，模型以低于2%误差再现电荷态演化，加速比约5×10⁴-10⁵，且在训练轨迹外保持稳定收敛。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16664v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Non-local thermodynamic equilibrium (NLTE) calculations remain a major computational bottleneck in radiation--hydrodynamics, while most existing machine-learning surrogates treat NLTE as a static input--output mapping rather than a kinetic evolution problem. Here, we present a physics-informed Latent Space Dynamics Identification (pLaSDI) framework specifically designed for NLTE atomic kinetics, which captures the time-dependent atomic kinetics of non-equilibrium plasmas through an explicit reduced governing equation. To ensure the physical reliability of the reduced model, we impose physics-informed loss terms that enforce macroscopic consistency, dynamical stability, and convergence to the correct steady state during long-time integration. Applied to tin NLTE population data generated along hydrodynamically modeled temperature--density trajectories relevant to extreme ultraviolet (EUV) lithography plasmas, the model accurately reproduces charge-state evolution and mean charge state with errors below 2%, achieves speedups of approximately 5×10⁴--10⁵, and remains stable outside the training trajectories by converging toward physically admissible states and the correct steady-state solution under fixed plasma conditions. These results show that careful physics-informed design of the latent dynamics, rather than data fitting alone, is essential for constructing fast, stable, and physically reliable extrapolative surrogates for time-dependent NLTE kinetics.

101

基于第一性原理与机器学习分子动力学预测分子及离子溶剂化自由能#

Predicting Solvation Free Energies of Molecules and Ions via First-Principles and Machine-Learning Molecular Dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Junting Yu, Shuo-Hui Li, Ding Pan📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地提出"气泡法"解决溶剂化自由能计算中端点奇异性难题，突破传统热力学积分与自由能微扰方法的局限性，实现第一性原理与机器学习分子动力学的兼容应用，为复杂分子/离子体系的溶剂化热力学预测提供高
研究团队提出"气泡法"以规避传统热力学积分与自由能微扰中的端点奇异性问题，实现从第一性原理计算任意形状分子和离子的溶剂化自由能。该方法兼容从头算与机器学习分子动力学，并针对周期性密度泛函理论引入中性背景电荷修正、周期镜像虚假相互作用修正及真空-水界面势修正。验证计算涵盖甲烷、甲醇、水及钠离子等体系。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究团队提出"气泡法"以规避传统热力学积分与自由能微扰中的端点奇异性问题，实现从第一性原理计算任意形状分子和离子的溶剂化自由能。该方法兼容从头算与机器学习分子动力学，并针对周期性密度泛函理论引入中性背景电荷修正、周期镜像虚假相互作用修正及真空-水界面势修正。验证计算涵盖甲烷、甲醇、水及钠离子等体系。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17076v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The solvation free energy (SFE) of molecules and ions is a fundamental property governing their solvation behavior and solubility. Molecular simulations offer a route to compute SFEs using alchemical free energy methods, such as thermodynamic integration or free energy perturbation. However, these methods suffer from the infamous end-point singularity, which leads to numerical instability when atoms approach closely, a challenge that becomes particularly acute in ab initio and machine learning molecular dynamics simulations. Here, we introduce the bubble method to calculate the SFEs of molecules and ions from first principles. Our approach avoids the end-state problem in both ab initio and machine learning molecular dynamics simulations and is applicable to molecules and ions of arbitrary shape. When calculating the SFEs of ions using periodic density functional theory, we incorporate corrections for the neutralizing background charge, spurious interactions between periodic images, and the vacuum-water interface potential. To validate our method, we successfully computed the SFEs of methane, methanol, water, and sodium ions using classical, ab initio, and machine learning molecular dynamics simulations. Importantly, our method requires no experimental inputs or empirical data. This makes it particularly well-suited for studying systems under extreme conditions, such as high pressure-temperature environments or under nanoconfinement, situations where experimental investigations are challenging and classical force fields, typically parameterized under ambient conditions, may be unreliable.

102

基于机器学习的火星等离子体区域自动分类#

Automated Classification of Plasma Regions at Mars Using Machine Learning
📚 arXiv👤 Yilan Qin, Chuanfei Dong, Hongyang Zhou, Chi Zhang, Kaichun Xu, Jiawei Gao, Simin Shekarpaz, Xinmin Li, Liang Wang📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将融入短时序信息的CNN应用于火星等离子体区域自动分类，突破了传统MLP无法区分太阳风与磁鞘的局限，为行星探测任务中的大规模空间数据实时处理提供了高效可靠的智能分析框架。
研究团队利用MAVEN探测器SWIA仪器的离子全向能谱数据，构建机器学习分类器自动识别太阳风、磁鞘和诱导磁层三种关键等离子体区域。对比评估显示，融入短时序信息的卷积神经网络（CNN）可靠区分三类区域，而多层感知机（MLP）难以分辨太阳风与磁鞘。该CNN框架可高效处理大规模数据并适用于未来行星探测任务。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究团队利用MAVEN探测器SWIA仪器的离子全向能谱数据，构建机器学习分类器自动识别太阳风、磁鞘和诱导磁层三种关键等离子体区域。对比评估显示，融入短时序信息的卷积神经网络（CNN）可靠区分三类区域，而多层感知机（MLP）难以分辨太阳风与磁鞘。该CNN框架可高效处理大规模数据并适用于未来行星探测任务。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17131v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The plasma environment around Mars is highly variable because it is strongly influenced by the solar wind. Accurate identification of plasma regions around Mars is important for the community studying solar wind-Mars interactions, region-specific plasma processes, and atmospheric escape. In this study, we develop a machine-learning-based classifier to automatically identify three key plasma regions--solar wind, magnetosheath, and induced magnetosphere--using only ion omnidirectional energy spectra measured by the MAVEN Solar Wind Ion Analyzer (SWIA). Two neural network architectures are evaluated: a multilayer perceptron (MLP) and a convolutional neural network (CNN) that incorporates short temporal sequences. Our results show that the CNN can reliably distinguish the three plasma regions, whereas the MLP struggles to separate the solar wind and magnetosheath. Therefore, the CNN-based approach provides an efficient and accurate framework for large-scale plasma region identification at Mars and can be readily applied to future planetary missions.

103

基于深度学习建模的二维磁流体动力学自回归预测#

Autoregressive prediction of 2D MHD dynamics inferred from deep learning modeling
📚 arXiv👤 David Kivarkis, Waleed Mouhali, Sadruddin Benkadda, Kai Schneider📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将Koopman理论与Transformer架构引入等离子体湍流模拟，突破传统数值方法在磁流体动力学多尺度耦合问题上的计算瓶颈。所建数据驱动代理模型首次实现涡量-电流密度联合自回归预测，
研究团队开发两种深度学习代理自回归模型——基于Koopman的Transformer与ConvLSTM-UNet，用于预测不同磁场强度下二维理想磁流体动力学Kelvin-Helmholtz不稳定性的时间演化。模型直接从高分辨率模拟同时预测涡量与电流密度，经自回归训练后可再现多尺度动力学的不稳定增长与非线性饱和等关键特征，并保持理想MHD全局不变量守恒趋势与阿尔芬涨落传播等物理结构，计算成本较直接数值模拟大幅降低。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究团队开发两种深度学习代理自回归模型——基于Koopman的Transformer与ConvLSTM-UNet，用于预测不同磁场强度下二维理想磁流体动力学Kelvin-Helmholtz不稳定性的时间演化。模型直接从高分辨率模拟同时预测涡量与电流密度，经自回归训练后可再现多尺度动力学的不稳定增长与非线性饱和等关键特征，并保持理想MHD全局不变量守恒趋势与阿尔芬涨落传播等物理结构，计算成本较直接数值模拟大幅降低。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18221v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We develop two deep learning surrogate autoregressive models for the prediction of the temporal evolution of two-dimensional ideal magnetohydrodynamic (MHD) Kelvin-Helmholtz instabilities across a range of magnetic field strengths. Using two neural network architectures, a Koopman-based Transformer model and a ConvLSTM-UNet, our approach enables simultaneous prediction of vorticity and current density directly from high-resolution simulations. The models are trained in an autoregressive manner and are able to reproduce key features of the multiscale dynamics over several instability growth and nonlinear saturation phases. Beyond accurate field reconstruction, the surrogates preserve essential physical structures of ideal MHD dynamics, including the conservation trends of global invariants and the propagation of Alfvénic fluctuations. Compared to direct numerical simulations, the proposed surrogates offer substantially reduced computational cost while maintaining good agreement with the reference dynamics. These results suggest that deep learning based surrogate models can provide a promising complementary tool for the efficient and physically consistent exploration of high-fidelity plasma and fluid simulations.

104

湍流PINNs中的不确定性量化：贝叶斯推断与排斥集成#

Uncertainty Quantification in PINNs for Turbulent Flows: Bayesian Inference and Repulsive Ensembles
📚 arXiv👤 Khemraj Shukla, Zongren Zou, Theo Kaeufer, Michael Triantafyllou, George Em Karniadakis📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将哈密顿蒙特卡洛、蒙特卡洛dropout与函数空间排斥集成相结合，系统解决了PINNs在湍流逆问题中认知不确定性量化不足的关键瓶颈。通过调节集成多样性与似然温度，显著提升了PDE约束下不
该工作针对物理信息神经网络（PINNs）在湍流建模中缺乏可靠认知不确定性的问题，系统评估了概率扩展框架。方法结合哈密顿蒙特卡洛采样的贝叶斯PINNs、蒙特卡洛dropout以及函数空间强制多样性的排斥深度集成，重点研究了集成多样性和似然温度调节对PDE约束逆问题不确定性校准的作用，在范德波尔振子和圆柱绕流等测试案例上进行了评估。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对物理信息神经网络（PINNs）在湍流建模中缺乏可靠认知不确定性的问题，系统评估了概率扩展框架。方法结合哈密顿蒙特卡洛采样的贝叶斯PINNs、蒙特卡洛dropout以及函数空间强制多样性的排斥深度集成，重点研究了集成多样性和似然温度调节对PDE约束逆问题不确定性校准的作用，在范德波尔振子和圆柱绕流等测试案例上进行了评估。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17156v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have emerged as a promising framework for solving inverse problems governed by partial differential equations (PDEs), including the reconstruction of turbulent flow fields from sparse data. However, most existing PINN formulations are deterministic and do not provide reliable quantification of epistemic uncertainty, which is critical for ill-posed problems such as data-driven Reynolds-averaged Navier-Stokes (RANS) modeling. In this work, we develop and systematically evaluate a set of probabilistic extensions of PINNs for uncertainty quantification in turbulence modeling. The proposed framework combines (i) Bayesian PINNs with Hamiltonian Monte Carlo sampling and a tempered multi-component likelihood, (ii) Monte Carlo dropout, and (iii) repulsive deep ensembles that enforce diversity in function space. Particular emphasis is placed on the role of ensemble diversity and likelihood tempering in improving uncertainty calibration for PDE-constrained inverse problems. The methods are assessed on a hierarchy of test cases, including the Van der Pol oscillator and turbulent flow past a circular cylinder at Reynolds numbers Re=3,900 (direct numerical simulation data) and Re = 10,000 (experimental particle image velocimetry data). The results demonstrate that Bayesian PINNs provide the most consistent uncertainty estimates across all inferred quantities, while function-space repulsive ensembles offer a computationally efficient approximation with competitive accuracy for primary flow variables. These findings provide quantitative insight into the trade-offs between accuracy, computational cost, and uncertainty calibration in physics-informed learning, and offer practical guidance for uncertainty quantification in data-driven turbulence modeling.

105

面向三维设计气动预测的基础模型范式#

Towards a Foundation-Model Paradigm for Aerodynamic Prediction in Three-dimensional Design
📚 arXiv👤 Yunjia Yang, Babak Gholami, Caglar Gurbuz, Mohammad Rashed, Nils Thuerey📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作开创性地将基础模型范式引入三维气动预测领域，以"海量预训练+极少量微调"破解高保真CFD数据稀缺的瓶颈。AeroTransformer通过跨构型知识迁移，将样本效率提升逾6倍，为飞行器数字化设计
该工作提出了基于大规模预训练再微调的气动预测替代模型构建方法，以应对三维复杂构型训练数据生成成本高的挑战。开发的Transformer架构AeroTransformer在包含近30000样本的SuperWing数据集上预训练，再用450个特定任务样本微调，在跨声速机翼表面流预测上实现0.36%误差，较从头训练降低84.2%；系统研究了模型配置和训练策略的影响。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出了基于大规模预训练再微调的气动预测替代模型构建方法，以应对三维复杂构型训练数据生成成本高的挑战。开发的Transformer架构AeroTransformer在包含近30000样本的SuperWing数据集上预训练，再用450个特定任务样本微调，在跨声速机翼表面流预测上实现0.36%误差，较从头训练降低84.2%；系统研究了模型配置和训练策略的影响。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18062v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Accurate machine-learning models for aerodynamic prediction are essential for accelerating shape optimization, yet remain challenging to develop for complex three-dimensional configurations due to the high cost of generating training data. This work introduces a methodology for efficiently constructing accurate surrogate models for design purposes by first pre-training a large-scale model on diverse geometries and then fine-tuning it with a few more detailed task-specific samples. A Transformer-based architecture, AeroTransformer, is developed and tailored for large-scale training to learn aerodynamics. The methodology is evaluated on transonic wings, where the model is pre-trained on SuperWing, a dataset of nearly 30000 samples with broad geometric diversity, and subsequently fine-tuned to handle specific wing shapes perturbed from the Common Research Model. Results show that, with 450 task-specific samples, the proposed methodology achieves 0.36% error on surface-flow prediction, reducing 84.2% compared to training from scratch. The influence of model configurations and training strategies is also systematically studied to provide guidance on effectively training and deploying such models under limited data and computational budgets. To facilitate reuse, we release the datasets and the pre-trained models at https://github.com/tum-pbs/AeroTransformer. An interactive design tool is also built on the pre-trained model and is available online at https://webwing.pbs.cit.tum.de.

106

温热中子星外壳状态方程#

Equation of State for warm Neutron Star outer crusts
📚 arXiv👤 David Barba-González, Conrado Albertus, M. Ángeles Pérez-García📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作发展了融合电子屏蔽与有限尺寸离子分布的分子动力学方法，首次系统揭示温热效应对中子星外壳状态方程的非平庸修正，为引力波信号建模和潮汐形变率计算提供关键输入，其神经网络参数化方案显著提升了天体物理模
该工作利用分子动力学多体模拟，结合电子屏蔽和有限尺寸高斯分布离子模型及高效Ewald能量求和，计算了中子星外壳温热离子等离子体的状态方程P(n_B,T)。结果覆盖重子数密度n_B∈[7.48×10⁻¹⁰,2.09×10⁻⁴]fm⁻³和温度k_BT∈[1,5]MeV范围，发现即使在适中温度下，离子热效应在接近内壳的高密度区也至关重要；提供了表格数据及神经网络参数化以提高可用性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用分子动力学多体模拟，结合电子屏蔽和有限尺寸高斯分布离子模型及高效Ewald能量求和，计算了中子星外壳温热离子等离子体的状态方程P(n_B,T)。结果覆盖重子数密度n_B∈[7.48×10⁻¹⁰,2.09×10⁻⁴]fm⁻³和温度k_BT∈[1,5]MeV范围，发现即使在适中温度下，离子热效应在接近内壳的高密度区也至关重要；提供了表格数据及神经网络参数化以提高可用性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18136v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We describe the equation of state (EoS) of a warm ion plasma as obtained by performing microscopic many-body simulations using Molecular Dynamics computational techniques. Using the cold one-component plasma (OCP) composition in the Neutron Star (NS) outer crust assumed in Murarka et al. (2022) with a representative heavy nucleus for each density, we refine previous calculations. We include electron screening and modeling of ions as finite-size Gaussian distributions in the interaction potential, together with an efficient Ewald energy summation procedure. From this, the EoS relation P(n_B,T) is obtained as a function of baryonic density and temperature in the NS outer crust under conditions n_Bin[7.48× 10⁻¹⁰,2.09×10⁻⁴] m̊ fm⁻³ , kBTin[1,5] MeV. In order to improve the usability of our results we provide tabulated data values along with a neural network parametrization available in the Zenodo repository, see https://zenodo.org/records/15348712. We find that even at moderate temperatures, thermal effects of ions are key in the higher density region closer to the inner crust, when described using a thermal effective parametrization based on the thermal adiabatic index Γₜₕ. We compare our results with other EoS in the literature performing a critical discussion.

107

随机重构中的动量稳定性与自适应控制#

Momentum Stability and Adaptive Control in Stochastic Reconfiguration
📚 arXiv👤 Yuyang Wang, Xin Liu📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作从理论上揭示了SPRING算法中动量参数μ<1与μ=1的收敛性本质差异，证明μ<1的收敛保证及μ=1的发散风险，并据此开发自适应动量选择策略PRIME-SR，为变分蒙特卡洛优化提供了更稳定的收敛
该工作研究变分蒙特卡洛（VMC）中随机重构（SR）方法的动量参数稳定性问题。作者阐明了SPRING算法中动量参数μ<1与μ=1两种机制的本质区别，证明0≤μ<1在温和假设下收敛，并构造反例说明μ=1在非可和步长下会因核相关方向失控增长而导致发散。基于此提出PRIME-SR方法，通过主值范围信息自适应选择动量参数以提升优化稳定性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究变分蒙特卡洛（VMC）中随机重构（SR）方法的动量参数稳定性问题。作者阐明了SPRING算法中动量参数μ<1与μ=1两种机制的本质区别，证明0≤μ<1在温和假设下收敛，并构造反例说明μ=1在非可和步长下会因核相关方向失控增长而导致发散。基于此提出PRIME-SR方法，通过主值范围信息自适应选择动量参数以提升优化稳定性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18357v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Variational Monte Carlo (VMC) combined with expressive neural network wavefunctions has become a powerful route to high-accuracy ground-state calculations, yet its practical success hinges on efficient and stable wavefunction optimization. While stochastic reconfiguration (SR) provides a geometry-aware preconditioner motivated by imaginary-time evolution, its Kaczmarz-inspired variant, subsampled projected-increment natural gradient descent (SPRING), achieves state-of-the-art empirical performance. However, the effectiveness of SPRING is highly sensitive to the choice of a momentum-like parameter μ. The original sensitivity of μ and the instability observed at μ=1, have remained unclear. In this work, we clarify the distinct mechanisms governing the regimes μ<1 and μ=1. We establish convergence guarantees for 0łeμ<1 under mild assumptions, and construct counterexamples showing that μ=1 can induce divergence via uncontrolled growth along kernel-related directions when the step-size is not summable. Motivated by these theoretical insights and numerical observations, we further propose Principal Range Informed MomEntum SR (PRIME-SR), a tuning-free momentum-adaptive SR method based on effective spectral dimension and subspace overlap. PRIME-SR achieves performance comparable to optimally tuned SPRING while significantly improving robustness in VMC optimization.

108

物理信息神经网络用于含时多体系统中量子费舍尔信息最大化#

Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Maximizing Quantum Fisher Information in Time-Dependent Many-Body Systems
📚 arXiv👤 Antonio Ferrer-Sánchez, Yolanda Vives-Gilabert, Yue Ban, Xi Chen, José D. Martín-Guerrero📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将物理信息神经网络引入量子计量优化，核心创新在于联合变分PINN与Magnus展开，直接从底层物理学习绝热规范势与调度函数，而非仅依赖欧拉-拉格朗日方程。在多体自旋系统上的优势表明，该方法为含时
该工作提出物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架，通过反绝热量子动力学学习来最大化含时多体系统中的量子费舍尔信息（QFI）。方法结合变分PINN表述与Magnus展开处理时序演化，直接从底层物理推断绝热规范势与调度函数，同时强制协议的欧拉-拉格朗日结构。在多达6量子比特的近邻、偶极及离子阱驱动自旋哈密顿量上的数值结果表明，该框架系统优于仅基于欧拉-拉格朗日条件的参考解。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架，通过反绝热量子动力学学习来最大化含时多体系统中的量子费舍尔信息（QFI）。方法结合变分PINN表述与Magnus展开处理时序演化，直接从底层物理推断绝热规范势与调度函数，同时强制协议的欧拉-拉格朗日结构。在多达6量子比特的近邻、偶极及离子阱驱动自旋哈密顿量上的数值结果表明，该框架系统优于仅基于欧拉-拉格朗日条件的参考解。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18506v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Quantum Fisher Information (QFI) sets the ultimate precision limit for parameter estimation and is therefore a central quantity in quantum metrology. In time-dependent many-body systems, however, maximizing QFI is a highly non-trivial task due to the combined effects of non-commutativity, control complexity, and the exponential growth of the Hilbert space. In this work, we present a physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework to address this problem through the learning of counter-diabatic quantum dynamics. Our approach combines a variational PINN formulation with a Magnus-expansion treatment of time-ordered evolution, enabling the adiabatic gauge potential and the scheduling function to be inferred directly from the underlying physics while enforcing the Euler-Lagrange structure of the protocol. The method is applied to several families of driven spin Hamiltonians, including nearest-neighbor, dipolar, and trapped-ion-inspired interactions, for systems of up to six qubits. The numerical results show that the proposed framework systematically improves over reference solutions based only on the Euler-Lagrange condition, yielding high normalized QFI together with favorable fidelity and extremal-balance metrics while preserving small phsical residuals. The analysis further shows that learning the scheduling function provides a clear performance advantage in most cases, and reveals non-trivial finite-size effects, with q=3 emerging as a particularly challenging regime. Although scalability remains limited by the exponential growth of the operator space and by automatic-differentiation costs, the results demonstrate that PINNs constitute a viable and physically grounded route for learning metrologically optimal control strategies in interacting quantum systems.

109

界面追踪的潜空间动力学辨识及其在冲击诱导孔洞坍塌中的应用#

Latent Space Dynamics Identification for Interface Tracking with Application to Shock-Induced Pore Collapse
📚 arXiv👤 Seung Whan Chung, Christopher Miller, Youngsoo Choi, Paul Tranquilli, H. Keo Springer, Kyle Sullivan📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：提出LaSDI-IT框架，创新性地将界面追踪嵌入潜空间学习，以联合重构物理场与区域指示函数的自编码器架构突破移动边界系统建模难题，在含能材料冲击孔洞坍塌中验证了其对尖锐梯度与动态界面的精准捕捉能力，为
该工作提出LaSDI-IT（界面追踪潜空间动力学辨识）数据驱动框架，结合低维潜空间动力学学习与显式界面感知编码，实现移动材料边界物理系统的精确高效建模。核心为联合重构物理场与指示材料区域/相的指示函数的改进自编码器架构，通过编码空间线性回归学习潜空间动力学，并以高斯过程插值与贪婪采样实现跨参数泛化。在含能材料冲击诱导孔洞坍塌问题上验证了该方法对尖锐温度梯度与动态变形孔几何的追踪能力。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出LaSDI-IT（界面追踪潜空间动力学辨识）数据驱动框架，结合低维潜空间动力学学习与显式界面感知编码，实现移动材料边界物理系统的精确高效建模。核心为联合重构物理场与指示材料区域/相的指示函数的改进自编码器架构，通过编码空间线性回归学习潜空间动力学，并以高斯过程插值与贪婪采样实现跨参数泛化。在含能材料冲击诱导孔洞坍塌问题上验证了该方法对尖锐温度梯度与动态变形孔几何的追踪能力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.10647v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Capturing sharp, evolving interfaces remains a central challenge in reduced-order modeling, especially when data is limited and the system exhibits localized nonlinearities or discontinuities. We propose LaSDI-IT (Latent Space Dynamics Identification for Interface Tracking), a data-driven framework that combines low-dimensional latent dynamics learning with explicit interface-aware encoding to enable accurate and efficient modeling of physical systems involving moving material boundaries. At the core of LaSDI-IT is a revised auto-encoder architecture that jointly reconstructs the physical field and an indicator function representing material regions or phases, allowing the model to track complex interface evolution without requiring detailed physical models or mesh adaptation. The latent dynamics are learned through linear regression in the encoded space and generalized across parameter regimes using Gaussian process interpolation with greedy sampling. We demonstrate LaSDI-IT on the problem of shock-induced pore collapse in high explosives, a process characterized by sharp temperature gradients and dynamically deforming pore geometries. The method achieves relative prediction errors below 9% across the parameter space, accurately recovers key quantities of interest such as pore area and hot spot formation, and matches the performance of dense training with only half the data. This latent dynamics prediction was 106 times faster than the conventional high-fidelity simulation, proving its utility for multi-query applications. These results highlight LaSDI-IT as a general, data-efficient framework for modeling discontinuity-rich systems in computational physics, with potential applications in multiphase flows, fracture mechanics, and phase change problems.

110

TGLF-WINN：聚变湍流传输建模的数据高效深度学习代理模型#

TGLF-WINN: Data-Efficient Deep Learning Surrogate for Turbulent Transport Modeling in Fusion
📚 arXiv👤 Yadi Cao, Futian Zhang, Wesley Liu, Tom Neiser, Orso Meneghini, Lawson Fuller, Sterling Smith, Raffi Nazikian, Brian Sammuli, Rose Yu📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作针对聚变等离子体湍流模拟中TGLF模型计算昂贵的问题，开发了数据高效的深度学习代理模型。其核心创新在于将物理先验融入神经网络架构设计：通过波数空间特征分解降低学习复杂度，利用物理引导的正则化约束
该工作提出TGLF-WINN（波数信息神经网络）作为捕获陀螺-朗道流体（TGLF）模型的数据高效神经网络代理。三项创新包括：原则性特征工程缩小预测目标范围简化学习任务；物理引导的波数分辨正则化改善稀疏数据下泛化；贝叶斯主动学习基于模型不确定性策略选择训练样本。特征调优与波数正则化在全数据集上相对TGLF-NN降低12.5% RMSLE，在稀疏数据下优势更显著，同时保持全可微分性以支持梯度耦合。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出TGLF-WINN（波数信息神经网络）作为捕获陀螺-朗道流体（TGLF）模型的数据高效神经网络代理。三项创新包括：原则性特征工程缩小预测目标范围简化学习任务；物理引导的波数分辨正则化改善稀疏数据下泛化；贝叶斯主动学习基于模型不确定性策略选择训练样本。特征调优与波数正则化在全数据集上相对TGLF-NN降低12.5% RMSLE，在稀疏数据下优势更显著，同时保持全可微分性以支持梯度耦合。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.07024v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The Trapped Gyro-Landau Fluid (TGLF) model provides fast, accurate predictions of turbulent transport in tokamaks, but whole device simulations requiring thousands of evaluations remain computationally expensive. Neural network (NN) surrogates offer accelerated inference with fully differentiable approximations that enable gradient-based coupling but typically require large training datasets to capture transport flux variations across plasma conditions, creating significant training burden and limiting applicability to expensive gyrokinetic simulations. We propose TGLF-WINN (Wavenumber-Informed Neural Network) with three key innovations: (1) principled feature engineering that reduces target prediction range, simplifying the learning task; (2) physics-guided wavenumber-resolved regularization to improve generalization under sparse data; and (3) Bayesian Active Learning (BAL) to strategically select training samples based on model uncertainty, reducing data requirements while maintaining accuracy. Feature tuning and wavenumber regularization together deliver a 12.5% relative RMSLE reduction over TGLF-NN on the full dataset; under sparse, unfiltered training (approximately 1/9 the full size) they yield an order-of-magnitude smaller RMSLE degradation than TGLF-NN, with the wavenumber-informed regularization imposing a physics-guided constraint on per-mode fluxes. Adding Bayesian Active Learning, TGLF-WINN matches TGLF-NN's full-data offline accuracy using only 25% of the training data, within 2.8% of TGLF-NN's full-data baseline and 4.3% of our own full-data result. A downstream flux-matching workflow further shows practicality: the NN surrogate gives a 45x speedup over TGLF with comparable reconstruction accuracy.

111

估计对撞机轻离子束嬗变污染的数据驱动方法#

Data-driven method to estimate contamination from light ion beam transmutation at colliders
📚 arXiv👤 Sruthy Jyothi Das, Austin Baty📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文针对LHC与RHIC轻离子对撞中电磁解离导致的束流污染模拟难题，创新性地提出数据驱动评估方法，利用污染物离子的时间依赖特性构建控制区域，规避了传统模拟的不确定性，为实验物理分析提供可靠的污染定量工
该工作提出数据驱动方法评估相对论轻离子（氧、氖、镁等）对撞中束流污染物对物理分析的潜在影响。方法利用污染物离子种类的时间依赖性与较小尺寸定义控制区域以量化污染效应，通过简单模型说明方法原理并研究其鲁棒性。电磁解离导致的束流污染难以精确模拟，该方法可为近期LHC与RHIC轻离子对撞实验研究提供参考。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出数据驱动方法评估相对论轻离子（氧、氖、镁等）对撞中束流污染物对物理分析的潜在影响。方法利用污染物离子种类的时间依赖性与较小尺寸定义控制区域以量化污染效应，通过简单模型说明方法原理并研究其鲁棒性。电磁解离导致的束流污染难以精确模拟，该方法可为近期LHC与RHIC轻离子对撞实验研究提供参考。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.09736v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Collisions of relativistic light ions, such as oxygen, neon, and magnesium, have been proposed as a way to examine the system-size dependence of dynamics typically associated with the quark-gluon plasma produced in collisions of heavier ions such as xenon, gold, or lead. Recent efforts at both the Relativistic Heavy Ion Collider (RHIC) and Large Hadron Collider (LHC) have produced large datasets of proton-oxygen, oxygen-oxygen, and neon-neon collisions, catalyzing intense interest in experimental backgrounds associated with light-ion collisions. In particular, electromagnetic dissociation of light ions while they are circulating in a collider can result in beam contamination that is difficult to simulate precisely. Here we propose a data-driven method for evaluating the potential impact of beam contaminants on physics analyses. The method exploits the time dependence and smaller size of contaminant ion species to define control regions that can be used to quantify potential contamination effects. A simple model is used to illustrate the method and to study its robustness. This method can inform studies of recent LHC and RHIC data and could also be useful for future light-ion programs at the LHC and beyond.

112

利用机器学习天气模拟器研究快速辐射驱动响应#

Examining Fast Radiatively Driven Responses Using Machine-Learning Weather Emulators
📚 arXiv👤 Ankur Mahesh, William D. Collins, Travis A. O'Brien, Paul B. Goddard, Sinclaire Zebaze, Shashank Subramanian, James P. C. Duncan, Oliver Watt-Meyer, Boris Bonev, Thorsten Kurth, Karthik Kashinath, Michael S. Pritchard, Da Yang📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将机器学习天气模拟器引入气候快反馈研究，突破传统气候模式计算瓶颈，实现基于历史再分析数据对辐射-对流平衡及水循环快速响应的高效模拟，为解析温室气体强迫的瞬时大气调整机制提供了新工具，兼具
气候系统对温室气体增加的响应由快、慢反馈共同调控。慢反馈涉及海洋温度年代际变化，而快反馈则源于大气物理过程的周尺度快速响应，且已存在于当前气候中。该研究指出，基于历史气象再分析数据训练的机器学习天气模拟器可用于研究辐射-对流平衡及全球水循环对二氧化碳等扰动的响应。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

气候系统对温室气体增加的响应由快、慢反馈共同调控。慢反馈涉及海洋温度年代际变化，而快反馈则源于大气物理过程的周尺度快速响应，且已存在于当前气候中。该研究指出，基于历史气象再分析数据训练的机器学习天气模拟器可用于研究辐射-对流平衡及全球水循环对二氧化碳等扰动的响应。

English Abstract

arXiv:2602.16090v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The response of the climate system to increased greenhouse gases and other radiative perturbations is governed by a combination of fast and slow feedbacks. Slow feedbacks are typically activated in response to changes in ocean temperatures on decadal timescales and manifest as changes in climatic state with no recent historical analogue. However, fast feedbacks are activated in response to rapid atmospheric physical processes on weekly timescales, and they are already operative in the present-day climate. This distinction implies that the physics of fast radiative feedbacks is present in the historical meteorological reanalyses used to train many recent successful machine-learning-based (ML) emulators of weather and climate. In addition, these feedbacks are functional under the historical boundary conditions pertaining to the top-of-atmosphere radiative balance and sea-surface temperatures. Together, these factors imply that we can use historically trained ML weather emulators to study the response of radiative-convective equilibrium (RCE), and hence the global hydrological cycle, to perturbations in carbon dioxide and other well-mixed greenhouse gases. Without retraining on prospective Earth system conditions, we use ML weather emulators to quantify the fast precipitation response to reduced and elevated carbon dioxed concentrations with no recent historical precedent. We show that the responses from historically trained emulators agree with those produced by full-physics Earth System Models (ESMs). In conclusion, we discuss the prospects for and advantages from using ESMs and ML emulators to study fast processes in global climate.

113

神经算子：数据是否足以建模世界？数据驱动科学机器学习的范式洞察#

Neural Operator: Is data all you need to model the world? An insight into the paradigm of data-driven scientific ML
📚 arXiv👤 Hrishikesh Viswanath, Md Ashiqur Rahman, Abhijeet Vyas, Andrey Shor, Beatriz Medeiros, Stephanie Hernandez, Suhas Eswarappa Prameela, Aniket Bera📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：神经算子突破传统PDE求解对网格离散化的依赖，以连续函数空间映射实现分辨率无关的物理场预测，为实时仿真、数字孪生及多尺度耦合问题开辟新路径，标志着科学计算从"方程驱动"向"数据-物理协同驱动"的范式跃
该综述探讨数据驱动机器学习方法（特别是神经算子）如何补充传统偏微分方程数值求解技术。神经算子具有离散不变性和分辨率不变性等优势，可为热传导、流体流动、弹性力学等物理工程问题提供更快速的替代方案。文章同时讨论了机器学习方法的开放性问题及其在科学与工程计算中的应用前景。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该综述探讨数据驱动机器学习方法（特别是神经算子）如何补充传统偏微分方程数值求解技术。神经算子具有离散不变性和分辨率不变性等优势，可为热传导、流体流动、弹性力学等物理工程问题提供更快速的替代方案。文章同时讨论了机器学习方法的开放性问题及其在科学与工程计算中的应用前景。

English Abstract

arXiv:2301.13331v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Numerical approximations of partial differential equations (PDEs) are routinely employed to formulate the solution of physics, engineering, and mathematical problems involving functions of several variables, such as the propagation of heat or sound, fluid flow, elasticity, electrostatics, electrodynamics, and more. While this has led to solving many complex phenomena, there are some limitations. Conventional approaches such as Finite Element Methods (FEMs) and Finite Difference Methods (FDMs) require considerable time and are computationally expensive. In contrast, data-driven machine learning-based methods, such as neural networks, provide a faster, fairly accurate alternative, and, in particular, focus on neural operators, which have certain advantages such as discretization invariance and resolution invariance. This article aims to provide a comprehensive insight into how data-driven approaches can complement conventional techniques to solve engineering and physics problems, while also noting some of the open problems of machine learning-based approaches. We will note how these new computational approaches can bring immense advantages in tackling many problems in fundamental and applied physics.

114

含自旋与同位旋自由度的两体系统神经网络方法#

A neural network approach for two-body systems with spin and isospin degrees of freedom
📚 arXiv👤 Chuanxin Wang, Tomoya Naito, Jian Li, Haozhao Liang📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将非全连接深度神经网络与无监督学习相结合，突破性地引入自旋-同位旋自由度，解决了传统方法难以处理的两体系统多自由度耦合问题。氘核验证表明，此方法为少体核结构第一性原理计算提供了可扩展的新范式，有
该研究提出一种改进的机器学习方法来计算两体系统基态，通过采用非全连接深度神经网络和无监督学习技术，将原有方法扩展至包含自旋和同位旋自由度的情况。以氘核唯一束缚态的计算验证了该方法的有效性。

中文摘要

该研究提出一种改进的机器学习方法来计算两体系统基态，通过采用非全连接深度神经网络和无监督学习技术，将原有方法扩展至包含自旋和同位旋自由度的情况。以氘核唯一束缚态的计算验证了该方法的有效性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2403.16819v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We propose an enhanced machine learning method to calculate the ground state of two-body systems. By extending the original method [Naito, Naito, and Hashimoto, Phys. Rev. Research 5, 033189 (2023)], the present method enables consideration of the spin and isospin degrees of freedom by employing a non-fully connected deep neural network and the unsupervised machine learning technique. The validity of this method is verified by calculating the unique bound state of the deuteron.

115

跨异构数据集的锂离子电池膝点感知寿命预测的连续老化轨迹表示#

Continuous ageing trajectory representations for knee-aware lifetime prediction of lithium-ion batteries across heterogeneous dataset
📚 arXiv👤 Agnieszka Pregowska, Stefan Marynowicz📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究的核心创新在于将异构电池老化数据映射至统一的连续表示空间，突破了数据集与循环协议差异导致的模型失效瓶颈。其意义在于：首次量化验证膝点起始与寿命终止的高度相关性，为早期寿命预测提供可解释的物理锚点
该研究提出基于电压-容量和容量-循环轨迹连续表示的统一电池老化分析框架，以应对电池间差异性、异构循环协议及数据驱动模型跨数据集迁移性不足的挑战。通过对NASA、CALCE、ISU-ILCC等公开数据集中250余块电池的分析，发现膝点起始与寿命终止之间存在显著统计相关性（Pearson 0.75-0.84），且早期寿命模型可提供随数据积累而趋于稳定的剩余使用寿命预测。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究提出基于电压-容量和容量-循环轨迹连续表示的统一电池老化分析框架，以应对电池间差异性、异构循环协议及数据驱动模型跨数据集迁移性不足的挑战。通过对NASA、CALCE、ISU-ILCC等公开数据集中250余块电池的分析，发现膝点起始与寿命终止之间存在显著统计相关性（Pearson 0.75-0.84），且早期寿命模型可提供随数据积累而趋于稳定的剩余使用寿命预测。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16580v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurate assessment of lithium-ion battery ageing is challenged by cell-to-cell variability, heterogeneous cycling protocols, and limited transferability of data-driven models across datasets. In particular, robust identification of degradation transitions, such as the knee point, and reliable early-life prediction of remaining useful life (RUL) remain open problems. This study proposes a unified framework for battery ageing analysis based on continuous representations of voltage-capacity and capacity-cycle trajectories learned from heterogeneous public datasets (NASA, CALCE, ISU-ILCC). The continuous formulation enables consistent extraction of degradation descriptors, including curvature, plateau length and knee-related metrics, while reducing sensitivity to dataset-specific discretisation. Across more than 250 cells, statistically significant correlations between knee onset and end-of-life (Pearson 0.75-0.84) are observed. Additional early-life analysis confirms that knee-related features retain predictive value when estimated from partial trajectories. Early-life models provide increasingly stable RUL predictions as the number of observed cycles increases, with meaningful predictive performance emerging within the first 5-20 cycles and remain robust under cross-dataset domain shift. The framework integrates continuous modelling, feature extraction and uncertainty-aware prediction, providing an interpretable and dataset-consistent approach demonstrating robustness across heterogeneous dataset types. Compared with conventional discrete or feature-based methods, the proposed representation reduces sensitivity to sampling resolution and improves cross-dataset consistency. The study is limited to laboratory-scale datasets and capacity-based end-of-life definitions.

116

FLARE：定向能量沉积位移场预测的数据高效替代模型#

FLARE: A Data-Efficient Surrogate for Predicting Displacement Fields in Directed Energy Deposition
📚 arXiv👤 Kittipong Thiamchaiboonthawee, Ghadi Nehme, Ram Mohan Telikicherla, Jiawei Tian, Balaji Jayaraman, Vikas Chandan, Dhanushkodi Mariappan, Faez Ahmed📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：FLARE通过将位移场编码为隐式神经场，并在权重空间施加仿射正则化，实现了小样本条件下对DED工艺参数-位移场映射的高效学习，突破了传统有限元计算成本高的瓶颈，为金属增材制造在线变形控制提供了可行的实
该研究提出FLARE（权重空间线性仿射重构场预测），一种用于预测定向能量沉积冷却后位移场的数据高效替代建模框架。通过开源有限元框架建立预定义几何的DED仿真流程，生成涵盖不同几何、激光功率和沉积速度的仿真数据集。FLARE将每次仿真编码为隐式神经场，并对神经网络权重进行正则化以遵循输入参数空间的仿射结构。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究提出FLARE（权重空间线性仿射重构场预测），一种用于预测定向能量沉积冷却后位移场的数据高效替代建模框架。通过开源有限元框架建立预定义几何的DED仿真流程，生成涵盖不同几何、激光功率和沉积速度的仿真数据集。FLARE将每次仿真编码为隐式神经场，并对神经网络权重进行正则化以遵循输入参数空间的仿射结构。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16649v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Directed energy deposition (DED) produces complex thermo-mechanical responses that can lead to distortion and reduced dimensional accuracy of a manufactured part. Thermo-mechanical finite element simulations are widely used to estimate these effects, but their computational cost and the complexity of accurately capturing DED physics limit their use in design iteration and process optimization. This paper introduces FLARE (Field Prediction via Linear Affine Reconstruction in wEight-space), a data-efficient surrogate modeling framework for predicting post-cooling displacement fields in DED from geometric and process parameters. We develop a predefined-geometry DED simulation workflow using an open-source finite element framework and generate a dataset of simulations with varying geometry, laser power, and deposition velocity. Each simulation provides full-field displacement, stress, strain, and temperature data throughout the manufacturing process. FLARE encodes each simulation as an implicit neural field and regularizes the corresponding neural-network weights so that they follow the affine structure of the input parameter space. This enables prediction of unseen parameter combinations by reconstructing network weights through affine mixing of training examples. On this DED benchmark, the method shows improved accuracy compared to baseline methods in both in-distribution and extrapolation settings. Although the present study focuses on DED displacement prediction, the proposed affine weight-space reconstruction framework offers a promising approach for data-efficient surrogate modeling of physical fields.

117

无需任务特定调优的逆问题噪声自适应扩散采样#

Noise-Adaptive Diffusion Sampling for Inverse Problems Without Task-Specific Tuning
📚 arXiv👤 Yingzhi Xia, Setthakorn Tanomkiattikun, Liangli Zhen, Zaiwang Gu📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将逆问题求解重构为初始噪声空间的哈密顿蒙特卡洛采样，以确定性扩散映射规避流形约束困境；噪声自适应扩展使其无需预设噪声模型即可处理真实场景，为医学成像、遥感等领域提供了即插即用的鲁棒重建框架。
该研究提出噪声空间哈密顿蒙特卡洛方法，将反向扩散视为从初始噪声到清晰图像的确定性映射，通过在初始噪声空间中完全进行推断来避免流形不可行性问题。理论分析支持该方法对解空间的全面探索以规避局部最优，并进一步扩展为噪声自适应变体以处理未知噪声类型和水平的逆问题。在线性与非线性逆问题上的实验表明其重建质量优越且跨噪声条件鲁棒。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究提出噪声空间哈密顿蒙特卡洛方法，将反向扩散视为从初始噪声到清晰图像的确定性映射，通过在初始噪声空间中完全进行推断来避免流形不可行性问题。理论分析支持该方法对解空间的全面探索以规避局部最优，并进一步扩展为噪声自适应变体以处理未知噪声类型和水平的逆问题。在线性与非线性逆问题上的实验表明其重建质量优越且跨噪声条件鲁棒。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16919v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) have recently shown remarkable performance on inverse problems (IPs). Optimization-based methods can fast solve IPs using DMs as powerful regularizers, but they are susceptible to local minima and noise overfitting. Although DMs can provide strong priors for Bayesian approaches, enforcing measurement consistency during the denoising process leads to manifold infeasibility issues. We propose Noise-space Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (N-HMC), a posterior sampling method that treats reverse diffusion as a deterministic mapping from initial noise to clean images. N-HMC enables comprehensive exploration of the solution space, avoiding local optima. By moving inference entirely into the initial-noise space, N-HMC keeps proposals on the learned data manifold. We provide a comprehensive theoretical analysis of our approach and extend the framework to a noise-adaptive variant (NA-NHMC) that effectively handles IPs with unknown noise type and level. Extensive experiments across four linear and three nonlinear inverse problems demonstrate that NA-NHMC achieves superior reconstruction quality with robust performance across different hyperparameters and initializations, significantly outperforming recent state-of-the-art methods. The code is available at https://github.com/NA-HMC/NA-HMC.

118

图、单纯形与胞腔学习的收缩与同漏持久同调#

Contraction and Hourglass Persistence for Learning on Graphs, Simplices, and Cells
📚 arXiv👤 Mattie Ji, Indradyumna Roy, Vikas Garg📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文突破传统持久同调仅增广子图的范式，首创收缩同调作为对偶拓扑操作，建立其与前向方法的表达差异理论；提出同漏持久性统一双向序列，兼顾表达力与稳定性，实现可微嵌入，为GNN提供新型拓扑特征学习框架。
针对图神经网络中持久同调方法仅遍历递增子图序列的局限，本文提出收缩同调（CH）作为原则性拓扑操作，并证明其与前向持久同调在表达能力上的差异。进而引入"同漏持久性"描述子，通过交错包含与收缩序列提升表达性、可学习性与稳定性，设计可嵌入端到端可微GNN流程的高效算法，在标准图数据集上持续优于多种持久同调方法。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对图神经网络中持久同调方法仅遍历递增子图序列的局限，本文提出收缩同调（CH）作为原则性拓扑操作，并证明其与前向持久同调在表达能力上的差异。进而引入"同漏持久性"描述子，通过交错包含与收缩序列提升表达性、可学习性与稳定性，设计可嵌入端到端可微GNN流程的高效算法，在标准图数据集上持续优于多种持久同调方法。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17548v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Persistent homology (PH) encodes global information, such as cycles, and is thus increasingly integrated into graph neural networks (GNNs). PH methods in GNNs typically traverse an increasing sequence of subgraphs. In this work, we first expose limitations of this inclusion procedure. To remedy these shortcomings, we analyze contractions as a principled topological operation, in particular, for graph representation learning. We study the persistence of contraction sequences, which we call Contraction Homology (CH). We establish that forward PH and CH differ in expressivity. We then introduce Hourglass Persistence, a class of topological descriptors that interleave a sequence of inclusions and contractions to boost expressivity, learnability, and stability. We also study related families parametrized by two paradigms. We also discuss how our framework extends to simplicial and cellular networks. We further design efficient algorithms that are pluggable into end-to-end differentiable GNN pipelines, enabling consistent empirical improvements over many PH methods across standard real-world graph datasets. Code is available at hrefhttps://github.com/Aalto-QuML/Hourglassthis https URL.

119

面向暖通空调系统的可扩展物理信息神经微分方程与数据驱动算法#

Scalable Physics-Informed Neural Differential Equations and Data-Driven Algorithms for HVAC Systems
📚 arXiv👤 Hanfeng Zhai, Hongtao Qiao, Hassan Mansour, Christopher Laughman📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将物理信息神经常微分方程与微分代数方程求解器分层耦合，通过门控隐态演化与轻量残差校正实现梯度稳定与约束满足，为大规模暖通空调系统的高保真实时仿真提供了可扩展的物理-数据融合计算范式。
本文提出耦合物理信息神经常微分方程（PINODE）与微分代数方程求解器的大规模HVAC系统仿真框架。组件层面采用隐式PINODE预测守恒量（制冷剂质量与内能），通过门控架构与层归一化实现梯度稳定的隐态演化；系统层面集成DAE求解器显式强制节点约束，并引入轻量校正网络消除残差偏差，在双压缩机与扩展网络研究中验证了精度与效率的权衡优化。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文提出耦合物理信息神经常微分方程（PINODE）与微分代数方程求解器的大规模HVAC系统仿真框架。组件层面采用隐式PINODE预测守恒量（制冷剂质量与内能），通过门控架构与层归一化实现梯度稳定的隐态演化；系统层面集成DAE求解器显式强制节点约束，并引入轻量校正网络消除残差偏差，在双压缩机与扩展网络研究中验证了精度与效率的权衡优化。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.18438v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a scalable, data-driven simulation framework for large-scale heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) systems that couples physics-informed neural ordinary differential equations (PINODEs) with differential-algebraic equation (DAE) solvers. At the component level, we learn heat-exchanger dynamics using an implicit PINODE formulation that predicts conserved quantities (refrigerant mass Mᵣ and internal energy Eₕₓ₎ as outputs, enabling physics-informed training via automatic differentiation of mass/energy balances. Stable long-horizon prediction is achieved through gradient-stabilized latent evolution with gated architectures and layer normalization. At the system level, we integrate learned components with DAE solvers (IDA and DASSL) that explicitly enforce junction constraints (pressure equilibrium and mass-flow consistency), and we use Bayesian optimization to tune solver parameters for accuracy--efficiency trade-offs. To reduce residual system-level bias, we introduce a lightweight corrector network trained on short trajectory segments. Across dual-compressor and scaled network studies, the proposed approach attains multi-fold speedups over high-fidelity simulation while keeping errors low (MAPE below a few percent) and scales to systems with up to 32 compressor--condenser pairs.

120

自适应坐标变换下Hermite逼近的收敛理论#

Convergence theory for Hermite approximations under adaptive coordinate transformations
📚 arXiv👤 Yahya Saleh📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文首次建立自适应坐标变换与Hermite谱逼近的等价原理，将变换后逼近误差转化为经典Hermite展开的拉回正则性问题；通过构造单调传输映射实现目标函数衰减与Hermite基底匹配，为无界区域上非标
本文首次给出自适应坐标变换下Hermite展开逼近函数的误差估计，建立等价原理：在变换基底下逼近函数f等价于在Hermite函数基底中逼近f的拉回。利用经典Hermite展开理论，导出变换坐标下的误差估计与拉回正则性的关系，并构造单调传输映射使目标函数衰减与Hermite基底对齐，保证谱收敛速率。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文首次给出自适应坐标变换下Hermite展开逼近函数的误差估计，建立等价原理：在变换基底下逼近函数f等价于在Hermite函数基底中逼近f的拉回。利用经典Hermite展开理论，导出变换坐标下的误差估计与拉回正则性的关系，并构造单调传输映射使目标函数衰减与Hermite基底对齐，保证谱收敛速率。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.16975v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent work has shown that parameterizing and optimizing coordinate transformations using normalizing flows, i.e., invertible neural networks, can significantly accelerate the convergence of spectral approximations. We present the first error estimates for approximating functions using Hermite expansions composed with adaptive coordinate transformations. Our analysis establishes an equivalence principle: approximating a function f in the span of the transformed basis is equivalent to approximating the pullback of f in the span of Hermite functions. This allows us to leverage the classical approximation theory of Hermite expansions to derive error estimates in transformed coordinates in terms of the regularity of the pullback. We present an example demonstrating how a nonlinear coordinate transformation can enhance the convergence of Hermite expansions. Focusing on smooth functions decaying along the real axis, we construct a monotone transport map that aligns the decay of the target function with the Hermite basis. This guarantees spectral convergence rates for the corresponding Hermite expansion. Our analysis provides theoretical insight into the convergence behavior of adaptive Hermite approximations based on normalizing flows, as recently explored in the computational quantum physics literature.

121

连续时间离散空间耦合隐马尔可夫模型的高效推断#

Efficient Inference for Coupled Hidden Markov Models in Continuous Time and Discrete Space
📚 arXiv👤 Giosue Migliorini, Padhraic Smyth📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出耦合隐马尔可夫模型的连续时间推断新框架，核心创新在于将参数化生成元与前瞻扭曲势估计相结合，突破传统离散时间限制；通过扭曲序贯蒙特卡洛实现高效后验采样，为图结构流行病学建模及野火蔓延预测等时空动
本文提出潜变量交互粒子系统模型类，参数化系统中每条马尔可夫链的生成元，并引入高效参数化估计前瞻函数（扭曲势）以预判未来信息。将该近似纳入扭曲序贯蒙特卡洛采样框架，在图上的潜SIRS模型后验推断任务及基于真实数据训练的野火蔓延神经模型上验证了方法的有效性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

本文提出潜变量交互粒子系统模型类，参数化系统中每条马尔可夫链的生成元，并引入高效参数化估计前瞻函数（扭曲势）以预判未来信息。将该近似纳入扭曲序贯蒙特卡洛采样框架，在图上的潜SIRS模型后验推断任务及基于真实数据训练的野火蔓延神经模型上验证了方法的有效性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.12916v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Systems of interacting continuous-time Markov chains are a powerful model class, but inference is typically intractable in high dimensional settings. Auxiliary information, such as noisy observations, is typically only available at discrete times, and incorporating it via a Doob's h-transform gives rise to an intractable posterior process that requires approximation. We introduce Latent Interacting Particle Systems, a model class parameterizing the generator of each Markov chain in the system. Our inference method involves estimating look-ahead functions (twist potentials) that anticipate future information, for which we introduce an efficient parameterization. We incorporate this approximation in a twisted Sequential Monte Carlo sampling scheme. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on a challenging posterior inference task for a latent SIRS model on a graph, and on a neural model for wildfire spread dynamics trained on real data.

122

SWORD：有序与无序晶体的对称性和Wyckoff序列表征#

SWORD: Symmetry and Wyckoff-sequence of Ordered and Disordered crystals
📚 arXiv👤 Yuyao Huang, Wei Nong, Shuya Yamazaki, Martin Hoffmann Petersen, Jianghai Wang, Ruiming Zhu, Kedar Hippalgaonkar📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：SWORD首创基于Wyckoff位置的对称感知字符串表示，突破性地统一了有序与无序晶体的结构描述框架。其核心创新在于通过混合度描述符量化部分占据位点的复杂无序，解决了传统方法无法显式表征共占物种的难题
该工作提出SWORD——一种基于Wyckoff位置的对称感知字符串表示方法，兼容有序和无序晶体。SWORD实现：(i)对称等价结构描述的标准化统一标记；(ii)部分占据位点上共占物种的显式表示；(iii)通过混合度描述符量化复杂无序。这些特性支持高效结构分组、重复识别和无序结构的精细优化，为材料发现中的新颖性评估提供了可靠工具。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出SWORD——一种基于Wyckoff位置的对称感知字符串表示方法，兼容有序和无序晶体。SWORD实现：(i)对称等价结构描述的标准化统一标记；(ii)部分占据位点上共占物种的显式表示；(iii)通过混合度描述符量化复杂无序。这些特性支持高效结构分组、重复识别和无序结构的精细优化，为材料发现中的新颖性评估提供了可靠工具。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.17994v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Novelty in materials discovery requires candidates to be distinct, non-redundant, and thermodynamically plausible. While crystallographic databases continue to expand in both size and complexity, making efficient and reliable novelty assessment has become increasingly difficult. This becomes particularly acute when crystallographic disorder is involved, as partial occupancies greatly enlarge the structure-composition space and obscure the identification of genuinely distinct structures. Here, we introduce SWORD, a symmetry-aware, Wyckoff-based string representation compatible with both ordered and disordered crystals. SWORD provides (i) standardization of symmetry-equivalent structural descriptions into a consistent label, (ii) explicitly represents co-occupying species on partially occupied sites, and (iii) quantifies complex disorder through a degree of mixing descriptor that captures continuous variation in site stoichiometry. These features enable efficient structure grouping, duplicate identification, and finer refinement of disordered structures. Benchmarking against existing fingerprint and structure-matching methods shows that SWORD remains invariant under identity-preserving transformations while retaining interpretable sensitivity to structural perturbations. In addition, SWORD shows competitive performance in associating unrelaxed and intermediate configurations with their final relaxed states along relaxation trajectories. This feature could enable more reliable novelty assessment directly from partially relaxed or even unrelaxed generated structures. Finally, SWORD was used to showcase its capability of disorder-aware database-scale deduplication and curation for the Inorganic Crystal Structure Database (ICSD). The curated ICSD would serve as the basis for the materials informatics and data-driven materials design in the era of artificial intelligence.

123

通过数据驱动代理模型增强纯及混合垂向平衡方案#

Augmenting a pure and hybrid vertical equilibrium scheme via data-driven surrogate modelling
📚 arXiv👤 Ivan Buntic, Bernd Flemisch📅 2026-04-21🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文针对混合垂向平衡模型因界面耦合导致计算效率低下的瓶颈，创新性地引入轻量级数据驱动代理模型替代耗时的数值求解环节，通过预测气羽距离与粗化级流动性实现加速，同时严格保持质量守恒等物理约束，为多孔介质流
针对多孔介质流体流动模拟中混合垂向平衡(VE)模型因耦合界面引入计算开销、甚至慢于全传统模拟的问题，提出利用数据驱动代理模型加速整体方案。通过预测VE模型中的气羽距离和粗化级流动性，并增强耦合方案计算，同时选用推理时间短的代理模型以最小化频繁函数调用的开销。该方法在部署数据驱动模型的同时保持质量守恒等关键物理性质。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对多孔介质流体流动模拟中混合垂向平衡(VE)模型因耦合界面引入计算开销、甚至慢于全传统模拟的问题，提出利用数据驱动代理模型加速整体方案。通过预测VE模型中的气羽距离和粗化级流动性，并增强耦合方案计算，同时选用推理时间短的代理模型以最小化频繁函数调用的开销。该方法在部署数据驱动模型的同时保持质量守恒等关键物理性质。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.12861v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Vertical equilibrium (VE) models have been introduced as computationally efficient alternatives to traditional mass and momentum balance equations for fluid flow in porous media. Since VE models are only accurate in regions where phase equilibrium holds and traditional simulations are computationally demanding, hybrid methods have been proposed to combine the accuracy of the full-dimensional approach with the efficiency of VE model. However, coupling both models introduces computational overhead that can make hybrid simulations slower than fully traditional ones. To address the computational overhead introduced by coupling interfaces in hybrid models, we utilize data-driven surrogates to accelerate the overall scheme. To this end, we predict the gas plume distance and coarse-level mobilities in the VE model, and also enhance the computation of the coupling scheme via surrogates. We focus on surrogate models with short inference times to minimize computational overhead during frequent function calls. The proposed approach preserves key physical properties, such as mass conservation, despite the deployment of data-driven models, while substantially reducing simulation runtimes. Overall, combining data-driven methods with the hybrid VE scheme yields an enhanced model that outperforms traditional simulations in speed while introducing only negligible errors.

124

原子尺度有序性实现β-Ga₂O₃/4H-SiC界面高界面热导#

Atomic-scale order enables high thermal boundary conductance at β-Ga₂O₃/4H-SiC interfaces
📚 arXiv👤 Hongao Yang, Yongtao Yang, Yuanbin Liu, Tao Ding, Yang Shen, Jiawei Huang, Weigang Ma, Linfeng Fei, Zhenping Wu, Gábor Csányi, Bingyang Cao📅 2026-04-20🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究揭示了β-Ga₂O₃/4H-SiC界面热输运中"无序增模式"与"有序保相干"的竞争机制，突破性地指出原子尺度有序性对维持声子相干性的关键作用，为氧化镓功率器件的散热优化与外延生长工艺设计提供了原
研究结合机器学习原子势与晶格动力学，系统研究了β-Ga₂O₃/4H-SiC异质界面从无序到原子级锐利的结构变化对热输运的影响。发现界面无序虽引入额外声子模式促进振动阻抗匹配，但同时破坏界面声子相干性；恢复原子尺度有序性可保持相干性并获得显著更高的热边界电导。该工作为可控外延生长高质量氧化镓/碳化硅异质结构提供了理论指导。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究结合机器学习原子势与晶格动力学，系统研究了β-Ga₂O₃/4H-SiC异质界面从无序到原子级锐利的结构变化对热输运的影响。发现界面无序虽引入额外声子模式促进振动阻抗匹配，但同时破坏界面声子相干性；恢复原子尺度有序性可保持相干性并获得显著更高的热边界电导。该工作为可控外延生长高质量氧化镓/碳化硅异质结构提供了理论指导。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15394v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Thermal boundary conductance (TBC) at dissimilar interfaces imposes a fundamental limit on electronic device performance, yet predicting and understanding heat transport across realistic, disordered boundaries remains elusive. Here, we develop a computational framework that combines machine-learned interatomic potentials with lattice dynamics to address the long-standing problem of how interfacial structure, from disordered to atomically sharp, affects thermal transport in the technologically important β-Ga₂O₃/4H-SiC heterostructure. By explicitly accounting for phonon wave-particle duality, we show that interfacial disorder introduces additional interfacial phonon modes that facilitate vibrational impedance matching between the two highly dissimilar crystals, yet it simultaneously disrupts interfacial phonon coherence and limits the potential heat-transport benefit. Our atomistic simulations further indicate that restoring atomic-scale order preserves coherence and yields markedly higher conductance. These insights motivate the controlled epitaxial growth of β-Ga₂O₃/4H-SiC heterostructures with systematically tuned interfacial order. Experimental measurements validate our predictions, achieving a record-high TBC of 231 MW m⁻² K⁻¹ at atomically sharp junctions. Beyond the immediate implications for β-Ga₂O₃₋based power electronics, our results establish the preservation of interfacial phonon coherence as an effective strategy for mitigating thermal bottlenecks in mismatched systems.

125

通过基变换增强神经网络变分蒙特卡洛#

Enhancing Neural-Network Variational Monte Carlo through Basis Transformation
📚 arXiv👤 Zhixuan Liu, Dongheng Qian, Jing Wang📅 2026-04-20🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出一种基变换策略，通过引入可学习参数α将多体波函数投影至高斯基，以提升神经网络变分蒙特卡洛的基态学习效率。该方法以极低成本显著降低三维均匀电子气的变分能量，并精确捕获费米液体-维格纳晶体相变，为
该工作为神经网络变分蒙特卡洛（NNVMC）引入了一种物理启发的基变换方法，通过将多体波函数表示于高斯基中，引入单一可学习局域参数α来重塑目标基态以提高可学习性。该方法计算开销极小，可与现有神经网络架构无缝结合。以三维均匀电子气为基准，该基变换一致降低了FermiNet和消息传递神经网络架构的变分能量，对后者更精确地确定了费米液体到维格纳晶体的相变。该结果为连续空间NNVMC的改进开辟了新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作为神经网络变分蒙特卡洛（NNVMC）引入了一种物理启发的基变换方法，通过将多体波函数表示于高斯基中，引入单一可学习局域参数α来重塑目标基态以提高可学习性。该方法计算开销极小，可与现有神经网络架构无缝结合。以三维均匀电子气为基准，该基变换一致降低了FermiNet和消息传递神经网络架构的变分能量，对后者更精确地确定了费米液体到维格纳晶体的相变。该结果为连续空间NNVMC的改进开辟了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15888v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Neural-network variational Monte Carlo (NNVMC) has emerged as a powerful tool for solving quantum many-body problems, yet systematic pathways for improving its accuracy remain largely heuristic. Here, we introduce a physically motivated basis transformation for NNVMC that enhances variational expressivity without increasing the complexity of the neural-network ansatz itself. By formulating the many-body wave function in a Gaussian basis, we introduce a single learnable locality parameter, α, that reshapes the target ground state into a more learnable representation. This approach introduces minimal computational overhead and can be readily combined with existing neural-network architectures. Using the three-dimensional homogeneous electron gas as a benchmark, we show that the optimized basis transformation consistently lowers the variational energy for both FermiNet and message-passing neural-network architectures. Notably, for the latter, it enables a more precise determination of the Fermi liquid to Wigner crystal phase transition. More broadly, our results highlight basis transformation as a new route to improving NNVMC in continuous space, showing that accuracy can be enhanced not only by refining the ansatz but also by making the target ground state easier to represent.

126

基于深度学习的扭转原子级薄双层材料的识别与结构表征#

Identification and Structural Characterization of Twisted Atomically Thin Bilayer Materials by Deep Learning
📚 arXiv👤 Haitao Yang, Ruiqi Hu, Heng Wu, Xiaolong He, Yan Zhou, Yizhe Xue, Kexin He, Wenshuai Hu, Haosen Chen, Mingming Gong, Xin Zhang, Ping-Heng Tan, Eduardo R Hernández, Yong Xie📅 2026-04-20🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作核心创新在于构建"语义分割+合成数据训练"的双阶段深度学习框架，突破扭转角预测对大量实验标注数据的依赖；其意义在于为CVD生长二维转角材料提供高通量、自动化的结构表征方案，加速扭转电子学材料筛选
该工作开发了自动化识别CVD生长MoS₂薄片厚度及扭转角的可扩展方法。首先利用语义分割CNN识别单层/多层MoS₂，继而训练基于超过10,000张合成图像数据集的CNN模型预测双层扭转角，覆盖六边形到三角形等多种几何构型。深度学习预测结果通过二次谐波产生和拉曼光谱验证，为扭转原子级薄CVD双层材料的自动化检测提供了新方案。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作开发了自动化识别CVD生长MoS₂薄片厚度及扭转角的可扩展方法。首先利用语义分割CNN识别单层/多层MoS₂，继而训练基于超过10,000张合成图像数据集的CNN模型预测双层扭转角，覆盖六边形到三角形等多种几何构型。深度学习预测结果通过二次谐波产生和拉曼光谱验证，为扭转原子级薄CVD双层材料的自动化检测提供了新方案。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.15960v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Two-dimensional materials are expected to play an important role in next-generation electronics and optoelectronic devices. Recently, twisted bilayer graphene and transition metal dichalcogenides have attracted significant attention due to their unique physical properties and potential applications. In this study we describe the use of optical microscopy to collect the color space of chemical vapor deposition (CVD) molybdenum disulfide (mboxMoS₂₎, and the application of a semantic segmentation convolutional neural network (CNN) to accurately and rapidly identify thicknesses of mboxMoS₂ flakes. A second CNN model is trained to provide precise predictions on the twist angle of CVD-grown bilayer flakes. This model harnessed a dataset comprising over 10,000 synthetic images, encompassing geometries spanning from hexagonal to triangular shapes. Subsequent validation of the deep learning predictions on twist angles was executed through the second harmonic generation and Raman spectroscopy. Our results introduce a scalable methodology for automated inspection of twisted atomically thin CVD-grown bilayer.
